authorBio:
Oh hi there! It's been a couple years since I updated my "about me" thing, so let's do this:

I'm Alison and I like to write when I'm not working full time in disability services. Somehow I've managed to publish three novels since I first started posting on Wattpad - In 27 Days (2017), The Silence Between Us (2019), and A Game Most Foul (2024) - and as my five year old says, "That's cool, mom." 📚

I also want to say thanks a million for all the love and continued support I get here. It's still surreal to look back and see how far I've come since 2011. (crap, I'm old.)

Check out my website for more info on all the bookish things I have going on:

www.alisongervais.com

Oh, and just in case you were curious... YES, there is still a movie for In 27 Days in the works! Unfortunately, the pandemic and the movie industry itself slowed things waaaaay down. Hopefully I will have more updates to share about this very soon!

(updated 8/18/24)

title: Love and Other Wicked Things
description:
One story, multiple ways to enjoy it! Read the bestselling published book right here as Wattpad Original or experience the story as a Webcomic on WEBTOON. Dive into the world of love and magic, any way you like to read.

***
Sometimes love is the strongest magic of all

***

Nineteen-year-old Rhia Greenbrook has lived in the sleepy town of Oakriver in a house with three generations of witches her entire life. Rhia draws her magic from the earth and likes to spend her time amongst plants and nature. Her practice is gentle, sacred, and-per her family's tradition-secret.

New-to-town witch Valerie Morgan is looking for answers about her mother's disappearance from Oakriver seventeen years ago. Without her mother's guidance, Valerie has cultivated her fire magic on her own and she makes no effort to keep her powers hidden. Although Rhia is immediately annoyed by Valerie's blatant use of magic, she can't deny the instant magnetism between them.

But amidst their magical connection, a dark presence looms over Oakriver. Unsettling visions from Rhia's grandmother and dangerous sleepwalking episodes throw into question Valerie's past and what role her presence plays in the strange happenings. And as Valerie gets tangled up further into the darkness, it's up to Rhia to tap into the full potential of her power in order to save the town she loves and the girl she's fallen for.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Tempting Fate
description:
When a young warrior-turned-spy finds a rare magic wielder her people thought extinct, she must make a decision: stay loyal to those she loves, or return to her people as a hero. 

Season 2 of The Fated Series

***

Secrets have been Brynn Alburn's companions since the moment her people left her for dead on the shores of the Western Shifter Territory. Having grown up among those once considered enemies, she's spent more time hiding from a dark past than living a peaceful life. But as the years pass, she's finally found herself settling into this new life with the shifters. 

Until she hears the whispers. Whispers of a separate kind of rare magic wielder-one her people thought extinct and have sought to return to their land.  

When the leader of the Western Shifter Territory asks her to help spy on the wielders and assist the neighboring Southern Shifter Territory, Brynn jumps at the chance to visit the territory directly connected to the rumors. Her visit leads her directly to Ronan, one of the deadliest shifters in all of Eravella, and a man she's inexplicably drawn to. 

Now, Brynn's been enlisted to help the Southern Shifter Territory rescue one of their own. The recovery effort puts her closer to Ronan, and gives her the chance to locate the treasure her people searched for. 

Except Ronan has a close eye on her, and he's refusing to let her keep her past buried deep where it belongs. Now she must fight her developing feelings, locate the wielder, and make the ultimate decision: protect the wielder and keep her secrets, or betray those she's come to love.

title: Witch Doctor
description:
Fall under the spell of Keira and Ryker as they work together find the killer behind the brutal deaths of Salem's Crossroads Coven.
  
  *****
  Dr. Keira Wynter, an Anthropology professor and expert in the occult, is called in to assist with an investigation that has her returning to a place she vowed she would never set foot in again.
  
  In one night, Salem has lost its most powerful coven and the only defense to keep the Crossroads closed. The city, a haven for witches, vampires and demons who hide in plain sight, is now under threat. No one is safe as the body count piles up, and  Keira must work with the local Sheriff to find out who's targeting the city's most powerful witches and why.
  
  As they begin to unravel the mystery, they discover things are not as they seem and come to the realization that there is a deadly force in play; a force willing to sacrifice anything and everything that gets in its way.
  
  With each step closer to the truth, Keira not only needs to deal with the ghosts of her past, but also contend with her attraction to Sheriff Ryker Kincaid, the vampire she is inexplicably drawn to.

I know I'm supposed to be dead. But for some reason, I'm not. I am Aramis Rayne. Occupation: Personal Assistant. Sounds boring, right? But the job description is a lot more complicated than that. Well, maybe because my boss is an Immortal. Now, I'm bound to him. And it all started on the day I died.

From childhood, Aramis already knows that she's different. All her life, she had isolated herself from everyone, but when she moves into a small town and meets an obnoxious, mysterious boy named Vincent Sinclair, her world is turned upside down. Her dream of a normal, boring life becomes out of reach when she is plunged into the world of 'Immortals' who are the keepers of balance between death and the living.
Now, Aramis is forced to choose: the world or her love?

title: Rebellion
description:
Picked for the WattVamps February Showcase & now a Wattpad Dark Fantasy featured story! 

The Risen Series - Book 1
Rebellion

I've been a cardholding member of the undead for centuries, torn away from the sun by a vampire with no care for human life. From the moment I opened my eyes to the night and had my first craving for blood, my Maker twisted and moulded me into exactly what he wanted; trapping me in his hold.

Until one day he let me go. 

Content to live out eternity as no more than a shadow, I do my best to stay out of trouble. But trouble always had a way of finding me. During a hunt, I run into another vampire doing his best to go unnoticed; one so ancient the air around him reeks of power, and he claims he's just escaped imprisonment from the very council that used me to their own ends. 

Atanas demands I help him until he regains his strength so he can finish what he started a century ago, but I'm not sure that's all he wants from me. And while I'm no supporter of the council he seeks vengeance against, there are secrets that bind my life to theirs, and I know better than most that disloyalty means death.

But in the shadows, a rebellion has been brewing, and I might be more important to both sides than I could ever have imagined.

title: The Devil's Son ✔
description:
Elizabeth de Baptiste never stood out much in school, she was a wallflower who blended into the vines that decorated Peril High. Just like all other girls in school she crushed on the school athlete; Jack Isle, the small-town jock star.

When Elizabeth one day stumbles into the Mythology section in the Library she finds a book per chance: the Grand Grimoire. Feeling drawn to the odd book she takes it home, finding that it contains spells, spells to make her get noticed by Jack Isle.

She could've never prepared herself for the next unfolding of events. She might've just accidentally and jokingly sold her soul to the Devil, literally. 

And his son is going to collect it. 

Most disturbingly, everything seems to point to Lucian Black, the school's rumoured bad boy, to be the man to do the deed. Is Lucian going after Elizabeth? And what will she do? 

Will he steal her soul, or her heart?

title: The Lost Hybrid (Completed)
description:
I felt the bed dip as he sat down on the other side but I focused solely on my task until I was done. "This is a pillow barrier. Meaning, you don't breach this side of the pillows." I instructed, my voice firm. 

"What if I don't want anything between us?" Phoenix said in a husky voice, and I risked a glance. 

Bad choice. 

His eyes were dark and his gaze was on my lips, to my chest, then back to my lips. 

"Eyes up here, buddy." I snapped the third time his eyes went down to my chest. 

All he did was turn off the lights. When it was dark, he whispered," Can't I admire what is mine?"

I had no answer, and turned on my side. 

He sighed. 

Despite taking two naps today, I was out cold the minute my head hit my pillow. I could only hope that in the morning, the pillow barrier was still there. 

*****

Adira has a secret, one she would do anything to protect.

She's built barriers around her heart, so strong that only the most powerful force could break them down. 

Adira was an Alpha's daughter, 19 years old, and didn't want a mate. She was too focused on figuring out what her deadly secret meant for her and those she loved. 

When she discovered her mate was Alpha Phoenix, she was sure the Moon Goddess was trying to punish her.  As truths unfold and loyalty is put to the test, her secret comes to light. Those she loves and the ones who would hurt her without a second thought find out, and she finds out a certain Twin has her in his sights. 

Will she open up to Phoenix? Will he break down her walls? 
Or will they both drown in truth's untold? 

(The first book in the Hybrid Series.)
#4 in Werewolf
#4 in Possessive mate
*You may cry, laugh, smile, curse and/or experience mood swings while reading*
* Warning: Not as cliche as it first seems:)*

title: BOOK 1: Forever Scarred ( From: The Series; BETRAYAL OF THE HEART)
description:
Mate," Xavier growled, the single word dripping with disdain rather than affection.

Felipe immediately stepped forward. "No," he said firmly, his voice steady despite the fear prickling at the edges of his resolve. "You already have a mate, Xavier. Hazel."

"Your already mated? I can smell her on you" Margie spat, overwhelmed by the fact that her mate is the alpha king and that he has already chosen someone even before he knew her.

Xavier's expression didn't falter, but his eyes briefly flicked to Felipe before returning to Margie.

"You're not worthy of me," Xavier sneered at Margie, his voice cold and cutting. "You're weak-pathetic. I don't want you, mortal."

💥

Margie's every waking moment is consumed by one person: Xavier, the powerful and ruthless alpha king. She's obsessed with him, her desire for him a burning fire that threatens to destroy her from the inside out.

But Xavier doesn't want her. He's made it clear that she's nothing but a mere mortal, unworthy of his love. He's chosen someone else, someone he deems worthy of his affection.

And yet, Margie can't help herself. She's drawn to Xavier's darkness, his power, and his unwavering rejection of her. She's determined to claim his heart, to break through his defenses and make him hers.

But her desire for him is a sickness, a poison that's eating away at her soul. She's consumed by visions of him, haunted by the memories of his touch. She's unable to eat, unable to sleep, unable to think of anything else but him.

Will Margie's all-consuming desire for Xavier ultimately be her downfall, or will she find a way to make him hers? Dive into the twisted world of Forever Scarred, where obsession, rejection, and desire collide in a tale of heartbreak and devastation.

title: The Rainy Cab Ride  | ✓
description:
When Nitara Koli is cheated by her 6-year long London boyfriend on a rainy night in the middle of a deserted street, she has nowhere to go.

Leaving his apartment with all her luggage in angst was definitely necessary, but intelligent? Perhaps, not. Having no place to go except a hotel until she rented a place back again for her to find residence in, she takes a cab. What she doesn't expect is for this sappy sad ride to turn into the best rainy cab ride she would ever have, hereafter. Until, it doesn't?

title: The Vigilante & The Dragon - Book 1 of the Guardians Saga [COMPLETED]
description:
#1 romance fantasy #1Dragonlove,  #2 Paranormal Romance highest rankings.

Awards: Short list of Writers Recognition Awards

Dark humor, justice, and love in the streets of New Orleans. Alex trawls the streets and alleys of New Orleans for pushers, pimps, and johns to beat senseless and leave naked in alleys. It's her revenge against the rapist stalking her. 

Morgan told her that he rescued her from the government agency that experimented on her and that she belongs to him. He had proven painfully to her that her new powers don't work against him. 

She escaped and her rage now falls on the others of his kind. Her goal is simple: take down the bad guys with her fun neuro-electric powers and snarky humor  until one of them finally kills her. 

When she interrupts a mugging, she realizes that she's rescued a humanoid dragon from his hunters. But are his hunters the same one chasing her? The ones racing against Morgan to find her? Can this dragon and his brothers save her from her course of self-destruction? Or will they be dragged down her spiral of revenge and dark humor ?

Note to reader : This book is not set in modern day New Orleans. This is a mixture of the New Orleans of my childhood, the New Orleans before Hurricane Katrina, and part fantasy. After Katrina, I needed some fantasy about New Orleans as well.

Insert here the usual legal warnings about copyright and that this work belongs to me, and I will prosecute for any unauthorized reproduction, theft, etc.  I have a law firm on retainer: truth.
Also any resemblance to actual people or characters is unintended.

Thanks to @cocosghost for my new cover!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Welcome to my profile , whether by intent or Happy Accident!
I love this crazy community of commenters and authors. Thanks to all who encourage me. I pray to do the same for you.

When it's raining, I want my books to be the invitation to come inside a warm house. Paraphrase from Story Embers podcast.

My various interests/obsessions (don't judge me!)
-reading Fantasy, paranormal romance/action, sci-fi
-Artemis Fowl [you HP and PJ fans have a treat in store for you if you read this! Or listen to the luscious Irish voice narrating it on Audible.]
-the book Heaven by Randy Alcorn (it has a whole chapter on why we will be reunited with our pets !!!)

I'm a very flawed follower of Christ, so any mistakes are mine, not His.

I also have been dubbed "The Dragon Editor" for my critiques [@DianaTheThird, a very talented writer who asks for more of my critiques]. I always mean my comments with "join in the fun and let's make this book reach 28 MILLION reads." I will also apologize if my comments hurt your feelings. I never mean that.

My book Guardians is dedicated to Shared Hope International, the real heroes in the real world. They rescue victims of sex trafficking in USA and oversees. May God bless them and their work.

title: DEVIL IN THE HIGH SCHOOL
description:
---
Lucky ni kijana mwenye uwezo wa kipekee wa kuona mambo yasiyo ya kawaida-vitu vya kiroho, majini, wachawi, na nafsi za waliokufa. Uwezo huu unamuweka kwenye ulimwengu tofauti na wa ajabu, ambapo anakuwa na marafiki watatu wa kipekee: Nasri, rafiki yake wa kiume ambaye ni binadamu wa kawaida; Sasha, Dracula mwenye nguvu za ajabu; na jini mwenye hekima na siri nyingi.

Baada ya kumaliza elimu yake ya sekondari, Lucky anafaulu kujiunga na shule ya advance, ambayo pia ina chuo kikuu. Huko ndiko ambapo maisha yake yanaanza kupatwa na changamoto bwa. Shule hii inajulikana kwa kuwa na viumbe vingi vya kishetani, na kila siku huleta hatari mpya.

Katika siku yake ya kwanza, Lucky anapata chumba cha malazi kilichokuwa na historia ya ajabu-kila mwanafunzi aliyekaa humo alikufa siku ya pili. Lakini Lucky, akiwa na uwezo wake wa kiroho, anapaswa kuamua kama atakubali changamoto hii au atakutana na hatima ya kutisha.

Je, Lucky atafanikiwa kuishi katika shule hii iliyojaa giza na uchawi, au atakutana na hatima inayomsubiri kila mwanafunzi aliyekaa katika chumba hicho? Usikose kusoma hadithi hii yenye siri, ujasiri, na mapambano ya kiroho.
---

title: Record: Zero
description:
Was it seven years ago?

"Your child might have schizophrenia."

No, that's not it.

"Look, he's talking to himself again."

I didn't.

"Ugh, creepy. Don't get too close to him!"

Why?

"Tch, that freak just laughed for no reason."

Why can't any of you see her?

This is the story of Damien, a man long ridiculed as mad and delusional for claiming to have an 'imaginary friend'. It has been years since he last encountered this mysterious companion, and just as he begins to move on and bury the memories of his past, his life takes a dramatic turn. Strange events unfold, drawing Damien into the dark and chaotic world of the supernatural. A place where secrets are revealed, danger lurks and all hell breaks loose.

===

title: The GIFTED CURSE
description:
" The Gifted Curse"

Veronica was an ordinary college girl living a happy life with her loving parents. But from the moment she was born, her weak eyesight made it impossible for her to see her parents clearly. Her life took a tragic turn when her mother's untimely accident changed everything. Veronica received her mother's eyes through a transplant-a gift that brought both joy and sorrow.

These new eyes allowed Veronica to see the world like never before, but they also came with a chilling secret. She started seeing things no ordinary person could see-visions, shadows, and mysteries that were too dangerous to ignore. As her life turned into an unending adventure filled with danger and uncertainty, Veronica uncovered secrets about her mother's past that could change everything.

What lies behind the power of her mother's eyes? Will Veronica be able to handle the extraordinary life she's been thrust into, and can she save herself from the looming dangers?

Dive into Veronica's thrilling journey filled with mystery, adventure, and a race to uncover the truth in "The Gifted Curse."

stay tuned . ........

title: The Boy In Her Dream
description:
"Mom! Dad! I'm terrified!" Elie shouted, her voice trembling with fear. "Listen, my brave little one," Penelope urged, urgency gripping her tone. "We have to finish the ritual to cloak her wolf-there's no time to lose!" Beta Elisa leaned down; her eyes filled with determination. "I know it's hard, sweetheart. But just close your eyes. All the pain will fade away and remember-Mommy and Daddy love you more than anything!" Elie took a shaky breath, feeling the weight of their love pushing back against the darkness. The air crackled with anticipation as they prepared to confront the unknown!

title: Valkyre ~ The Last She Wolf
description:
She was the last female wolf alive, the last hope of the pack's survival-a featus for the offspring and, sadly, only one for the thousands. For years, she was hidden behind humanity and the gigantic walls of the Demigods' Kingdoms-the sapiens with the Godly powers.

But, as soon as she turned sixteen, she started to feel changes in her body. The changes no one could explain to her. Her parents, in a hurry to marry her off, sent her away, oceans away, to keep her safe.

But, through her scent, the Eclipsia Essence was the sweetest fruit to the male wolves - something that they never tasted, smelled delicious and actually powerful.

A war had been waged amongst the packs to win her. Everyone wanted her, even if for only once. Every wolf, even the strongest Alphas of the Seven Kingdoms, desired her.

She was Valkyre, the gifted, the Goddess' child, but she could not escape men.

They tormented her in every possible way, but she was the only one who could change their future and their destinies, and no one knew how, why and when.

A sixteen-year-old, confused Princess, unaware of her powers, is thrown among the hungry male wolves each day with a new challenge, and still, the most powerful Luna of the Seven Kingdoms-Valkyre-rises.

The story contains highly mature content. Only Sixteen and above are advised.

Update Schedule - Free Chapter Every Saturday at 7 PM

title: Cloud Piercer
description:
Shifters never mingle with humans. They reside high in the mountains venturing below only once a year for the night of the Red Moon. They invade the human villages below, take and kill who they want, but they never leave any witnesses. Not before Freya.

Season 1 of Cloud Piercer

*****

18-year-old Freya Raune will do anything to find out why the shifters took her brother. And that includes searching for the deserters, an elusive rebel group determined to end the shifters' rule. 

But as the next Red Moon approaches and the mysterious yet charismatic Killian Li sweeps into her village, Freya is forced to be more careful. Those caught fraternizing with the deserters are murdered, and Killian's arrival is a reminder that nobody can be trusted--even those Freya is closest to.

title: The Spirits' Feast
description:
This short poem foreshadows the Spirits' Feast, an annual holiday that takes place in the magical country of Aurelia (the world crafted in my spooky YA fantasy, the Aurelian Legacy). For one day, the magic that binds ghosts to their places of death is lifted, allowing spirits to leave the premises on which they died and roam the land. Some ghosts will inevitably use this day for ill. The aims of others are far less sinister than us mortals might believe.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm in the process of publishing my first full-length novel, the Aurelian Legacy. I've been working on developing the idea for over four years, so this story is very near and dear to me. It is meant to be the first of an eight-book series. At a minimum, I will upload a new chapter every week.

When I'm not writing, I'm usually found binge-watching Buffy reruns or crossing off spots from my travel bucket list (most recently, Nicaragua and Antarctica). As you may have already guessed from my story, I adore the spooky season.

Note: I will not do V4V's. But I will do R4R's when stories are of mutual interest. I will gladly offer constructive feedback on the books of others during R4Rs if they request it and offer the same courtesy on mine.

title: Her Hidden Half (War Songs of the Courts #1)
description:
Fate has promised me the shittiest ever after...

Death. 

Fortunately, I've never been very good at accepting bullshit endings.

    Echo Wilde grew up with a gift she never wanted. 

    She could see the creatures that starred in both fairy tales and horror stories alike.

    Now, at nineteen, she's finally living her life the way she wants.

    That all comes to an abrupt stop when she finds herself torn from her life and thrown in the middle of the world she never wanted to be apart of.

    Navigating the Courts, she will have to find a way to survive where she is destined to die. 

    But what if survival comes in the form of a vampire with dark eyes and an agenda; a common enemy of the Courts?

    #4 in Paranormal 02-22-2018
    #5 in Paranormal 02-23-2018
    #6 in Paranormal 03-21-2018

title: Saving Sunset
description:

Sunset Van Helsing had no choice.

As a female alpha, it is her responsibility to keep the pack safe, yet she doesn't have any more options left. After all, vampires suddenly started to exist again...

No vampire existed after the 21st century due to a mysterious disease, but the sudden rise of vampires escalated fast. Causing fear against the other supernatural beings from an upcoming war, meaning it will also affect humanity's modern race. 

But with no other option, Sunset offers a deal with the leader of supernatural hunters, Asher Morningstar. Forced to work with him and his people to stop the vampires from increasing, in exchange for their safety within her pack under the Werewolf King's order. 

What would happen if Asher and Sunset were fated mates? If so, why doesn't Asher feel the bond with Sunset?

description:
ONC 2023 Shortlist 

Astrid, the Princess of Eurovea, a country existing several centuries in the future, had led a happy and sheltered life in the castle ruled by Regent Arcturus, her uncle.

Only on reaching the age of ascension when, according to an ancient tradition, all future queens must face a trial, she realised that there were great gaps in her knowledge of the world around her, her uncle, and even the people she thought she knew well.

In a world where love doesn't exist, a young girl who understands old novels better than her reality is sent on a dangerous quest to save her country from creatures who, just like love, were not supposed to be true...

Mystery, romance, adventure, and magic combine in this tale, in which a young princess who had grown up surrounded by an impenetrable web of lies, has to find her true identity, and free her kingdom from suffering. 

A young-adult, dystopian, paranormal fantasy-romance.

The wonderful cover created by @WakeWriteWrath

title: Stranger
description:
An unusual power. A dead body. Nowhere to turn.

By the time she gets to the Academy for Peculiars, Sophie Harper has already killed a man. The superhuman strength she was born with and abandoned because of means she's a peculiar, but her unique gift still alienates her from her peculiar peers because of its rarity.

As she settles into her new home, she struggles to catch up with schoolwork, and starts falling for her infuriating trainer, a rugged shifter named Will, despite the fact that a relationship between them is forbidden.

Sophie should be focused on fitting in, but she can't change that she's different, even among peculiars. So when she finds out there's one other person with her same preternatural gift, she yearns to learn more about him. Only problem is, he's someone everyone refuses to discuss.

Especially with her.

Fans of paranormal academy romance, X-Men and The Umbrella Academy are binge-reading a new paranormal academy romance saga!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: If growing up in Orange County taught me anything, it life isn't as perfect as it seems. My characters struggle against beautiful backdrops that turn into characters themselves. Though it doesn't rain much where I live, rain is absolutely necessary to help my characters grow. When I'm not binge-watching Netflix to gather inspiration for my latest book, I'm plotting my own stories filled with mystery, forbidden romance, and increasingly difficult obstacles my characters are forced to overcome. I'm a USA Today Best Selling author three times over and I look forward to creating new content!

title: His to haunt or his to protect. [SLOW UPDATES]
description:
Mia Anderson, a stunning wildlife photographer, has always embraced a life of freedom, traveling the globe with her camera in tow. However, what unfolds when her carefree demeanor leads her to a haunted mansion, nestled within the dense forests of Scotland, is a meeting with Edward Collin that could change everything.

Kyle McAndrew, Mia's dashing colleague with striking hazel brown eyes, impeccably styled brown hair, and a charming face complemented by a physique that leaves many swooning, has joined her and two others in the mansion. Will he succeed in shielding Mia from the impending danger? Or will Mia choose to embrace the danger itself?

Edward Collin was one of the wealthiest and most handsome men of his era. A striking figure, he had beautiful dirty blonde hair and greenish-blue eyes that resembled a hunter's gaze. His body was lean, with well-defined muscles and a golden, sun-kissed complexion.

But tragically, he was...

Edward was dead...

So, how would Mia ever meet him?

Will Mia be able to figure out what she actually wants?

title: Caught between realms
description:
This book is a sequel to my first book, Broken. I recommend you read it before this one.

This book follows Nevel and Ivy as they grow and learn to use the gifts they happen to be born with. 

What happens when the young prince and his red headed companion are sucked into a portal with no way out?


The light came brighter as some sort of vacuum sucked us in. 

"What's going on?" Nevel asked holding onto the door handle. "Ivy, grab my hand." He screamed as I got closer and closer.

He let go of the handle quickly grabbing my hand. The force was too strong. 

We both found ourselves being sucked into the purple light.



Where are we, Ivy?" I asked. I looked around but Ivy wasn't here. No.

"Ivy?" I called. No response. You've got to be kidding me.

'Lei?' I called through the mindlink. Nothing. 'Alex? Cece? Cole? Dad? Ivy? Anyone?' I growled frustrated. 

No response.

title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children by Ransom Riggs
description:
Goodreads Choice AwardNominee for Favorite Book of 2011 (2011)
Nominee for Readers' Favorite Young Adult Fantasy & Science Fiction (2011)
Alternate Cover edition for ISBN 9781594744761

A mysterious island. An abandoned orphanage. A strange collection of very curious photographs. It all waits to be discovered in Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children, an unforgettable novel that mixes fiction and photography in a thrilling reading experience. As our story opens, a horrific family tragedy sets sixteen-year-old Jacob journeying to a remote island off the coast of Wales, where he discovers the crumbling ruins of Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children. As Jacob explores its abandoned bedrooms and hallways, it becomes clear that the children were more than just peculiar. They may have been dangerous. They may have been quarantined on a deserted island for good reason. And somehow-impossible though it seems-they may still be alive. A spine-tingling fantasy illustrated with haunting vintage photography, Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children will delight adults, teens, and anyone who relishes an adventure in the shadows.

title: the twins of Terror
description:
Eighteen-year-old twins, Berea and Brandon, desperate for independence and a fresh start, inherit a decaying Victorian mansion. Initially thrilled by the eccentric property, they soon discover a sinister secret: the mansion is haunted by a malevolent spirit that ruthlessly eliminates any trespassers. As the twins delve deeper into the mansion's chilling history, they uncover a tragic past involving the original owner's obsession with the occult and his tragic downfall. Forced to confront the supernatural forces within the mansion, Berea and Brandon must unravel the ghostly mystery and break the deadly curse before they become the spirit's next victims. This thrilling tale of supernatural horror will keep readers on the edge of their seats as the twins fight for their lives against an unseen enemy.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Rudy Valentino, at 32, is a whirlwind of conflicting emotions bottled within a lanky frame. His mind, a chaotic orchestra of thoughts, is a constant symphony of words, both spoken and unspoken. He lives in a world of stories, where reality often fades into the background, replaced by fantastical landscapes and characters that whisper their tales in the quiet corners of his imagination.

Writing is his sanctuary, his refuge from the anxieties that gnaw at him. It's a desperate attempt to capture the fleeting moments of beauty, the raw emotions that threaten to consume him. Each sentence, each carefully chosen word, is a piece of himself laid bare on the page, a vulnerable confession of his deepest fears and desires.

title: Counterpart (GirlxGirl) Editing Slowly
description:
Cold, Distant, Dangerous, Powerful, a killer are some of the things that describes Aliana. But there is one more. Lonely. 

Years of killing has turned her into an emotionless killer, she doesn't care what you think of her, just don't get in her way.

 Out of nowhere she experiences something she thought lost to her. Love. Will she accept it or let it go?

Shy, Useless, a nobody is how many describe Kassandra. Since her fathers betrayl, She is treated as an outcast.

She meets a girl with dead eyes and forms and instant connection with her, but will fear of rejection keep from reaching for what she wants?

title: HEDOSCHISM: WATTY AWARD WINNER
description:
**FEATURED STORY JULY 2018* 
**WATTPAD HQ READ OF THE WEEK AUGUST 2018*
**WATTYS 2018 WINNER** 

Casey Brogan is on a mission to self-destruct. Whether it's booze, drugs or men, she's spiralling out of control and stepping over the line, to destroy the demons of her past and herself in the process. 
  
  Ethan Drake isn't looking to be anyone's saviour. He has enough demons of his own and a legacy he'd do anything to avoid. 
  
  Following a near-fatal overdose, Casey discovers a world beyond the one she knows, one where dark creatures wage an age-old war and where nobody is who they appear to be. Now hunted by those who want their world to remain a secret, she must decide whether she can put her trust in Ethan, or whether he is just as much a threat as those that want her dead. 
  
  After a lifetime of trying to destroy herself, Casey is about to do just about anything to keep herself alive.

title: The Cabinet of Wonders
description:
The moon is believed to be created by the moon Goddess as a gift to all human and magical beings. 
An altar to truly honor the beauty and greatness of the said Goddess, as it is said that those who pray and believe, without doubts and misconceptions, only by the goodness of their heart, are able to receive the magical blessings that one would only dream of.

Astrea Windrune, haunted by her nightmares decides to move to a small town near the border of Thornfell, a town she has seen many times but only in her dreams. Or so it seems. With no one but herself to rely on, she tries her best to forget what she is and the monsters that is running from. Although that seems to be impossible seeing as she may not be that different from them after all.

Upon the discoverance of a mysterious little shop,she starts to suspect that things may not be as they seem. With a curious mind and a heart set in stone she opens the doors to what would inevitably change her fate. For better or for worse that remains to be seen.

A witch, a golden compass, a peculiar little box and some butterflies are enough to kick start the journey of a lifetime.

With that let us uncover the hidden mysteries within the depths of The Cabinet Of Wonders.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
‎˚ ༘ ೀ⋆｡˚ ʚɞ ⁺˖ ⸝⸝ NightFall Butterfly ‎˚ ༘ ೀ⋆｡˚ ʚɞ ⁺˖ ⸝⸝

Hidden beneath a canopy of whispering trees, Nightfall Butterfly is a place where the night is never fully dark, and the moonlight dances on the wings of midnight butterflies.

These elusive creatures, with their iridescent wings, flutter between shadows and light, guardians of secrets that no mortal eye has fully seen.

It is said that anyone who dares wander too deep into these stories may catch a fleeting glimpse of a figure-or perhaps a memory-that will linger long after they've left.

title: Bloodlust: A Tale Of Reincarnated Lovers
description:
Being reincarnated as a vampire was the last thing Phoenix thought could have been the curse for breaking out of the underworld.

Now cursed with an uncontrollable thirst for blood on a full moon, Phoenix must quickly find the one person that can break him free of the curse before the next full moon.

But, once again, things don't go as planned as Phoenix lands into the palms of a refined vampire family whose aim is to raise a coven who can withstand bloodlust.

In the meantime, Pheonix tries to blend into this new environment, his eyes set on his cure, his lover in his past life. But he isn't the only one who needs her...

Will he be able to protect her from those who seek the powers she unconsciously possess? Or should we ask the more important question: Will he be able to control his bloodlust when he sees her...

...because when the prophecy begins and the rolls of secrets start to unfurl, blood is a necessity and the center of it all: the problem and its solution...

--------------------------------------------------------

authorBio:
Just joined, at whatever time the date down there says, but I'm not a rookie - at least I don't think I am.

I'm a young and passionate writer who started writing at eight for a very queer reason (out of envy, and not jealousy, for a fellow classmate). She managed to spread the craze to the entire class and I also fell for it. Although, looking back now I have a feeling of respect for her. Working on my first few, but I must say that you're at the right place if you're looking for hot sci-fi, fantasy, thriller or paranormal books laced with controversial themes and action with the right pinch of romance.

All you just need to do is hop on and lemme take you to cloud nine...

***

I'll try to update my debut novel, Bloodlust: A tale of reincarnated lovers, regularly, say once a week. It's a great piece and you should check it out.

title: The Grim Reaper's Dahlia
description:
'A Devil is not to be trusted' they say but can you trust humans?

 In a world where death is her only escape, Lore who is abused, broken and diagnosed with Addison's disease feels her mortal life slowly fade away. But she knows better than anyone that death finds its victim not the other way around when depression hits her. 
 Lore's encounter with The Grim Reaper, Adion and the Queen Iza of the Souls realm- ' Yoru' makes her life a living hell. A queen who has a twisted sense of justice and a weird way of having fun puts her in a life in turmoil. Adion who pays loyalty to the Queen of the realm can't help but fall for Lore who is a 'mere human'. 

 Lore's life now filled with dark twists must tackle them in order to fight DEATH herself because Death always takes away one or the other. 

 Will Lore choose death's embrace as she always wished for or fight her way to bring everything back to its place?

 This is a haunting tale of justice, forbidden love and blurred lines between life and death. Finding life in the face of death is the cruellest thing Lore will face during this quest or maybe not... she is yet to face more pain than she can handle.

On hiatus due to personal reasons ( will come back when I sort things out)

NOTE : this story contains underlying mature themes such as depression, torture, violence, child abuse, assault, suicide etc...

DISCLAIMER: 
The events, circumstances, places and characters in the Story are purely imaginative and fictional 

THIS WORK IS COPYRIGHTED© 
PLAGIARISM IS STRICTLY PROHIBITED AND COULD ATTRACT LEGAL ACTION IN CASE OF BREACH.

title: The Stone-Hearted Alpha
description:
"He is cursed to lose his fated mate; She loses everyone she loves."

Everyone Cess loves always dies. She believes it's a curse she carries and tries to protect those around her from her deadly curse, vowing never to love again. However, there's one wolf she cannot help but love-her fated mate. To keep him safe from her curse, she seeks the help of a powerful witch, uncertain if the witch can assist her.

Cess is captured after finding the witch. She is shocked to discover she's now on the territory of the most feared Alpha and her fated mate is far more dangerous than the curse she believes she carries; She may be the one who needs saving from him instead.

Hoax by a witch to lose his fated mates, Alpha Gunner realizes that he and Cess share a common bond, they are both suffering from the pain of loss. When secrets are revealed Alpha Gunner learns that Cess is the one to get him close to the witch to avenge her, thus allowing him to seek revenge and break his curse.

But can Cess withstand the Alpha's curse knowing they're both connected and understanding the truth about her curse? And is Alpha Gunner's heart hard enough to play his part in their intertwined fates?

title: Bound by Twilight
description:
If you're a fan of Twilight and Vampire Diaries, then this book is just for you.

Genre: Paranormal Romance / Urban Fantasy  

Premise:  
In a secluded coastal town, the night sky is split by mysterious auroras that appear every decade, bringing with them whispers of an ancient curse. 17-year-old Sienna Hawthorne, new to town after a family tragedy, quickly discovers the locals' odd traditions of staying indoors after sundown and avoiding the sea cliffs.  

Her curiosity leads her to the enigmatic Luxford twins, Aurelius and Selene, who harbor a dangerous secret-they belong to an ancient bloodline cursed to serve as the guardians of a rift between worlds. The auroras signal the rift weakening, threatening to unleash creatures of chaos into their world.  

Drawn to Aurelius's dark charm and Selene's quiet intensity, Sienna becomes entwined in their centuries-long struggle. But her involvement awakens something dormant within her-a latent power that ties her to the rift and a prophecy that could either save the world or destroy it.  

As love and loyalty blur, Sienna must choose between her growing affection for Aurelius, her unyielding bond with Selene, and her own destiny. With the clock ticking and the auroras intensifying, Sienna must navigate a supernatural world filled with rival clans, forbidden magic, and the weight of a decision that could reshape reality itself.

authorBio:
✣ ┅ ABOUT ┅ ✣

Wattys 2023 Winner
Multi-Featured Author
5x Wattys Shortlister
2x ONC Honourable Mention

You can call me August, but I will also be summoned by cool pond bugs and/or pictures of cats.

I'm a queer spec fic writer with a fondness for tossing characters into things they think they aren't prepared for. Most of my work is Dark Fantasy or Horror, but I cross paths with Sci-Fi, Paranormal, and Romance more often than not.

If my books have anything in common, it's wild settings, happy endings, casual rep, and kickass disaster queers being disasters but also kickass!

In the normal world, I work for the UN, wait on two cats, and keep Carassius and Corixidae in outdoor aquaria. I am five years old inside.

I wasn't kidding about the pond bugs.

title: The Destruction of Angels - An Urban Fantasy
description:
I had one job to do. Only one, and that was to protect him. And through all his lifetimes and for thousands of years that's exactly what I did. 

Until I started visiting Hell. I knew it was something I should not have done. I had no business there. But memories from the past pulled me in. And I started spending more and more time in Hell with my old acquaintances who'd fallen. And it rekindled a centuries-old obsession I thought was long dead.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Always trying to escape the mundane by fantasizing about monsters and supernatural things.
In my spare time, I like to write about those things.

Garrison Keillor

Stripped of his past and cursed with immortality, he wanders through centuries of isolation, burdened by guilt and the weight of his forbidden actions. Can he find redemption, or is he doomed to exist in the ashes of his past?

title: Rogue Mate | ENG
description:
Owen Ashford, beta of the Ashenclaw Pack, is a strong and respected leader within one of Europe's most influential werewolf packs. When Sabine, a rogue werewolf, unexpectedly crosses his path, their eyes meet, and they instantly recognize each other as mates. Terrified of the bond, Sabine flees, unwilling to confront the connection. Owen, determined to find her, abandons an important meeting to search. As Sabine hides, struggling with the fear of her past and the pack, Owen relentlessly pursues, caught between his duty and the undeniable bond. Will Sabine face her destiny, or continue running from the truth?

title: The Ghost of Willow Creek
description:
When aspiring photographer, Lily, moves to the eerie town of Willow Creek, she discovers a hidden history of ghostly encounters and a chilling secret tied to the town's abandoned mansion. As she delves deeper, she uncovers a tragic love story from the past and finds herself drawn to the enigmatic ghost of a young woman who haunts the mansion. But as Lily unravels the mystery, she realizes she's not just uncovering the past - she's also putting herself in grave danger.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: City of Blood
description:
After picking the wrong pocket, street rat Lumi finds herself entangled in the dangerous world of notorious pirate lord, Rook.

Lumi's past is a mystery she can't seem to unravel. When Rook discovers she can read the ancient dialect on his treasure map-a language long extinct-he decides to keep her close. He buys her freedom, but there's a catch: first, she must join him on his treasure hunt.

Before handing her over to Rook, Lumi's master makes one final promise-Lumi's stolen memories will be returned if she brings back Rook's head.

Caught between a chance to reclaim her past and a growing attraction to Rook, Lumi faces an impossible choice: claim the memories she's desperate for, or follow her heart into uncharted waters. In a world where betrayal is as common as the tides, Lumi must decide if the past is worth the price, or if the future is worth the risk.

~updates every friday~
~early access on patreon~
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Wishing Games
description:
Six contestants compete for the ultimate prize: one wish.

When reclusive billionaire, Dorian James, decides to host a game show, he promises that the contestant who completes three trials will earn one wish from him. Nothing is off limits.

Calliope has no memory prior to her accident, no luck and, since she can't keep a job, no money. She's plagued by a reoccurring dream of an empty field, so unlike the crowded world she lives in. When a man begins to invade her dream claiming to love her, she grows suspicious of her own mind and desires. The suspicion only grows as thoughts of hellish demons begin to haunt her at every turn. Out of sheer desperation, she auditions for The Wishing Game, hoping to gain a cure for her sanity or the money to have herself committed. With little hope in being cast and even less hope in winning, Calli can only hope to stay sane long enough before her mind consumes her.
 
But behind the movie magic of the gameshow, a sinister plot is in play and humanity is at stake.

Each contestant will be tested. The line between what is real and what is movie magic will blur. 
In the end, one wish is at all it takes. 

To either save them or damn them all to hell.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I enjoy reading mostly fantasy romance, whether mild or spicy, and spend my free time writing it as well.
I plan on trying to do at least weekly chapter drops.
I have three novels I'm currently working on. That's right! Currently. . . as in I can't help but bounce back and forth. I know focusing on one would get the story out faster but it's the only way I know how to do things.
The first novel is loosely titled "Red". It's a first-person narrative about a girl who suffers tragic loses and discovers she's a werewolf while navigating grief, love and prophecy. It's a bit on the mature side.
"New Planet," that is more dystopian romance.
And "The Wishing Games," this one is light dystopian and very early stages.
I have a few other story ideas I'm milling around that I'll hopefully get around to writing this year, so be on the lookout.
I am not great with the whole "read for read" scene.  I enjoy happily stumbling into a great read. That being said, I don't mind read requests but I might not read it if it's not the genre I prefer. I don't read fanfiction at all.
I am open to criticism, however I'm not looking to undo main themes, etc. I have posted to sites in the past where people have been a little hypercritical. I'm not looking to be the next Neil Gaiman or Sarah J Maas. I'm not even looking to be the next Stephanie Meyer. I'm just looking to write what I love and share it.
XOXO JG 11/30/24

title: How to break a soul
description:
16 year old Christie Keller is abducted by an alien race called the Nameless and taken to another dimension. Imprisoned inside the space ship Aegis, she meets the speedster Alan, the nymph I'vinie, Bruce who can bend earth, Ilene the pirate witch and Gaile the elf. Christie undergoes combat training with her friends. She is forced to take part in trails that take place inside the central dome, an artificially constructed habitat that combines a variety of different magical domains housing many magical entities including dwarves, dragons, mermaids and ghouls. The teams fights for survival and while reliving some of the toughest moments of their lives. At the end of trials many inmates are dead or injured allowing the Nameless to experiment on them to their hearts desires. Christie's body and soul is ripped apart as foreign elements are integrated into her after being defeated and almost killed in a battle with a dragon. Later another alien ship, infiltrated by federal agents, arrives with more prisoners. Among them Christie meets a spy capable of manipulating time, Serena who helps her and her friends to flee. Wanting to aid in their escape she struggles to use the powers of her alter self, Maeve who doesn't hesitate to do what needs to be done for self preservation, including going on a murder spree against the control of the sweet and preserved Christie.
Tous Droits Réservés

A Taekook fanfiction set in a post-apocalyptic world. Slow-burn romance, action-packed plot, and a fight for survival."

title: Diary of A Monster Babysitter
description:
Diary of a Monster Babysitter

Premise:
Life was already complicated for 14-year-old Rowan Blake-navigating high school, dealing with nosy neighbors, and trying to earn a little extra cash babysitting. But when Rowan accidentally takes a babysitting job for the Grimms, the strangest family in town, things take a wild turn.

Their kids aren't just difficult-they're monsters. And not just the metaphorical kind. Between fire-breathing tantrums, werewolf howling at bedtime, and a vampire toddler who refuses to drink anything but "premium Type O," Rowan has no idea how to survive the night, let alone the rest of the job.

The diary captures Rowan's hilarious and heartwarming misadventures as a monster babysitter, from handling supernatural crises to discovering that even monsters have a softer side.

title: The shadow city
description:
Here's a small introduction for the story:

*"The Shadow City"*

In a world where darkness and light collide, a young girl named Emilia discovers that she is the key to unlocking the secrets of the Shadow City, a mysterious realm that exists parallel to the mortal world. With the help of Elijah, a mysterious ally, Emilia must navigate the treacherous landscape of the Shadow City, confronting ancient powers, hidden enemies, and her own destiny. But as she delves deeper into the heart of the city, Emilia begins to realize that nothing is as it seems, and that the truth about her past, her powers, and her very existence is far more sinister than she ever imagined.

title: Blackthorn Academy
description:
When Elliot Grayson arrives at the foreboding Blackthorn Academy, he is prepared for loneliness, strict teachers, and the icy indifference of his peers. What he doesn't expect is the strange chill that clings to the school's halls or the haunting whispers that seem to follow him at night. As Elliot struggles to find his place, he encounters two unlikely companions: a quirky outcast with a fascination for the supernatural-and a mysterious girl whose sadness seems as deep as the shadows surrounding her.

Drawn to the secrets buried within the academy's walls, Elliot is pulled into a web of betrayal, guilt, and a long-forgotten tragedy. But some truths refuse to remain hidden, and the past has a way of reaching out for those who dare to uncover it.

In the end, Elliot must face not only the darkness of Blackthorn but also the ghosts that linger in his own heart.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Victor R. Mortis | Purveyor of dark tales and twisted fates. I find beauty in shadows and solace in the strange. Expect tales of gothic horrors, melancholic musings, and characters who dance with darkness. | Join me on this journey through the macabre and the fantastical.

title: Fire and Magic (The Jadori Book 1)
description:
A girl who sees ghosts. A magic out of control. A group hellbent on destroying what they're afraid of.

Maddie Johnson is sent to a mental institution because she talks to people who aren't there. She insists that they're ghosts. Just as she thinks she's convinced the doctors that she is fine, a dark-haired ghost with dreamy brown eyes rushes in and ruins everything.

Instead of going home, she is sent to a halfway house that helps people with mental illness assimilate back into society. Problem is, one of the residents hates her and the house is haunted - oh, and the cute ghost has followed her. Maddie tries to get away, but then she hurts someone using magic she didn't know she possessed. Now she has a new problem. She will have to learn to control her magic.

She discovers that the town has secrets; people are going missing. How far are people willing to go to destroy what they are afraid of? Maddie and her attractive-but-annoying spirit might just find out first-hand.

FIRE AND MAGIC is an exciting first book in the Jadori Series that will transport romantasy fans to a fascinating world that exists within our own, filled with suspense, danger, magic, ghosts, and romance.

© 2024 Susan McKenzie. All rights reserved.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Sue is an Australian author who loves creating worlds of fantasy and science fiction with fascinating characters and slow-burn low-spice romance.
She loves stories that hit you in the feels.

Her books are full of interesting and relatable characters who use their psychic abilities or magical powers to fight their way out of trouble.

She's not a typical author coffee addict - but chocolate? Now that's a different story. When she's not writing, she loves to paint, draw and play the guitar.

https://reamstories.com/susanmckenzie

title: DAYA- I am human
description:
The story of an African girl who faces challenges due to her unique physical appearance and is initially outcast by her mother and community. Despite these hardships, she demonstrates remarkable resilience and determination as she navigates her difficult circumstances on the streets, ultimately striving to rise above her situation and become an empowered and influential woman.

title: New Beginnings: A Story in The Cthulhu Mythos
description:
With the help of modern technology, the unthinkable goal of the Cthulhu cult is closer than ever to being realized. As the remaining days before the opening of a cosmic portal that will unleash incomprehensible horrors on the world wane, Professor Henry Silberhutte and his team must find a way to stop them. But the revelation of a secret threatens the team. Will the Professor and John Steele, the team's strongest warrior, prevail against the Cthulhu chaos worshipers?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
AUTHOR BIO

Dr. Thomas Davison has taught college coursework inside two State Prisons in Ohio for the past eight years. His observations and interactions with his incarcerated students have deeply moved him. This motivated him to create poems and short stories about their daily lives and experiences. Thomas has recently started a not-for-profit Entrepreneur Services for Felons (ESF). He has dedicated 100% of his writing earnings to providing free one-on-one support services for felons and ex-felons. Dr. Davison has created two Writing Clubs within the prisons. These incarcerated students are his beta readers to ensure he speaks in their voice and keeps it honest.

His published novels include:

The Boy With Strange Eyes: award-winning YA Fantasy.

Different Prisons: NF-Memoirs, Dr. Davison's personal story about teaching inside the prisons. 

How to Write a Winning Dissertation:  Academic how to book.

title: Visions of Fate
description:
"UNLOCK THE SECRETS OF THE CHRONOKEEPER" 

                                  †

In a world where visions and prophecies collide, 17-year-old Emily discovers her hidden past and the mysterious legacy of the Visionari. With the help of her boyfriend Ethan, she unravels the truth about her family's ancient powers and the deadly rivalry with the Vegants.

As Emily navigates her newfound abilities and confronts the darkness of her destiny, she must choose between embracing her true identity as the Chronokeeper or succumbing to the shadows of her past. With time travel, romance, and self-discovery, Emily's journey will leave you breathless.

Will she find the strength to protect her loved ones and unite the Visionari, or will the Vegants silence her forever? Dive into this thrilling tale of magic, mystery, and adventure to find out!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Welcome to my world of words! I'm Stephany Hazard, a book enthusiast and writer at heart. Since learning to spell my name, I've been hooked on reading and writing. When I'm not conjuring up stories, you can find me singing my heart out (vocal warm-ups are my jam!) or dreaming up new characters.

My passion for writing knows no bounds, and I'm excited to share my tales with you! I envision a future where my stories transport readers to new realms, evoke emotions, and spark imagination. As a friendly and approachable author, I strive to craft novels that resonate with you, my amazing readers!

Join me on this literary journey, and let's explore the world of words together! Stay tuned for updates, sneak peeks, and behind-the-scenes insights into my writing process. I can't wait to share my stories with you and hear your thoughts!

title: Uriel
description:
*Sequel to Paladin*
  
  The kingdom of Thule stands on the brink of civil war between two armies -- the Paladins and the Uriel -- each claiming the right to serve as Thule's protector. Once a Paladin trainee, Lady Samantha of Haywood -- Sam --  has been named a traitor to king and country by the Paladins' High Commander, with a bounty set on her head.
  
  Only Sam and her friends know what the people of Thule do not: the High Commander is no ordinary man but something more--something evil. The supposed military hero holds a dark alliance with the demons that have ravaged mankind for millennia, commanding them as easily as he does his men. Worse, he can control Braeden, Sam's half-demon lover, through blood magic long thought extinct.
  
  Sam and Braeden set sail across the sea in hopes of finding a way to nullify the High Commander's power. But the secrets they uncover reveal Thule faces an even greater threat. They must return to Thule and warn the Uriel...before it's too late.

title: Malagim na Sumpa
description:
Tahimik sana ang pag-usad ng simpleng buhay bilang high school student nang biglang nabulabog ang magkakaibigang sila Phoebe sa mga misteryosong kakaibang nangyayari sa kanilang paaralan. 

Gustuhin man nila o hindi, pero nadadawit sila sa kaganapan. Sa pagkalkal sa nakaraan ang nagtungo sa kanila sa madilim na sumpa. Isa itong bulong ng nakaraan. Wala silang magawa kundi kaharapin ito sa hindi maiwasang pagkakasangkot sa dilim. 

Sa kapalaran, kung silang magkakaibigang babae ang nadadawit sa misteryong kaganapan, sumama naman ang magkaka-grupong lalaki para iligtas sila hangga't sa makakaya. Sa kakulitan at pagpupumilit, hindi makapalag ang magkakaibigang babae kundi magsama-sama sila para masagot ang mga katanungan at lutasin ang misteryo.

title: Echoes Between Us
description:
Private investigator Amara Blackwood has one rule: never take murder cases. She has enough ghosts haunting her already. But when the captivating Jace Kendrick walks through her door on a rain-slashed night, his offer proves impossible to refuse: help him expose a web of corruption surrounding the city's most powerful woman, Mayor Sterling.

The case should be straightforward. The chemistry between them shouldn't be this electric. And the deeper Amara digs, the more the evidence seems to twist like smoke through her fingers. Something about this investigation defies the natural order-something that awakens the very abilities she's spent years burying.

As assassination attempts mount and long-buried secrets surface, Amara must question everything: her resistance to her unique gifts, her growing feelings for Jace, and most disturbingly, the thin line between what is real and what only appears to be. In a case where nothing is quite as solid as it seems, even love might be an illusion-or the most real thing she's ever known.

title: How Deep The Roots Go ( Book One)
description:
Born into a mystical bloodline, Temperance Augustine inherited the Second Sight. But with every gift, there is a levy to pay, and the young woman's premonitions are merely attuned to coming evil. Although she can never see the good in human kind, Temperance has not only accepted her fate, but has also learned to embrace it.  
When Mardi Gras causes her visions to abruptly stop, Temperance's search for answers leads to the handsome and mysterious Roman. Claiming to be her Guardian, he offers to help Temperance unveil the truth about her powers, but instead starts a chain of events that will make them face the Devil himself. Temperance will need to dig deep within her being to find the strength not only to save herself, but also the one man she is forbidden to love.

title: Wild Hunt
description:
[BOOK TRAILER NOW AVAILABLE] VISIT https://youtu.be/APtEPckzBdA OR READ TO FIND OUT MORE. 

.                                                                ------------------  ~☽ ◯ ☾~  ------------------

"I'm a wolf...I hunger for you in ways I didn't think imaginable. This obsession is eating me alive. I feel this hunger no matter what I do and I'm starved. It's insatiable and only you can quench it."

Every full moon it's the same. It's the time of the Wild Hunt, when the wolves disappear into the night, tracking the prey, a deer or stag. Some are easier to catch than the rest, but the prime prey, is the Golden Stag, the one that evades them every time.

Most girls don't make it past fifteen. They are caught and taken as a mate before they learn how to survive the great hunt. The longer a girl survives, the more appealing she becomes. She begins as a deer, fresh and unaware...vulnerable. If she lasts three moons, she becomes a stag, the more respected prey and the more skilled...worth hunting. The one who has survived the longest is crowned the Golden Stag.

Every Alpha male; the strongest, quickest, boldest, track the scent of the Golden Stag. It is different from that of the others, intoxicating...tempting. To bring down the Golden Stag is a mark of skill and authority, well worth the time spent pursuing it. 

The Wild Hunt.

It makes me feel alive and dead, free and caged, broken and whole.
I am the Golden Stag.
Catch me if you can.

.                                                                ------------------  ~☽ ◯ ☾~  ------------------
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"A gentleman is simply a patient wolf." Lana Turner

The duality of the human being is fascinating. Despite our pretense of nobility, logic and complex morality we are still controlled by our basic instincts.

Stories of wolves, lions and beasts reflect our inner demons. It exemplifies the undeniable fact, that despite our egos, we are simply animals, defined by nature, and subject to it. It is through these 'monsters' that we discover how horrifying human nature can truly be.

"I'm a wolf Maeve. I hunger for you in ways I didn't think imaginable. Every thought, every second of every day is dominated by you. The need to speak to you, the need to see you, the need to feel you... This is driving me insane."  Maicoh, The Wild Hunt

title: My Demon Mates
description:
Lydia Jennings was your normal 21-year-old young lady. She had just started her first job after finishing up school. It wasn't her dream job, but it was a start. She still loved to do the things from her early teenage years, not that she'd tell anyone else that for fear that they'd make fun of her. She loved to read, especially stories of the Victorian Era. After her senior year, her parents sprung and bought her a trip to London. Those tales painted a vastly different picture than this modern world. Then there was her other guilty pleasure. She loved watching Black Butler. It was set in the same era, but with supernatural elements. She was drawn to some of the characters in the show but brushed it off. It wasn't like she'd ever get to meet them, they were fictional. She kept her head down and continued her life until one day everything changed.


I don't own Black Butler or any of the characters!

#1 in #ceil August 9, 2022
#1 in #ceilphantomhive September 15, 2022
#1 in #aloistrancy December 1, 2022
#1 in #claudefaustus February 16, 2023

authorBio: I am a Christian wife and mother. I am a transplant to North Carolina. My family lives in Tennessee and Kentucky. I still go back and visit with them as much as I can. I have been writing since I was in 7th grade. I love to read and write. I also like to watch TV.

title: Lucky Blue Smith: How About Two?
description:
A fanfic that seems too realistic to be untrue. Join Lucky Blue Smith as his whole world is turned upside-down by a fated encounter with a celibate who forces him to examine tenets of the Church regarding his marital life.

Lucky Blue Smith, a happy-go-lucky Mormon, comes face to face with Deneo, a demon-possessed religious zealot, who goes by the epithet 'bride of Christ'. Deneo unveils esoteric truths to Lucky that he finds hard to resist. They discuss if Lucky can become intimate with more than one woman; whether polygyny is outdated; if bigamy can be taken seriously in a postmodern society; whether sexual intercourse with a virgin equates marriage; if a marriage between nonvirgins is accepted by God; and lastly, but a tad more serious, should Lucky ultimately choose celibacy for the Kingdom of God? Tag along on this epic psychological journey.
Tous Droits Réservés

Enjoys writing as a cathartic exercise.

A master's graduate in English Literature.

title: Dreamscape | Yeonbin
description:
During times of crisis who hasn't made one or two wishes? Everyone had! Wishing was a good thing, it proves that you're hopeful enough to believe in such things...however this was just more work for Yeonjun. 

Yeonjun was a child born with special powers. He could enter anyone's dream if they wished for it, no- He could enter anyone's dream, even if they did not wish for it. You'd think angels would be beautiful smiling but once you saw THIS angel who would meet you with a scowl so terrifying, you'll be forced to change your mind. 

He was renowned for his ability to be able to get rid of nightmares for you, that was supposed to be his only job, yet Yeonjun had to tirelessly work extra for the foolishness of several girls, who wished he'd show up in their dream just so they could see his face. 

no one could remember his face after they woke up and Yeonjun was grateful for it...this was his nightly routine- visiting the dreams of girls till one day...till one day a guy from his campus made a wish. 

once he entered this guy's dream, the really tolerant Yeonjun who had seen almost everything and cured almost all nìghtmares, had to give up reluctantly, deciding that this guy needed therapy. 




If you enjoy the story please don't forget to vote and comment!!

Rohan, a brilliant forensic expert, has his life turned upside down as he faces three impossible challenges!! 

no 1. His beloved sister, Ishita, is marrying his sworn enemy, Aarav. ❤️‍🩹
no 2. Ananya, Aarav's sister, a village girl who is the complete opposite of Rohan, enters his life, igniting an unexpected spark. ❤️‍🔥
no 3. A dangerous serial killer is on the loose, and it's up to Rohan to stop them. 🔪

But things aren't what they seem. The murders aren't the work of a human.... but, an ancient curse that haunts the village of Vikralpur🌿🎑 As secrets unravel, Rohan, Ishita, Aarav, and Ananya must face the supernatural forces at play❤️‍🔥

Will they be able to lift the curse before it consumes them all?

~𝓐𝓷𝓲𝓼𝓱𝓴𝓪 𝓟𝓪𝓷𝓭𝓪 (𝑨𝒖𝒕𝒉𝒐𝒓)

title: After A December
description:
Being raised as an omega has it's limits, but it wasn't easy for October, when he witnessed his mother's death by a rouge attack. How can a innocent child supposed to live after that? 

October has given up on hope, and what is hope supposed to help the innocent with the meaning of life? Becoming emotionless and almost feeling deaf with the living around him, maybe it was best to die now than later.

But one may consider that the moon goddess has her reasons, so why? Why should October start believing in hope again? Even when he meets Harper, the living dead girl? The proof of a purpose to move on?

title: The Doe Identity
description:
When the spirit of a comatose man shows up in front of her, Alexis Howard is determined to help him find his identity. Little does she know, she's about to get sucked into a world of secrets, lies, and murder.

***

Alexis Howard can see the dead. A gift that has done her more harm than good. Having been forced to move into a strange small town because of it, Alexis vows to cut all contact with the world of the dead. It's easy at first, especially since there don't seem to be any ghosts in Casa Nova. That is until a comatose patient of hers shows up as one.

No, he's not dead. He's just semi-dead. And he has no idea who he is. Oh, and the police think he's a cold-blooded criminal who's involved in the disappearance of a 17-year-old girl.

Believing otherwise, Alexis decides to help the spirit find his identity and becomes embroiled in the search for the missing girl. Her investigation also leads to a meeting with a peculiar cat, who seems to be much older than she looks.

Just what exactly is the connection between the three? What kind of a cat gets shot and shows up without so much as a scratch a few days later? More importantly, who is John Doe?

title: Abstract Shadows and Painted Stars
description:
Book blurb:

Ashlyn works for a Paranormal Investigation Agency. One day, she and her partner, Percy, discover a mind-reading alien hidden inside a very restricted part of the building. 

                                                                        ...

"Ignorance is safety," Percy reminded me. 

I perked up, before I let a long sigh escape me. "Control feeds on ignorance, Percy," I reminded him in a hushed voice that only I could hear.
	
You shouldn't burn the book before you obtain its knowledge, I thought to myself. Throughout history, too many have been forced to follow leaders without questioning why these self-proclaimed kings wear the crown. You shouldn't obey sightlessly just to follow the masses. I, for one, refuse to conform and join the human sheep. I'll be the one to chain myself to the tree and riot in the streets hoping for change. I'll fight for what I think is right. And if I am hunted down like some graceful deer wandering the clearing as twilight breaks? So be it. 

Tomorrow, I'm going to sneak into that vault and free that Alien, because it's the right thing to do according to my heart. And I'm not going to let anyone stop me.

Screw ignorance. It was never meant for me. 

                                                                    ...



NOTES:
1) This is an original story. The narrative and characters are owned by the Author (me).
2) It's a cute human + alien love story.  
3) CAUTION, some chapters will address the impact of trauma. And this book will have instances of ghost possession, violence and strong language. 
5) Book art was drawn by me - the author.

P.S. As you scroll through this book, please feel free to leave any comments or feedback along the way. It's always appreciated ^-^ 

Now, grab yourself a warm drink, find someplace comfortable and get ready to dive in.

Happy reading, my little bookdragons! :D

title: Bloom and Doom
description:
In the picturesque seaside village of Llyncroft, nestled amidst rolling hills and lush greenery, Evelyn Hartwell inherits her grandmothers quaint bed and breakfast. The inn offers cozy rooms, blooming gardens and a welcome retreat from the chaos of city life. However, Evie soon discovers that beneath its charming exterior lies a tangled web of secrets and mysteries.

Evelyn and her fiancée Marcus stumble upon a shocking discovery, a dead body in one of the guest rooms. With the help of her new eccentric friends, including the enigmatic police captain Gethin Wolfhart, the wise apothecary Agnes Blackwood, and the elusive pub owner Cedric Thorne, Evie embarks on a quest to unravel the truth behind the murder.

But as clues emerge and suspicions mount, Evie realizes that the idyllic village of Llyncroft harbours dark secrets of its own. From ancient feuds to long-buried betrayals, the past threatens to surface with deadly consequences. With time running out Evelyn must rely on her instincts and unearth her grandmother's secrets before she becomes the next victim.

Grab a cup of your favourite brew and join Evelyn Hartwell on her journey as she navigates the treacherous waters of deceit and deception in a world where nothing is as it seems in Bloom and Doom.

However, her destination gets rerouted, landing her in the Dark, a mysterious place led by a mysterious being named Nyx who proclaims her a lamb, and takes her in.

Nina is entrenched in a whirlwind of mystery, paranormal sightings, and a bizarre world she can't comprehend with no memories of her own. 

Can she make it back to the Goddess?
Is Elysium all it's cracked up to be?

title: His secret girlfriend
description:
She was broken beyond repair. She was tossed like a crumpled paper by him. It took her a lot of effort to gather herself again and make a fresh start. But can she defy the destiny and laws of attraction. Drawn to her ex-boyfriend who she knows was nothing less than than a cheater. 

She is forced into his world by her best friend who is engaged to his cousin. will she survive in the world fake flamboyance and glittering charms. How will she avoid her sexy ex-boyfriend? 

The erratic disappearances, plunging herself into grave danger every now and then is it just a coincidence? 

_-----------------------------
"elena"his voice resonated. 
The entire crowd was staring at me. I desperately yearned to disappear into thin air. 
He pushed the girl who was clinging at him and harshly grabbed my hand from my date. 
"Leave me"I whispered "I am not your girl anymore Allan"
"You are mine forever"he said pulling me out of the hall into his car.
I struggled and yelled. He pulled me towards him evading my lips with his. My legs trembled, I was giving in. My brains commands were spurned by my heart. 
"you are engaged to an another lady"i shouted pushing him away "I am not a whore Mr Hawthorne, If you want a girl for your needs go find yourself a mistress".
Anger flared in his eyes. 
"out"he yelled. 
I staggered out of the car . I removed the heels holding it in my hands and marched away. only if I knew it was easy to move away from his car not from his life.

NOTE:
This is the second story in secret series. If you haven't read Elle's secret boyfriend you can still read it. it is indeed a standalone book, but certain reference might confuse you. It would be wonderful if you check out Elle's secret boyfriend before reading this.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Searching for the magic in daily life, penning tales of love and hope. 

I write, to ease the pain of life. I am weak but my words aren't. 

So I let the ramblings of my pen and mind free to wander and gather the stories hidden in every nook.

title: Escaping Duty
description:
After encountering something of myths one day after work, Valentina begins questioning her once mundane world. Seeking answers to prove she's not crazy, she receives another shocking truth that hits even closer to home.

Mason returns home to escape his past, but familiar faces return, and new threats arrive in town. Keeping an eye on the enemy, he struggles to avoid getting involved any more than he should.

But, when their paths cross, they learn not everything is black and white, and the people you least suspect could be your enemy.

------

'This is a dumb idea' she thought to herself.

Slowly she began reaching her hand towards the animal, feeling compelled to touch it. Would it be as soft as it looked? Did it want her to touch it? The rain continued pelting them, but it felt like its eyes were drawing her into another space, where nothing else mattered. The sudden desire to be closer to this animal was beginning to overtake her mind, especially as her hand neared its head.

The whole time the animal only watched her with those large eyes. She imagined it almost asking for her touch. It didn't cross her mind how she knew he'd be soft, or how she even knew the creature was a 'he' to begin with. As her finger just barely grazed the animal, multiples things happened.

She felt something shock her causing her to pull her hand back, just as thunder and lightning sounded. When the light cleared the animals' eyes, were narrowed into slits, and it was growling. It was a deep menacing sound that sent her stumbling backward, heart wildly beating. It bared fangs the size of her hand alone dipping its head.

Had her touch angered the animal into finally attacking her? She kept moving backward in the rain, slipping in her converses as the creature continued growling. It was then she knew she was prepared to run, no matter what happened.

Cover by: BaneenI2I

title: Bona Fide Queen
description:
Verlas is a secret land hidden by wards and is run by Werewolves.

There exists the Alpha King, and the Alphas who report to him, who watch over the far spread land.

Then, there are the humans. They live in the regular world of modern society, unbeknownst of their neighbors; the werewolves, who are hidden.

The two coexist quite well, that even when werewolves choose to live amongst the humans. 

That is until someone breaks the rules. Violet Raye a human, and her brother, Tyler, have stumbled upon the secret that is Verlas.

And when Violet is brought before the Alpha King to face punishment, all it will take is a glance to change everything.

Violet will not be the same teenage girl who ship wrecked on Verlas. She will need to rise and become the Queen she was destined to be.
