authorBio:
ETHEREAL
   BEST TITLE AWARD
   #2 IN CROSSOVERS
ASTROLOGY FOR DUMMIES
   PART 2 IN WORKS
NEWLY FANGED
   CHAPTER 1 IN WORKS

she is curling up with a good book on freshly washed sheets. she is listening to your favorite music, the songs that are most comforting and familiar. she's a bright light that streams through the window when you first open them early in the morning on a sunny day, and the feeling you get when you're looking through a photo album and you see a picture that brings back a memory that doesn't really make you feel nostalgic, it's just a warm, happy, cozy feeling.
she's that time late at night when you're laughing with your best friend and right then you have no responsibility.
no illness.
no anything holding you back.
at that moment it is just you and them and nothing else matters.
she's the way a pair of eyes light up when talking about something they're passionate about, and that scene in The Good Dinosaur where they're running through the grass and all those fireflies light up, and classic music on a vinyl.
she's that feeling you get when you realize you're falling in love, but it isn't scary: it's wonderful. she's sea foam and light pouring through dusty curtains and the feeling you get after you just laughed so hard your stomach hurts and you're lightheaded and tired, but in the most satisfying and warm and happy way.
she's everything i've ever hoped for.

- to beth: thank you for inspiring me every day.

title: When Worlds Collide
description:
In the distant future, Earth lies in ruin, a desolate landscape scarred by the ravages of time and neglect. Cities crumble, forests fade to dust, and the remnants of civilization cling desperately to the shadows of a once-thriving world. Amidst this bleak panorama, a group known as the Treaders emerges-individuals bestowed with extraordinary abilities that connect them deeply to the earth and its truths.

With great abilities, Treaders can summon storms, grow life from barren soil, and even speak to the remnants of the past. Their gifts, however, come with a heavy burden: they are the last hope for restoring balance to a fractured planet, but they are also hunted by factions that crave their abilities for domination.

A girl, broken by captivity and lost in silent pleas may just hold the key to ridding the world of its desolation. 

A boy, forced to grow up too fast and see too much might just be the one able to save her. From the ones that hold her trapped...or from herself?

what will happen, When worlds Collide?




Trigger warning; depicted scenes of violence and abuse
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"I write to give myself strength. I write to be the characters I am not. I write to explore all the things I'm afraid of.&quot
"When reading we don't fall in love with the characters' appearance. we fall in love with their words, their thoughts, and their hearts. We fall in love with their souls."

title: Vulnerable: Book 1 of the Magic Mutations Series | ✓
description:
|| WATTYS 2021 SHORTLIST ||
The day Olivia Byrne met Benjamin Cross, her day was going almost to plan... until he showed up. But it also could have gone so many different ways. 

In her summer holidays between university terms, Olivia finds herself lost in the library, researching all sorts of creatures for her latest writing project. The last thing she expected was to find love amidst the shelves filled with fables, myths, and fairytales.

But lurking behind Benjamin's dreamy blue eyes lies a secret that Olivia may not be prepared for.

Jumping head first into the world of vampires, witches, fairies, and shapeshifters, Olivia finds herself in a battle to become the hero of her own story, or to succumb to her past and be, forever, vulnerable. 

Will Olivia's journey through magic, love, friendship, and heartache see her story become one immortalised in fairytales?

Or will her story belong in the pages of cautionary fables?
 
[APPROX. 120,000 WORDS]
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Rescued and Ruined
description:
I thought being kidnapped by heartless scientists was the worst thing that could happen to me. 
I was wrong. 
Being rescued by a massive teal alien alpha covered in spikes was worse. 

So much worse.

The scientists only wanted to experiment on me. 
He wants to ruin me.

title: The Caliginous Villainess
description:
"Your highness, I'd like to cancel our engagement." 
 "Sure...wait...what?" Why did the crown prince sound so bewildered?
***
 "Your grace, why are you always staring at me?" I asked the second prince who kept following me since I visited the castle.
---------------------   
         Blair McGregor (badass money-lover) met Truck-kun in an unfortunate day after returning from work, thoroughly exhausted. She was caught in the middle of the crossway like a deer in headlights only to wake up in a lavish bed as the cruel but cliched villainess of a web novel she read. 
      
         Blair, now as Rose Eskater, has to make a decision to follow her written fate or create a new one. And what is the smart decision? Obviously to create her own fate! Who would want to be executed for not being able to take the hint and leave!! 
      
      'Let the lovestruck fools enjoy themselves while I prepare to run off to the countryside to live a stress-free life, plus why did Rose hide her swordsmanship? The girl can beat down a whole army single-handed. Anyone who dares to disrupt my plans can say hello to my sword's wrath. Hah!?'   
       
        But little did Blair know that her sudden change of personality sparked interest into the Eskater duchy as well as the second prince. 
        Will Blair be able to avoid her tragic end and change the cliché story while annulling her engagement and avoiding the sudden stares from the 2nd Prince???
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello!
I like to pour out my ideas into writing and create something that everyone can enjoy and get lost in. Writing calms me down and thrusts me forward. I invite you to my humble territory to explore.
Please excuse my silly mistakes during writing. And I would gladly accept any advice. Thank you and hope you enjoy my writings!!!

title: The Ravaging
description:
Something has been happening on the outside of the United States for months now, and that something is terrifying. Nobody knows what the virus is that spread all around the globe, and listening to their government, Americans weren't worried about it coming to their own country. But they were wrong, and now it has quickly spread from the East Coast to the West. 

Alden Hale and Finn Foster are two unlucky college students who are forced to work together in order to survive. Can two people who just met truly trust each other? Will they be able to survive the ravaging?

Cover by brookmcx
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
The way to win over my heart is by giving me a steaming hot cup of coffee, but tea would be alright too.

Malena is my name, and procrastinating is my game.

Twenty-one-year-old college student, currently pursuing a degree in public health.

Sarcasm tends to be my go to, but I try to reign it in online.

All of my stories come from a simple idea that spiraled out of control, so I wrote them down.

Comments are greatly appreciated, and I read every one but may be slow to responding.

I don't take reading requests, mostly because I just don't have time.

My tumblr is very gay, but you can come check it out if you like.

title: Sea Of Treason, Pirate's Bluff #1
description:
When Whitley winds up on the top of a pirate hit-list thanks to her con-artist father, she must hide her identity and board another pirate ship, trusting in one shape-shifting pirate named Bluff to help her escape. Too bad you can never, ever, trust a pirate.

authorBio: Indie urban fantasy author! I'm posting my entire Pirate's Bluff series here now. Learn more about my other books: www.staceyTrombley.com

title: Rejecting Azrael | ✔️
description:
"I, Coco Lee reject Azrael Ford as my future beta mate and the father of my future pups." 

-

Coco Lee has everything she could have wanted; popularity, the money, friends, and a hot boyfriend. What more could a she-wolf ask for? 

Until he came along and crashed her small world. However, this story comes with a little twist. 

This time, the girl rejects and the boy breaks. 

Cover was made by me.

title: Enigmatic Darkness
description:
When two opposite world collides, with past invading present and present turning darker, destruction is meant to follow.

***

Piya Jaiswal is a beautiful sweet teen with a great amount of patience and courage in her broken heart. Not to forget innocence which can see beauty in the darkness of dangerous forest.

And this is how her innocence, attempts to find the care in the enigmatic Abhay Raichand, in whom darkness resides.

Abhay Raichand is a mysterious newcomer in the city of Mysteries with his own ulterior motives. And all of them linked to the one girl, Piya, who happens to be stranger, but still more than anything for him.

But when their twisted pasts, with much-twisted darkness of Abhay's world, hunt Abhay and Piya both, Abhay has to break down all the barriers, he built to keep her away, and let their worlds collide.

With darkness consuming, allies out of reach, power out of understanding and traitors among their trusted people, will Abhay and Piya get out of this war alive? Or death will be the ultimate destination even before they could find the haunting truth of past?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Warning before you go ahead; I love to create my own monsters. Vampires and werewolves were someone's imagination too, right? So read at your own risk. 😉


And no my work is not fanfiction, I simply borrow the characters from certain daily soaps. 

If you're craving for mystery, thrill and wonder of loves as it heal the broken hearts then dive in, my stories will welcome you wholeheartedly.

title: Blood & Honey #1
description:
~A  Wattys and Fiction Award winner*
A lion does not need an invitation from a lamb. That is not the way of the predator. Predators take what they want, when they want it, however they please. And this belief that I am, that evil is, enslaved by the dark night is humorous to say the least. Why would any creator make their pupil inept of withstanding the lighted world when this planet is covered in daylight for half of its life span? No, our Maker did not instill such restrictions for, up here on these earthly lands, we are the gods of prey. ~ Tristan 

There is only one rule vampires must follow--Bite Hard. It is forbidden for humans to know vampires exist so you can imagine Tristan Darkos's surprise when he finds one that knows what he is. He can tell by the tremble of her body, the thump-thump of her pulse, and her dilated pupils. He's going to have to finish what some other vampire started. 

The problem is when Tristan gets close to this human his blood turns to fire and the thirst that burns in his throat that should spell her doom twists until he's consumed by another need--one that is evocative, primitive, and...wrong.

If Tristan doesn't figure out the mystery that is Kinley Shea Rylan, it is certain whatever dark force her honey blood is summoning forth will be the end of him and, possibly, the end of the world as we know it. 
  ~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~
  
  Author note: 
  - This is an original work with my take on Vampires. Hope you enjoy it!
***Available for a limited time *** ( ie. Whenever I finish this series or WP notices me)

  
  Blood and Honey Milestones:
  - Wattpad Featured story 9/20/17
  -  2018 Watttys winner~ The Contemporaries 
  -  2018 Fiction Awards winner in Vampire category
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm an aspiring author who has a soft spot for slow burn romances. I like to be tortured before an author gives me that life changing kiss. Maybe I have issues... Any who, when I am not writing,  I'm watching a movie in my head about what I am going to be writing next. Yep, I'm that girl, the one who is always staring off into space. So if you ever find me staring at you, it's because the movie in my head has become intense and all my brain cells are too busy at the moment to alert me that I look like a creep because I have been "staring" in your direction for over ten minutes. 

But who I really am is just a girl chasing after a life long dream.

*I do not accept reading request, reads for reads ect. Sorry but I devout all my free time to writing and replying to comments 🖤.*

**All books on Wattpad are working first drafts. I love to post my WIP here for feedback while I am pursuing my next self-pub series. Helps keep this girl accountable and is so much more fun than being locked up in a dark room for years all by my lonesome. So get them while they are up!

title: I Have Infinite Attributes
description:
Zhou Jibo's world shatters when betrayal strikes from the least expected quarter-his fiancée, Zheng Xunqin.  

Drugged and robbed of his cultivation ability by Zheng, a member of the allied Zheng family, Zhou finds himself crippled in a realm where martial prowess rules all.  

Reborn in a mysterious new world after a tragic end in modern times, he discovers he's not just any youth, but one blessed with an Earth Spirit bone root, a marker of potential greatness now tragically marred. 

As he silently endures the agonizing theft of his bone root, a sudden twist of fate awakens the "Universal Attribute Point System" within him, presenting a Newbie Gift Bag that promises unimaginable power.

description:
The vampire coven that owns the Thurman werewolf pack lands has returned. 

When they demand a human sacrifice, the Alpha's son, Jake, has little qualms about offering up his newly discovered blind mate, Ciara, as the human sacrifice. 

After all, what Alpha or Alpha-to-be wants a blind Luna?

While Ciara is trying to escape being turned into a blood bag for vampires, the supernatural council is stuck in a deadlock with an evil sect that is wreaking havoc on the world. 

They need to find all the Fae Omegas destined to save the world as soon as possible.

title: The Edifice
description:
WATTYS 2021 WINNER - PARANORMAL

Olivia Porter is well acquainted with death- or so she thought. 

With the passing of her only friend, she's given more than she bargained for when the estranged and mysterious Lee Noble enters her life.

Lee brings with him more than his bad attitude and mysterious past. He's Olivia's gateway to a dark and terrifying underworld she never knew existed. The Edifice; a dimension parallel to their own, separated for a very good reason.

It's a world of magic, where warlocks, fiends and monsters walk the streets in  strained coexistence. Stranded in a foreign land at the mercy of its citizens, Olivia has no choice but to accept the help of Otis- a deity masquerading as a fickle young man.

With seven days to escape the consequences of the deity's contract, Olivia's humanity is on a perilous countdown. Otis promises her the world if she can hold out- while Lee will sacrifice anything to see her gone. 

Because Otis's gift to her is worth dying for... and all of the Edifice knows it.

title: Iniquitous H.S
description:
"You know I can't just let you go." He says. 

"You have no choice" I weakly say with tears falling. 

"I'm not letting you go. I just can't allow you to leave me." He begins to walk over to me, I start to take steps back to create some distance. 

"You chose to do what you did." My voice cracks. "As much as I love you, I can't live with what you've done."

_____________________________


I've always wondered who I was. I was born into a world where there was only one power. That power was demons. I was born on the day they took over. My whole life I've felt like I've never belonged. Like I was different from everyone around me. What I know now I realize why I felt like that. I'm finally learning who I am and see the world in a new light. It's all thanks to him. Harry Styles.

description:
Solangelo vampire AU

 Will is a vampire, and the son of the coven leader. But to the irritation of his father and the disgust of the majority of the vampire race, he refuses to drink human blood and lives off animals. 
 He meets Nico, who has been taken in by his guards, but is then sentenced to death by his father under the ruse of trespassing and for some reason, he just can't let the boy die. So much to everyones surprise, Will takes his first blood slave. 
    
Nico was happy with his life, more or less, till he's kidnapped by vampires. He's finally saved, but it seems even his new captors don't find him worth keeping. To his surprise, he's taken in by a boy whom they say will now be his master.

Little does he know, its just the beginning.

description:
[Completed] 

When Adriana moves to a small new town, she is looking forward to some peace and quiet. However, she observes strange things the very same day she arrives. Puzzled and terrified, she thinks it is mostly her imagination.

When she meets the mysterious and cold Ethan, she is intrigued by his less than friendly demeanor. On the other hand, Caleb is friendly enough, but can he be trusted? 

She finally manages to settle down and but then events take a dark turn as the town is hit by a number of serial killings. Everyone is not as they seem to be, and she isn't sure who to trust. 

Secrets are everywhere and even Adriana has one she must guard with her life. Can she find who is behind the killings before it is too late?

As the line between what is real and what is not blurs, will she be able to escape and save her life?

title: Hunter: Begin Again
description:
Vampires have Slayers.   
Werewolves have Trackers.   
Everything else has a Hunter.   

 ---   

It's nearly been a year since Elise Bunting walked away from the life she never wanted to try and create one that she did. Only her past has finally caught up with her in the form of her brother, his best friend and the one guy who knows how to get under her skin unlike anyone else. No matter how hard you try to change yourself or your destiny, you can't fight it forever and Elise is in for another reminder on who she is as she gets ready to begin again.     

Problem is it's not just Elise who is making a return to the world she didn't want to be apart of. V aka Aaron - the vampire who escaped from the portal to the Other World, is planning his own comeback, and it involves Elise.     

Will she be able to work out his plan before it's too late or is she going to be forced to say goodbye to the people she loves again?

title: The Alien's Match (Le'vris Dragons Book 2)
description:
This dragon says he will make me shine brighter than his treasure, and he succeeds every time he touches me.

Threatened by a dwindling population, the dragons create a matching program where their fittest warriors seduce and conquer humans, providing comforts and pleasures fit for a queen.

It has been decades since they attacked Earth and destroyed our cities, but I haven't forgotten. After years of resentment and fighting to survive, I have no interest in their matching program. But when my rebellious sister enlists, I go on a wild chase that lands me in the brawny arms of an unyielding dragon who sets me on fire without breathing a single flame.

I'm stuck on an alien planet with this relentless man. He has so much wealth, status, and muscle that little can be denied, but the greedy dragon wants more: me. I resist his advances, but with every touch and whisper, every time he flies me into the sky to do wicked things no one else can see, I fall deeper into his lure.

title: The Final Bride of Dracula
description:
She began with a hiss. "That worthless creature is my friend. If you lay a hand on him again. I will kill you. "

"You will, how?" He seethed. 

 She poked her finger on his chest. "I will drive a stake, straight through your nonexistent heart."  
 She paused. "I will keep driving it through until it reaches the other side. I will watch what ever life you have fade."

Kidnapped and stuck inside the castle of Dracula, Alandra grows close to another vampire. Dracula cannot stand the fact of any completion, he stomps the flame before it can ignite. Alandra loathes the very thought of Vlad and wishes to have nothing to do with him. Will her mind change? 
Or will she only see the cruel exterior?

title: Accordance - (Significance - Book Two) Completed
description:
From NEW YORK TIMES Bestselling author, Shelly Crane, comes the sequel to Significance.

Maggie learns much more about all the strange things that have happened to her and has to face many new ones. She learns something about herself, that she is something that the clans have been waiting for. She rebels against it but, ultimately must face it for her new family's sake and maybe even her life. Bish went from being her biggest supporter to her biggest pain in the butt and Kyle's intentions to attract her interest may not be so innocent. 

Caleb and Maggie face many new obstacles together as a couple and on their own. They fight to work through them, but will one that should be a good thing be too much for Maggie to handle? Will she become who she has to be to save the ones she loves or will she crumble under the pressure as this epic love story continues.

"Shelly Crane always provides a captivating story, and this time was no different. You'll find yourself running into walls because you won't want to put it down!" 
-Molly McAdams, NYT Bestselling Author of Taking Chances

 "It's the kind of love that we begin dreaming about as little girls and never stop enjoying long after we've found our own knight in shining armor."
- M. Leighton, NYT Bestselling Author of Madly and Down To You   
                
"Sparks flew for Maggie and Caleb, and they flew for me too! Shelly Crane's characters will stay with you long after you've finished reading that last page."
- Jessica Verday, NYT Bestselling Author of The Hollow Trilogy
                                          
"Completely blown away by unexpected creativity."
 - Georgia Cates, NYT Bestselling Author of Beauty From Pain and Going Under

READ THE STORY BEFORE THE TV SHOW!

Read the first chapter here and find the rest almost anywhere eBooks or paperbacks are sold.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm a NEW YORK TIMES & USA TODAY bestselling author from a small town in Georgia and love everything about the south. Except the heat. If I could find a place that was 65 degrees all year long, I would move there!

I'm the wife to an amazing, fantastical husband and stay-at-home mom to two boisterous and mischievous boys who keep me on my toes. I hoard paperbacks, devour sweet tea, search year-round for candy corn, and love to spend time with my family and friends, go out to eat at new restaurants, sight-see in the new areas we travel to for book signings, listen to music, and, of course, love to read, but don't have much time to these days with all the characters filling my head, begging to come out.

I've written and published 23 books to date, #24 will be coming out at the beginning of 2016 with #25, the next Significance book, closely behind it.

Before we begin, a few Random Facts about me:
- Reba Mcentire once sang in our back yard when her bus broke down and said I was a cute baby. I was in the swing so this was a few years ago. Just a few.
- I love olives. Black and green. I eat them by the jarful. When I was a kid I used to ask for olives instead of candy.
- I'm obsessed with throw pillows. They're everywhere.
- I'm also obsessed with paperbacks. I have a home library and shelves in my office and living room full of books. Not to mention the ones that won't fit that are scattered all around and stacked up in odd places. It's kind of out of control. But it's such a pretty obsession.
- I'm also obsessed with 90's and 2000's reruns. Roswell, Gilmore Girls, Friends, One Tree Hill, Seinfeld, even Saved by the Bell and California Dreams. If any of these shows come on, I could sit and watch for hours.

title: Hide and Seek
description:
Ri likes a quiet life, without drama, and certainly without all that mate crap that the world seems to revolve around. To her exasperation, it seems to be all anyone cares about, looking for, finding and then claiming their mate. 

Well, that won't be her. She has a secret. She has managed to suppress her scent, so her mate can never find her. She has other plans and they don't involve having her head and heart messed up by hormones and matehood. 

Because she knows who her mate is. 

Damian, warrior and son of the Clan leader. 

Her friend. 

And if he ever finds out...
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Explorer, Seeker, Artist.

title: Hell of a Deal
description:
Marla finds herself in a mysterious office with no recollection of how she arrived. She has an appointment with a man she's never met for employment even though she has a job.

What is the secret behind this company, and the man who runs it?

What does he want from her?

title: The Underworld's Moon
description:
**This is a BoyxBoy story that is unedited. It was written in 2009 and finished in around 2015. You've been warned!**

Verin is a demon and the best part, he's the prince of the Underworld. He's completely ignorant and can't help but act spoiled as he wishes. All he cares about is getting the throne so that his lazy, sex-drive father can get off it. His father wants Verin to go buy a slave to learn responsibilities and Verin begrudgingly does as told. 

Now, he as a pet werewolf named Faolan as his slave, and he has no idea what to do with him. Instead of planning to use him and quickly get rid of him as planned for when he gets the throne, would he end up falling for this little werewolf?

But what Verin doesn't know was that there are other things going on inside the castle besides learning responsibility. There were many secrets that were left untold that Verin would get sucked into. This could lead to him losing the throne especially if he falls in love with a male werewolf. So, will Verin fight for what he wants?

**This whole story is unedited so I apologize ahead of time for all grammatical errors, plot holes, rushed areas/dry ones and so many more stuff**
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Miracle (boyxboy)
description:
Imaginary friend, or guardian angel?

Connor has been tailed his entire life by a mysterious hooded man. On his 15th birthday, the man appears with a strange gift and an even stranger message, and his visit is followed by a series of bizarre, disturbing events.

Why are men being so sexually aggressive with him? Is his mother really trying to sell his twin sister? What was the strange experiment that was done to them both before they were born?

And most of all, how can he convince Ezra--his self-proclaimed 'guardian angel' and lifelong crush--to give him a chance? Especially once Ezra is put on trial for treason against the Nephilim race, and it's all Connor's fault...
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I write lesbian romance professionally, and boys' love stories for fun.

Follow me if you want to be first to know when it's updated; COVID-19 has drastically affected my day job (I'm a social worker) and so right now my updates are sporadic but still coming!

title: His Little Human Mate
description:
Book 1 of the Black Moon series.

After a terrible accident causes the death of his father, Nixx is the new Alpha of the Shadowed Sunset pack. With responsibilities and decisions that pile up, he realizes he needs the mate that seems to not exist. But an injured human seeking refuge on his border may change his mind... 


Noella Reese is determined to ignore the people around her that say her missing father is dead. Instead, she sets out on a mission to prove them wrong. She'll travel into the forbidden forest just to show them that he still lives. Except, when danger and confusion unfold around her, it looks like her mission may need to pause.

title: Annika Northman: Part Two
description:
"Eric's voice echoes through my mind, like it does a lot: 'I will tell you that which you need to know. I will protect you from that which you do not. And you must trust my judgment as to which is which.'
I told him I trust him, and of course I do, of course I do . . ."
. . . . .
Annika, Eric's eleven-year-old psychic human, expects things to calm down after the events in Dallas. She is quickly proven wrong, finding herself in the company of many powerful, dangerous creatures, even as her relationships with those she loves are irrevocably changed. Through it all, her abilities continue to develop . . . and that doesn't always seem like a good thing.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Hell's Angel: Book 2
description:
On his first moon, Aden finds a white werewolf with red markings staring back at him in his reflection. He is definitely a sub but with a little extra fire. It's okay. Aden was expecting it. Titus, on the other hand, couldn't be happier.

He takes Aden home where the pack is waiting. They are thrilled about the new addition. They instantly embrace Aden as one of them, and he starts adjusting to life as a werewolf.

The rules of the pack are hard at first. Aden clings to some of his human tendencies and finds himself getting annoyed when ranking disputes cause problems among his packmates. His own marriage has a few bumps, but Titus and Aden work threw it together.

Eventually, Aden comes to understand the rules of the pack are there to protect him. A sub with beautiful white fur is bound to attract attention from dominants looking for that perfect sub. Because in this world, even the strongest werewolves' mates are at risk of being stolen.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Order of the Alpha #2
description:
Celestine Colton was a survivor, against the turmoil and abuse against the werewolf kind in a world run solely by humanised factions, she's a cuffed butterfly tied down to a name she does not know and a name she cannot fulfil until every question about her family, her choices and life is answered. Starting with Nicolai Darkling, a tormented reign of terror in a world he couldn't claim, on a throne he could not call his until a mating was made. Overthrowing both his siblings to a seat at the throne table, he held his dear mate close to his side, no matter how hard she tried to run. She was his, he was certain of it, even if deserving her was no longer on the table. 

If only they knew the truth of the wolf with the touch of the flame, that fire cannot kill the one who's blood is embedded with it. Only one did. A joke to Celestine, Alastair didn't cherish her, but tried to use her and Elias tried to force her hand. Her record for mates is almost diabolical. 

Love is not a liability. Nor is it a curse. 

It's a gift they should have cherished, not questioned. But is it too late. 

Not at Nocturne. Not at a school that needs Celestine and Athena more than most need air to breathe. It's time a new chapter was set in course, and to uncover what Celestine knows in her heart, it's to find herself first at a school with more secrets than the Bermuda Triangle.

What will happen when something else comes to play?

Or someone else.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Testimony of Children (Alice Gray Book 2)
description:
Catch up with your favourite Vamps and Witches, and discover what else is lurking in the shadows of London! This is the second part of Alice Gray's adventure and things are heating up for our reluctant heroine.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Alice Gray, descendant of the Pendle Witch that got away, might have magic and a vampire lover, but she still needs help unravelling her strange family history. 

Alice Gray must find a way to control her magic, or lead a life of isolation and madness. Creepy ancestors infiltrating her dreams are not the kind of help that she needs. But if the past holds answers, where better to get them than the heart of the paranormal community in London. Surrounded by vampires, werewolves and witches, Alice must learn that control comes from give and take.

With the right help, maybe the past can yield the answers after all...

title: The Dead Boy's Guide To Second Chances
description:
What do you do when you're given a second chance at life?

***

Age 15: Oliver Sallow is shipped to the tiny town of Blissby to live with a new foster family. Finn O'Connell is captain of the football team. Neither of them knows much about the other except for one thing: they have absolutely nothing in common.

Age 17: Oliver finds Finn having a panic attack in the library bathroom. They still have nothing in common. They fall in love all the same.

Age 18: Oliver breaks up with Finn.

Age 18.5: Oliver dies in a motorcycle accident. Six minutes and twenty-four seconds later, he wakes up again to be offered a deal: he will get to spend another twelve months as a guardian angel, neither fully dead nor completely alive. The catch: the person he is assigned to help is none other than Finn O'Connell.

Age 19: Two boys, fourteen months of history, and a promise: this time, there can be no falling back in love.

(Cover art by @slimmwrites)

title: Until Then
description:
Lance Corporal Kenneth Pines was a United States Marine killed in action while serving his country. Taken from this world quickly, he left behind a younger sister and four fellow Marines he had served beside until the day he died in front of them. Just when he thought he had completed his last mission, he finds himself trapped between worlds, left to discover and carryout the most important objective he'd ever been assigned. 
  
  Quinn Blair has been on her own since her grandmother passed away four years ago. She has no known relatives and her job as a nurse has left her very little time to nurture close friendships. Comforting terminally ill children makes her feel emotionally connected in a way she can't seem to find outside the hospital walls. Spending hours with children who are slowly slipping from this world to the next has made her sensitive to that mysterious space between.
  
  Death might come quickly, but going "home" isn't always easy. As Kenneth waits to pass from this world into the next, he finds friendship in Quinn to comfort him until then.
  
  This is the final book in the Dear Bailey Series. It can be read as a stand-alone, but it will spoil the other stories if you have not read them yet. Also, reading the Dear Bailey series first will enhance this storyline.

title: Surfacing - Book One in the Swans Landing Series
description:
Sixteen-year-old Mara Westray has just lost her mother, and now, being shipped off to live with the father she doesn’t know is not how she imagined grieving. She’s already counting down the days until she turns eighteen and can leave the tiny island of Swans Landing.

But from the moment she steps off the ferry, nothing is as ordinary as it looks. Whispers of a haunting song on the wind make her see impossible things, and she isn’t sure she can trust her judgment about what is real and what isn’t anymore. Maybe she can’t even trust her judgment about quiet Josh Canavan, whose way of speaking in riddles and half-truths only confuses her more, luring her deeper into the secrets hidden beneath the ocean’s surface.

As she tries to unravel the events that led to her mom fleeing the island sixteen years ago, Mara finds that the biggest secret of all is only the beginning.


SURFACING is currently available in ebook format from Amazon.com, BarnesandNoble.com, iTunes, Smashwords, and other ebook retailers. Available in audiobook from Audible, and in print at Amazon.

Visit my website for more information on the Swans Landing series and where to purchase the ebooks: http://www.shananorris.com/surfacing/

authorBio:
I'm the author of the young adult novels Troy High, The Boyfriend Thief, Something to Blog About, and Surfacing. I love books and mermaids and white chocolate. I also love animals and can't resist taking in one that needs a home, which is how I ended up with two dogs, five cats, and five chickens.

Surfacing is the first book of the Swans Landing series, which I am posting on Wattpad for free. title: Isolation & Fear (Damned of the 2/19th Book Seven)
description:
The Atlas crew has been torn apart. Most have ETS'd or left the military due to injuries incurred in line of duty. Of the original crew, only a handful remain. Trauma and shared pain have begun to drive apart the surviving members of Echo-Five-Actual. The Atlas Crew, mostly wiped out in a deadly explosion the year before, is fragmenting as promotions, replacements, and drop on requests have left the crew with more new faces than old. Those who remain of Echo-Five-Actual have been split into different work crews, promoted, ETS's, left due to injuries, or died.
  
  Accidents and a coordinated strike by the KGB have wreaked havoc on III CosCom, VII Corps and V Corps ability to wage war if the Soviet Union decides to invade Western Europe, and this has hit 2/19th hard. With most of the effective and experienced members dead, missing, or in the hospital, 2/19th's chain of command is shattered and people have slipped through the cracks.
  
  Including Stillwater, who is trapped, alone, on the mountain. And Cromwell, who is locked in the War Fighter Tunnels with 18 women, 7 of them pregnant, three infants, and two male soldiers undergoing chapters to put them out of the military.
  
  Bomber and Nagle are hospitalized, having barely survived the attacks that killed many other members of the unit. Bomber is comatose, the bullet meant to kill him trapping him in memories and dreams of the past. Nagle is in ICU, unable to speak after having been shot through the throat.
  
  Now, they don't even have each other.
  
  And nobody is coming to the rescue.
  
  Author's Note: Thanks to Twitter user @tikibomber for providing me with a Gaelic/English dictionary. http://www.focloir.ie/
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A last little bit of me, mostly rusted and damaged metal.

I'm a father of four and have two grand-children. Married for more than 20 years to the same woman who puts up with all of my crap and laughs while I do stupid things. I live in the Rogue Valley, Oregon, someplace I had dreamed of returning to for the 20 years I was gone.

A Cold War veteran of the US Army, I was released after my third medical board refused to return me to full duty. From there I worked in a factory, was a bartender, worked in a cannery, did construction, worked at two big store chains. I've worked for a carnival, slinging cable for a nation-wide cable company, and other jobs. I'm currently nothing more than a lazy old man who watches TV with his grandchildren and kids.

Three years of college before I just walked off one day, leaving my car and my books and everything else in the parking lot of the college. (My friends got it and took it and me home to my wife)

My absolute favorite movie is Freejack. Favorite song is Wasted Years by Iron Maiden. Favorite TV show is: Grey's Anatomy. Favorite book is Redliners  by David Drake.



*****NOTICE****

If you ask me to critique ANY military story, have your stuff straight. Don't try to excuse it with 'it's just fan-fiction' or 'it's not real' or 'I'm making it up, it doesn't matter', because it does to me. One look at my page should tell you that it matters to me.

If you ask me to read anything, I *WILL* critique it.

Initial Editing Pass: Heather Dawn Willard & Jose Quervo

title: Worst Cupid Ever
description:
Genevieve had a crush on her boss. Yes, HAD. After witnessing how much of a cold, dead-on-the-inside grinch he was, she gave her interest in the man a firm kick in the butt and promptly moved on with her life. 
So it was a little more than a surprise when she woke up one morning to a girl claiming to be a cupid and begging her to please fall in love with her killjoy boss. 

Adarosa has never gotten a match right, not when the couple had a 50% success rate or even a 99%. But when her existence as a cupid gets threatened, Adarosa is determined to do whatever it takes to make her final match work.

authorBio:
Female writer of stories.

Cheers to reading novels way into the night and feeling like a zombie the morning after. Worst best feeling ever.

I hope you enjoy my stories enough to read them way into the night. ❤
.
.
.

On the other hand...

Imagine chilling in your house and a stranger bursts in, yells some random bs, flings a flyer at your face then buzzes off all the while confident you'd do exactly what their flyer says. Hilarious huh? 😐

That's how advertising stuff on my message board or stories feels like. Hella annoying.

I will say this gently: I do not accept reading requests nor wish to check out your fantastic new writing platform. All I want is world peace.

You're free to hop into my message board to say hi, tho. I'd def say hi back and see how you're doing. *huggies*

title: #FreakshowFriday | ✔
description:
After a wild adventure involving a powerful magic book, former drug dealer Nathan has turned his life around: having abandoned his criminal ways, he now works a minimum wage job and is learning video editing on the side. But even though everything seems to be going smoothly, it's hard to truly leave the past behind, and his feelings for a certain YouTube star may have become more than strictly platonic. Not to mention that magic doesn't seem to be done with him yet...

Meanwhile, disgraced Internet celebrity Jamie is working her hardest to salvage her reputation and restore her YouTube channel Witchcraft Wednesday to its former glory. When a golden opportunity in the form of one of the world's most haunted islands crosses her path, the only thing she can do is take it with both hands. But it comes at a price: enduring her family on a two-week trip to Europe. Even with Nathan by her side, that may prove one of her toughest challenges to date.

And the haunted island might just house plenty of mysteries and dangers as well.

~Sequel to #WitchcraftWednesday~
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
AJ | She/her | 22 | Dutch | ONC winner | Wattys 2024 winner | Tired university student (History) | Autistic | Asexual | Writer who doth her best

I like to imagine myself as a really cool person, but in reality I triple-tie my shoelaces and occasionally get chased through the streets by hostile cats.

So yeah, that's me. Welcome to my profile! This is where I put all the lovingly crafted bundles of crazy that I call my stories. I mostly write whatever the hell strikes my fancy at any given moment, but common trends in my work are a paranormal/fantasy focus, a nice dose of mystery, and lots of dark and scary things that I balance out with my peculiar sense of dry, witty humour.

I like wacky plots with plenty of twists and turns to keep you on your toes, complex characters who may or may not be actual train wrecks, laugh-out-loud moments and the occasional philosophical musing. If you have a fondness for those things as well, you're in exactly the right place!

title: Dark Wings (Dark World #1)
description:
Domick slid into the seat next to me and looked over. "Did you see how he was looking at you?"
What?
"H-he's not even my friend, just a partner sometimes." I managed to stammer out.
"Trust me, he wanted to be more than just a partner." Domick sneered the last word.
A surprised laugh escaped me, and I leaned towards him to whisper, "What makes you think that."
"Because I notice when someone wants what's mine."
-----------------------------
After I blew out my candles on my 7th birthday, I started to see things no one else could.
Wings.
I know, crazy right?
After my Dads mysterious disappearance, I had to move in with my aunt who ignored my very existence.
Then I met a certain someone. Domick. From the moment I saw his wings I knew he was different, just like me.
Turns out I'm not the only "abnormal" around here.
Domick was sent to find me for a reason, but can he stand to give me up to the secretive Council?
Between Domick's possessiveness and me not knowing what the heck is going on.
It's going to be one crazy ride.

Sergeant Stillwater is a highly trained Special Weapons soldier, trained by the US Army to fight and win on the nuclear battlefield. Stationed on a mountaintop in the Fulda Gap during the Cold War, the barracks is buried beneath meters of snow every winter and the Rear Detachment cut off from all help. Every prior year has resulted in dozens of deaths and wounded via enemy action or madness induced violence.

This year he's woken up, badly injured, on the floor of a barracks room, with no clue how he got there, who he had for backup, or why he's been left for dead by persons unknown. He's not completely there, his brain malfunctioning and even the lizard unable to get all his systems running.

But someone has let the winter into the barracks, and Sergeant Stillwater, badly wounded and barely more than a dangerous animal himself, has to survive in Arctic conditions and see, not only who he has to defeat to survive, but who else might need his help.

I've worked for a carnival, slinging cable for a nation-wide cable company, and other jobs. I'm currently nothing more than a lazy old man who watches TV with his grandchildren and kids.

Three years of college before I just walked off one day, leaving my car and my books and everything else in the parking lot of the college. (My friends got it and took it and me home to my wife)

My absolute favorite movie is Freejack. Favorite song is Wasted Years by Iron Maiden. Favorite TV show is: Grey's Anatomy. Favorite book is Redliners  by David Drake.



*****NOTICE****

If you ask me to critique ANY military story, have your stuff straight. Don't try to excuse it with 'it's just fan-fiction' or 'it's not real' or 'I'm making it up, it doesn't matter', because it does to me. One look at my page should tell you that it matters to me.

If you ask me to read anything, I *WILL* critique it.

title: Vampirism | ✓
description:
Wern Muller is always hungry.

Unfortunately, eating for Wern is not as easy as grabbing takeout. Wern can only feed on the traumatic memories of people and animals. It's an exhausting and thought-eroding experience, but Wern has to eat, or terrible things happen. To make it easier, Wern works in places where he is in close contact with traumatized individuals.

Haruto Sato makes Wern hungry. 

Sato, a user of the food bank where Wern works, is dripping in trauma. Wern can see the memories slither and hiss on his neck and shoulders. The memories whisper to Wern, enticing him like sauce on dumplings. 

 Haruto could quench Wern's hunger for a full year...

So why won't Wern feed on him?

---

title: THE UNDYING | TWILIGHT
description:
When you're the Volturi's secretary, your greatest challenge is staying alive. After accepting the position, one woman decides that she will do whatever it takes to survive. But the longer she stays, the deeper she sinks. Once you're in, there's no getting out.

--- 

After getting caught trying to loot Volterra's city hall, Dahlia finds herself sitting before Aro, a peculiar man with blood-red eyes and skin as cold as death. Instead of turning her over to the police, he offers her a job as his secretary, and Dahlia hesitantly accepts. As she gets comfortable, however, Dahlia grows suspicious of her new employer and his staff. What secrets are they hiding? And what happened to the secretary before her?

Disclaimer: All publicly recognizable characters, settings, etc. are the property of Stephenie Meyer. I do not claim any ownership over them or the world of Twilight.

title: Annika Northman: Part One
description:
"Anytime we're around humans, someone always assumes I'm Eric's daughter. It's the only thing that makes sense in their minds. And I look like I could be his daughter, with my blonde hair and blue eyes. So it's simpler to just let them believe that. Anyway, Eric never corrects them."

Eleven years ago, Eric Northman obtained an infant promised to have great psychic ability, intending to mold her into a powerful, devoted asset. But for now, she's only a child, gifted but confused about many things -- such as why there is a man chained up in her guardian's basement.

title: My Heartless Alpha
description:
He is aggressive, sadistic and deadly 
She is innocent yet strong and stubborn

Rose moved to America to get away from her past and to have a fresh start. The last thing she expected was to meet the most attractive male she'd even laid eyes upon and find out that they are mates. 

She expected her first relationship to be full of love and compassion but as she is forced into the world of werewolves she quickly learns that her mate is Alpha Asher, the leader of the the BlackMoon pack. They are the deadliest and most powerful  pack ever known therefore it's with no doubt that their leader shares the same qualities. Rose vows to herself she'll never be with a man so hateful and malicious, who emotionlessly causes her to suffer, physically and mentally.

Asher is heartless, controlling and merciless with a desire to punish and deliver retribution running through his veins. He vows to himself that Rose won't be immune to his punishments, mate bond and all. 

But their lives are threatened from both of their pasts. A witch is attacking the pack, claiming she can break mate bonds once and for all. She is the darkness which all fear and Asher and Rose are forced to make decisions which could have serious consequences.

Will he break his promises to himself? Will they accept each other? 
After all, mates are sacred.


Best ratings:

#4 in Mated 
#2 in heartless

As Lorraine and her husband Ed navigate the treacherous world of demonic forces, they must confront their deepest fears to protect their family and ensure the safe arrival of their baby.

title: A Pocket Full of Posies (Book 1)
description:
Felix Reynolds, a university student with a sixth sense, has to uncover the truth about the past he has no memory of in order to unravel what really killed his family, and keep himself and his friends alive in the process.

                                                                       *****

Felix Reynolds is your typical nineteen-year-old guy - least if you don't account for the whole seeing dead people thing. He swears it's not as exciting as it sounds, and it's nothing too scary either. That is, until he starts university. 
  
His sister, Annabel, who happens to be dead, has helped him manouvere through life fairly easily up until now, but not even she can explain some of the strange things that are starting to happen. After meeting someone else who claims to be a spirit talker, things start turning really weird, really fast. Mysterious entities start following Felix, other spirits begin giving him grizzly warnings, and the accident that killed his family and wiped his memory may actually be nothing of an accident at all.
  
Felix Reynolds is your typical nineteen-year old guy, but he can't keep up that charade much longer.

                                                                       *****

(Book One of The Posies Trilogy)

★ Watty Awards 2019 winner ★

title: Nightshade - A Bonnie Bennett Story (Vampire Diaries / The Originals)
description:
Bourbon, jazz, and streets soaked in magic. New Orleans is an infamous supernatural playground, and the perfect place for a witch to feel right at home.

When Bonnie Bennett travels to The Big Easy for some much needed rest and relaxation, she unexpectedly encounters a few familiar faces. Despite their violent history and her resulting efforts to steer clear of Mikaelson family drama, she soon finds herself agreeing to help Klaus when his brother Elijah goes missing. Assuming they could get a little aid from the local covens, they quickly realize the eldest original vampire isn't the only mysterious disappearance in the Crescent City.

The clock is ticking. With the help of her unlikely ally and a handful of new friends from the French quarter, Bonnie must face off with a dark force fueled by vengeance and hell bent on wiping out every New Orleans witch in existence.

*Originally published as part of the Bennett Witch Chronicles series in the Amazon Vampire Diaries Kindle Worlds. With the dissolution of Amazon's Kindle Worlds program, I'm making the story available here for free.

ABOUT THE BENNETT WITCH CHRONICLES SERIES
With her magic restored, her best friends living happily ever after together as humans, and the love of her life waiting patiently for her on the other side, Bonnie Bennett is not going to just sit around and let her life pass her by. She's off to see the world! Join Bonnie as she journeys around the globe, encountering supernaturals in the most unexpected of places.  *Since the dissolution of the Kindle Worlds program, not all of the Bennett Witch Chronicles authors chose to republish their stories. However, if you're interested in reading their other published work, you can find links to their Amazon pages at https://bennettwitchchronicles.wordpress.com.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Bestselling author JENA GREGOIRE was born and raised in New Hampshire, USA, and despite her abhorrence for any season which dares to drop to a temperature below seventy degrees, she still currently resides there with her two children and several furbabies. Always a passionate reader, her love of urban fantasy books inevitably morphed into a love of writing them. She is currently working on two series - the Hellfire series and the Executioner series.

title: Monteverde Academy
description:
Featured in Wattpad Vampires Dark Romance Reading list.
_____
Sixteen year old Verina Theron had it all- she was rich, pretty and smart. But when she embarked on a summer road trip with her friend Bianca things don't go exactly as she planned.

Now, Verina is attending her fifth year at Monteverde Academy, determined to forget her past and have fun. But life isn't as rosy anymore- Her father is ashamed of her and thinks she has let down the name of their noble Carthan vampire clan and she has lost the urge to feed or sleep.

To top it all off, a vampire hunter is on the loose, having awakened from his ancient slumber. This is a school year full of chaos, betrayal, confusion, friendship, love and danger. 

Verina tries to survive this year, while her past threatens to catch up with her. Will she able to tell the difference between friend and foe and confront her past? Will she do the right thing or will she listen to her heart?

title: Forgotten
description:
Sansa had a secret. 
At the change of every season, a beautiful stranger would visit her in the woods. It was a promise made long ago, one that kept her going back into the forest in search of him every day. 
Only at the change of the seasons could they meet. 
Maybe it's fate. Maybe it's destiny. 
Maybe it's both. 
But one day her beautiful stranger - didn't come. 
The way she saw it, Sansa had two choices. 
She could continue waiting, alone in the woods, for him to come. 
Or she could go out, and reclaim her missing soul. 
This is the story of her journey, and how far one is willing to go for the one they love.

©world_joy_

title: Where She Belongs
description:
Looking at the motivational poster, I couldn't stop myself from snorting at the ridiculousness of it all. 'Why fit in, when you were born to stand out?' Who ever came up with that masterpiece was clearly not a wolf-shifter or had ever been a teenager. I would have  killed to fit in - literally.

----

When you're a single, twenty-four year old wolf-shifter, that is unable to actually shift, pack is the over extended family you try to avoid at Christmas. No matter how hard she has tried to blend in, Samara Franklin has been cursed with not only the inability to shift, but to be what is termed a 'lone wolf'. She has no desire to be one of the pack, to follow her alpha's lead and has always preferred her own company over that of her family. For a race that is so co-dependent on one another, Samara just isn't. 

Yet it's more than that, Samara knows it, feels it, but what exactly it is, is something she has been unable to discover. Now with reports of someone hunting her kind, could the answers she's been looking for finally be found?

description:

title: A Sprinkle of Stardust
description:
In a realm where nobody knows who to trust, the one constant in Lyrani Esch's life is her job as an agent for the Elven Council of Irylen Secret Intelligence (ECISI). 

It's easy enough to ignore the rumours about the villainy of the elf king Nash. People call it "The Curse of the Crown", but it's all hearsay. At least until Lyrani is assigned a mission to confront it. 

Her objectives are simple - get into Vlitavia Palace, gather intelligence on King Nash's operations, kill him and get out. But assignments are never as easy as they sound, and the stars are against Lyrani from the start. 

The deeper Lyrani delves into Nash's present, the more she learns of her past. With her startling discoveries comes the realisation that she must free Nash from a vicious trap or forfeit the realm and both their lives in the name of the curse. 

Because destinies entwined are never easily separated.

Season 1 of A Sprinkle of Stardust

WARNING: This story contains strong language and depictions of sexual assault that may be upsetting for some readers. Reader discretion is advised.

title: Traces of Delilah
description:
[Cover made by @Vanoeuxx]

After moving to Connecticut to room with her best friend for the summer, Chastity Blake doesn't know what to think of the charm bracelet she finds, caught under the floorboards in her new bedroom; with the initials D.K. engraved into it.

But ignoring the bracelet's origins isn't an option when she begins to live out strange scenarios as a young woman named Delilah. And when these scenarios start cutting too close to reality, she can't help but suspect they're memories. She quickly realizes though they're not her memories.

They're Delilah Kim's memories -- a girl who was believed to have committed her family's murder, then suicide. But her memories tell a different story other than what everyone else in town seems to know. And it's up to Chastity to place the missing pieces of the puzzle together.

[BEING REWRITTEN OFFLINE]

✨From our Stars - featured 10/14/20✨
✨Editor's Choice - featured 12/31/20✨

title: Fated
description:
Alpha of the Northfall pack, Adrian Carter is brash, stubborn, and hot-headed.  At 25 years of age, he must now make the most important decision of all:  choosing a mate for the biggest pack west of the Atlantic ocean. Fear in the packs is escalating due to rogue attacks, and there has never been a greater need for his female counterpart. But on the night of the choosing ceremony, Adrian finds the most unexpected surprise, his fated mate...who just wants to run away. 

Adira Williams has never believed in miracles. Orphaned at a young age with little food or security, she has learned to fend for herself a very long time ago. So when a handsome stranger literally crashes into her life to sweep her off her feet, she is a little skeptical and a whole lot confused. Now she must learn that not only are fairy tales very real...but so are its villains. 

As the first fated pair in over a decade, Adira and Adrian must fight not only rogue threats to the pack but also to earn the trust of a werewolf society that has had no fated interference in centuries. Most importantly they must earn the trust of one another in a relationship neither of them chose to start or wanted. 

 But a bigger battle is on the verge. There was a reason why fate stopped interfering in the first place...

title: My Monster
description:
Sophie Green calls the shots in sex and love as both her childhood nemesis, Shawn Henderson, and the mysterious new heartthrob, Landon Pearce, vie for her romantic attention. But when she discovers that she's the target of a secret world of monsters, can she keep her life under control?

                                                                      *****

Sophie is so anti-social she can barely stand other human beings, so she definitely draws the line at non-human entities like gryphons and dragons, especially when it comes to dating. But when tragedy hits, Sophie's whole world shatters and she's left with a choice: face the painful truths of life, or leave her humanity behind forever. If she wants to be the boss of her own fate, Sophie will have to learn to tell apart the mess in her heart from the madness of a world where monsters are real.

[[word count: 90,000-100,000 words]]
Cover designed by Ren T

description:

BOOK COVER COPYRIGHT
Invoke is a suspenseful paranormal romance that is imbued with magic and supernatural abound. Alongside the tension of anticipation throughout, you will find that within the pages there are moments that capture poignancy and impart a note of sadness as well. Scarlett Calvin is a teacher who has just moved into a house that she spontaneously purchased. She soon discovers that there is company dwelling in her new homestead, but not of this dimension. Being a Medium, Scarlett reluctantly communicates, but soon learns she was destined to the call of the dead and the house she now calls home. Before long, she unearths pieces of history that are tied to her, and to the man she quickly binds her heart to. A deeply hidden secret must be unveiled in order for the past to heal, and for the restless spirits who haunt her to finally find peace. Filled with ghosts, magic, Voo-Doo priestess and more, Invoke follows Scarlett through a time of reckoning. The past must be met, and fate must have its due time. Scarlett is led to a place in the recess of her mind that she has denied all along, which will either be the restoration or downfall of her.

title: Creepypasta (Rewritten)
description:
I know it's not mainstream or relevant anymore, but I still like Creepypastas. A lot. After I first heard of Slender Man, it didn't take long for me to find out that he was but a tiny piece of a larger puzzle. There were a lot of stories with many more characters that many people liked. But unfortunately, it took me years to find out why the fandom was dying:  Many stories, like Jeff the Killer, Eyeless Jack, Laughing Jack, Play With Me, and so on, were flawed. EXTREMELY flawed. The characters' actions didn't really make sense, there were a lot of misspellings, poor grammar, and cliches that made them broken from the start. I wasn't capable back in the day, but now I will do my best to find the best versions of their stories from the internet (or write them myself) and publish them here. I hope what I'm doing is worth it. If you have any suggestions, please send requests, I'll happily take them.

title: Breaking Free (BXB)
description:
Milo was completely ordinary until an extra-ordinary war threatened his home and everyone he holds dear. Now he must find it within himself to fight for a world he barely knows, navigate complicated relationships and twisted loyalties to save everyone he has ever loved or die trying.
                   _______________________
My heart panged at the thought of being alone.
Owen got up to leave, my body now thoroughly warmed and safe under the mounds of blankets. I reached for his arm, holding him there for a second, begging him with my eyes.

"Please don't leave me alone," I mumbled into the pillows, my words muffled by the fabric, and slowly, as if I would shatter into a million pieces if he moved too harshly, Owen crawled in beside me, holding me in his arms.

"Ok." He murmured into my hair. "Ok." He repeated, and I drifted off. For the first time in a long time, I felt safe.

title: Black Butler: Red - Part 2 (Sebastian Michaelis Fanfiction) (FINISHED)
description:
He is the reaper of souls...

He is my moving shadow.

He is the darkness swelling inside me.

He is my black soul.

But he will save me.

*****

Sebastian Michaelis was known for his schemes-he was known as the devil hidden in the night-but he will not show unless he deems you worthy.

A worthy soul.

Even years later, I recalled the night of my parents murder, their blood staining my hands, and how I was hauled away from them by men in a van, and I was tortured for days.

It wasn't until he heard my cry of despair that Sebastian came, and he promised me vengeance on those vile demons, on those who murdered my parents. He told me that all he wanted in return...

Was my soul.

So I signed a contract with him.

I recalled this happening before, because of my English ancestors who were stowed away in the UK; they always warned me from making a deal with the devil. 

My parents told me a story of my great grandfather from hundreds of years ago; he who signed a contract with a vile demon in order to get revenge on his parents death.

My great ancestor... Ciel Phantomhive.

I never thought I'd fall in his shoes, but here I was staring into Sebastian's blood-red eyes.

History really repeated itself, didn't it?

I made a deal with the devil,

And I don't regret it one bit. 

****this book is a fanfiction, the idea, some characters, and story arc do NOT belong to me! They belong to the original creators of Black Butler and the author of it, as well, Yana Toboso****
***many images in this book do not belong to me, either! all except for the fan arts and my original characters!****

human curiosity ... it's what brought us to where we are today . Everything mundane in our life could never have existed had the humanity never questioned why , how or what ...

but sometimes ... giving in to curiosity could lead to dire consequences ... 

we began researching on a secret project that was meant to revolutionize humanity as we know it . little did we know we were in fact foolishly playing with fire ... or maybe it was the fire playing us into it's clutches . 

those shadows should not be experimented with ... they are far too unpredictable and dangerous to be tampered with . 

but our supervisors wouldn't listen , they would stop at nothing to satisfy their curiosity ... 

I have decided I will stop this madness ... the results of my actions may change the world forever , but nothing would ever be worse than what these experiments may bring upon us . 

I pray that I may succeed in putting a stop to this

title: Rosalind: Book One
description:
When a witch disguised as a beggar comes to cruel Lord Caspian's home asking for charity, he brutally attacks her. Hell-bent on revenge, the witch turns Caspian into a beast, kills his wife, and turns his son into a wolf. The curse causes a century of snowfall and insurmountable death. 

One hundred years later, when the Hershel men trespass on the Beast's property during a hunt, Lord Caspian captures and threatens to slaughter them for their crime. 

Harlan Hershel offers his daughter Rosalind to the beast for a month to save his sons. 

But reality and illusions blur when the Beast sees Rosalind. Believing she is the reincarnation of his wife, he becomes fiercely drawn to her. 

Though terrified at first Rosalind grows fonder of the abominable lord and the cold surrounding his land. The closer she gets to the secrets he keeps, especially of the mysterious stranger in the violin room, the more he awakens a darkness in her she wants to explore. 

When Rosalind's true calling is discovered, that she is the one prophesied to kill the lord, her desire for him threatens to destroy the person she once was, and all of Transylvania. 

Beauty and the Beast meets Dracula.  Other influences: Alice in Wonderland and the tale of Hades and Persephone. 

There's a sequel called Bellua.

Highest ranking #1 Gothic, #1 Dracula, #1 Dark Romance, #2 Horror, #1 ONEMILLIONPROJECT.  Amby Awards 2023 TOP PICK in Paranormal.

Rosalind won first place in PrettyInPunk's Paranormal Romance category and tied for third place in the Paranormal/Supernatural including Vampire/Werewolf category in the One Million Project challenge.

After the attack on Havenbrooke, Alex Kingsley―a social outcast turned war hero―is now the most powerful woman in Ells. But her life, along with Will's future and the fate of 2,000 demonic prisoners, rests in the hands of the High Court. 

And the weeds have every reason to condemn her.

It's up to Alex and her peers to shift their people's perceptions of women, enemies, and military precedents before the nation's antiquated foundations collapse. 

But to the west, Regulas is already preparing his retribution, and humanity's clock is ticking.

title: Quick Time: El contraataque de la carne de cañón.
description:
Camelia depues de pasar mas de 10 años en el hospital estaba muriendo y, afortunadamente, se convirtió en el misionero de contraataque en nombre de la pobre carne de cañón.
　　Como resultado, Camelia jugó varias vidas en un mundo tras otro, conociendo a todo tipo de personas que decían: "Eres despiadado, eres frío, eres irrazonable". Encontró todo tipos de perras desvergonzadas e intrigantes por lotes.
　　Se encontró con todo tipo de críticos...
"¿Existe todavia alguna belleza de verdad en este mundo?"  Grito Camelia enojado.
Ya sea abuso de cabrones o perras de loto blanco; ella, Camelia es muy hábil.

Misión: Transmigrar mundo por mundo, cumple el deseo del dueño original.

description:
BOOK TWO IN THE NOX HAVEN SERIES:


When you look in the mirror what do you see? Does your reflection look exactly like you or does it mirror the person you truly are. title: Courage of the Spirit {Fanfiction Book 1}
description:
Spirited Away Fanfiction: Chihiro is 20 and at university. Her brush with the Spirit World still influences her life today. She is trying hard to fit in with the "real world", but she is finding this difficult and the cracks are starting to show

This was my first ever novel. It was written over a decade ago. It is imperfect, written with more passion than skill.

Written under username Velf. 

All art gifted as fanart to me.

Very rough round the edges but this was my start and I won't be editing it. I post it here because it will always be loved by me if no one else. I've been widely plagiarised, but I don't care. Fanfiction is meant to be fun and I own absolutely nothing.

authorBio:
In another life, Anna Velfman graduated from Stirling University with an Environmental Science degree and moved to the Shetland islands having just got married. Later she returned to mainland Scotland to train as a teacher. However, having written online for years as a way to help manage her dyslexia, she decided she would be happier aiming to write more. She now works with children with additional needs between creating books.

When she is not writing, she can be found gaming on the PC she built, painting and sewing (badly) watching anime and Kdramas, walking her dog, riding her bright blue ebike, or chatting with her readers on discord.

She loves living in Scotland, where she is raising two boys with her husband. 

She has a bi-monthly (sometimes) Podcast called Writer Rambles where she talks about her writing and chats to other authors about their work.

title: CRYPTID
description:
Paranelope, a ghost hunter who's been cancelled for faking evidence, must discover the truth behind a local cryptid in order to clear her name.

--
 
Penelope, better known as the ghost hunter PARANELOPE to her millions of followers, has only ever wanted one thing: to find solid, irrefutable proof of the supernatural. But when her ex-boyfriend outs all of her evidence as fake, her fans and the rest of the Internet are quick to turn on her. Now not only is Penelope betrayed, heartbroken, and #cancelled... She's not sure what to believe in anymore.

Seeking refuge, Penelope lands in the quiet little mountain town of Ridgestone, far away from the city and reliable cell service. But Ridgestone isn't as quiet as it first appeared, and washed-up influencers aren't the only thing haunting its surrounding woods. The little town is home to a cryptid, a legendary monster, just like the ones she used to hunt. A monster that seems particularly interested in Penelope. 

If only someone would believe her...

ABOUT ME
=========
Telling stories is something I've always done, but until recently, they took the form of comics or illustrations. While I have dabbled in short fiction before, NaNoWriMo 2009 was the first time I managed to finish an entire novel. Writing that first book seemed to spark something in me, and I've kept writing ever since. Funny where life takes you, huh?

Christmas goblin alter-ego @ChristmasRomance

COMMENTING & READING POLICY
============================
Please don't ask me to read your stories. I wish I could, but I get too many requests to make any promises. I do try to check out everyone who comments, but I'm a lurker by nature. 👻 Advertising, however, is just rude. And also against Wattpad guidelines. Don't.

COVER DESIGN
============
All illustrations and designs are my own. I am not taking requests or commissions, sorry.

title: UNSEEN: Undone Realms Book 1
description:
2014 WATTY WINNER!! (Collector's Dream Award for being one of the most want-to-read stories of 2014!). A Wattpad Featured story, and a Summer 2015 #WattpadBlockParty featured book!  

Undone Realms series: bk. 1

Out of countless realms in the multiverse, Clara is trapped in one that won't let her breathe. 

Her life consists of a hotel in a tiny pocket universe overlapping our own. Population: one. She doesn't know how she came to be there, how she can exist without breathing, or why she can see into the breathing world, but no one can see into hers. 

Nolan doesn't know any more about parallel worlds or pocket universes than Clara does.  Running away from his abusive father, he finds work at the hotel. Depressed, Nolan wants to disappear as much as Clara wishes to be seen. There is little hope that they'll share anything beyond a palpable loneliness until the morning the barrier separating their planes of existence is breached and for the first time, Clara's unseen world is made visible. As Nolan is slowly drawn into Clara's breathless reality, he must decide whether the love of one person is worth crossing into a world that may never let him back into his own.

title: The Faerie Curses
description:
A war is brewing in The Faerie Realm; it's up to a knight, a prince, and an outcast to stop it. 
  
  When a sinister and mysterious master takes control of a group of cursed faeries known as the sprites, they want revenge against the fae...and they will stop at nothing to obliterate the kingdoms known as the Faerie Courts in a slaughtering attack on Midsummer's night. 
  
  When Marissa, a Winter Knight with a dark past, joins forces with the arrogant prince Glen and the runaway sprite Diandre, she knows that they are the fae's only chance of defeating The Master.
  
  The first step? Become fugitives. 
  
  These three will have to race against time to recover the Objects of Power: a wand and a scepter that have been lost for centuries. But to prevent a dark war, Marissa, Glen, and Diandre will be tested like they've never imagined. 
  
  And it might just cost them their lives.

title: Bound: A Supernatural Story ✔️
description:
Holly Gaines is a young witch, orphaned after the death of her parents years earlier. She bides her time taking art classes and waiting for the day she can finally leave behind the streets of Savannah. 

When two handsome strangers roll into her favourite bar, she knows she can't trust them. After all, they're Hunters. And Hunters don't mix well with witches. Hunters are the reason her parents are dead - or so she thinks.

But after a near death experience, Holly finds her very soul bound to one of one of the brothers, a man she never thought she could trust. Now her and the Winchesters have to work together to take down the menacing presence that's been stalking her city... one that's got his fangs aimed right for Holly's throat. 

****

This is a fanfic novella based on the show Supernatural, but it doesn't require knowledge of the show to enjoy. Featuring an original FMC.

title: The Devil Lives Next Door
description:
"Where do you think you're going?" He asked with amusement in his voice, his peppermint breath hitting my ear making my breath hitched. I was too scared to move, I felt like I was paralyzed as his fingers brushed down my arm, making tingles run down my spine and shots of pleasurable electricity went through my arm. "You are mine!" He growled in my ear, making my knees buckle.   Brooke is deaf and mute because of it, she has been living alone since she got out of high school and away from her drug addict, abusive father. She is now living a comfortable life as a painter. One day she was on her porch painting when a moving truck arrived next door. Her curiosity got the best of her and she took a look, only to see another car follow and a sex god exits the vehicle. Brooke has no idea that the sex god is none other than the devil himself and he has only one goal in mind... To retrieve what's his.    Cover made by me kenralove12

title: One Fateful Night
description:
*Formerly known as the Betas Daughter::::  The Betas Daughter is getting a makeover. I have decided to clean up the errors, and fix some of the holes and gaps I had in the story to start with. Thus the new name. One Fateful Night.*

Growing up in the Blood Moon Pack, Emily Thompson daughter of Beta Benjamin Thompson had so much to love about home. A goal of being Head Tracker within her reach, family who loves her, a best friend who is there for her.   

One fateful night changed it all, shunned by her mate, she returns to her pack to find it under attack. Left alone she must put the pieces back together of her heart and help the remaining packs find the one leading the Rogues on a killing spree.
