title: Eternal Flame ~ A Pemberley Fairy Tale
description:
The house known as Pemberley stands in an isolated valley on the edge of the High Peak, as intriguing and inaccessible as Sleeping Beauty's briar-shrouded castle. 

To historian Liz Pargeter it's a mystery to be solved. How can a stately home of such importance have sunk into obscurity? What happened to the former owners - the Darcys - who disappeared from local records after the early 19th century? And why is so little known about Pemberley's current residents? 

Fitzwilliam Darcy, the former Master of Pemberley, has been dead for many years. When Liz walks through the door of his ancestral home, she awakens more than just his curiosity. She may also be the key to his salvation.


Eternal Flame is a contemporary fairytale romance. It is a sequel to Jane Austen's "Pride and Prejudice", set two hundred years after the events of the original novel.

A Wattpad Featured story between March 2015 and July 2017 .
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm a hobby writer who likes to share my stories with readers. I write mostly for fun, and I prefer the soppy romantic stuff with a smidgen of conflict and a guaranteed happy ending. I write the kind of stories I like to read, and hope others like them too.

When I read, it's mostly romance, historical fiction or occasionally a bit of fantasy. Some of my favourite authors are Jane Austen, Georgette Heyer, Dorothy L. Sayers, Terry Pratchett, Dorothy Dunnett, Julia Quinn and Raymond E. Feist. I love watching period dramas, TV archaeology, history documentaries and cooking programmes.

My area of special historic interest is Britain in the early 19th century. I particularly love the English Regency period: the manners, the clothes, and how different the world was then to the way it is today.

Thank you, Wattpad, for including "Eternal Flame" in the Featured Stories list between March 2015 and July 2017.

title: A Little Bite of Magic Goes a Long Way (BxB)
description:
Matt Rose is nothing special. Though he's friends with witches and vampires, monsters and ghosts, Matt himself has always been painfully mundane. So, when an accident reveals he has a gift of his own, Matt is overjoyed. For his husband, Ben, on the other hand, it seems like one weird thing too many. 

With a growing rift between them, Matt can't understand why Ben doesn't love the magic in their lives the way he does, and why he seems able to make time for just about everyone and everything except for him. Finally, when things reach a breaking point just days before their first anniversary, Matt is devastated.

With his heart in pieces, he decides to take matters into his own hands, get the truth, and win Ben back. As he quickly discovers, though, magic is fickle--a coin with two sides. A little bit of it can go a long way, and not always in the direction he might have hoped.

---
About this story:
This story features characters from the Ari & Soren books, 'Bound by Blood (formerly titled 'Breath of Osiris') and 'Hecate's Gift.' It is an interlude between the end of book 2 and the beginning of Book 3. -SGG, 2020/06/05)
---
Rating: PG 13, some language and sexuality, non-explicit.
---
Disclaimer: This is a work of fiction. Names, characters, businesses, places, events, locales, and incidents are either the products of the author's imagination or used in a fictitious manner. Any resemblance to actual persons, living or dead, or actual events is purely coincidental.

title: The Order Of Machiavelli
description:
"I swear to you, I won't stop until your legs are shaking, and the neighbors know my name..." Dominikov Machiavelli

~~~~~

  Meet VIVIENNE FITZMAN, multi billionaire
"well, let me introduce myself. I'm the bitch you try as much as possible to never fuck with. I'm going to make you think that you're dying...feel like you're dying...even see that you're dying, meanwhile in real life, you could never have been more fucking alive"

"YOU'RE SUPPOSED TO BE A FEDERAL JUDGE!" he screamed out

"yes I am. but sometimes I act as jury and executioner too"

Now, what happens when she makes a mistake?
 She fucked with the wrong man... 

Dominikov Machiavelli. the leader of the order of Machiavelli. An organization that made the Illuminati seem like child's play. A man that held the reigning strings over world leaders. This wasn't the mafia. No. this was the man you sent to exterminate the fucking mafia. No one outside the order had ever seen how he looked like and lived to tell about it. A shadow behind an organization that could grant you your innermost three wishes. for a price of course. oh, he wasn't a genie. He was the devil.

"I want to watch your control slip. watch you reach your breaking point and not be able to do anything about it. And when you eventually scream out all that tension fastly building up within you, knowing you've lost, I'm going to be right here, with my hands on the fucking trigger. My name the only thing on your thoughts before I send you off."

 Two people who are good at control. Except he's stronger. better. faster. And a lot more richer. A man who never thought he'd meet the girl worthy of him. He got a vixen who's every movement screamed sex on six inch heels!

"This is toxic! we're going to be the death of each other. We both have the ability and capacity to burn, and we're going to burn each other to the ground"

"Good. let's fuck in the ashes then. I swear to you, I won't stop until your legs are shaking and the neighbours know my name "
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Enamored | ✓
description:
He caressed my hair gently, his fingertips touching large chunks of silky strands,  ❝I wanted to give you a chance to win and escape me. I couldn't wait anymore. I need you now.❞ 

*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*

Los Angeles; known as the City of Angels. It is a city of opportunity where the stars illuminate, a city close to breathtakingly beautiful beaches and where swaying palm trees decorate the modern city. However, beneath it's façade, lays the city of the wild and corrupt.

 The City of Angels is a misnomer because its citizens' souls are all conquered under the prince of the Nether Realm; Daemon. 

All except for one. 

Celeste is a 17 year old girl hoping to ease her parents' financial burdens. She is the beacon of light and purity that draws Daemon to her. He reveled in her innocence because he would have another soul meant for heaven damned in his realm.

Daemon proposes a deadly game to attain her soul with freedom to live as the prize. The rules of the game are now set and the players have been decided. 

However, as the game continues, a deadly love triangle occurs, and a potential war between heaven and hell looms. 

The game maker and his players might not be able to leave this game unscarred. 

*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~*

title: Lost in Darkness
description:
"Suddenly, I found our faces so close together, I could feel his warm breath caressing my face. It smelt slightly of mint, and an undercurrent that was all Cole-pure masculine goodness.I breathed in deeply, my eyes briefly fluttering closed. God, since when did he smell so good?"

Raven has lost everyone. Her mother and twin sister died, her father left, leaving her in alone in the world with powers that she barely understands. All that Raven has left is Cole, her best friend. 

When a dangerous enemy resurfaces intent on killing Raven, Cole swears he will do all he can to protect her. As the two get pushed closer together, will their combined powers be enough to save them? Will Raven be able to stop her heart from shattering to a thousand pieces?

title: Fate and Destiny | Book 2
description:
~Forever Series: Book 2~
Prequel to Changed Forever

***
He hates his life.

Everything about it was terrible. He had lost so much from such a young age. He lost his family, he lost his friends and in the end, he lost himself.

He became the property of the Black Market, an assassin who takes the lives of the innocent. It's either kill or get killed. So he became a monster, but the world made him that way.

His luck finally runs out and he's arrested. He discovers a world he never knew existed. He discovers love.

Forbidden love.

It was a forbidden and dangerous love. Humans and werewolves were never meant to be together, especially if they weren't mated. It was a taboo, a taboo that would ruin them both.

But maybe everything happens for a reason...



***
"It's more than love. It's fate, it's destiny".

"It's fate and destiny... but maybe it's also karma".

title: Rogue Luna
description:
Solena Lorena Lily Midnight is on the run from every pack in America. She enters territories without a word and leaves behind her initials LM. She's well known for taking advantage of female werewolves and killing anyone who gets in her way. She's on a dangerous mission to deliver wolf souls to female werewolves all over America. A mate is not an option.

The Alpha King is the only wolf who is more feared than Lily Midnight. Lily Midnight has been causing unrest among the packs for 7 years and the other alphas are demanding answers. The Alpha King uses all his resources to catch the elusive werewolf. 

When the two come together, they are surprised by each other. An infamous rogue and the Alpha king as mates. A match made in heaven? Or a disaster waiting to happen?

title: Shadows in Plain Sight
description:
Elena has spent her life brushing off the apparitions she sees as tricks of her imagination. A woman in her mother's garden, a ghostly man tied to a secondhand couch-she convinces herself they're not real because no one else believes her. But when she teams up with paranormal investigators Sam and Colby, Elena learns her visions are more than figments of her mind. As she confronts lingering spirits and unravels their stories, she discovers her unique ability to bridge the living and the dead-and realizes this is only the beginning.

title: Cursed ✔️
description:
Genre: Horror/Mystery 

'Sometimes It's Better To Keep Things Untouched' 

A perfect beach trip. A mesmerising emerald stone. It looked so hypnotic and beautiful. It's just a stone, right? What could go wrong? 

What John didn't know was that his innocence was just the beginning of their ends. And whom does the whispers belong to that keeps echoing in John's head? 

Since the day John brought the stone home, eerie and creepy things began happening and even the deaths in his family. Is that all just a coincedence? And whom does the shadow belongs to that John keeps seeing? 

John, his sister, Hannah, and their friend, Emily, must act fast before the curse gets them. 

Will they be able to solve the mystery of the curse before it's too late? And who are the mutilated creatures following John around?

title: Dead Lines
description:
In Life Lines, she became Elite. In Love Lines, she became Assarion. In Dead Lines, she becomes...something quite different.

Natalie Abernathy has been through a lot since the beginning of the school year. She never would've guessed dying and then being brought back would be one of them.

After that fateful night in the corn field, life for Natalie has slowed to a crawl and turned uncertain. She's learning how to balance her normal lifewith her new Assarion one. However, not everything is working out how she would like. She can't remember everything about how she died and how she was brought back. Some of the details are gone but one thing she does know for certain. Caelus is hiding inside one of her friends. She just can't recall which one.

Caelus is lurking in the shadows and no one knows why he hasn't put his plan to end the world and start anew into action yet. With the newly released monsters causing chaos and destruction all over the world, the Elite are forced to work together despite their differences. Enacting a tense peace between the two sides.

With Homecoming and Halloween fast approaching, Natalie can't help but feel like everything is changing, the life she once knew and loved being drowned out by visions and a constant foreboding that the end to everything won't turn out how everyone would hope.

title: I See Dead People. . . [ BNHA × OC ]
description:
They say that there is no escape from destiny. 

Most people dare to be heros, protagonists of their own stories and champions of their battles. But dead parents, plus a creepy Quirk, on top of a life being raised in a cemetery doesn't exactly equal a relatable main character. 

This isn't the tale of how I became the biggest hero, nor any hero for that matter. Instead, this is just the story of how I tried to 𝘢𝘷𝘰𝘪𝘥 being the world's greatest hero and just live a normal life. . . and how that whole plan derailed the day I was accepted into UA High.

How much of a hero can you even be as an extra?

title: Sentiments & Reason ✓ (Dogs, Bats & Monkeys series, Book II)
description:
"Dad's gone," my cousin's voice was barely above a whisper. "You must come home for the Evaluations," she uttered and the phone line went dead.

*****

After Keri's Uncle - the Alpha of the Silver Bullets pack - loses his battle with cancer, the young woman is summoned away from University and back home to take part in the Evaluations - a series of challenges that would help determine who would take on the role of the new leader. 

Once the responsibility of caring for over a hundred werewolves falls on Keri, she must stay with her pack in Woodville, relinquishing her lifelong dream of becoming a lawyer. The young female soon discovers that her new position is even more demanding that she'd always thought it would be, but she is determined to prove herself and justify the trust placed on her. Respected for her good judgment, physical abilities and compassion, the twenty-four year old lacks in one of the most important aspects an Alpha could: she has yet to choose a mate, or so the pack thinks.

Little do they know, Keri has already recognized the man to bear that title, but deciding that his personality and lifestyle might prove detrimental to her wards, she gives up on another dream: the dream of being with someone she could confide in and always depend on. With an unknown enemy determined to ruin the Silver Bullets, never before had Keri needed that man as much as she does now. Things only get worse when he somewhat reluctantly offers his help; now Keri must fight not only the pack's foe, but also herself as she's forced to work with the person her heart desires but her mind does not approve of.

*****

title: MirrorMirror
description:
After a traumatic breakup, Cassidy moves into a new home. In an old wardrobe, he finds a mirror on which messages begin to appear from a brutally murdered girl who insists ghosts don't exist...

###

Mirror, mirror on the wall, who's the murderer of you all?

Cassidy is attempting to rebuild his life after a torturous breakup. He moves into a new house, where an old wardrobe hides a mirror, and a deadly secret. On that mirror, messages appear from a girl brutally murdered years before. A girl he used to have a crush on. A crime that remains unsolved. Can Cass stand back when the messages lead to the killer's true identity?

No, and that might just be the death of both him and the siblings desperate to help.

"Just when I thought you couldn't get any better at writing, you proved that you're a master at this!!!"
"Wow, that's crazy!"
"Excellent as always."

title: Death Angel
description:
An original and unique Paranormal Romance Mystery that will leave you on the edge of your seat and guessing until the end! 

When nineteen-year-old Vanessa Hunter falls to her death, she realizes her life as she knows it, is over.

But when Death strikes a bargain with her in exchange for her immortal soul, she takes the ultimate gamble and becomes a Death Angel: gifted with the powers of Death and responsible for finding and harvesting lost souls on earth.
 
Now Vanessa has to perform Death's dirty deeds, forced to deal with all sorts of unimaginable evils: Vampires, Demons from Hell, and Hedge Fund Managers. Not to mention this girl Rina, with special powers, who is absolutely obsessed with taking down the new Death Angel.

On top of all that, Vanessa still has to solve the riddle to her murder; a riddle that points back to her fiance, Daniel Ashcroft. Thrust into this strange new world, Vanessa finds her emotions in turmoil. She still loves Daniel with all her heart, but now finds herself strangely drawn to Death; a being who is at once mysterious, infuriating, and madly attractive.

But things are not at all what they seem, and there are many things that Vanessa needs to uncover, unsettling things about her former life, her family's money, and Death, her newfound "savior" who doesn't always seem to be on her side.

Can Vanessa tell friend from foe, and solve the riddle of her murder to find out if the man she's loved all along, was truly her lover? Or her greatest enemy?

Copyright © 2015 Michael Limjoco

description:

title: The Survivors: Body & Blood (book 3)
description:
HOW MANY ANSWERS YOU SEEK ARE JUST A PART OF YOU, WAITING TO BE FOUND?


The game has changed.

Fresh from her first brush with mortality, a fragile Sadie Matthau is playing human in New York while the Survivors endure unimaginable tragedy. Wrought with the first deaths of their own kind, a tyrant who will torture them, and an opponent more terrifying than anyone could have foreseen, the Survivors are facing their end.

Told from three points of view, The Survivors: Body & Blood is a bloodcurdling, mind-bending, heart-stopping ride. As Sadie and the Winters uncover more enemies, more history, and more answers, they find themselves brought closer together and ripped further apart. And all the while, a haunting Alexander Raven lurks at the edge of Sadie's lifeline, at the darkening fringes of her mind.

As the Survivors descend into chaos, Sadie realizes a painful truth: the deepest of secrets leave the darkest of marks. Caught between a terrifying fantasy and her own grim reality, Body & Blood is the story of Sadie's dance with her demons - future, past, and present.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Amanda Havard has been telling stories since before she could write. She grew up in Dallas, Texas, where her first book was published in her elementary school library at age 7. She received bachelor's and master's degrees in education from Vanderbilt University. She currently resides in Nashville, Tennessee with her baby grand piano and more story ideas than she could tell in one lifetime.

The Survivors is her first novel, and it is the first in a series of five. It is her heart and soul, her life and love. And now she shares it with you.

Get more info, including Survivor music, maps of character travel, blog, and even a longer bio at http://amandahavard.com.

Keep up with the series and Amanda on Facebook: http://facebook.com/thesurvivors and http://facebook.com/amandahavard

Plus, listen to original songs, covers of soundtrack songs, and more on her YouTube page at http://youtube.com/amandahavard

Amanda-- and her characters!-- are on Twitter, and they love to talk.

title: Unexpected Lycan Book 1
description:
Alexandra Rodgers has been through 2 failed marriages and the death of her grandmother. She moves to Milford Lake hoping for some peace and quiet. Alex swore she would not let another man hurt her. Then she meets her neighbor across the lake, Trevor. Will she finally get her happily ever after or will her secrets be the death of her.

Trevor is an Alpha. He is shocked that Alex is his mate. She is human. Alphas only have Alpha females as mates. He tried to keep it a secret, but his no good uncle found out and he wants her. He does everything in his power to protect her but, someone else wants her dead.


There will be some mild language and sexual content. The R-rated excerpts are in a separate book on my profile. Follow me then add the private chapters to your library.

Follow me on Twitter @WooleySandra

title: The Third Child
description:
Zack, a half-elf and the illegitimate son of the twins' father, lives alone in a self-built cabin in the forest. Despite his magical talents, he is shunned by his father and the village. After his mother's death, he becomes a bounty hunter, taking jobs from the Sable Dragon guild. On his 16th birthday, he is tasked with capturing a bandit named Rurik. Using his skills, Zack tracks down and defeats Rurik, bringing him back to the guild for his reward. Despite his success, Zack remains determined to prove himself and overcome his past.

title: After School
description:
Paranormal activity occurring in the hallways. Haunted classrooms. Creepy washrooms. Mysterious forces. Strange happenings. That is the type of school they go to.  And that is the type of school they will have to escape.

~ When transfer student, Yuta, starts his grade 11 year at Willesden high school, everything seems normal at first. The American school is different from what he is used to, but it is a shift he can adjust to. That is, until one day, he and his homeroom classmates are locked in, after school- with no way of escaping. They realize that the paranormal activity that has been occurring to them since September 3, 1946, wasn't a dream.

This unlikely group of students must unite and fight against their fears, to escape and erase the curse of their school. But why is this happening to them? And who is the one purposely causing their turmoil?

This is the story of a boy who had been wrongfully gifted the powers of a witch and of a 200-year-old man who covers his face with a human mask.

title: Angel
description:
* Highest ranking: #1 Vampire #1 Dracula  #1 BoyxBoy #2 Cinderella *
Abused terribly since he was a boy, Kylo dreams of freedom. When his wicked stepsisters get invited to the handsome Lord Vincent's masquerade ball, the women believe they are going as potential brides. Forbidden to go by his evil stepmother, Kylo sneaks to the elegant manor to get a look at the mysterious lord. When he's captured for trespassing, Kylo fears a whipping yet the lord takes mercy upon him and invites him to the ball as his guest.

As the night progresses, Kylo finds himself falling for the bewitching lord. Upon the stroke of midnight, Kylo flees from the ball, losing one of his gloves in his haste. 

When the lord searches the homes wanting to return the glove, he finds Kylo badly beaten. Realizing he is being abused, Lord Vincent returns that night to rescue the young man.

Soon Kylo is pulled into a world of darkness, blood, and vampires. 

A sequel is available: The Angel And The Vampire. https://www.wattpad.com/story/288753789-the-angel-and-the-vampire-the-sequel-to-angel

This is my second entry for the Open Novella Contest 2021. My prompt is number 32: "All that we see or seem is but a dream within a dream" Edgar Allan Poe

This is a Cinderella meets Dracula tale. 

Warning for typical Christine darkness, abuse, death, vampire stuff, sex, bad words, and other mature themes.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Though Wendy may have been kicked out of the nursery when she grew up, she still lingers outside by the window reminiscing about the past - the good and the bad. And when things get bewildering or it simply gets too cold, she finds an aging Peter Pan taking her by the hand and whispering to her like some broken record, "We never should have left Neverland."

If I tamed my demons then none of my angels would want to stay.

When I grow up, I want to be the Night King.

title: Shards of Black Glass (A Ghost Adventures Story)
description:
Saira never thought she was anything special. She thought seeing ghosts was a normal thing for everyone.

Until she meets Zak Bagans, she knows nothing. 

Invited to be a camera person on the TV show Ghost Advetures, Saira is about to make a choice that will change her life. Her ability of sight will greatly help the GAC, but it is also a curse.

As the lockdowns pile up and the ghosts come out to play, will Saira be able to control her power, or will it shatter her life into black shards of glass?

*This is the first book in the Shards of Glass series. Please comment if you like this book. I appreciate your comments and thoughts on my writing. ;p*

Disclaimer: I do not own, nor have any connection to, GAC or the people in this book. All portrayals of the characters are fictional and are only meant for the storyline.

title: Beneath The Skin (Twin Peaks, #1)
description:
New house, new life, new start. 

Lucinda Cartwright's life was thrown into chaos after her father and step mother died. She became the sole provider for her younger sister, Mary-Beth in a single moment. Uncertainty cloaked her and she decided that moving across country would help them have a fresh start. 

Twin Peaks was a quaint and friendly town that seemed very welcoming and accepting of Lucinda and her sister but there are dark secrets in these parts. She will discover that beasts walk with the mortals and when the bodies start to pile up, the fingers start to point towards Callum Wolfe. The man who Lucinda finds herself inexplicably drawn to. 

Attempting to figure out who is behind the brutal murders, Lucinda and Callum struggle to clear his name and keep the people they care about alive. Lines will be drawn, stones will be thrown, and Lucinda will discover quickly that evil is sometimes lurking right beneath the skin.

Cover by @Pananabels

title: Fate's Demand (Twisted Fate, Book 3)
description:
Finally eighteen, Alyssa Frank has inherited more than the ability to vote. The moment celebrating her birth brought back her memories, reminding her of Death, and tore the barrier time had provided for protection down. Now, as Darkness seeks her, she cannot hide, for where there is light, shadows will dwell.

To keep her safe, the Sisters of Fate demand the Brothers bring Alyssa to Glory Academy in the Celestial Realm. With Suzie at her side, Alyssa trains harder than ever before and tries to make sense of the role she's destined to fulfill as the leader of the Pure Souls.

But when a new group presents itself, offering Alyssa the chance to escape her heavenly confinement, will she take it? Who are the Dark Souls, and why haven't the Brothers heard of them? The more Alyssa discovers, the more questions she has. How do you qualify something so bad when it comes from something so good? And how can she be good if she's supposed to lead a group so bad?

With both groups vying for her attention, Alyssa isn't sure she'll be able to help anyone, including herself.

title: Titan's Throne
description:
30 year old Bastian Smith died and reincarnated in a different body in a word different from earth. The body he was in was that of a 12 year old noble boy. Bastian was at a loss. This new body however had a dragon looking tattoo on his chest. When he touched it something strange occurred. 
  
  A powerful voice resounded in his mind. "To the owner of the titans mark be warned. You shall bear great power but  u also bear a curse. Anyone who bears this mark is a child of I the great Ambevilius , emperor of all that is under the heavens. The first to slay or subdue 1000 mark bearers shall become my successor. This is not a destiny you can escape so fight in the name of my glory!"
  
  At this moment the memories belonging to this body merged with his. This was the sovereign continent, a place were only the strong are just! Bastian began his long and adventurous journey... To earn the right to sit on the Titans Throne!
  
  Three chapters a week for the moment.
  
  Please vote ;)
  
  
  
  Highest rank so far #23 in Fantasy
  and 14 in Strategy

Hi there! I am @patriarchonion aka onion, and I am the founder of theonionjunktion! Let me explain what we are!

Theonionjunktion is a team of writers and artists with the objective of creating original novels with a xuanhuan/fantasy theme, often with martial arts and RPG themes. It is run by me, @patriarchonion.

Please stay with us on this epic journey. I am currently writing 4 books at the moment and all of them are in the same multiverse. I have published the books on royalroad.com, webnovel and wattpad as well. They are Titan's Thone, Conclave of Tyrants, Solitary Sword Sovereign and Infallible Oathbreaker. title: Hunted (Belle Morte Book 3)
description:
Forced to team up to bring renegade vampires to justice, vampire Ludovic and human Roux insist they don't need each other--but they can't help wanting each other.                                                           
                                                                    *****

The battle for Belle Morte has been fought and won, but with enemy vampires escaped into the city, the fight is not over. Pressure from human authorities is mounting, and the future of vampirekind hangs in the balance. The escapees must be brought to justice - and fast. 

For reclusive vampire  Ludovic de Vauban,  this is the perfect opportunity to confront his fears about the world beyond the mansion's walls. But he can't do this alone. Roux Hayes knows she's the girl for the job. Accomplished liar, quick thinker, and modern human, she can help Ludovic navigate a world that has long since left him behind. Ludovic thinks he doesn't need help. Roux doesn't care.

As they work together to preserve a future for their friends, they discover a mutual passion that neither of them expected, one that burns hotter than anything either of them have ever experienced.

But the shadow of their old enemies stretches longer than they ever imagined...

(Book 3, the Belle Morte Series)

[[word count: 200,000-250,000 words]]

Cover designed by Regina Dionela

title: Her Guardians (Her Guardians Trilogy #1)
description:
On the outside, I'm just an ordinary eighteen-year-old girl. But, I have an extraordinary gift. A gift that I have always felt like I needed to keep secret.

On top of that, I have two men in my life. One doesn't even notice I'm there half the time, and the other goes out of his way to make himself a part of it.

Both are mysterious.
Both hold secrets.

Life feels as though it has never been so hard.

Or, so I thought.

It soon becomes clear that as far as my hard life is concerned, I've barely scratched the surface.

title: Red Glory
description:
Catina never had a reason to hate her strange appearance. Her golden hair and deep brown eyes- eyes that could be mistaken for red- had never caused her any misfortune. Until one night, the great conqueror arrived- a man who wanted the world for himself and would stop at nothing until it bowed at his feet. 
Catina's appearance fits that of his tribe's Goddess and he knows that she is the reincarnation of "Mikabellum." 
Taken suddenly from her home, and cast onto the high podium of deity, Catina finds that the world of richness and beauty is not all as it seems. 
Her mind soon revolves around a single thought-  "think like a goddess."

title: The Struggles of Marrying a Demon {Completed}
description:
Sequel to "The Struggles of Dating a Demon." 

Mabel knew dating a demonic guardian was hard and, in cases like hers, sometimes resulted in a brief loss of life. Nevertheless, she wouldn't trade her Aleron for anything, and, with both Hell and Earth saved from the most recent crisis, all is peaceful. That quickly changes when the newest ruler of Hell, Colby, decides that rules are really just suggestions, and his poor decisions begin to stir up trouble. 

Horrible nightmares, a disobedient Death, angry warlocks, suspicious repairmen, and best friends fighting leads to a whole new set of struggles for Mabel. How's a simple human to cope? Why, by putting her nose where it doesn't belong, of course. 

What could possibly go wrong? 
(Spoiler alert: A whole Hell of a lot, pun intended)

title: The Face in the House
description:
A twisted tale of death, love, and magic. Enter the mouth of the face in the house...

Featured on:
"Stranger Summer Reads" (Wattpad Pick)- Summer 2019
Wattpad Homepage - Fall 2019
"Wattpad Classics" - Spring 2020

Rose White's little old house is filled floor-to-ceiling with books, newspapers, and other fragments of a life spent shut in from the outside world. She lived as a stranger to her family, who knew her only as a reclusive, lonely old woman.  Only her great-granddaughter, Teddy White, knows that the woman was anything but lonely in that strange old house. At just ten years old, Teddy witnessed an impossible, terrifying magic there--one that changed her life forever. 

Nearly a decade after that twisted weekend visit, Teddy returns to grandma's house, unsure she can trust her own memory of the place.  As she struggles with her newfound independence, she dives deep into the escape, and companionship, the house provides. For the first time she can remember, Teddy feels the warmth of love and security with her makeshift family--But there's a dark presence growing in the house that threatens to take it all away.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello! I'm Amy. I'm 25. I write horror stories.

🌟 Wattpad Star 🌟

My first novel THE FACE IN THE HOUSE is complete and available to read free here on Wattpad.  It's a spooky, cozy, suspenseful horror/fantasy novel, so check it out if that's your thing!

Keep in mind all my works here on Wattpad are first drafts. Be kind. :)

Thanks for stopping by! Feel free to introduce yourself - I'm always eager to connect with fellow writers (especially horror writers)!

title: Her Mate
description:
"it's time".

At the grave tone of his voice, I peak up at the sky to notice the once bright sky had painted itself in dark crimson. The sky is sored with black thin streaks which is beginning to form as all the once twinkling stars seems to have disappeared leaving only the now faint red moon.

I inhale a huge amount of air; turning to stare at Luke. "You look surprisedly calm. How are you not scared of the chaos approaching? "

A small silence follows after. He turns around and took lazy careful strides towards me; stopping only when both peaks of our shoes touched the other.

The side of his lips curls up in a wicked smile as he leans in closer until I can smell nothing but his all so familiar musky wood mixed with a bit of oranges scent flow gently into my nostrils. "I watched my family being brutally killed before my eyes sweetheart. Trust me I am the chaos they should be scared of."

With that, his deep crimson eyes flares brightly into a deeper shade of red. 


                   •••••••••••••

Elise White had waited and prepared patiently all her life to finally be mated with the love of her life; Daniel Silver, the Alpha of the silver pack and finally become his Luna but calamity soon ensues when their pack is attacked by another who declares war on them.
       Elise on the other hand soon realizes that the danger she'll encounter is much more deeper than she had thought as she battles to find the truth and danger which surrounds her existence as she alongside finds solace in the new grown attachment she feels for whom she thought to be the enemy.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Dragon's Keep
description:
For centuries, mankind believed they were the only intelligent beings on the earth. But under their noses, something stronger, powerful, lurked.

Evangeline Charon is a human who grew up listening to faery tales: mythical creatures, paranormal experiences, magic. She never could imagine that it was the next desk over.

Cahill Hughes is a being shrouded in mystery, as though he is covered in a veil of smoke. His smoldering green eyes entice girls, only to be kept arms-length away from his truth.

Unbeknownst to both, a primal need will drive them together. They will face many battles during their intertwining.
A battle of love.
A battle of self.
A battle for supremacy of races.
Who will reign victorious and will their love be counted among the survivors?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Unfold
description:
In a school built on prestige and silence, some secrets refuse to stay buried. When a scandal shakes the very foundation of the academy, the whispers of corruption and betrayal grow louder, and a dark truth begins to unfurl.

Behind the façade of power, a dangerous game is being played-one that involves more than just students. The rules are hidden, and the cost of uncovering them could be more than anyone is willing to pay. As the investigation deepens, it becomes clear: the truth is a fragile thing, and once it starts to unfold, there's no stopping it.

In this place, where ambition reigns and loyalty is a currency, the deeper you look, the darker the secrets become. And when the last one is revealed, nothing will ever be the same.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Hi. I write..

title: Taint (Formerly Claimed) Dark Midnight 1
description:
As a suffering epileptic with uncontrolled siezures, Miriam always knew she was different.  For her, it's better to be invisible--but that all changes when He comes to town; a boy with murder in his eyes, and blood on his soul.  

He's different too.  Maybe not even human...

But there's a dark secret behind the truth of Miriam's siezures.  Her days are numbered--and she doesn't even know it.

Only one thing can save her.  

One person.

It's too bad that the curse that could end up saving her life, could be the very thing that destroys it...
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Please check out the winner of my story contest, @AuRevoirSimone.  Her stories are amazing--this girl has true talent.  :)
_____________
NOTICE:  If you spam my story comments for me to read your story, I will personally send a goblin to your house to eat you.  Message me instead, if you must, though I will probably ignore it.  :)
_____________

Okay, after almost a year, this profile was in dire need for an update.  I used to be all nicey-nicey, but not anymore.  Here are some things you should know before you comment on my stories, to save me the hassle of having to explain them to you.

1.  I have no time.  Though it may look like I'm on Wattpad all the time, I'm actually pretty busy.

2.   I edit all of my stories myself, kay?  That's over a million words and tons of drafts...all by my lonesome.  You try going over the same set of paragraphs fifty billion times and then tell me if things don't start blurring together.  Grammar and spelling are important, but refer back to #1.
            A.  Please don't offer to be my editor.  I've been through too many people who couldn't handle the sheer amount of stuff they have to shift through. I don't want to have my heart broken again.  :(
            B. That being said, if you see a mistake, don't just say 'this has tons of mistakes.'  POINT. THEM. OUT.

3.  If you don't like my story, kindly say so. 

4.  Please, if you find something wrong in my story, do not talk down or condescendingly to me.  I'm not some 12-year old twilight-obsessed preteen, kay?  I'm in my TWENTIES.  Judging from the average age of users on this site, I am at least 5-10 years older than most of you.  Get over yourself. 

5. NO READ FOR READS.  NO FAN FOR FANS--WHATEVER.

I'm really not a mean person.  But there you go.  :)

Have a nice day!
-Nikki
_________

My website is where I put my more 'mature' stories, or my other account @Lana_sky.  Click at your own risk.

title: Daughter of Luka (LGBT+)
description:
In a world of those who have human and wolf blood, Ophelia is the daughter of a wolf hunter. There's just one thing that might cause trouble for that and that is Ophelia's growing relationship with a pack of wolves that live in the forest behind her house. 

Ophelia thought her life was going to be simple. Well, as simple as life could get when she just happened to be failing her job, her relationship and (the absolute bane of it all) mathematics. 
But oh, no, something far more deadly and sinister awaits Ophelia in the forest behind her home. 
Will she be able to discover how to save her new friends before something takes them from her forever?

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Werewolves in England? Yeah, apparently stranger things did happen. Much, much stranger than I had ever thought of before, but strange nonetheless. 

At first, I thought I had simply been imagining it. 

As soon as I got into bed and stared up at my ceiling, I pinched myself just to establish that I wasn't, in fact, dreaming. 

I wasn't dreaming. 

Thus, I had to accept what I had seen in the forest as the cold, hard, truth- make that the warm, fuzzy, truth. 

Werewolves were real. 

It was either that, or I was completely losing it.

title: The Death's Game
description:
Striking a deal with Death can have dangerous effect - especially when you end up in a love triangle with one of its reapers, while fighting for your life in a deadly underworld competition. 

***

Percy Spring has always been able to see the darker side of the world - ever since the car accident that almost claimed her life, she has gained the ability to see demons and Death's reapers. But when Death itself offers her a second chance at life, she knows she can't pass it up. In order to save her friends, Percy agrees to enter The Game - a deadly competition in the underworld where no one is as they seem.

As Percy navigates the dangerous world of The Game, she realizes that she has been placed in competition with one of Death's reapers, Ryder, with whom she has a complicated past. To make matters even more complicated, she is also competing against Death's jealous mistress. When the other players start to die, Percy must decide who she can trust in order to emerge victorious.

As she struggles to outwit Death and save her friends, Percy must also confront her own feelings and decide where her loyalties lie. Can she trust Ryder, the reaper with whom she shares a tumultuous history, or Blake, the mysterious man who promised to help her save her friends? And can Percy truly trust either of them? 

Striking a deal with Death has never been more dangerous, and the consequences of Percy's choices will have a lasting impact on her future. Will she come out on top, or will she be caught in Death's deadly game forever?

***

"Percy Spring, you are offered a second chance." 
"A second chance," she repeated. "This mean I will come back to life?"
"The game of second chance was created for people whose fate is in doubt of whether their time has come or not. It is also for those who wish to go out on a limb and try their luck in winning with me," Death started explaining. "You will be put in the game, and we will play."

title: Breeding Rights
description:
The Nightshade Pack has been dwindling. Their lack of female wolves has led to a decline in babies being born with the gene. Needing new blood to filter in and to grow the pack, they had always allowed matings of choice which meant mating humans, but now... with the dwindling population they have reinstated the Moon Ceremony. 

With a lack of werewolf female options for the mating, an elder suggests buying breeding rights of females from the neighbor pack. Is it a bad idea... or the perfect right idea?

Sold to a neighboring pack for the breeding rights during the Moon Ceremony... Tikka is being forced to submit to mating.

title: Luna's Secret
description:
Luna has always been an outsider in her pack, while other's banded together worrying about things like mates and love, Luna spent her time with nature exploring, absorbing energy from the moon reading. All she wanted to do was to become a healer and travel the world. On one of her trips to the forest her pack was attacked by a group of powerful rogues and all structure burnt to the ground. In one day she was rendered homeless and an orphan.

She hated herself and felt guilty for not being with them, she fell into despair, deciding to join her family, she brewed a poisonous herb with wolfsbane refusing to listen to the protests of her wolf, she drank it in one go passing out, when she awoke much to her horror and her wolf spirit was gone, thus she became an enigma with a tragic past.she desperate to keep hidden and get revenge she joined the golden moon pack as an omega. There, she meets Alpha Marcus, a powerful, ruthless leader who didn't believe in love. While Marcus has vowed never to love again, he can't resist the mysterious pull he feels toward Luna.

As danger looms from rogue wolves and hidden enemies, Marcus and Luna are forced to work together, their bond growing stronger with each passing day. But Luna's secret could destroy everything.

authorBio:
About the Author: Aquah-Goddess

Aquah-Goddess is an emerging fantasy writer who captivates readers with her unique blend of romance, drama, and complex power dynamics. Her stories delve deep into the intricacies of relationships, offering an emotional journey that explores the darker side of desire, manipulation, and passion. Known for crafting vivid characters and rich, immersive worlds, Aquah-Goddess creates tales that leave a lasting impression.

In addition to her writing, she is the creative force behind Tori's Drip and Gadgets, a successful thrift store where she curates a collection of plus-size male clothing, shirts, and school bags. Through her TikTok account, Aquah Goddess, she shares her personal and entrepreneurial journey, connecting with her followers in authentic ways.

With one completed book under her belt, Aquah-Goddess is currently working on her highly anticipated trilogy, which kicks off with the thrilling Dark Seduction. Her fans, affectionately known as Goddess, you can expect a captivating blend of love, power, and mystery that keeps them eagerly turning pages.

When she's not writing, Aquah-Goddess enjoys crafting imaginative worlds and sharing her creative process with her online community. Her Wattpad handle, AQUAH_GODDESS, is where readers can find her latest works and engage with her literary world. title: ESSENCE; A Journal of Time ( Nigerian Scifi )
description:
The first chapter of this book began with a young boy named Cosmos in a family of six, whereby he was coming of age into a man. He has always had the feeling of being out of place in the world, or perhaps it is the world which is out of place. He has always been a Genius, which is both a blessing and a curse. This boy has an imaginary friend which he nicknamed Morningstar. He is very picky with his choice of friends, it is not easy finding someone who can match his complex mind. One could say it is because he sees the best and the worst in people.

The storyline took a different route after he got abducted by a dreaded terrorist sect during his NYSC program in Borno State, Nigeria (a program for Nigerian citizens, after they graduate from an higher institution). A lot began to unfold afterwards, he soon discovered that he is just the tip of the iceberg in an entire world filled with principal actors.

Time soon made the readers understand that there are a lot of higher forces at play in this novel; humans with godlike technologies and powers out of this world.


NOTE:
-Do not forget to follow to stay in touch.
-New chapters will try to be published weekly.
-If you love my work, check link in bio.

title: Lethe's Kiss (Ari & Soren Book 3)
description:
When Soren's father disappears, Ari and Soren are left to unravel the mysteries of Volkir's past as an old enemy threatens the present.
                                           *****
Two years have gone by since Soren turned, and now his father wants him to take his place as Master of his realm. Soren has no desire to inherit his father's responsibilities, however, and would rather live a simple, uncomplicated life with his witch-mage husband and life-mate, Ari Lorenfield. 

Ari has enough on his plate as it is, having taken over leadership of the Guardian Circle, and Soren worries he'll work himself to death if he doesn't learn to say 'no.' 

When a mysterious new-blooded vampire appears bearing a strange message, though, Volkir vanishes, leaving Soren in charge of his domain. As new perils surface, Ari and Soren must look to their friends for help as they seek to discover the secrets of Volkir's past and save their own future. 
-
⚠️ Book 3 of the Ari & Soren series

title: Voice in the mirror
description:
Voice in the Mirror is a supernatural thriller that follows the eerie experiences of Mark, Olivia, and their loyal golden retriever, Wowell. When the couple discovers a mysterious mirror in their new home, they are drawn into a chilling mystery. The mirror reflects a dimly lit, unfamiliar room and whispers strange messages, hinting at the presence of an unknown figure. As Mark and Olivia experience increasingly unsettling occurrences, their curiosity and fear lead them to seek help from a historian named Eleanor, who may hold the key to unraveling the mirror's dark secrets. But as the whispers grow louder and the figure in the reflection becomes clearer, they realize that some mysteries are better left unsolved.

title: The Book of Miranda | gxg | ✔︎
description:
Desdemona ''Des'' Winchester wants nothing to do with Melliford Academy. In fact, she's pretty sure her parents shipped her off to boarding school just to get her out of their hair. It's a move they'll come to regret if she has any say in the matter. Nothing humiliates posh folk like having a daughter sent home from the country's most esteemed educational institution. 

Just flunking class isn't dramatic enough, though. Des plans to get booted in the most spectacular manner possible, just to make sure her parents' social circle will never let them live it down. Her scheming, unfortunately, encounters three roadblocks within the first week of class. 

The first: Exie Quinnell, teacher's pet, whip-smart, and unreasonably attractive. Neither girl intended to end up on a project together, but their teacher deemed Des in need of a little... remediation. 

The second: There are things about Melliford Academy that none of the teachers will talk about, even when pressed. Things that should be easy answers. 

The third: The first student found dead with a folded paper dove perched on their chest. 


❖❖❖

Complete and fully edited.

Comments and critiques are both welcome and appreciated. I write characters from many different backgrounds, with many different experiences. If you share those traits and find that I have misrepresented anything, please let me know! I am feedback-friendly and here to learn  :)
Tous Droits Réservés

You can call me August, but I will also be summoned by cool pond bugs and/or pictures of cats.

I'm a queer spec fic writer with a fondness for tossing characters into things they think they aren't prepared for. Most of my work is Dark Fantasy or Horror, but I cross paths with Sci-Fi, Paranormal, and Romance more often than not.

If my books have anything in common, it's wild settings, happy endings, casual rep, and kickass disaster queers being disasters but also kickass!

In the normal world, I work for the UN, wait on two cats, and keep Carassius and Corixidae in outdoor aquaria. I am five years old inside.

title: The Ugly Mate  [EDITING NEEDED]
description:
I let out a small laugh as nodded my head in confusion. "What do you mean? Of course you need me, I'm your mate." 

"No, I don't actually," He said as a fact. 

"I don't need you. You have nothing that will benefit me. I'm ashamed to say that I have someone like you as a mate." 



                        .  .  .  .  .  .  .  .  .  .  .  .  .  


Love. 

It's such a simple word and yet it means so much. Having it can be the most amazing thing in the world.

But for others, it can mean carrying around the heavy burden of loving another. 

For Amenina Tate, she unfortunately is the latter. She holds love for a man that does not feel the same way for her. Everyday she deals with the constant pain of his betrayal. She is broken and it may be only a matter of time before the already cracked mirror of her life completely shatters.  




HELLO, I AM TRYING MY BEST TO NOT MAKE THIS LIKE EVERY WEREWOLF STORY ON WATTPAD. I AM TRYING TO STRAY AWAY FROM THOSE MAJOR CLICHES SO PLEASE EVEN THOUGH IM NOT THE WOLRDS GREATEST WRITER, GIVE MY STORY A TRY :)

At first, life appears to be looking up for Harper. She's making new friends and is strangely drawn to the boy next door. But when evidence ties her to the gruesome murder of a Demons cheerleader, Harper discovers this small town has a big secret.

After her boyfriend Tom is killed in New York by a handsome looking stranger she makes it her life mission to revenge his death. With the grand revelation she finally finds a clue as to who could have been responsible. No one other than 1000 year old vampire Sheriff Eric Northman. 
She moves to Bon Temps, a small town near the killers business "Fangtasia" and plots her revenge until one day the tall Wiking himself walks into Merlottes and takes a shine on her. She tries her best to stay on course with her mission to Eric Northman, but somehow gets entangled more and more with Bon Temps society and its supernatural problems. When she finally finds some mysterious and unexplainable things going on with herself, she is forced to decide.

title: King Slayer {1} ✓
description:
"Aren't you scared?" Isaiah took another step towards me.

"Of you? No."

"You should be. I could snap your pretty little neck anytime, darling."

"Get in line, darling." I threw his stupid nickname back in his face. He was trying hard to intimidate me but I wouldn't back down so easily.

"Why are you even here to begin with?"

"I'm here to clean up the mess your family is making all because of some stupid rivalry."

"Did you really think we came here for 'some stupid rivalry'?" My back hit the counter as he cornered me. "No, we plan to conquer your pathetic little town until there's nothing left of it."

"You know you don't have to kill people for power. You're immortal, what else could you possibly want?"

He smirked and I didn't think I'd ever loathed anyone more in my entire life, "Oh darling, you don't know anything."

title: Tanner's Beacon
description:
Savannah Collins had been best friends with Dakota, Alex, Chelsea, and Tanner since she was a teenager. Even after she graduated college and moved away she stayed in close contact with them. She had been insanely proud of all of their accomplishments and it was no surprise that the boys continued hunting down the paranormal. However, she was very surprised when Dakota showed up at her front door to pitch his new show idea and wanted Savannah to come along for the ride. Of course, she said yes, she would have done anything for her friends. However not only will Savannah have to fight the paralyzing fear of staying in haunted locations on her own, but she will also have to fight some old feelings that are rapidly bubbling to the surface again.

title: Frost and Fates : An Enchanted Christmas Encounter
description:
Twenty years have passed since the epic journey that led to Raven and Viktor reclaiming their land and species as their own and taking power from the careless god who tried to ruin it.

Now, they've settled into a boring, normal life with two children. 13-year-old Eliza Nightfang, and 3-year-old Crow Nightfang. But they've changed from their soft and fun selves to a pair of stern parents.

Eliza hates this. Where's the fun in having famous parents if they don't tell you anything and never let you do anything? But one day, just a night before Christmas Eve, that all changes.

Teritia, Goddess of Christmas and Holidays, has shown up at their porch begging for help. Her staff has gone missing, stolen by someone. But Raven and Viktor refuse to help, stating they're done with interfering with godly drama.

Determined to prove herself against the odds, Eliza sneaks out and attempts to find the staff alone, despite not having shifted yet. 

A race against time even greater than her parents, and without a loving supporter, can Eliza find the staff before Christmas is ruined?


This story is my entry to the Sparkle Holiday Writing Competition by @-svnny_skiies-

title: The Reluctant Queen
description:
Adrian grabbed my chin, his eyes suddenly dark. I felt a little bit of satisfaction, if only for a moment.

"You are mine, Sophia. Nothing, not a petty crush or your stubbornness, is going to change that." He rubbed my lower lip with his thumb. "Everything you once believed to be yours is mine now. Your heart, your body and soul all belong to me. I have you for the rest of your days. We will marry, have children and rule the empire I created together. Do you want to know how I know this? Because you can't refuse me."
............

Sophia is your ordinary high school senior, trying to change her life for the better through her music. She has no idea that her world is about to change. Confronted by a young wizard named Louis, she is taken out of her bleak world and thrown into a magical kingdom where she is forced to fight for her own heart. The King of Kilader has had Sophia in his sights for months, and now that she is in his kingdom he will do anything to make her his own. With Louis by her side, Sophia tries to find a way to change her fate, only to find love in an unexpected place. 

Will she be able to escape the grasp of the ruthless King? Or will she be forced to leave the first love she has ever known? 

One thing is for sure, her heart is no longer her own.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello everyone! My name is Susie Ellery. My first novel, The Reluctant Queen, is basically my baby, a story that I have been working on for years. 

Besides being an amateur author, I am just your regular nerd. My obsessions range from awesome video games like Pokemon and Tomb Raider, to just as awesome shows like Avatar The Last Air Bender. I whole heartedly love cheesy romantic musicals and I can never turn away a book with a love triangle. 

Feel free to message me! I'm open to talking about anything, especially my works here on Wattpad :)

title: A Twisted Cinderella

Devastated by her father's sudden death Victoria must go live with a mother  she never knew about, upon her arrival things go from back to down right creepy.

First thing she meets her siblings her father had failed to mention in her sixteen years of life, and her mother promptly locks her in the attic. Her only companies are the fantasies of her notes and theories about the strange things going on.

Desperately lonely, Victoria watches from the window as her family leaves for a night each month to attend "meetings." While their gone one night only to discover why her mother has kept her locked up.

She knows their secret, she must fight for her freedom . . .  and possibly her life.

This is part of a series, Girl Among Wolves.

title: RUPTURES [ AOU × BOOM ]
description:
[ A PARANORMAL - HORROR CONTENTS ]
Boom who can 'sense-and-see-the-invisible' alienated himself from the rest of the school. He was alone but in reality he was not. He lived in trauma and decided to become an introvert for the rest of his life. He then enrolled in one of university majored in economics but nothing changed because he chose to be alone without any friend. Battling with his inner self and he can't even sleep at night... 

Aou and his friends called him an idiot freak because he often scared and restless. They even troll him with stupid pranks. Aou accidentally mocked him with unforgivable phrases and later found out that Boom was suffered with a deep 'cut-and-wound'. He was traumatized since he was a little boy and came from a broken family. His parents abandoned him because they believed that Boom was an unfortunate child with unforgivable sins. He was a curse to the family, bringing bad lucks and decided to disowned him.

Days passed by and the sixth sense becoming worse than ever. Boom who can't bear it any longer, tried to vanish but Aou was there to saved him. 

Will Aou save him from all the miseries?

title: Avery
description:
♡♡#182 In Werewolf as of 6/19/2016

( What some readers are saying about Avery....

"I can already tell this is going to be a great book" @myathesmart

"Ooh, love the mystery." @Yoojin_Kim

"Definitely interesting." @Young006

"HOLY SH*T!! KAYDEN/ADEN IS HAWT!! LOVE YOUR TASTE LADY AUTHOR!!!" "BEST. STORY. EVERR!!! Gotta hand it to you, If I were a judge in the werewolf section, I'd put ya 1st" @AleckIsALlama

"It gets more interesting by the chapter."@Xapri714



The lost of my father caused an empathic power to unlock within me. I thought I was going crazy from not only the  death of my father but also the over load of emotions and spent two years in a mental health hospital. 

 I could feel everything, from everyone in the hospital. Add my own emotions on top of that it became a disaster. It wasn't a good time. I learned to block out others but in the process I locked out my own emotions.   I became this cold thing.  I thought it was perfect. Never needing to feel a thing. Well emotionally anyways. And being crazy didn't seem so bad. A crazy cold thing. I could live with that.

Then my Uncle came and got custody of me. I learned  a few thing in 
those first weeks with him. I'm not crazy. I'm an empath.  
I have more family than I knew of. I have two life mates.  I'm possibly an empath able to form a bond to a wolf in the rage. I'm also the first of my kind.
And here I thought I was the crazy one.

title: The Secrets Of The Gordian Knot Book 1: Book Of Secrets
description:
[Year 1 of The Voyageurs Era] The year is 2005. 

7 years after Harry Potter defeated Lord Voldemort at the Battle of Hogwarts, the Wizarding World has found peace once again. James Evercreetch, an adventurous young genius, who is proud of his Irish heritage, has lived a peaceful life for the past 10 years with his twin sister, Melissa, as his only friend. Little do they know, their mother has been keeping a secret from them - she's a witch. On their 11th birthday, a mysterious young woman arrives at their doorstep with an invitation to the prestigious Ilvermorny School of Witchcraft and Wizardry in Massachusetts. Never knowing their lives are about to change forever. However, after discovering ancient journals and a mysterious golden necklace, they soon realize that their new home has a dark side, known only by a select few. They never could have imagined the many adventures and dangers that awaited them.

Secrets Of The Gordian Knot Book 2: Divided & United coming soon.
Disclaimer: I do not own Harry Potter or Ilvermorny. It belongs to JK Rowling. I also do not agree with everyone she says. 

"It's a dangerous business, Frodo, going out your door. You step onto the road, and if you don't keep your feet, there's no knowing where you might be swept off to." - J.R.R. Tolkien 

Highest-ever ranking: #5 in Ilvermorny
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"It is an extremely common mistake. People think the writer's imagination is always at work, that he's constantly inventing an endless supply of incidents and episodes; that he simply dreams up his stories out of thin air. In point of fact, the opposite is true. Once the public knows that you're a writer, they bring the characters and events to you. And as long as you maintain your ability to look, and to carefully listen, these stories will continue to seek you out over your lifetime. To him, who has often told the tales of others, many more tales will be told."
-The Author, The Grand Budapest Hotel

I'm not really into the shipping thing. Most of the HP characters in my books are of my own original creation. I'm a Ravenclaw/Thunderbird and the mastermind behind Birding_Memes on iFunny.

title: Alien Invading My Heart
description:
They came.

And they took everything from us.

They took our homes, our loved ones, our freedom

Nothing is the same anymore. 

And now, they want us to "Peacefully co-exist and even learn from one another"
That is never going to happen- I thought until I met him, and everything changed once again.

__________________________________________

Rose was just an ordinary girl in an ordinary world... that is until aliens came and took the word ordinary out of her dictionary. 
After a year in a prison called "region", six teenagers were selected to go to school with aliens as the part of integration program.  
What happens once Rose finds out that aliens aren't so bad after all?

title: Mated To The Werewolf King (Completed, Kings Series, Book 1)
description:
Only sample chps.  Annabelle finds out that she is not the real daughter of the Alpha at her werewolf pack. As the world she knows comes collapsing down, she has to hide from the Demon Lord who is determined to find her. Will the Werewolf King yield to the Demon Lord's ultimatum and give her to the enemy or will she be the cause of a looming war between the two species? More importantly, who is Belle and what does the Demon Lord want with her?  
    Belle's meeting with the Werewolf King does not go very well, she finds him to be an arrogant bastard! Worse still,  he wants nothing to do with her. 
    "Why do I feel you're my mate? What have you done to me? "bellowed the King. 
    "How do you know I am not your mate?" I asked, growling in frustration. I did not want to be his mate any more than he wanted me to be his, but his cocky attitude was getting to me. 
    "Because you are not even a werewolf," he grunted, his black irises shimmering dangerously. 
    "You're a liar," I screamed not caring that I was talking to the most lethal creature in the world. 
    He roared in laughter, the sound of which irritated the hell out of me.  Aargh! How I wanted to rip his  heart out even as I wanted to glue my body to his and stay there forever, basking in his scent. I was so mad that I wanted to show him how wrong he was. Soon, he would be sorry, he would kneel and beg for my forgiveness. The mental image of him on his knees made my lips twitch with amusement. I started phasing out to my wolf form, and when I stood in all my glory, I prowled and preened to show off  my beautiful fur. 
    He laughed even harder.
    I simply wanted to kill him. Yes, my wolf was small, but it existed. Why the hell wasn't he on his knees then?
    "As I said, you're not a werewolf," he repeated.
    Huh, what did he mean by that?

title: The truth of Slenderman
description:
I am publishing this for the sole reason of spreading the truth. This will contain my findings, and be warned: the more you know, the more you are a target. If you still wish to read this, then carry on. It is your own foolish choice. This will contain information that most will not know about. After all, none of this is common knowledge. You probably have not heard about any of this.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: The stars align.

title: Love Lines
description:
Last night I made the worst decision of my life, unbeknowest of the consequences. I can't change it. I can't take it back. That split second of doubt and uncertainty brought me where I am now. 

Alone. 

I have no idea what I'm doing. The power of seeing the future is something I never wanted and wish to give back. No one really knows how to help me except some ex-gypsy boy named...well, I don't know how to really pronounce it. And even then, I don't think he really knows what he's doing. He just pretends to it seems like. So here I am with a power I can't completely control and the boy I love on the other side, where I wanted to be. 

And I'll do whatever I have to to get there with him. 

But in order to do that, I have to learn things about myself and my family that I never wanted to. That I never imagined were true. But I'll do it if it means I can talk to him again. If it means I can be the person I want myself to be, the person my mother wanted me to be.

~ * ~ 

Natalie Abernathy has made her choice. Now she is forced to live with it.

~ * ~

Sequel to Life Lines
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Life's A Witch
description:
This witch lives a charmed life. . . 
 
Hadley is the envy of every girl-and the desire of every guy. Her key to magically having it all? She's an actual witch.

As a descendant of the first woman executed in the Salem witch trials, Hadley understands the consequences if her secret gets out. The only ones who know about her powers are members of her coven, who, like Hadley's family, have magic in their blood. But there's no spell that can undo a fatal attack on the coven. All the evidence points to an age-old rival coven as the culprit, and now it's up to Hadley to lead the fight against them.
 
At the same time, she's caught up in her feelings for a mysterious guy named Asher, who has plenty of secrets of his own. With everything at stake, can Hadley trust her magic-and her heart?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm a former magazine editor who's had the privilege of interviewing celebs like Miley Cyrus, Heather Morris, Ashley Tisdale, Dakota Fanning and Ashley Greene. I'm also a total book nerd. My author crush is Meg Cabot—seriously, who's more genius than her?—and I also love authors Jonathan Mayberry, Amanda Havard, Stacey Jay and the Mara Dyer series!

But first and foremost, I'm a young adult writer. My book, LIFE'S A WITCH is a modern retelling of the Salem Witch Trials from the perspective of a sassy, sexy, 17-year-old girl. And I'm happy to announce that after more than 19 million reads of LAW here on Wattpad, I signed a 3-book deal with Simon & Schuster to repub the book! title: The Faerie Guardian
description:
She's fae. He's human. He should never have followed her into the magic realm...

Violet has one job: protect humans from dangerous magical creatures. It's a job she's good at-until the cute human guy whose life she just saved follows her into the fae world.

Now she's broken faerie law, risking her future at the Guild of Guardians. She needs to get Nate home and make him forget everything he's discovered.

If only someone wasn't intent on hunting him down.

Vi and Nate are pulled into the darker side of the fae world, where deadly magic and long-forgotten secrets exist.

Vi might be one of the best, but can she get them out alive?

Dazzling magic, page-turning action, family secrets, and swoon-worthy romance. Start reading today to be swept away into this enchanting world!

(Note: This is a first edition. The second edition with minor changes is now available on the Google Play store, Apple Books, Kobo, Amazon and other ebook and print book retailers.)
Tous Droits Réservés

title: First Shift
description:
Kye is a 15 year old werewolf and part of the Night Shade pack. When her birthday comes so will her first shift into her wolf form, and pack law states she must be on the pack's land when that happens. Now she has to pick up and leave the only life she has ever truly known. Her father is in the military in the Night Raiders unit, and won't be returning home with her. This leaves Kye alone as she tries to find her place in the pack with not even her memories to help her. The accident that killed Kye's mother also stole Kye's memories leaving her past a mystery. 

Kye comes from a family of mainly Omega wolves, submissive wolves, so that's how she is treated by pack mates which is starting to seriously piss her off. Worse still is the Alpha heir, Andrea who acts like she's already in charge and seems to have it out for Kye.

When humans in the next town over start getting brutally murdered they blame the pack, but it is not a wolf behind the murders and it's not just hunting the humans.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey! So a brief summary about me

- I love reading and writing my favorite genre is Fantasy. I may also have a slight obsession with werewolves and vampires, which I think is weird due to the fact I have a phobia of blood.

- I love Greek mythology and I also know some things about Roman, Egyptian, and Norsel mythology.

She finds herself upon the island with a troubled fate, needing to decide whether to run and cry wolf or fight for her own destiny. 

Come find out.

title: Dying for Death
description:
Trinity has never hurt a soul in her entire life, however life hasn't always been good to her. When a stray bullet blasts threw her temple, Trinity isn't really stunned. In fact she's almost revealed. After loosing her mother, Trinity's father drinks his problems away...while taking the rest out on her. Now she's dead, waiting in line....and trying not to bring any attention to herself. Nothing ever goes as planned in Trinity's world.

Editing done by Tina @Little-Tina ^.^
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Song of the Seraph - A Dark Fallen Angel Paranormal Romance
description:
I never asked for this. I never asked to be drawn to him, a man with the weight of centuries on his shoulders and the darkness of the world in his eyes. But now that I've found him... I can't let go.

Lily's life has been nothing short of a struggle-until the night she stumbles onto Seraphiel's doorstep, drawn by a force she can't understand. He's a stranger, but something about him feels like home, like a missing piece of her soul.

The more time she spends with him, the more she realizes he's no ordinary man. He's an angel-battle-worn and broken-and she's the reincarnation of someone he once loved. A love bound to a prophecy that threatens both their lives.

As the connection between them deepens, so does the tension-an attraction that pulls them closer with every stolen touch, every lingering glance. The sparks between them could ignite something far darker than either of them imagined, something that may cost them their lives-or their hearts.

"I don't know if I'm strong enough for this," Lily whispers, her breath hot against his skin. "But I'm willing to find out."

As forces from Heaven and Hell close in, Lily must decide: Is the love she feels for him a gift... or a curse that will destroy them both?

Can their love survive the darkness? Or will the prophecy tear them apart before they can claim each other completely?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, lovely readers! 👋✨

Follow me to stay up to date with my regular updates!

I'm your friendly neighborhood chaos bringer, spinning tales of forbidden love, angels with broken halos, and demons with hearts too big for their own good. By day, I'm a coffee-powered dreamer; by night, I'm crafting worlds where love defies the odds, the laws of heaven, and occasionally, gravity.

I believe in happily-ever-afters-with a twist of darkness and a dash of drama, because let's be honest, who doesn't love a bit of edge with their romance? 🌙💋 When I'm not writing, you'll find me binge-reading, hoarding candles like a gremlin, or pretending I can dance as gracefully as my characters.

Join me on this wild ride where souls collide, sparks fly, and nothing is ever what it seems. Don't forget to hit that follow button and say hi-I swear I don't bite. (Unless you're into that. 😉)

With love,
Ser

title: Jin Se - Priest [English Fan Translation BL Novel]
description:
[From Author] A cliché yao(*)-human love story with xianxia background ... Fine, it's just a yao vs human love story. Sanctimonious shou x Obstinate gong.
(*) yao: a type of supernatural being evolved into human form and consciousness from plants, animals, or inanimate objects. Typically can shape-shift into their original form. 

[From VN-TL] 
"If food is left over, in a few days mould would grow, if fruits are buried underground, two days is enough for them to spoil, if tea is left exposed, it cannot be consumer overnight. 
The human heart lies in our bodies for decades, will it also rot, degenerate ... even change completely?"
In troubling times, old friends have now stood on opposite sides of the front line. Pride and suspicion have pushed them even further, only for them to finally realise, the peace during childhood was the thing we chase after all this time.

NOTE: Fan translation, do comment on errors if spotted. I do not own the story and any of the characters - the original author is Priest. This isn't authorised by the author, do support their work by buying chapters at Jinjiang.  Updates not regular.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: SKIPPING TIME
description:
Cacee Adams never suspects that Jess--the, "honor-student/ Boy Scout" she's falling for, is really a  street-smart delinquent who's never told her a single true thing about himself.   

But when Cacee and Jess somehow fall through a painting and wake up far from the mountains of Pennsylvania, everything changes. Stranded in a dangerous city that holds shocking surprises, Cacee is forced to depend on Jess for her very survival.    

Now, as Cacee watches Jess  pick pockets and win knife fights with equal ease, she realizes the boy she thought she knew never existed. As they struggle to stay alive long enough to return home, Cacee must decide: Can a thief and a liar be trusted with the biggest thing he's ever stolen--her heart.

title: Get Lit (Season One)
description:
[New Adult Zombie Apocalypse Romance]
"It's the second of January and students are racing back to campus early to make an appearance at the biggest rave of the year hosted by the one and only DJ Sparks." 

College freshman, Lilly Butler, doesn't consider herself much of a party girl, but agrees to let loose to appease her best friend. Lilly is unhappy to discover they will be attending the bash with the campus bad boys. 

Eli and Nico are considered to be the life of the party. Most students have indulged in Nico's party favors at one time or another, and many are excited to sample Nico's brand new shipment called Hype.

The joyful energy of the party goes downhill fast as word spreads about a vicious virus that has taken down New York City. It isn't until people experience the insane crash from their euphoric state that their zombie-like behavior appears, leaving Lilly to fight for her life alongside the infamous duo, Eli and Nico. 

ZOMBIE APOCALYPSE ROMANCE NOVELLA
(FOR TEENS AND NEW ADULTS)

You are amazing creators and you have the power to do anything you choose. Don't give anyone power over your emotions, desires, creations, or decisions.

AND ALWAYS REMEMBER YOU ARE WORTHY!

title: One True Alpha
description:
The only child of an alpha, Iris Ironclaw is the heir to her father's western region pack. Being a female heir is rare with only a few in the nation ever taking the role as Alpha to their pack. Like every western werewolf, she goes to search for her soulmate at the Moon Blessing Festival that is held every three years. 

Once at the Moon Blessing Festival she meets the twin males of Canyon Creek Alpha, Iris must choose whether to take a mate or leave them both behind. With Canyon Creek being an eastern region, it will take a miracle to convince either of them her potential as an alpha.

All three are given until the next Moon Blessing Festival to decide who has the moon's favor to be a leader, a follower, and mate. Iris must use every skill she has been taught to be what her pack needs, the one true alpha.

***I finally did the adult thing and outlined this so I know where I want to go. 90% of the book is done. Once I finish, I'll go back through the chapters that haven't been published and go from there. ***
