title: The Witch and The Thief
description:
Lachlan Shadowblade has one job, steal the Dragon Tooth Stone from the Deepwood Vault, a witch's bank notorious for being impenetrable to thieves. Born with magic in his veins, he's not the average thief and is moments away from success when the captivating Maera Maelstrom, one of the vault keepers, catches him.  
Not once in her lonely existence, did Maera ever imagine how her life would be turned upside down when one of the most powerful magical artifacts is stolen right out from under her nose. Tasked with recovering the stone from the handsome thief to avoid a punishment worse than death, Maera embarks on a daring quest that sets events in motion that will forever intertwine her fate with Lachlan's and threaten both their lives.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Born the 2nd oldest of 6 children, she grew up often escaping to her bedroom to read, draw, and write. Somehow, she managed to graduate high school and even continued her education by being granted a Theatre scholarship and earned her degree in pretending to be someone else. After graduating, she served a mission for The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints in Toronto, Canada.
Upon returning to the U.S., she earned her Cosmetology License so she could run with scissors and not get yelled at. To really finish the deal, she became a certified Media Makeup Artist.
In 2006 she married her husband, who she met while they both worked in a magical far-off land the locals call 'The Home Depot.' Now on the search for the ever-elusive Sasquatch, they live in the Pacific Northwest, where her husband is from. When she's not writing stories or speaking fluently in movie quotes, she enjoys drawing, painting, and spending time with her handsome husband and their dog. You can like and follow her on:

title: Jinxed
description:
The secrets of our ancestors never stay hidden for long...
Emilia Evers was an average girl living an average life until one day, everything wasn't so average anymore. 
Forced to team up with the bane of her existence on a Class trip to New Orleans, Emilia is thrown into a world of Nineteenth century glamour, scandal, and murder. In order to find her way back home, she'll have to expose secrets, solve mysteries, and avoid getting herself killed in the process.

title: Cursed and Fur-saken
description:
**Love and survival are never simple in a world Cursed and Fur-saken.**

Dian Hunt, a brooding alpha snow leopard shifter with a grudge against witches, thrives on solitude and the untamed wilds of Valor Woods. But his peace is shattered when a headstrong enchantress barges into his territory, cradling twin shifter cubs and demanding sanctuary. Karamia Candlyn has no patience for Dian's hostility; she vowed to protect the cubs and won't allow anyone-or anything-to stand in her way.

As an old curse resurfaces and dark forces close in, the reluctant allies must uncover the truth behind the cub's abandonment while battling the dangerous rogue packs hunting them. Tensions run high and sparks fly as Kara's magic and Dian's animal instincts collide in a storm of passion that neither can resist. 

But trust is fragile, and danger lurks in every shadow. Will Luka and Kara be able to let go of their pasts and save the cubs, or will their growing feelings for each other leave them vulnerable to the enemies who want them dead?

description:
After losing three fiancés in tragic accidents over the past six years, Lady Elphi Matson knows three things for certain: heartache only maims its victim when it should kill, not all haunted places are crumbling castles, and without a doubt, she is cursed when it comes to falling in love.  

Able to see ghosts since surviving a drowning accident at age nine, Lord Rufus Treadway works as a Private Investigator of the paranormal. So, when his closest friend Lord Roderick Matson pleads for help solving Elphi's curse, Rufus agrees to attend the Sanham séance, promising not to let Elphi know Roderick hired him and, for his own safety, not to fall in love with her. However, just like curses, some promises are meant to be broken.

authorBio:
Born the 2nd oldest of 6 children, she grew up often escaping to her bedroom to read, draw, and write. Somehow, she managed to graduate high school and even continued her education by being granted a Theatre scholarship and earned her degree in pretending to be someone else. After graduating, she served a mission for The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints in Toronto, Canada.
Upon returning to the U.S., she earned her Cosmetology License so she could run with scissors and not get yelled at. To really finish the deal, she became a certified Media Makeup Artist.
In 2006 she married her husband, who she met while they both worked in a magical far-off land the locals call 'The Home Depot.' Now on the search for the ever-elusive Sasquatch, they live in the Pacific Northwest, where her husband is from. When she's not writing stories or speaking fluently in movie quotes, she enjoys drawing, painting, and spending time with her handsome husband and their dog. You can like and follow her on:

title: The Luna's Awakening
description:
I always felt like I was different somehow. I knew my wolf could feel it too. But it all changed on the day of my 18th birthday when I inherited my Luna powers and the mark. But the thing is... only the first born daughter of the Silver Moon Luna pack gets these powers and my mother is not a Luna (female Alpha), she is just a member of the pack like me. So then I guess that leaves me with one unanswered question.....
Who am I really? 


Over the years only the first born daughters of powerful female leaders in the SilverMoon pack are born with the same mark on their hip. 
They are the ones to become the next pack leaders, Luna's. 
But what happens when Lara King, an ordinary werewolf whose mum is not a Luna, receives a unique mark on her hip on her 18th birthday which no other wolf or first born daughter has. She knows she is different. Her parents tell her she was born to be a powerful leader like no other, they tell her that when the time comes she will need to reveal her real identity to everyone to save her pack and defeat a powerful enemy. 

However Lara is worried and feels like she is not the one. Until the day when the current Luna of her pack finds out of her true identity and is set out on killing her. 
She knows the time for her to reveal her big secret is closer then she expected but she has many challenges to face along the way, some which include love triangles, death, secrets, hunters and the biggest of them all... war against the vampire king.


This is my first book so I'm sorry for any mistakes but I hope you enjoy my story! :)

title: Double Howl (Completed)
description:
****SLOWLY EDITING****

The wind whipped past her golden curls that chased behind her in a tangled mess. Her steps echoed loudly through the silence as she thumped through the woods as though the devil himself was at her heels. 

The adrenaline pumping through her veins held back the pains of the sharp cuts that the unmerciful wood grounds had tattooed on her bare feet. The branches danced along her fair flawless skin creating a pattern of it's own as it ripped through her plain white chemise which now spotted streaks of red and brown. The flimsy material, now drenched in sweat clung fiercely to her body like a second skin outlining every dip, every edge and every curve......

Her beating heart echoed through the silence in her head but she could still hear the growls of the beast that had been pursuing her relentlessly. She saw his yellow glowing eyes as he stepped through the woods and made his way toward her slowly. A predator and its prey.

title: Clayton
description:
2016 Watty Award Winner for FEROCIOUS reads. 

Sample only. This book is PUBLISHED!

How do you tell yourself not to breathe?

He is my mate, and she is his everything.

But he chose her, against every single instinct that we both know. For that, I have been whipped, shunned, shamed, disgraced, and broken.
All for one moment of madness I could not control.

After two years, I left, unable to bear the pain and loneliness anymore.
That was then. This is now.
I am back, and I am not the juvenile I was. I am now a fully grown female. I feel his eyes on me, but I can't. I won't. I shouldn't.

Time has healed my wounds, but not the deep scars the whip seared into my flesh or his indifference to my heart.
Each breath is a pain, and his scent overwhelms me. But I can smell her in it. He still will not give her up, despite his own body crawling with a deep, physical desire that only a mate can satisfy.

I breathe: I exist; barely.

I am a midwife. I bring life into a cruel world that haunts me every day, and the Doctor I work with is the only one in this pack who holds faith in me. He is the one person who stands up for me - and I feel light again when I am with him.
What kind of life is this when two mates cannot be together, yet every part of their primal soul yearns for it infinitely? What kind of cruel moon would torture a she-wolf like this?

I can't go on, but I must.
Whatever happens, I must attend to my purpose and give my miserable life some meaning; perhaps I can snatch some joy in pieces, but now I see that he needs me - but he also wants her too.

How do you tell yourself not to breathe?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Ghost of Ontario
description:
|PART 1 · 10TH GRADE DRAFT · 3X FEATURED| 

|NEW DRAFT WAS CONSIDERED FOR THE WATTPAD ORIGINALS PROGRAM IN 2024! I DECLINED BECAUSE OF THE VENTRICLES.|

Fifteen-year-old Kylie Juniper is not excited about attending a week-long canoe trip with her family in the depths of the Lady Evelyn-Smoothwater Provincial Park. After she learns the legend of the Ghost of Ontario, she meets a First Nations boy who is just as mysterious as the ten-year-old ghost.

                                                                                                   ***

Ten years ago, a little boy went missing in the Lady Evelyn-Smoothwater Provincial Park. Legend has it that he died and became the Ghost of Ontario. When fifteen-year-old Kylie learns of it, she vows to uncover the mystery, but things become extra interesting when she and her family meet an amnesic hermit, Ihaan, in the park. 

Ihaan has no memories of his past. All he remembers is his life with Canada's wild animals. However, it changes when he meets Kylie. Suddenly, he is desperate to find his lost memories, so he joins Kylie and her family on their canoe trip, much to Kylie's mother's displeasure.

As the trip progresses, Kylie and her family learn new secrets about Ihaan and try to help him get home. Ihaan, though, is eager to stay in the provincial park after living alone there for a long time. When mysterious happenings begin, such as "Lucilla" and voices in the forest, Kylie starts to wonder... Is Ihaan the Ghost of Ontario himself?

                                                                                                    ***

Note: Ihaan is pronounced "Ian".
(IMPORTANT! Just FYI, this is very poorly written. I wrote it in 10th grade but needed somewhere to store it.)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"Writing is a process, and that's why it's just as powerful as a star gone supernova."

*Published through SC!*
*Proud Wattpad Creator!*
*Former Wattpad Outreach Ambassador!*
*Judge and Reviewer!*
*151X Featured writer!*
*Ambys 2022/2023 winner!*
*Grand Winner of the 2023 Nano Watt Awards!*
*ONC 2024 Longlister/Ambassadors' Pick!*
*I prefer original over cliché/tropes (sorry!) and shorter chapters.*
*My stories are screenplay-like, plot and character-driven, and different.*

Hello, everybody! My name is Viktoria Fyodorova, and I'm so happy to know that there is a website like Wattpad where I can share some of my favorite writing pieces! Ever since 4th grade, I've loved to write. Writing is the "Hakuna Matata" of my life. I forget all my worries when I write because I get so lost in my worlds and worlds from movies, books, and TV shows I love.

My favorite genre to write is Fantasy, but I also like Fanfiction and the occasional Science Fiction.

After fourteen years and eight drafts, I was officially published through South Carolina on October 8th, 2024. Currently, I'm writing a war drama, Bill and the Whistling Death, about a retired Korean War Navy pilot still haunted by a mistake he made during his service.

I tragically lost my older brother in 2021, which left me with PTSD, but it also inspired my Scarlet and Violet fanfic, Infrared. For the longest time after he died, I thought I would never return to writing, but I did as a coping method for dealing with grief.

I'm a 2022 Ambys Awards winner with my short story, Messummer, and a 2023 Ambys Award/Nano Watt Grand Winner with Infrared! I'm also a judge and reviewer because I love to help authors improve their craft. I never judge somebody based on their writing style because we all have our own.

My favorite fandoms are Pokémon, Star Wars, HTTYD, and Harry Potter.

I hope you enjoy the stories and fanfics I post on Wattpad. If you can, please give me tips on how to improve my writing.

title: Rage of Vendetta (The Vendetta Series #2)
description:
In the anticipated sequel to In Vendetta House, Ariel and her gang of superpowered Cambions are back and better than ever.

Since escaping Vendetta House, a place where Cambions are killed to be used as dead, mind-controlled soldiers, they are in a race against time to stop an impending war. The Cambions have suffered through centuries of death and destruction by the Nephilum. Their only resort was to run and hide, but for very the first time, the Cambions are taking a stand. Too bad it is for all the wrong reasons, led by the wrong person. Unless Ariel and her friends can get to the Cambion council and make the rest of the Cambion population aware of the atrocities Aunt Nelly has committed to make her army, they are a lost cause. Blood calls to blood, and through a journey fueled by friendship and love, it is time for Ariel to learn that sacrifice means everything.

title: Not Quite Human - Book 1 of Werewolves Downunder
description:
Kasey lived in Sydney all her life, for part of it she'd even lived on the streets. This was her town, her home!  She had good friends and even if she didn't have a great deal she knew she had a lot.  When a tall stranger comes into her life, things start to change, she's not sure if that's a good thing or not, but she likes to take people at face value and well... he is a hunk!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
It's been some time since I first discovered wattpad and I've enjoyed uploading my stories, reading other peoples stories and getting and giving feedback. I think it's important for those that will hopefully one day be buying my books to get a feel for my writing and also to let me know if I'm getting it right. I value other peoples opinion of my work. I might not always agree with it, but as a writer I need to consider it.

I live in Sydney Australia and am a  veracious reader. I write poetry, short stories and still working on my Werewolves Downunder series. I also have outlines for several other stories I'd like to have the time to write as well. If I could have anything job in the world, it would be to write fulltime. My dream is to be a published author and that my books sell. More importantly if what I write touches someone then I know what I wrote was worthwhile.

I've read quite a few  stories here and have even made a few friends. I have to say that wattpad can become addictive... but it's an addiction I can live with!

For those interested in my Were series, I've listed them below in order of how they should be read.

1. Not Quite Human
2. Only Human
3. Sacred Guardian
4. Rescued Hearts
5. Tempest
6. Acceptance

I love -
The beach - swimming or just sitting in the sand letting my imagination drift with the tide
Reading - a range of genres
Writing - it keeps me sane
Helping others if I can
Playing in the dirt - or gardening as some call it, I like to get back to nature and this is about as natural as I can get in the city
Getting to know people of all ages and sharing ideas
Music, all kinds depending on my mood

title: My Guardian Angel
description:
Annabel had the perfect family. That is until a tragic accident takes her mother's life. Now, 10 years later, Annabel is 18 years old and her father is remarried. Claudia isn't a bad stepmom, but she decided that they should move away from the bad memories. California is way different than Colorado, though, and on top of the move Annabel has to finish out her senior year in a new school. She meets new friends and begins getting comfortable with her new life until he comes along. 

Angel Owens; The ultimate mystery.

 It seems like every time Annabel gets into trouble, he's always there to save her. He also seems to know an awful lot about her. What is he hiding? Why does he seem so familiar? But most importantly, why does Annabel feel so drawn to him?

title: Love's Revenge
description:
His black eyes bleed into my soul. 

"For every act of torture you inflicted on me," he takes another step towards me. I step back, coming in contact with the cold concrete behind me. "I will make you suffer twice as much." His voice is like ice. 

He raises his arm, pressing the gun to my forehead. The metal is cold against my skin. 

He leans closer to my face, lips brushing the hair beside my ear, "you're at my mercy now, Heidi."

-------------

Zane has been imprisoned deep underground in the most secure location. Being the alpha's brother, he has to stay hidden from his own pack. 

Heidi wants him to suffer for his crimes. From going on a murder streak through the packs, killing many innocents including her mate. 

She vows she will avenge her mate. But every act of pain she tries to inflict, rolls right off of him. 

All changes as one fateful day, an attack sets him free. His bloodthirsty eyes have only one motive...

Seek his own revenge on her.

RANKED #2 IN PARANORMAL 4/17/2020
RANKED #1 IN POSSESSIVE 4/25/2020

title: Call of the Wild
description:
When Aren is chased from his wolf pack after an accident in a hunting festival known as the Call of the Wild, his escape quickly gets upended.

Quite literally. 

He's hit by a car, stolen from his retreat, and threatened with veterinary care by a clueless but well-meaning human. Not the best of starts to his journey, but Aren finds this accidental meeting might be just the thing he needs. 

With time running out and shadows chasing him down, Aren must choose between saving himself and saving his captor.

title: Girl Meets Wolf
description:
Meet Ashlyn Clarke, your typical self-centered College girl. She cares about herself, her family, and her future. She's a no-nonsense girl, who can't seem to get over her own nonsense.   Her plans for her sophomore year include passing her classes and having a good time. 

Meet Axel. The boy with the tough exterior and beautiful blue-grey eyes. Axel is the whole package, but  his secrets  always seem to be lurking around him.  He is the future Alpha of his  pack. He thinks he has it all figured out. He knows his place in life and is ready to accept his destiny. His plans for the year include graduating from College, and going back home to learn how to run the pack. 

Little do they know that their worlds are about to be flipped upside down. Cue the random rouge attacks, and throw in some growing pains and you've got yourself one heck of a year, full of twist and turns. Insecurities will be revealed,  values will be tested and their sense of self will be challenged. There is a shift coming, but are Axel land Ashlyn ready for it?

EDIT: This is the first novel I've ever written... I think the story line is great, but the way it was delivered wasn't the best. Read, if you don't mind grammatical errors and other things.

title: Essence {Book 2 ✔️}

"I still wonder about it," I said. 

His brow furrowed, eyes searching my expression. "Wonder about what?"

"Whether you're the villain in my story."

Mara Monroe is at the center of a war she wanted no part in. 

But with her new throne she faces her sister's continued absence, a power she can't understand, and decisions on who to trust. Mara feels herself pulled in too many directions. 

One direction may be the best for her people, her family, her safety. 

The other, however, is the one she wants.

title: Hell's Rayne (Book 1)
description:
Rayne is not your average bounty hunter.

Part of a special programme of half-breeds - human/demon hybrids - that are born for one special purpose. They walk the earth and hunt those whose souls tread too close to the line and risk throwing off the precarious balance of the world; descending all life as we know it into chaos.

The hunters collect their bounty of human souls to be sacrificed in Hell, and the world keeps on turning. But with the taint of human morality running in her veins, for Rayne, the job's never quite as easy as it would seem.

Book 1 of the Hell Saga.

authorBio:
My name is Kate, obviously, I am 33, part time admin and clerical assistant at my local hospital, and mother of two beautiful, not so little anymore, girls.

I am an avid reader and writer. I also dabble in other art forms. I draw, sculpt clay models, bake a multitude of treats, attempt to play the bass guitar, and have recently started to dabble in costume making for my eldest daughter (the joys of the school years).

I am, currently, a 1st Kyu brown belt in Wado Karate. Have been training with the EWKR association since September 2011. Never would have thought martial arts would be my sport, but I do feel I've finally found my niche in the sports world.

title: Crowned By The Devil - BOOK 3 ✔ (Unedited)
description:
Book 1 - Saved By The Devil ✅
Book 2 - Return Of The Devil ✅
Book 3 - Crowned By The Devil ✅
Book 4 - War With The Devil ✅
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Scene from book:
"I warned you," he growled in anger as his fingers tightened around my neck. I focused on flashing out of his holding but nothing happen.

A hysterical laugh escaped him, "You can't escape my holding. You see, when I order someone to be here, they have no choice but to be here. Your powers will never work against me no matter if you're a demon or not. Even if you get your new powers, they wouldn't work. You know why?" he asked with a evil smirk on his face.

I couldn't reply since I was now gasping for air. 

"Because you're a Demon," he answered his own question. "You know why even a Demon can't go against me?" his smirk widened.

I grabbed his hand and tried to push it away or at least loosen it but he kept a grip on me enough for me to breath in small amounts of air. He leaned in closer, "Because I own every Demon, which mean, I own you. So test me again Sky and see what happens. Until you get back to your normal self, there is no us. I need the girl I fell in love with. Not the girl who goes around killing other people for the fun off it," he hissed out. 

With his final words, he let go of me and I dropped to the floor breathing heavily. I took up and looked at him to see he was not in flames anymore. He was just casually leaning against the wall looking at me with a smug look. 

"That was a bitch move," I mumbled.

He looked around, "Do you see it?" he asked.

I let out a scoff, "See what?"

He looked at me in the eyes with a smirk. "If I care."

Out of anger I flashed over to him and reached for his neck again but this time, he grabbed both of my hands causing me to stop. I tried to reach but he was still stronger than me.

"Forgive me Princessa but....

title: Clay's Hope
description:
Clay is a man of few human talents. As a wolf, he hunts well and can fight off a grizzly twice his size, but has no aspirations. The idea of a Mate isn't something he has ever seriously entertained. Dreamed about, maybe, but he knows the chances are nearly non-existent. 

Then he meets Gabby, a human girl. She hates him at first sight, yet he can't let her go. Who he was is no longer important. Now, who he needs to become to win her over is the only thing that matters. 

Note: This is the companion book to Hope(less), book 1 of the Judgement of the Six Series.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
About me?  Well, I like to write the kind of stuff I'd like to read.  Whether adult or YA, I stick mostly to paranormal/fantasy themes.  Life's real enough, right?

If you like Hope(less), Clay's Hope, and Moved, PLEASE tell your friends.  It's the biggest thanks you can give me.  If you're interested in the rest of the books, they can be found on most major retailer sites.

And for those who like 3rd person bios...

Ms. Haag is the author of nineteen books full of passion, twists, and excitement. She writes adult paranormal/fantasy/science-fiction romance under her pen name MJ Haag. Her award-winning Beastly Tales trilogy starts with Depravity (June 2015), followed by Deceit and Devastation. She also writes young adult paranormal/fantasy/science-fiction romance under another pen name, Melissa Haag, and is best known for her Judgment of Six series and the companion books.

Whether she's writing about Werewolves, retelling fairy tales, or running into aliens, each story features thoughtful, protective alpha males and strong women who never look to a man to get things done.

title: Children of the Archangels
description:
Nineteen-year-old Luke Sanchez was doing well at college until demons showed up at his campus and possessed his girlfriend. Luckily he solved that problem with a special ability only he possessed: to summon fire from the palm of his hand. The gift was granted to him by the archangel Uriel, one of the seven archangels in Christianity who adopt mentally stagnated children and imbue them with special powers. 

However, Luke needed to know more about his heritage, so when the opportunity arrived to study at an academy for his kind up in the Rocky Mountains, he took it, leaving his friends, school, family, and the love of his life behind. He learns that mentally distracted children can only unlock the power within them at the cost of their innocence. And when he gets chosen by the school to carry out a dangerous mission to the Garden of Eden to help "save" a mentally lost child, he encounters monstrous creatures, demons, turned angels, and a betrayal that puts his new school's safety in jeopardy.

***
This story is complete! 

Ranked #11 in Catholic Category

Genres: Young Adult Fantasy, Paranormal (Angels & Demons), Adventure 

Rated: PG-13 for Language and Mild Violence (It'll be a movie inside your head)

If you have any interest in angels and demons, Christianity, super powers, Hogwarts, the Hunger Games, or Percy Jackson, then you're going to love this story.

title: Hotel De Stella
description:
Polaris has had a few murders swept beneath the rug before. But when the brutal murder of Willow Archer reaches the ears of the public, the past pours out.

Luna Valentine, a room attendant at the Grand hotel, is unaware of all the trouble this misfortune will bring her. 
A hotel staff, a rookie officer, a journalist and a part timer at the local rental store. An unlikely group of people are unwillingly stringed along to uncover the truths lying in Polaris. Where does it all lead back to? 

Find out by reading through Luna Valentine's journey in Grand hotel where things keep going south!

title: I Am The Alpha (Part 1/2)
description:
Erin Daniels is part of the East Forest Pack, not only that but she's the Alpha. In a male dominant race this makes her one of a kind. She was born with the Alpha imprint on her skin but as she grew older it changed into something the likes of which no one has ever seen.

Erin isn't your usual girl.... in fact she hates most girls. She prefers to spend time running a muck with her Pack-mates and if anyone gets in her way they better watch out. 

Erin has just come back from an exchange trip to Spain when all of a sudden the Blood Valley Alpha himself decides to go after her and will stop at nothing. 

When everything falls apart and enemy packs try to destroy East Forest will Erin's strange powers be enough to save her, or will her love for her pack-mates be her downfall?

Join Erin Daniels on a journey of finding herself and fighting for the ones she loves. Delve into the world of werewolves and the ancient legends of their past. Be captivated by unusual enemies and even stranger friendships. Remember, not everything is what it seems. 

{this book is not actually completed but was marked as so to be in the runnings for the watty awards 2011. The second part can be found on my profile.}

title: Chasing Death
description:
When Hell and Earth collide, sparks are bound to fly. Saddened by the death of her lover, Tora tries to take her own life only to learn that her name is missing from the system of the Fates. She sets out on a journey to correct the glitch but lands herself in trouble, becoming a wanted criminal on the run. Trapped in a dangerous realm, making friends and foes and trying to evade eternal punishment, Tora finds safety in the arms of Death himself. Will this forbidden love survive the test of time? Life, Death or Immortality - what will Tora choose in Pataal Lok? And are the legends of good vs evil, as straight as they're narrated to us?

title: The Blood of Rubies
description:
It all begins when a silver dagger goes missing.

For her entire life, a human named Cora Gabris has known that lycans were searching for her, as she was born as a Ruby -- a human that, when turned into a lycan, will become much stronger than any of the others.

If she were to turn into a lycan, the powers she could harness are immeasurable. And her mate would inherit them as well. It's for that very reason that she has remained hidden all of her life, as a dangerous lycan has been searching for her since she went missing. 

When the life of her last family member is threatened, Cora chooses to meet the Alpha of  Reiger Pack, hoping to avoid the lycan that hunts for her. 

She is utterly unprepared to face the different culture, to sift through the greed of those who crave her power. She must face a language barrier and prove she is more than just a Ruby. She is Cora Gabris, and once among them, she has every intention to make a name for herself among creatures that value in perseverance above all. 

Scars will be made, and alliances will either save or destroy her. 

It will be a worthy sacrifice in her eyes as long as her brother is safe, and that she doesn't fall into the wrong hands before she is able to fully turn into one of them...


...

Welcome to a world where witches aid humanity, and the Seers of lycans are watching. Waiting. Determined to strike back. 

Explore the danger where the gods push their final pieces into place before watching it unfold.

And discover a story about comradery, betrayal, love, heartache, loss, and growth. 


...

title: The Last Necromancer
description:
TO LISTEN TO THE AUDIOBOOK OF THE LAST NECROMANCER FOR FREE check out my YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/@cjarcherauthor

For five years, Charlotte (Charlie) Holloway has lived as a boy in the slums. But when one theft too many gets her arrested, her only means of escape lies with a dead man. Charlie hasn't raised a spirit since she first discovered she could do so five years ago. That time, her father banished her. This time, she brings even more trouble upon herself.

People are now hunting Charlie all over London, but only one man succeeds in capturing her.

Lincoln Fitzroy is the mysterious head of a secret organization on the trail of a madman who needs a necromancer to control his newly "made" creatures. There was only one known necromancer in the world - Charlotte - but now there appears to be two. Lincoln captures the willful Charlie in the hopes the boy will lead him to Charlotte. But what happens when he discovers the boy is in fact the young woman he's been searching for all along? And will she agree to work for the man who held her against her will, and for an organization she doesn't trust?

Because Lincoln and his ministry might be just as dangerous as the madman they're hunting.

title: The Blanchard Witches of Daihmler County
description:
The Blanchards are your typical, close-knit southern family... who also just happen to wield magic. The road through life is never easy, but for three generations of witches living together in their ancestral home, things are getting more complicated. Olympia Blanchard, her daughters, and her adult grandchildren will navigate love, loss, and quite a bit of danger when the magical world creeps into their natural one.

In the debut novel of THE BLANCHARD WITCHES series...A spell gone awry leaves Salem Blanchard missing and it will be up to Olympia to discover why and where in time she might be. Seth Blanchard and his cousins Yasmine and Fable have all found summer love, but is one of their romantic interests the psycho killer on the prowl? Tragedy will strike the family and a life long enemy will come back into their lives as the Blanchards face a summer they will never forget.

The Blanchard witches will need all of their skill, all of their love, and their indomitable family unity to face the challenges awaiting them. Welcome to Daihmler County, Alabama. Home of the Blanchards. Things are about to get a little strange.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am an author writing in the supernatural/contemporary fantasy genre.  My current series THE BLANCHARD WITCHES has won multiple awards and growing a loyal fan base. 
Not possessing the time or patience for novels that go too slowly or go nowhere at all, I write fast paced, multi character stories that (I've been told by fans) never gets boring because the stories are ever evolving.  Likewise, I try to make sure my characters are never flat.  I want you to recognize yourself or someone you know in them because once that emotional connection is forged, you care.  You care about what happens to them.  Their triumphs become your own and their tragedies will bring you to tears.  When you feel like my people are your people too, then I've done my job.


On a personal note, live in Birmingham, Alabama with my husband and our sons.  We do our best to show our boys the greater world out there and the people they share it with.  We frequently get out of our town and take them to cities we love such as New York, Miami, Nashville, Denver, and Cleveland to name a few favorites.  We are proud to see them growing up unafraid to meet new and interesting people, learning about other people's life experiences, and understanding everyone isn't exactly like the people you live next door to.  I always tell them, "Fill your life with people who are not like you.  You already know your perspective, but you will never know other people's story if everyone you know is the same as you."

title: The Alpha's Vampire
description:
Callum has a special gift and although he has been told that countless times by his Mom, he fails to see it. As a result of his oblivion, the queen of his vampire clan is after him and he doesn't even realize it, not until later.

After their move due to a lot of reasons put together, Callum comes in contact with an annoyingly possessive boy who also happens to be a wolf. Callum also finds himself falling for wolf boy at a pace totally out of his control.

Nathan is not gay and he sure as hell is not getting mated to a frighteningly pale boy he knows nothing about. Despite Nathan's various rebellious actions, he can't stop the way this frail boy makes him feel.

They may just be two ordinary -not so ordinary- guys trying to make the most of life, but one thing is certain, life has a lot install for this two polar opposites.

One of them being getting past the fact that vampires and werewolves aren't in each other's good books.

title: Wildcard
description:
With a child murderer to catch, rookie Detective Ryan Shale has no time to lose. What he NEEDS is an older, wiser detective to teach him how to become a top-notch investigator. What he GETS is a guitar-plucking, fortune-telling, pickpocketing psychic. Is Ryan's career ruined before it even gets started? Or has he just had the luckiest break any guy could wish for?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Welcome to the home of Detective Ryan Shale and Forensic Psychic Jake Taberner, and thank you for visiting my page.

'Wildcard' and 'Racing The Tide' are the first two books in a series of five and are self-contained novellas. Ryan and Jake's latter three stories are free to read on Amazon's Kindle Unlimited, or downloadable there for £1.99 each.

title: Illusional
description:
It's Winter. It's Snowing. It's Time.

Mason, a 15-year old boy, decided to reunite with his family and friends by taking a cozy winter cabin vacation, but was unaware what might happen while they were there.

As Mason and his friends and family explore the cabin, they were bought into a false sense of security and realize they were snowed in the cabin overnight! They are now trapped in the cabin with no way out. Only time could heal.

Over time, Mason and the others began to experience their biggest fears and their greatest nightmares come to life, each one being suited to affect one's own specific fear.

Can Mason and his family and friends survive their greatest fears and discover why they are experiencing this?

The book is finished, but will be going through revision before being marked as "Complete."

title: Never Cheat a Witch (Book II A Not So Cozy Mystery)
description:
(Book II in the NSCM series) Rowena Flores has troubles... and we're not just talking about her lackluster love life.

Just when her life is finally getting back to normal, newly discovered hexing witch Rowena Flores is volun-told to participate in a Sweeter Homes beauty pageant. If that wasn't bad enough, Rowena's book club bestie is accused of murdering the pageant's judge. With no leads on the case, her friend's freedom on the line, and a killer on the loose, Rowena takes matters into her own hands.

Will Rowena find the true killer and clear her best friend's name? Will she ever be able to control her growing powers as a hexing witch? More importantly, is Rowena's crush, the local wolf pack alpha, really engaged to be married?

*Cover made with Canva

***A Not So Cozy Mystery Series***
Book I: Good Witch, Bad Alpha
Book II: Never Cheat a Witch
Book III: Oh, Shift! (coming soon)

title: THE GIRL WHO KNEW TOO MUCH
description:
[ON BREAK]
What if the loved one you lost were too come back ?

You will meet Akshara in the story whose mother dies leaving a huge vacuum in her life. Akshara is just 13 and is not able to cope up with this jolt. And then Harry comes in her life narrating her his own story. This, he does, in order to create a similar kind of faith, that is there in Sahiba. As a matter fact, you will then easily able to correlate the situation Sahiba and Akshara passed through in their individual lives.


 It is a story of faith in self love . The faith that goes well beyond the boundaries of reality and brings you to a different level. A level that takes you out of the worldly chores and puts you a level above. A level where you create an endless bond with the people you are in love with. No matter where they are. And whether they still exist or not.

I hope u like this story, this is my first one :)

title: Unoridnary Days(CURRENTLY ON HIATUS)
description:
CURRENTLY ON HIATUS:

I am actually taking a break from writing as I am busy am going to have some exams and stuff rn but I will update this after it has ended!!


Manasvipuri is a small town with nothing quite cool to make it stand out.

It has the usual concrete jungle, which people fondly call 'home', vehicles blaring horns and the asphalt roads.
At first, this city seems quite normal at first sight.

But the truth is only known to the ones who reside.

With the help of a blessing from an era gone by, this city has unique citizens!

Espers and paranormal are something that  has been coexisting with the normal since many years.

According to the residents, this isn't anything special to them. 

But Isha? 

She has to unpack quite a alot!

With a new city comes new stories to unfold and maybe gain something more.

Making new friends and marking new adventures, That's the fun!

Read further to get to know about what our protagonists go through!

title: Radioman (A 2/19th Spinoff) - Complete
description:
Paul Foster is a 17 year old boy, a white trash high school dropout without even a GED to his name, an adulteress ex-wife he married at 16, uncaring (at best) parents, who's left behind his hometown for what he felt would be an uncaring world. Once finished with Basic Training and Advanced Individual Training, he finds himself assigned to 2/19th Special Weapons Group and figures that nothing in an uncaring world matters. 

Exposed to nerve agent. Fighting Soviet soldiers over control of a 15 square mile section of Western Germany. Seeing friends die. The crushing weight of his duties in an uncaring military steadily grinds away at him.

However, in the fire and blood of the hell of 2/19th he finds a small spark. A dancing firefly in the middle of misery and terror that has wound around him and held his heart in her tiny hands. Amid the blood and gunfire of a war that nobody knows or cares about, he's found friends and his place in the world.

But now he has to return home. To a past he tried to leave behind.

When everything goes bad, the tormentors of his past quickly discover the simple fact of 2/19th.

Like his fellow soldiers, Paul Foster may look like a man, but he isn't.

He's a weapon.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A last little bit of me, mostly rusted and damaged metal.

I'm a father of four and have two grand-children. Married for more than 20 years to the same woman who puts up with all of my crap and laughs while I do stupid things. I live in the Rogue Valley, Oregon, someplace I had dreamed of returning to for the 20 years I was gone.

A Cold War veteran of the US Army, I was released after my third medical board refused to return me to full duty. From there I worked in a factory, was a bartender, worked in a cannery, did construction, worked at two big store chains. I've worked for a carnival, slinging cable for a nation-wide cable company, and other jobs. I'm currently nothing more than a lazy old man who watches TV with his grandchildren and kids.

Three years of college before I just walked off one day, leaving my car and my books and everything else in the parking lot of the college. (My friends got it and took it and me home to my wife)

My absolute favorite movie is Freejack. Favorite song is Wasted Years by Iron Maiden. Favorite TV show is: Grey's Anatomy. Favorite book is Redliners  by David Drake.



*****NOTICE****

If you ask me to critique ANY military story, have your stuff straight. Don't try to excuse it with 'it's just fan-fiction' or 'it's not real' or 'I'm making it up, it doesn't matter', because it does to me. One look at my page should tell you that it matters to me.

If you ask me to read anything, I *WILL* critique it.

<b>Credits:</b>
Damned of the 2/19th Covers: @undertoned
Initial Editing Pass: Heather Dawn Willard & Jose Quervo
Character Concept Sketches: Owen Kuhn
2/19th Special Weapons Group Concept and Implementation: US Department of Defense

title: The Keepers
description:
Some relatives are meant to stay distant.                                           
* * *
Josephine Lyttleton-Bradley can't understand why she must leave her London home - in the middle of the night during a wicked storm, no less - to live with a relative she's never even met. 

When Josie realizes she's stuck indefinitely in Great Aunt Donatella's lavish, but spooky mansion in the English countryside, she must uncover why her parents kept details about this branch of the family a secret or risk missing her chance to ever leave.

[Approx. 30K word Novella] Cover made with Canva Image Generator.

(c) 2014 All Rights Reserved - R.S. Kovach
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
✨Award-winning Former Wattpad Creator, Originals & Yonder✨ Bigger than a breadbox, but not by much.

Do NOT advertise on my board. Spammers will be deleted and BLOCKED.

I write strong yet relatable heroines, flawed but redeemable heroes, and the occasional villain you'll love to hate. I like to subvert tropes to create original ways of looking at the familiar. Common elements include intriguing settings, art & architecture; exploration of immortality (both literal & figurative); hiding symbolism in plain sight; ending chapters with kick-ass cliffhangers; and centering girls who rescue themselves.

Published by 2 of the BIG 5. Wrote for Legendary Pictures, Hulu, Amazon Prime, and Simon & Schuster. Optioned for a podcast by MediaCorp Singapore. Numbers person at a Uni. Art historian in another life.

title: Checkered Royals [Ciel Phantomhive x Reader] *NOT FULLY EDITED*
description:
•{this is a pretty slow paced story- I personally don't like quick paced ones ^^' and before we start, this is a female!Reader insert, so she/her pronouns will be used!!}•

The young Phantomhive is still at the top of his game. A successful businessman of the Funtom Company of children's toys and confectionary whom also holds the title of her Majesty's "Guard Dog" with his loyal demon of a butler at his side. Solving mystery by mystery, running business by business, Ciel is holding up well whilst on his journey of revenge.

Y/N, a rich girl living in the shadow of tragedy is forced to step up after her parents and younger sister are reported missing. She takes the reigns of her family business of jewellery which is famously known all across Britain and in some parts of the world whilst hiding a family curse. Y/N's determined to take vengeance for all that her family and relatives have suffered.


They don't expect to cross paths. However, after they meet, drama starts rolling. Once it does, things'll change, may they be for better...

Or worse.

title: 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐒𝐢𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐖𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬
description:
In the vast silence of time, voices echo; unheard, unseen, and yearning to be remembered.
Tales of the Forgotten is a haunting collection of ten monologues, each giving voice to those lost to history. Their words, rich with longing and pain, stand as a testament to the lives they once lived. These are not tales of triumph or glory but intimate confessions, heartfelt laments, and whispered reflections from the edge of existence.

title: Ghost [Boyxboy]
description:
Ghost walks the halls, only seen by one boy, Quinn, in years.  The two are close friends, inseparable really.  Another kid, Sean, gets an injury from a near death experience, now they can both see the ghost.  Sean finds out that Quinn really wasn?t a weirdo talking to himself, but can he accept that he is now the same in peer?s eyes?  Ghost is freaked, no one has seen him but this one kid his entire lonely existence, but now there are two? The three have to find out why they can see Ghost when no one else can.  The secret may lie in fate or in something from ghosts past.

title: Render Me Starless
description:
[COMPLETED] 

"Are you trying to get into my pants, Orion?" 
His eyes flash gold as he looks at me. "Yes."

***

It's long since been told that the stars were story tellers. 
That the stars held knowledge that no one had. 
It was time for Maria to find out how true this really was. 

***

I suppose being forced to stay with a complete stranger sucks. It sucks even more when nothing makes sense. It doesn't help when I am stuck with an obnoxious, cocky and hot man.

Orion. Even his name provoked a plethora of feelings. Nervousness. Dread. Wanting to shove a stick up his ass. Maybe even kiss his kissable lips. Orion. 

Just meeting him had been out of the norm. Then I was shoved. Shoved hard. Shoved into a world that causes my body to sweat and have goosebumps all over at the same time. A world that gave me things I never knew I wanted. A world I had yet to discover. 

Oh, it was time alright. Time to Render the world Starless.


Cover by: @sofkisses

title: Tornado Insanity: Rewritten
description:
"Some are too naive to not know that all things come to an end."

CURRENT STORY ARC: THE END

Twenty-five years have passed after the prophetic announcement of an apocalyptic event, and society has moved on from the paroxysm of fear that gripped the world on that day. World governments have denounced and denied the possibility of such an event, which conspirators call "Touchdown of the Sky." The potential tragedy was uncovered in various tombs on six continents, foretelling about humanity's final night... the night where all cities, towns, and the people dwelling within them would be wiped off the face of the earth. The tornado that would end all life: the tornado from heaven.

A crossover between Tornado Insanity and Tornado Alley Ultimate, among other games, placed into a realistic setting. Credits to Telavation for creating TI and 1billybob1 for TAU.

title: Dancing With The Masquerade
description:
Twenty-six-year-old Kasiemobi Ejindu knows something sinister has been moving on with her for as long as she could recall even though she's oblivious of its true threats but a shocking revelation regarding her ancestral background and her sudden encounter with a young Hispanic-American pastor might just be her first true direction to finding salvation and love.

* * *

It's Christmas holiday, a time of joy, relaxation, thanksgiving and being with family but not for Kasiemobi, well, at least not this year.

Twenty-six-year-old Kasiemobi Ejindu is conscious of the fact that something sinister has entwined with her life for as long as she could recall, and even though she is oblivious of the true threat it poses, she has learned to live with it. That is until a week before Christmas when her fiancée abruptly breaks off their engagement and she eventually travels to her hometown alone on major account of her young cousin's wedding. There, she meets Cergio Suarez, a young Hispanic-American pastor whose company she eventually grows fond of but their relationship-and ultimately her life is threatened by forces beyond her control and if she doesn't give into its demand, she stands a chance of losing her entire family and what they stand for.

2021 ©️

title: Donovan's Desire
description:
Alpha Donovan watched his brother struggle with the complications that come with a mate. Nonetheless, he still cannot wait to find his own. Born who he was, he is not prepared to discover that his mate is a witch. As if that were not challenge enough, she wants nothing to do with him whatsoever. Donovan's advice to Liam on the acquisition of his own mate led to great strife so he can only hope that the couple has a useful plan in mind for his predicament. Not that he would listen to it.
The situation, however, could not be that simple. 
"Coerced" into a deal with the trickster witch Zira, Donovan finds himself tangled in a web he might not be able to free anyone from. More than that, he is not the only one that wants the witch with the green thumb. Can he protect his mate while she fights for her life or will she die without ever knowing what he is to her?

title: Soul (Chaos #1)
description:
Soul is the first book in the official series that began with One Night with the Fae / A Dark Faery Tale.

Cara Kelly’s life is going nowhere when she’s lured to a faery festival. There she sees darkness and magic, madness and lust, and she comes out the other side with new eyes and an addiction to the fae.

When the faery who saved her life returns to her, Cara knows there’s something wrong. Two souls exist in one body, and both need her, but to help one, she’ll end the life of the other. At first, her mind is made up, but both souls know how to charm her. 

As the days pass, it becomes clear that the faeries need a leader, and Cara finds herself sucked into a world where morals don’t exist. The truth of her past is hidden in the magic, but all Cara needs to do is survive the king’s coronation, then the fae will let her go forever. 

But that’s not what she wants anymore, and it’s getting harder and harder to tell the difference between a king and a half-blooded solitary fae. Cara’s losing her way, and her heart, to the fae, but there’s still her life, and her humanity, left to lose.

title: Marked by Encantos
description:
Dante Reyes never expected his first year at Diliman University to spiral into a dark, supernatural mystery. What begins as an ordinary first day turns sinister when a mysterious mark appears on his hand, slowly revealing its true nature-he is connected to the hidden realm of Biringan, the city of the Encantos, long believed to be a myth. Haunted by cryptic messages, elusive figures, and a secretive roommate, Alex, who knows more than he's letting on, Dante must unravel the secrets of his family's past.

As he digs deeper, he discovers that the mark is no ordinary tattoo-it is a symbol of power, an ancient bond that marks him as a key figure in the delicate balance between the human world and the world of the Encantos. But with his newfound connection comes danger. The Encanto Hunters are closing in, and Biringan's dark forces are stirring.

Caught between two worlds, Dante must choose-will he embrace his destiny as the protector of these ancient secrets, or will the darkness consume him?

In Marked by Encantos, the lines between reality and myth blur as Dante is drawn into a world of danger, magic, and betrayal, where every decision could mean the difference between life and death.

title: Alpha King's Mate
description:
A Wattpad Featured Story November 20, 2017

#1 in Teen Romance May 7, 2020

***

As the daughter of an Alpha it is required by law that Olivia Mayer must use her strengthened genes for the reproduction of purebred werewolves. In other words, Olivia must cast her mate aside to bring a new generation of strong wolves into the world, so the werewolf, a dying species, might survive. In order to save herself from a lifetime of dissatisfaction and unhappiness, Olivia runs away illegally, only to be caught by the King's guards on the edge of His Majesty's territory. The last thing  she expects is to find that the King is actually her mate.
In her ascension to the throne and adjustment to royal life, Olivia comes to realize the secret sinister ongoings of their government and must decide to adhere to the stereotypes of what a noblewoman should be in the eyes of men, or to truly be a monarch.

title: The Mystery Beneath Spirit Lake (TG/TF Story)
description:
Part 1 - Spiritwalker
Sean Lattimer has a rare talent: he is a Spiritwalker...
Yet, when a mysterious fire quickly breaks out in his group cabin, he must leap into Spirit Lake to help bucket water, or risk losing everything. With the cabin saved, a price must be paid for entering Spirit Lake. A tithe to protect not only those whom he cherishes, but nature itself.
And that price is either his humanity, or his sanity.
Part 2-Skinwalker
'Either you stop those who threatened to disturb my gift from Manito...or forever be cursed to become its guardian.'
That was the divine punishment passed down upon David Braose after he had foolishly decided to sleep at Spirit Lake.
Between battling the local god-like elementals, enduring the harsh alpine elements, and outwitting greedy humans; everyday was just a struggle to survive.
With every passing sunset, he must quickly learn how to adapt to being the new guardian spirit, or perish at the hands of his previous acquaintance.
To endure every passing moon, replacing his mortal human identity with something mysterious and demonic!
Part 2-Shadowwalker
Being Written...plot yet to come

authorBio:
ABOUT THE AUTHOR:
Mira Carleen grew up in a small coastal farming community in Kitsap, Washington where her aspirations for science, writing and fantasy were cultivated.

She attended Pacific Lutheran University and received her Bachelors Degree in Geo-Sciences, Specialization in Children's Literature, Autobiography Writing and Majors in Creative Writing. She has a background in aquatic marine biology for her job as an Environmental Educator, which was spurred by her love of mermaids.

She has always enjoyed writing since she was young, writing scientific research papers, science fiction and historical fiction. While attending PLU, she began writing fantasy books based on mermaids, Atlantis and alternate dimensions. She published her first Scientific Thesis on Mass Wasting Processes at Mount St. Helens (USGS Publication), and written three books on Medicial Plants, Plants of the Pacific Northwest and Plants of Vashon Island.

Much of her inspiration and favorite authors included: J. R. R. Tolkien (Lord of the Rings), Philip Pullman (His Dark Materials), Ransom Riggs (Miss Peregrine's Home For Particular Children), CM Michaels (Kerrigan's Race), Peter David (Legions Of Fire) and Dan Brown (Robert Langdon's Series). Many of these elements you'll find in her work.

Her current work is complying Native American Mythology of the Mount St. Helens (Project for the MSHNVM/MSHI) and writing a eight book series called: The Atlantean Doctrine.

As a transgendered individual, she incorporates gender dysphoria in many of her 'transfiguration' stories. This was a cooping mechanism for her to safely understand her human body and mermaid soul.

Another reoccurring aspect of her writing is heavy on respiratory conditions, as she is currently battling Cystic Fibrosis, which in the last five years has given her time to focus on writing old stories, and bring them to life.

In her free time; she spends much of her time reading, researching new topics and rock collecting.

title: Words of Power (Alice Gray Book 3)
description:
If you like mysteries that span centuries and magical creatures that hide in the dark corners of the world, then you've come to the right place!

Words of Power is the third book in the Alice Gray series so don't forget to check out the first two books in order!

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Follow Alice Gray, Pendle Witch descendant and hybrid pack member, to the historical city of York, where she faces the biggest challenge of her life - her very own witch trial.

Corruption and greed infest the justice system and riddle her personal life, making Alice doubt those she holds dearest. Humans, vampires and shifters all want a piece of her, and they're not alone. York Minster is not the place to be if gargoyles are after you, but this time there are worse creatures lurking in the shadows than Alice's old stone friends.

The first Alice Gray escaped her 1612 trial with the help of court clerk and friendly vampire Thomas Potts. But when her turncoat vampire lover shows his true self, our Alice is left out in the cold. Will she find the words to trigger her magic and make history repeat itself?

Well, that all depends on the blood...

authorBio:
Romance, history, magical worlds - erm, yes please!

I have a PhD in Victorian publishing history all about novel serialisations. I love them!

title: The Peak of Clarity
description:
Persa has only ever known the white rooms, her so called siblings, and him. The man of nightmares. When she is finally let out after so many years of experiments, she is being sold for breeding. But an act of kindness and chance meeting will change that all. Finding herself pregnant and surrounded by very handsome men, she has to face all of her past, letting out the dark that she has kept inside a box since she was a child as she tries to find clarity in this new world she didn't know existed.

This is a why choose romance where the main character will end up with multiple males in the end,  there are three! No romance triangles, no cheesy scenes where she has to decline a guy. Let's be honest, I get second male lead syndrome way too much, so let's just stick with reverse harem, thank you come again. 

Trigger warnings: Abuse, Suicide Attempt, Suicide, PTSD, Human Trafficking, and more.

This is my very first story. Feedback is much appreciated no matter how harsh, I don't get easily offended. For now I will post twice a week, but if I get a break from life, it will be more often! Thanks for reading if you decide to read! If not that's cool too, I'm not expecting anything.

I did not take the photo but I did edit it to have my title on it and to fit the Wattpad cover format. The author/photographer/editor is Katsiaryna Naliuka. Found it randomly online.

I'm working on a bunch of other stories, this is the one I have the most material for and is the most original, but if you like my stuff then tell me I should do more! Love you all, you matter, let's burn the world together!

title: Two Hearts: The Hunt [Slowly Editing]
description:
The vampires. Adrianna Catalina Marandici is the spoiled vampire princess of Marandici Kingdom. After the unfortunate death of her father the King, Adrianna is sent by her rash stepfather to the border town of Fairview Hills to find the werewolf responsible for his brother's death. But what happens when instead of finding a werewolf, she finds love? 

The werewolves. Caleb Hayes is the future Alpha of the Moonlight Shadows pack. After his father, the current leader and Alpha, hears from a witch that the Marandici vampires have sent one of their own to attack their pack, he sends Caleb to Fairview Hills to kill the vampire and protect his race. But what happens when instead of protecting his pack, Caleb finds himself protecting someone who he loves?

The witches. For centuries they have watched the ongoing feud between werewolves and vampires intensify to the point of death. Now with both sides on the brink of war, they have been pressured to pick a side. But soon their suspicious actions give way to questions regarding their true intentions. Whose side are the witches of Fairview Hills really on?

Three sides, two hearts, one fate.

Let The Hunt begin.

[ Written when I was 15. First story ever. Does not reflect current writing ability. Read at own risk. ]

title: It Happened One Summer
description:
Alternate Universe Wangxian Fanfiction - fluffy romance.

Dominant Alpha Lan Wangji is the star of Gusu Academy. During a Summer Exchange program he meets his match in a certain Wei Wuxian. Wei Wuxian is intelligent, athletic, spontaneous and a beta to Alpha Jiang Wanyin. Lan Wangji hates the fact that Wei Wuxian doesn't have any expectations to live up to and that makes him detest the man. Being a beta he has no shoes to fill. 

A beta's role in society is to assist the alphas. The role of omegas is to bear children. It's the alphas who shoulder the major responsibility of society. Lan Wangji considers it a waste for beta Wei Wuxian to be so talented. He wants the beta to focus his talents into helping his alpha but to no avail. Wei Wuxian is hell bent on enjoying his life. 

The plot twist is that Wei Wuxian is actually a dominant Omega and takes suppressants and pheromones blockers ever since he received his first heat. No one knows. Not alpha Jiang or his family, nor anyone except the doctor who treated him and his two children and now Lan Wangji.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm Bai Hao Xue, Indian. I'm a writer. My hobby is learning new things. That's why my name is HaoXue (One with wide learning). Recently I'm learning Chinese.     

Writer, dreamer, and fanfiction enthusiast. I spend my days crafting stories in the world of Mo Dao Zu Shi and other captivating universes. title: The Plague Doctor's Daughter
description:
[2021 WATTYS Winner] Giovanna joins a handsome nobleman to save a friend from an arranged marriage, but they discover a plot that may have victims of Venice's Black Death rising from their graves.

* * *
As a child, Giovanna Visconti learned the arts of bloodletting and elixir brewing from her father with an intent to simply support his work, not take it over. But when he falls ill from the pestilence that's been ravaging Venice for months, she reluctantly dons the beaked mask of the plague doctor. Vowing to protect her father however she can, Giovanna hides him away and sees her first patient--the handsome, but alarmingly feverish Matteo Barozzi. Although she successfully treats this son of a high-ranking official, in a careless moment Giovanna fails to properly conceal her identity. The only reason she isn't tossed into a dank jail cell is thanks to the young man's honor and feelings of indebtedness.

The association between the charming aristocrat and the clever commoner should end there, but when Giovanna's dearest friend goes missing right after her betrothal to the Doge's son and amid strange reports of nighttime attacks, violent commotions, and inexplicable behaviors in the community, the only person Giovanna can turn to for help is Matteo. Together, they must carefully navigate Venice's increasingly deadly canals to uncover a sect peddling false cures and a smuggling plot involving the highest levels of government or risk the entire Republic falling victim to something even worse than the plague: the risen dead.

Historical Fiction with Fantasy Elements
THE BORGIAS X FOREST OF HANDS AND TEETH

* * *

title: Seven Weeks to Forever (Love / Romance)
description:
Love? No thanks. Cassidy Jordan won't open her heart to anyone after a devastating romance caused her death the first time she turned eighteen. As a second-timer returned from the afterlife, all that stands between her and eternity is finding some guy named Riley Davis and helping him get his life on track. But no one told her helping Riley would mean dating him.

When Cassidy realizes she's falling for Riley, she's faced with a choice: give him the life he's meant for and leave this life when it's time, or give up eternity for the true love she's never had, knowing Riley will die the same way she did in her first life and that her entire existence could end at any time.

From Chapter Nine:

It's as though I'm under a spell as I put one foot in front of the other, feeling Riley's hand pressed against the small of my back. My body is going crazy with the tingling I feel. I must stumble, because he steadies me and we stop a few feet away from my front door. I find myself moving even closer to him, and for a moment, I'm not Cassidy. There's something familiar in the energy I feel. Riley's face blurs in front of me, and then there's the outline of a face I used to know well.

The outline I can see looks like David. The last time I stood in a driveway about to kiss someone, it was him. I want to say his name, but I can't move my lips. Then my vision clears and it's Riley in front of me again, his head bending down and his eyes holding mine. The energy pull between us is magnetic, and I hold my breath when his fingertips come up to my chin.

This can't happen. I try to tell myself that, but the rest of me isn't listening. My eyes close and every nerve in my body seems to hum as I wait for what's coming.

Teen Romance / Supernatural Romance / Paranormal Romance / Young Adult Romance
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, I'm Jennifer Farwell. I write teen and celebrity romance with a lot of love, laughter, and happily ever after. My writing has been featured by Publishers Weekly, Cosmopolitan, Wattpad, Marriott, and more. I've been writing since the day I picked up a navy blue crayon as a toddler and began scribbling on my parents' freshly painted white walls. When I'm not writing, I can usually be found playing at sound baths, taking in live music and stand-up comedy, or cheering on my favorite hockey team during hockey season.

title: Echoes - Beyond Threads Of Time
description:
~ A tale beyond threads of time ~

A voice echoes in her dreams, telling her to visit an unknown place, because it's time. Will a companion, who hears similar echoes in his dreams, make the expedition better than the destination?

_______

Unfolding in two famous royal cities of India, this saga of dreams, destiny and reincarnation will take you on a journey of two soulmates, that battle mysteries, betrayals and vengeance, to rekindle a forgotten historic romance. 

The timeline alternates between 2021 and 1921, showing glimpses of contemporary India as well as British India and its Princely States.

_______

Sanjana is the only living heir of a wealthy business family, based in New Delhi, India. However, she is tired of visiting several therapists, who cannot seem to understand how stubborn and convincing the echoes in her dreams are. The echoes that have been telling her to go somewhere since she turned 18. The therapists offer her no solution, except the useless sleeping pills that aren't even effective anymore. When she suddenly finds a stranger with a similar predicament, will she embark on an expedition with him to find answers? Where will this journey take her?

________

Brandon is the co-founder of a gaming start-up, based in Silicon valley, CA, USA. With his excellent design skills and his partner's business strategies, he became a successful billionaire at a very young age. Life is perfect for him, except for the nagging echoes that disturb him every night in his dreams. When an opportunity to explore a new country comes up, in the form of finding out where his dreams intend to take him, he decides to seize it. Will this be just another holiday for him or will this trip change his life forever?

_______

Written as an entry for Indian Open Novella Contest ONC 2021, Prompt #2

_______

All rights reserved
© Paramagnetic, 2021

title: The Curse of Halloween: The Garden Battle
description:
The lights flicker, the streets fill with disturbing figures and the line between reality and fantasy seems to blur. It's Halloween, the night when nightmares come to life, where even the harmless can transform into something frightening. But what happens when an innocent prank like a macabre decoration turns out to be a horror far more real? In this story, three brothers (Fallou, Saliou and Mohamed) together with their two sisters (Mame and Adja), find themselves in a living nightmare with a group of friends, acquaintances, strangers and even pets, trapped in the garden of their house, forced to face terrifying, bloodthirsty creatures to survive the night that soon became far more terrifying than it should be.

BACKSTORY: The idea for this story came to my sisters (Mame and Adja) and they convinced me to write it so they could read it before going to sleep. I spent a couple of months thinking about a plot, characters (some based on real people and some fictional) and a possible sequel. Let me know in the comments if I should write a sequel to this story!

title: Spells on Shelves
description:
Jade is on the run. To escape her old coven, she pretends to be normal. Just some run-off-the-mill witch. Certainly not someone powerful and especially not a life weaver. 
Taking on the position of the town witch in a seemingly idyllic, quiet, and desolate town seemed like the perfect plan to lay low for a while until she meets Paxton--shifter, Supernatural Security Division agent, and worst of all: witch hunter. 
When a dark ritual is performed just outside of town, all signs point to the works of a powerful witch. The only problem: Jade is the only witch. Now she has to work with Paxton to find the real culprit before her identity is exposed. 
The longer she stays, the harder it gets to leave. As the investigation unfolds, it becomes apparent that a high politician is not only behind the attacks, but after something specific. The town guards its own secret, one that forces Jade to compromise her carefully crafted identity or risk the safety of her new home. 
When her past and present collide, Jade needs to finally face those who have been after her powers all this time without losing everything she's built in her new home.

title: Kiss me under the Moonlight
description:
A wise man once said life is what happens to us while we are busy making other plans. That was so true in Arthit's case. Life was good for him with a nice job, supportive friends, and a loving boyfriend. He couldn't ask for more. He was happy with what he had and was looking forward to waking up every morning in the arms of his boyfriend and living another day with utmost happiness. But everything turned upside down suddenly in a single day. 

Every reason he was living for has changed. Now he was wandering the world in a soulless body and was counting every day that passed by. Just when he was trying to start a new life by locking away the past and burying it deep in his heart, the past comes back to him at an unexpected time. 

Arthit is confused with this new man who wears the skin of his old lover. He doesn't know what to do or how to react to someone he thought he knew so well. Every time he approaches this man expecting a familiar response, he is proven wrong. He wonders if it is the same person or is he going mad as he looks at every stranger and they look like his past lover?

Among all this commotion, barges in a handsome new guy who is sweet and caring and chases Arthit everywhere he goes. Every time Arthit snaps, curses, and screams at the new guy, he takes it with a stride. Not once he lets the smile on his face slip away and he comes back to Arthit every time without any grudge. 

If being in a love triangle was too much for Arthit, what would he do when he comes to know he is caught in the middle of a war that is simply unimaginable for the mortal mind?

WARNING:
Contains mature content that involves male-on-male relationships. If this is not your cup of tea, please skip reading this story.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Just another average human who likes getting lost between the folds of a book or taking the imaginary chariot to explore a daydream.

I love to read and write. But I have one teeny tiny problem where I am as lazy as a wet-soaking hippo.

Anyway, don't have much to tell. Enjoy my work and please leave a vote and comment if you like my work. I would really like to get your opinions guys. Stay positive and challenge yourself everyday but not at the cost of self-love. Save a smile for anything that life throws at you!! Spreading Love❤❤❤

title: Kilo-61 (Damned of the 2/19th Book 19)- Ongoing
description:
Years have gone by, the Cold War is over, the Special Weapons Program has been shut down along with the old Continuity of Government Program, and the USSR is a fading memory. Old weapons have been set aside, shelved, and largely forgotten. 

One such weapon is Anthony Stillwater, a relic of the Cold War, trained to bring about the end of the world and fight in the rubble. However, relics are shelved when they have no use. After being put out the military, Anthony Stillwater thought he had left it all behind. Living in the woods with his wife and four children, he's known around town as a relatively quiet man who dotes on his young wife and children when he isn't tending bar at the local seaside tavern. Although he bears scars from his time in the military, beyond nightmares he has left behind the dark, cold, and horror of his military service.

A buried secret has been found, and events are in motion to remind Stillwater that no matter what lies he tells himself, no matter what masks he wears, he will always be nothing more than a weapon and Property of the U.S. Army.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A last little bit of me, mostly rusted and damaged metal.

I'm a father of four and have two grand-children. Married for more than 20 years to the same woman who puts up with all of my crap and laughs while I do stupid things. I live in the Rogue Valley, Oregon, someplace I had dreamed of returning to for the 20 years I was gone.

A Cold War veteran of the US Army, I was released after my third medical board refused to return me to full duty. From there I worked in a factory, was a bartender, worked in a cannery, did construction, worked at two big store chains. I've worked for a carnival, slinging cable for a nation-wide cable company, and other jobs. I'm currently nothing more than a lazy old man who watches TV with his grandchildren and kids.

Three years of college before I just walked off one day, leaving my car and my books and everything else in the parking lot of the college. (My friends got it and took it and me home to my wife)

My absolute favorite movie is Freejack. Favorite song is Wasted Years by Iron Maiden. Favorite TV show is: Grey's Anatomy. Favorite book is Redliners  by David Drake.



*****NOTICE****

If you ask me to critique ANY military story, have your stuff straight. Don't try to excuse it with 'it's just fan-fiction' or 'it's not real' or 'I'm making it up, it doesn't matter', because it does to me. One look at my page should tell you that it matters to me.

If you ask me to read anything, I *WILL* critique it.

<b>Credits:</b>
Damned of the 2/19th Covers: @undertoned
Initial Editing Pass: Heather Dawn Willard & Jose Quervo
Character Concept Sketches: Owen Kuhn
2/19th Special Weapons Group Concept and Implementation: US Department of Defense

title: Waking Other Lives (Completed, Drakon Series, Book 1)
description:
(An Alternative Universe Book) Sierra lives a rather privileged life; she is coming from a well off, wonderful family, dating the perfect boyfriend, having the best of friends. Why is she then drawn to the bad boy, Seth who is going to the same college, the boy who frequently uses his fists, and hangs around with the shaky crowd? There is something intriguing about him from the dragon tattoo on his arm, down to his rebellious nature, even if Sierra is yet to figure that out.  The discovery may be sooner than later though as one day she wakes up in an entirely different world where everything she once knew and loved is turned upside down. This is an alternative universe, and her once secure world is over as she finds herself in the role of a rebel, fighting to dismantle the order preserved by the master race, the Drakons.

title: The Devilish Empanada Affair
description:
Book's inline: Two gay guys with daddy issues open an empanada store to stop Armaggedon.

In the heart of a bustling city, Lucas finds himself at a crossroads after a tumultuous breakup. Enter Kyle, his new roommate with a devilish charm and a penchant for mischief. Together, they embark on a culinary adventure, launching an empanada business that soon attracts attention from both mortal and supernatural forces.
  As they navigate the cutthroat world of small business and uncover the bizarre secrets lurking beneath the surface, Lucas and Kyle's friendship blossoms into something more. But when Kyle's true identity as the devil is revealed, their bond is tested as they confront a conspiracy that threatens to tear their world apart.
  With infernal ingredients and devilish wit, they face off against rival vendors, corrupt officials, and otherworldly beings in a battle for culinary supremacy and supernatural survival. Can their love withstand the trials of Hellish intrigue and empanada troubles, or will the flames of chaos consume them?
  
  "The Devilish Empanada Affair: love with a Kick" is a heartwarming tale of love, friendship, and the power of empanadas to unite even the most unlikely of allies. Prepare for a spicy adventure filled with laughter, romance, and devilish charm.
