title: Emily's House: Book 1 of the Akasha Chronicles
description:
Fourteen-year-old Emily Adams is flunking math - and life. But Emily has a secret, one that she has kept even from her best friends. Soon the ancient legacy coursing through her veins will force her secret to be revealed. Dormant for over a thousand years, an evil has arisen and this time, it will destroy anyone - or anything - that stands in its way.

Three teens embark on a dangerous journey and risk everything. For Emily, the fate of her friends - and her world - lies in her hands.
Travel with Emily as she unlocks the secrets of her Celtic ancestors as she goes on a mystical journey to the inner house and beyond.
Join the Journey . . .

WHAT READERS ARE SAYING:

"Natalie Wright has divined in Emily's House a simultaneous modern and ancient fairy tale of the greatest kind: sans parents, sans immediate consequence, sans cowardice. Bravery is said to be not the lack of fear, but action in the face of it. Like the best of Grimm, Perrault and Charles Schulz, Ms. Wright's kids find themselves amidst adventure, terror and turmoil, as well as ineffective and/or absent parental units. By their own bootstraps they must find help themselves to find their way home, to save not only each other, but perchance an entire civilization. "Adults drool, kids rule" is the motto for any well-written young adult or children's tale. Natalie's kids indeed rule. 

This one will last, alongside Grimm, Perrault and Schulz, in the coffers of timeless, fantasy literature. Plus, there's Hindergog and no one could not love Hindergog! Well done, Ms. Wright. Well done, indeed." - Jennifer S. Devore, author of "The Darlings of Orange County"
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I write epic Fantasy and Science Fiction. My work is inspired by my love of the Sci-Fi shows I watched growing up (Twilight Zone and Star Trek), my favorite books as a kid and young adult (A Wrinkle in Time, 1984), and my love of RPG video Games such as Dragon Age, Skyrim, and Elder Scrolls. I've been a nerd and sci-fi geek since long before it was remotely cool! ;-)

My first novels were written for the YA market, but my "voice" has aged up with each book I've written (now working on my seventh novel). My future works will not be YA.

The Wattpad community has shown amazing love for my first novel, Emily's House, posted here in its entirety. Thank you so much Wattpad folks for the loves! If you enjoy heroic adventure stories with a metaphysical twist, please check it out.

All of my works, including the award-winning H.A.L.F. trilogy, are available on Amazon.

I love to write, but there's more to life than fingers banging on the keyboard! I find travel super inspirational. So far I've been to eight countries. Ireland was my favorite (I did research there for Emily's House ;-), but I also had a blast in Paris and London.

I live in the desert southwest with my husband and two cat overlords, and spend too much time playing Dragon Age.

_____________________________________________________________________

title: Pathless Origin: Bane Of The Gods #featured
description:
After a failed suicide, 16 year old Artillian Skye woke up as an armoured soldier. With only a spear in hand, he was thrust in the middle of a battlefield with thousands of soldiers.

Somehow he had entered the Gaia domain. A place were spirits, demons and Demi-Gods run rampant in their quests for power.

Artillian learned that he was given a second chance by the fallen goddess Hestia, she had given him the last of her divine essence to bring him back to life. So he makes it his life's mission to restore her to her former glory, however to do that he needs to get stronger himself. He needed to become stronger than the gods!

For her he would kill any god,  do anything, even searching all from the  heavens to the nine levels of hell if need be. For she had given him something he had never had...A reason to live.

So he made her a promise

"I shall make the bottomless sky your ground, the boundless universe your domain and the unending infinite your sky!"
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Clopwyck River (Book One)
description:
Cover image - © Gemphotography | Dreamstime.com

15-year-old Demi-Louise knew that her new life in Clopwyck River wouldn't be easy. Forced to live with her estranged sister and racked with guilt over her mother's death, she is guarded with those she might hurt- and who might hurt her. But she couldn't have predicted the secrets of this seemingly quiet town. Centuries before, the inhabitants of Clopwyck River drowned a pregnant witch and since then those born there are cursed with a power that lies dormant until unleashed by extreme emotion: the Facultas.

Drawn into a life interwoven with magic and excitement, friendship and romance, Demi learns there is a sinister side of the Facultas: when used for evil, pieces of the soul are lost until there is nothing left but madness. She discovers that someone has found a malevolent way of circumventing the risk of losing the soul; death. A human sacrifice will unleash chaos and darkness will descend on the town.

Just as Demi starts to accept her place in her friends' hearts, family secrets are revealed and she battles a life changing truth and a threat against her loved ones. She must come to terms with her hidden past and fight for her family and friends' lives- by any means possible.

I follow his lead and bend a bit backwards. "Dancing requires trust."

"Then I guess we have a lot of improving to do together." A cheeky grin returned on the Lord of Emberwind's face as he pulled me back up.

Delusional. But I guess I can entertain him for tonight.

• Season 1 of Greykin Mountain •

When investigating the disappearance of seven fellow journalists, Jackson discovers Ascela's mountains hide more than wolf walkers and undead monsters.

***

Jackson, a 23-year-old trans-man journalist heads to the remote, snow-covered mountains of Ascela in search of his missing best friend and six other journalists, all of whom disappeared after investigating the same thing: Greykin Mountain. What starts as a desperate attempt to uncover the truth quickly turns into a nightmare when Jackson is bitten by a monstrous creature and transformed into a wolf walker. 

Thrown into a hidden world of ancient wolf-shifters, undead creatures, and dangerous secrets, Jackson must learn to navigate his new reality. Under the watchful eye of the cold and enigmatic Alpha, Daimon, he struggles to control his inner wolf and uncover the mystery of the deadly virus plaguing the region-a virus that threatens both humans and wolf walkers alike. 

As tensions rise within the pack and darker forces close in, Jackson finds himself torn between his quest for answers and a growing connection to Daimon. With the fate of the pack and Caeleste-kind at stake, Jackson must confront his own hidden past and face the looming threat that could destroy everything.

title: (ON HOLD) Spellbound (BxB)
description:
Asher Greenly attends a prestigious school in the coastal town of Willowbrook Cove, where the heartbeat of the world still plays to the tune of eighties pop, drive-in theaters, and 1960's neon diners. 

Welcomed into the arms of a private hybrid prep school, specializing in the education of college-bound students from ages sixteen to twenty-four, Asher is admitted into a program designed especially for the handicapped, the mentally disabled, and the mentally ill students. Incorrectly diagnosed as suicidal, Asher is segregated into a specially designed dorm room and deemed by his new peers as a "crazy".

But no one knows the truth of Asher's harsh reality: He can see spirits, and *they're* the ones trying to kill him. 

His struggle to fit in takes a drastic turn when he meets the captain of the baseball team, and son of the honorable school Dean, Jackal Riley. Though unnecessarily handsome and too cunning for his own good, Jackal Riley's mysterious personal veils a dangerous secret. There's a reason Willowbrook is trapped in the eighties, and it isn't the timeless nostalgia of Pac Man and MASH-but a spell, put upon the town to preserve sacred ground.

Jackal is revealed to belong to a coven of witches, who not only run the school, but the entire town of Willowbrook Cove. As Asher grows closer to the Riley family, one thing becomes drastically clear: someone is tampering with dark magic and threatening the lives of not only the coven, but the entire town of Willowbrook.

And to make matters worse, Asher soon finds himself mixed up with the coven in ways he never imagined possible.  

For instance, consumed by the soul of a fox familiar, bound to Jackal Riley for eternity.

title: Soulbound
description:
"Would it kill you to let yourself open up?"
"No," I sigh, tilting my chin and fixing my gaze to the ceiling. I clench my fists, nails digging into my palms as I fight to stay grounded. "But it might kill you."

*************

One is a half-demon with a harrowing past. The other is a barista with emotional baggage. Brought together by chance, bound together by fate--or a curse, depending on who you ask.

But one thing is certain: she never should have saved her life.

When Danika "Dani" Breeland runs into Ashe at a nightclub, she had no way of knowing that the chance encounter with her fiery redheaded crush would pull her into a secret world filled with the supernatural, or that something as simple as a silver ring would bind the two women together in unexpected--and dangerous--ways.

Navigating this strange new world isn't the only threat that Dani faces, however. There are far worse things to fear than soul-sucking vampires and egotistical witches--things lurking just beyond the Veil--and while Ashe may be tasked with keeping the balance, Dani may very well be the key to its undoing.

authorBio:
She/her. Lesbian.

IT Project Manager by day, aspiring writer by night. Lover of all things fantasy and sci-fi. Shameless indulger of coffee. Self-proclaimed cat lady but mildly tolerated by her cats (and dog who thinks he's a cat).

I write tales centering on strong (read: stubborn) leading ladies who like other ladies, walk the thin tightrope of morality and combat uncomfortable situations with sarcasm.

If you're an aspiring writer looking to share your work, or a book lover looking for your next new fave, then feel free to join THE WRITERS SANCTUM! title: Luna Skylar
description:
At age twenty-one, Skylar Bellemore loses all hope of finding her destined mate. After three years of seeing other wolves her age meeting their mates from near and far, she decides it may be time for her to move on. That's when she meets Bennett Price, a man around her age whose destined mate had passed away a year prior. Now, Skylar and Bennett have been together, happily in love, for four years, and the two of them couldn't imagine things any other way. In fact, Skylar is convinced that whoever her destined mate is, couldn't possibly compare to Bennett, and she no longer has any interest in ever meeting him. 

Bennett, on the other hand, worries every day that his chosen mate may run into the man she's destined to be with. Although Skylar assures him that nothing could ever come between them, could she really be so sure?

Alpha Zane Warwick had never had much interest in finding his mate. He didn't necessarily dislike the idea of having a mate, but it wasn't a top priority for him. That is, until his father, former Alpha Cedric Warwick suddenly falls ill and passes away. With no Luna or former Alpha, the Night Fire pack becomes the weakest and most vulnerable it's ever been. Between Zane's deep hunger for power and his father's dying wish for him to find his mate, his pack's rightful Luna, Zane has no choice but to actively search for the she-wolf the Moon Goddess destined him to be with. 

He would stop at nothing to find her, and once he found her, he would never let her go

________________________

title: Can you see me? [completed]
description:
I am invisible. No, not like having super power invisible but I have been invisible since I was cursed. Messing with high power priestess is not a good option. I have been what you call a bad boy. I loved dating girl, breaking hearts, late night rendezvous and rule breaking. 
So my curse was to live an endless life with a added bonus of being invisible so that I was alone for immortality. Since I was so very good looking and she kind of had a soft spot for me, she left a loop hole. My curse will be lifted if I find true love.
 I wish it was that easy because in my case no one can even see me so falling in love with me was out of question. 

Tristyn Moore is a cursed bad boy now invisible. Iorwen Haywell is the tomboy of her town with gang of friends, with rough child hood she is now one tough girl. Though she is pretty enough but for some reason she has never dated and is like invisible to opposite sex. Can two invisible people will be finally able to see and believe in each other?

title: Glory and Empire
description:
The Terran Empire is in a state of chaos after the successful sack by the Valdi armada.  As the Terran fleets struggle to reorganize, First Marshal Scott Pearson led the charge to cut into the enemy flank and stem the tide of reinforcements.  With Orion help, he was succeeding, until Captain Traci Ganner interfered--again.
  
But Traci must bring the Terran marshal and the chief Orion councilor together to confront a new Terran threat from the future.  Facing daunting new technology, Traci finds herself in the clutches of a new Terran enemy and if they force the location of the rift from her, both the Terrans and Orions will be lost.

In the final book of the Traci Ganner trilogy, Traci and her officers must endure their most difficult trials yet that leads Traci to a mystical temple that holds the keys to her very survival.

title: Wings
description:
Firstly, it was just the prisoners that were used. 

Then it became orphans, and even some of the elderly. 

Now it is everyone in a society where people are struggling to find work. 

Money is offered to anyone willing to volunteer themselves or their children to take part in scientific trials run by the organisation called Calox.

Except no one ever gets the money. 

No one is ever seen again once they've volunteered for the trials.

(This is the first book in the 'Children of Calox' series. 'Flames' is the sequel, and therefore the second book in the series. I plan to write between three and five books in total.)

title: La Cometa 1892
description:
Four working individuals are set to begin their adventure in the once prosperous town where they have to collect information about its root of destruction.

---

In a progressive city of Minokawa, it is expected to be one of the cities praised for its high rate of economic growth. Their pioneering distribution of resources, responsible usage of highly developed technology, and its top priority to build institutions and provide quality healthcare to the public challenged the neighboring lands to be better.

But with all these striking descriptions of what the so-called Kite City can offer, there is a part of it that remained untouched by modernity.

Soluna.

Apart from its antiquated geographical data, a horde of historians, journalists, and curious onlookers strived on excavating the origin of the town. However, with the continuous failed attempts on their search, Soluna still persists to be impenetrable of what's beyond the town's historic rack and ruin.

title: Courting Death | Book 3
description:
[BOOK THREE]
  
  "Falling in love was never a plan, Minnie." I sighed, fingers reaching up to rub my temples as I blinked my very translucent eyelids. "I was never courting death. No pun intended. And now I'm quite literally a few thousand feet underground, possibly dead, and in love with an eon-old spirit. What else could happen?"
    
    ***
    
    She had honest to god tried so hard as to stay out of harm's way. However, Addison's new found friendship with Death himself was enough to force her to make the worst decision of her life:
    
    Jump in front of a poisonous dart that could kill off an immortal god-like being just so she could protect the cynical spirit she had fallen in love with. 
    
    Oh, and was it mentioned that the spirit was actually Death himself and had been trying to kill her off just a year ago?
    
    Yeah, that happened. 
    
    Now stuck in the underworld of hell itself, Addison needs to find her way back to the land of the living. With only one of her best friends, Minnie Hoover, as a companion through this deadly (not so much for her since she's already stone cold dead) mission, as well as the said spirit by her side, the blonde stunner has five days to find her way back to life before she would be shipped off into the reincarnation system. And thus losing herself, and her friends, forever. 
    
    How hard could it be? After all, Addison didn't need to worry about being stabbed in the back again (in every sense of the word). Perhaps all it takes is the one thing she tried to avoid from the beginning. 
    
    A kiss from Death himself. 
    
  *****
    
    Highest Rank Fantasy: #7

title: Unnatural forces
description:
'What are you doing here?' he said angrily forcefully yanking my arm. 'I told you to stay hidden.'
I pulled my arm free. 'I know but I wanted to help!' I told him with creased brows wondering why we were wasting time.
'By getting yourself killed? Is that your idea of helping?' his deep eyes shot daggers at me.
'I don't care! This is my fight too?' I argued shooting back the daggers.
'You don't...' he mumbled the rest of the statement running his hand through his hair in obvious frustration. 'This is a war, not one of your childish games, Santana.'
Injured by his words, I shot back. 'Then i would rather die than li...' I stopped when the atmosphere immediately changed...drastically.
His eyes narrowed into mere slits as his face grew dark and he seemed to loom darkly and threateningly over me. I shivered as I stepped back in both awe and fear. He suddenly scooped down and gripped my shoulders pulling closer to him while lifting me off the ground until i was almost the same height as him.
'I will rip everyone's throat with my bare hands before I let anyone touch you.' he hissed his eyes a deep shade of grey that they were almost black.
What the hell?

                                                                                           *       *       *

All Santana wanted was to live an quiet life. After what happened to her Grandmother everyone's eyes were on her family and all she had to do was to try and not be a psycho... how hard could it be?
Oh...she had no idea.
From her recurring dream to her brother's terrifyingly accurate intuition to her own ability see beyond the physical, it was becoming increasingly obvious that something was amiss...
***
Tous Droits Réservés

Nathan grins. "Wanna see a magic trick?" 

Before any party can react, his hand wraps around her wrist, the curse - powered touch sends her back arched and entire body wound tight as painfully intense sensations ravage her, again. Something between a whimper and cry fall from her lips, shaking, eye flying wide then squeezing shut.  

Her legs give out, but he catches her, forearm hooking around her waist, and something even stronger follows in his wake. "O - oh, p - please," she gasps, writhing in his grip. Her nails claw at his skin as agonizing bliss tears across her nerves until she's convulsing violently with another orgasm.       
Somehow, she manages to rip herself out of his hold, hitting the carpeted floor, still twitching and buzzingly numb. Her gaze lifts to see Michael's wide - eyed expression, then to Nathan's, black eyed and filled with bad.   

"Little lamb." He smiles, all teeth and carnivorous. "This is going to be fun. I've been waiting to devour you."

When I reached my teen years, the romance genre became my favorite and that has never changed. Several years ago, I decided to try my hand at writing and I've been doing so with a passion ever since. title: Broken and Together
description:
Ever since Evan's death three years prior, Michael has been struggling. Between losing jobs and being bothered by his father, he finds that his life is about as miserable as he expected it to be. Tired, depressed, and angry, he uselessly searches for a new career. He receives this opportunity in a way he did not expect, through his father who offers him a job at the sister location of Freddy Fazbear's Pizza.

As he works to gain this position, he is reunited with a childhood friend whom he dropped contact with after the death of his brother. Charlotte Emily, the daughter of William's business partner. It isn't long before the two find themselves rebuilding their lost friendship and working together at the rental service. However, this job takes them much further than they ever thought. Terrible things have happened, things they can hardly bear to believe. Soon, both their sanity and relationship are tested throughout numerous life-threatening situations, all the while one question burns in their minds. Is it truly worth it to risk their own lives in order to make the past right?


(None of the characters in this story belong to me.)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey! I'm TheInsaneFoxWriter, but you can call me fox. That username is a bit of a mouthful. I'm an avid writer who's come here to post whatever I feel like. I'm also a Christian, and admittedly, a bit of a geek, a weirdo, a n d I love to torture my best boys and best girls. If you've found me in my little corner of the internet then, well, enjoy your stay. I post mainly fnaf stuff, with the occasional fic for my other obsessions.

So...I'm not very active here. Deleted my original account but got a new one, because I felt a bit badly for leaving some readers hanging. That being said, I don't plan to post much here. title: A Book of Dust and Breath
description:
Max has spent the past several thousand lifetimes as a Reaper among humans and, despite the pleasures of a tidy country home with a well-dusted library and a finely tuned Harley, he's starting to get bored. His best friend gives him some advice: "Drink some scotch. Bed a woman. Join a rock band. Get it out of your system, and get back to your dutiful service."
 
Max tried, but he ended up getting drunk, marrying the girl in Vegas, and accidentally triggering a chain of events that could end with the destruction of the human race.
 
Now he needs to make things right again but the Reaper quickly learns that the magic of being human comes with one grim reality.

authorBio:
I had been writing for years, but never really tried to get my stories out into the world. Then I discovered NanoWriMo and finished my first ever novel.
I've written loads more since that long-ago day and become a real-life published author--something 13-year-old me would have been completely in awe of.

I live in Michigan, surrounded by people I love and loads of feathered and furry critters. It's a good life!

title: Harry Potter's Twin Sister
description:
Separated at birth when she fell out of the crib and crawled away, out of her destroyed house, Lila is reunited with Harry in their third year, by Dumbledore, finally locating her. She had lived her whole life with Madame Maxine who received Lila when she was just a baby from a friend who had found her in Godrics Hollow. She was raised a Veela, but struggled to be lady like. Dumbledore transfers her over too Hogwarts and Lila and Harry are closer than anyone would have suspected. Being away from them for thirteen years.

She's so much like her brother, black, smooth hair and even has the same exact scar in the same exact place. They were so much alike that she even had Lily's heart and James troublemaking.

A whole lot of mischief awaits them in their third year!

Big Thanks to J.K Rowling who wrote the most awesome books ever!

title: Journey Home
description:
Two young werewolves were abducted from the Arctic Tundra sold to a paranormal trafficking ring and bought by a human couple as a money-making venture of the most horrific kind.

Our story begins with Char and Tee's escape and their journey to find their way home. They don't know where their pack is, but they have an idea of where a pack is because they saw a documentary on wolves. 

In a leap of faith, they make their way to Canada to find any pack of werewolves in the hopes that they know where their Arctic werewolf pack is.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am a burgeoning author who started my writing career with Fan Fiction in 2023. I was inspired by my fellow ZeeNuNew fans to bring alive the men we stan in different types of stories.

My entire life, I wanted to write, but I was afraid.

I grew up with a love of reading. So much so that I preferred a good book over...just about anything. In the car, at a party, walking home, instead of making friends; I always had a book in my face.

I have my father to thank for my reading habit. I have never been so grateful to anyone in my life and I will tell you why.

I have autism, but when I was a child they did not know what autism was, not by today's standards. Girls like me were a mystery. Everyone knew there was something "wrong" with me, and throughout my education, they tried to hold me back but my dad would not have it. (My hero!!)

In kindergarten they began teaching my classmates to read. I learned differently than the other children so instead of accomodating me, they put me in a delayed group. My dad was furious but the school would not budge. Every night he came home from work, he sat down with me and taught me to read. I screamed, cried, and begged but he would not let me out of it.

Not only did I learn how to read, but I far outshone my peers. I was the girl who was "Quirky, not very smart, but pretty.", and I graduated college, on my own. I earned scholarships, worked full time, and paid for it myself.

So those of you who are different, don't give up. You are awesome the way you are. What you need to do is find your way to do things. Once you stop trying to do it the mainstream way you will flourish.

Thank you, Daddy! Thank you for believing in me.

title: Stolen (Demon Romance) (FINISHED) (2024)
description:
DANGER NEVER TASTED SO SWEET
 *******************
How to date a vampire?  
I'll tell you! 
You'll need to give him hugs, daily, and also... other things. 
Oh, and blood. He needs blood. 
How do I know? 
My boyfriend's a vampire! Or at least I think. 
He's very dark and brooding, but... I notice he loves sweet things. Why doesn't everyone else know that? 
His blood is his coffee, he loves dumping sugar in it. 
It's odd, but I don't judge! I can just get him chocolate. 
So how to date a vampire?  
Good question, I'm still learning. 
 
Do you know Suki Quinn? No, she doesn't even know herself. 
She has a bright heart with a dark soul... her blood thickened and savory, just every vampire's dream.  
Every vampire had been hunting for the perfect meal, the bitter blood mixed with sweetness... and Suki was the definition of perfect blood. 
That's when William came into the situation. 
William Blaze, the boss at the publishing company Suki worked at. 
He wouldn't be her boss for long, no. 
He wouldn't allow anyone to get their slimy fingers on his dinner. 
His dinner? 
Yes, his dinner. 
Blood and lust made his favorite meal.

(originally "Once Bitten, I'm Smitten")
(Part of the Daem Realm)
(completed on October 21 2024)

title: Snowbound with an Invisible Love
description:
When shy writer Clairah retreats to a secluded, snow-covered cabin with her loyal service dog, Nugget, she hopes to break through her writer's block and find solace from her PTSD. But the isolation soon takes a sinister turn. Strange noises in the night, phantom footsteps in the snow, and eerie encounters blur the line between her imagination, her new medication's side effects, and something far darker.

After a chance meeting with Eric-a dangerously handsome and enigmatic stranger who seems to know too much about the cabin's history-Clairah begins to unravel secrets that defy reason. As her attraction to Eric deepens, so does her unease. He's intoxicating yet unsettling, his presence stirring both desire and fear. When Nugget's behavior becomes erratic and Clairah faces terrifying apparitions, she must confront the chilling truth: Eric may not be who-or what-he seems.

Caught in a web of lust, danger, and the supernatural, Clairah must decide if her connection to Eric is worth risking her sanity-or even her life.

©️All Rights Reserved

title: How To Forget A God [Yatori Noragami ff]
description:
"I want you to sever your ties with me, don't you understand?!" 

His harsh words flooded and drowned Hiyori's mind. She never expected he would react like that. Is this for real? Why? Why did Yato suddenly hate her? She was just trying to help.

"B-but Yato..." 

"I wanted you forget you even met us because I wish I never did!"

Her eyes widened and tears slowly formed in her eyes. She never knew he was even capable of saying those words.
Yukine stiffened and clenched his fists. He was about to say something and go to Yato, but then, Hiyori held his hand back.

"Is that what you really want Yato? Then fine... Cut them."

title: The Pact of Shadows
description:
The Pact of Shadows is a story about two strangers, Chloe and Dylan, who meet in the most unexpected way by crashing their cars into each other on a dark, empty road in San Bernardino. Both of them are dealing with some serious baggage. Chloe is on the hunt for her missing sister, while Dylan is searching for his wife, who vanished without a trace. They reluctantly team up to follow clues, and as they dig deeper, weird things start happening. Shadows seem to move on their own, strange people keep showing up, and creepy legends about the nearby forest feel a little too real.
    
    Their journey takes them from rundown motels to shady bars. Along the way, Chloe's sarcasm and Dylan's deadpan attitude create some much needed humor to cut through the tension. But with old secrets coming to light and sinister forces closing in, Chloe and Dylan have to face their pasts and learn to trust each other if they want to make it out alive. In this mix of suspense, dark humor, and supernatural mystery, The Pact of Shadows explores friendship, loss, and how sometimes facing the unknown means confronting your own fears.

title: The Forgotten Child
description:
Mark Stevens was just trying to get home after a long business trip, but when he spots an old, abandoned stroller on the side of a dark, empty road late at night, everything changes. A mysterious woman, standing eerily still beside the stroller, seems to watch him as he passes by. Haunted by the encounter, Mark tries to forget what he saw-but the horror has already followed him home.

As strange and terrifying events begin to plague his family, Mark realizes this isn't just a ghostly figure-it's something far more sinister. His daughter, Emily, starts talking to someone who isn't there, and Mark soon discovers a chilling connection between the woman on the road and his own family.

The more he uncovers, the deeper he's pulled into a nightmare that refuses to let go. Who is the woman with the stroller? And why does she want Emily?

Mark must confront the deadly secret buried in his past before the curse consumes them all.

authorBio:
Okay, so I just deleted my whole about section. I think it's about time I update this thing. When I first started writing I used it as an antidepressant. I loved writing so much and then I had no motivation to write, no matter how much I tried I could not sit down at all to write. Now that I am currently on first shift and found a band called Dark Sarah it's like a light in me has been ignited and now I can't stop writing.

Sure I'm not writing that fast, but the current story I'm writing I was able to update it within 3 days. This time around I'm going to focus on one story at a time. Some of my other stories are currently in progress and I'm sorry, but this story I'm currently working on is going to be the one I focus on and try to complete. Once I do that then I can focus on other things. But working on multiple stories doesn't work for me anymore.

I hope not all of you have left, I know I have been an awful writer lately, but I hope to earn back your trust. Please enjoy A Dance With A Dragon. Hope everyone is doing well.

title: Elements Academy (Book One)
description:
*COPYRIGHT*


Nicole Finch, a Fire Elemental with the ability to control the single Element of Fire. She's finally come of age to join a school for others like her. Where the people can control one of the main four elements: Fire, Water, Air or Earth, or the Half-Elements: Dust, Mist, Smoke or Ice. It's supposed to be a peaceful school where Elementals learn to control their powers.

But a new danger has risen. Evil Elementals - a race of ancient Elementals that are thought to be extinct. Nocturna, a girl that once attended Elements Academy in secret is freed from her prison in the shadows and, with her abilities over the Evil Elements: Blood, Shadows, Lightning and Storms, she's wavering on the edge of sanity. Not to mention poor Nicole can't even use her ability.

Is this peaceful school turning into a minefield?

title: Supernatural Marks Book 1 (Completed/unedited)
description:
(Update: 2/25/19- This story was original called Alphas Red. Noticing there is so much to be added to this novel. I've decided to make it into a series called Supernatural marks. with the first one being the Elite Mark. So instead of sticking to the main two characters, we will be seeing more of the other characters stories come to life!)

Book 1: An Elite Mark
Being a wolf, Lena was always fascinated with her Nana stories growing up. Though the legendary wolf that the stories were based on always had Lena wanting to know more. one day on her way home from her grandparents house. Lena so happen to come face to face with the wolf. She wasn't totally sure if he was the one from the stories. Where everyone seemed to fear the one from the story, this wolf made her feel safe. 

Alpha Damian Shaw is an original and most feared of his kind. He has earned his reputation through the years, even if the facts weren't always right. He lived over 200 years without a mate, and he planned on keeping it that way. That was till one day in the woods he falls open Lena. He refuses to have a mate be part if his life, even if the pull between them is strong. To keep his wolf at ease he would watch over her, and make sure she stayed safe. 

But fate has something else in store for him.

title: Under The Sea
description:
Highest ranking: #3 in Paranormal 

Forest Atlandria was ready for a new life. Being the princess of an underwater kingdom was growing utterly old, she was ready for an adventure. Daring nights, sword fights, epic creatures, and damsels in anything but distress. On account of her uneventful life underwater, she decides to swim up to dry land to find an amazing epic full of the life she dreamed of living and friends in the characters she reads.

But on dry land she finds herself in a bit of a scuffle and ends up being saved by Aran White, her one and only soul mate, as the fates would so amusingly have it.

Two people from two different worlds entirely, spells a load of confusion.

Meanwhile, things under the sea aren't going so well; a vengeful uncle threatens to make the waters quake as a princess begins to realize her part in the world and what she would do to save her home.

A paranormal romance full of vengeance.

description:

Knotty reading!

Silly little city girl

The corn maze is no place for fancy little morsels like her, especially on Halloween. Monsters creep among the stalks... and we're starving.

My mortal enemy and I have never been properly paid for our services. That changes tonight. We'll take our payment from the lost little human wandering through our field.

We'll feast on her slick. Revel in her fear. Bask in her screams of pain and pleasure.

But what if one round on our special hayride isn't enough? What if she's the straw that causes us to burst at the seams?

This addition to The Knottiverse is dark, filthy, and knotty. If you like primal chase and capture scenes, intense stop, I can't take anymore but they don't stop situations or I hate you, leave me alone but they smirk and pull her closer, then this is the story for you. If not... go somewhere else. I've got hot, feral monsters to wrangle.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
When did I go from naughty to knotty? In the Marine Corps? As I popped out 5 kids in seven years? When I fell into the dark romance hole and realized I never wanted to climb out? 
Probably that last one. 
You're welcome.

... enjoy the *fruits* of my labor as I conquer the world, one filthy, action-packed omegaverse romance at a time. As a two time USA Today Bestselling Author and the creator of The Knottiverse (trademark pending), there's only one good way for me to sign off... Knotty reading!

title: A Kingdom's Secrecy
description:
One comes from royalty, and one comes from poverty. Yet the same shadows follow them everywhere, leading them right to each other and their destiny.
 
                                                                  	*****

Princess Elouise and Eldon are complete opposites who come from different areas of Aristol. Elouise's biggest worry is ensuring she lives up to her kingdom's expectations of a Queen. Eldon's biggest worry is how much food will be hunted for the week. So when Elouise awakens a magical ability and Eldon is beckoned to the capital by a disembodied voice, they realize there might be more to themselves than they believed. They are both the only two living souls with brown eyes, and they understand they were brought together for a reason. Unfortunately, there are people who know more about them than they do. These people are a cult who despise the royal family. They lurk in every corner, getting closer and closer. To make matters worse, the Kingdom of Aristol seems to hold more secrets than Elouise and Eldon can handle. 

(Book One of The Secrets of Aristol series.)

Content warning: this story contains themes of violence, blood, and death.

description:
[NaNoWriMo 2014; Wattys 2014] WARNING. THIS IS A VERY ROUGH, FIRST DRAFT AND HAS NOT BEEN EDITED AT ALL.

The land of Elseer has steadily been dying. With only the words of a long-forgotten prophecy to guide them, speaking of both destruction and renewal, the lives of the people hang in the balance, resting all on a single person.

Hidden and on the run, he has never settled in one place for more than a few weeks. He is elusive, and mysterious, not the one she thought she would meet in the streets of the busiest city in Elseer.
Certainly not the one that the goddess is driving her towards.

Last of Elves Book 1

authorBio:
G'day! Welcome to my little Aussie corner of Wattpad. I have a wide range of genres that I'm trying my hand with, but so far, fantasy is my favourite.

I've been writing since I was 14, and lost count of how many I've started. Reading and writing are two of my passions, and I'm constantly starting new books before I've finished others. So there will inevitably  be unfinished books available to read. I'll always get around to finishing them sometime, though.
At the moment, my writing life is all over the place. With at least five books being written right now, I'm a busy little bee - with more ideas bubbling into my head in the wee hours of the night.

Because I have so many ideas in my head at any one time, I do have boards for all my ideas (and then some). You can have a peek here, and maybe find spoilers and sneak peeks for future books. https://www.pinterest.com/sadams2082/

Always looking forward to NaNoWriMo, so here's me! Feel free to buddy me. c: http://nanowrimo.org/participants/wolf-wynd

title: Wayward Favor || ONC 2024
description:
A family curse. A forced marriage. A runaway bride. And a wayward son.

After years of misfortune, luck has finally shown favor upon the Truvow family in the form of Count Reginald Drewmond, but his kindness comes at a cost. Estella Truvow discovers she must marry the count tomorrow morning, a man she has never met, if she wants to save her family from ruin.

Estella has other plans and she isn't the only one.

This novella is being written for ONC 2024 using prompt 88: "Your father is forcing you to marry someone you have never met. The night before your wedding you tie your sheets together and make your escape through the window. Half way down you make eye contact with someone doing the exact same thing a few windows over."
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello! Welcome, let me tell you a story. I write mostly fantasy, paranormal, and poetry with pinches of various other genres. When I'm not writing, I'm thinking about writing or I'm hoarding shiny things: rocks, jewelry, unusual knowledge, weird cds, and old books with gilded covers.
Right now, I'm trying to focus on one story at a time, but sometimes, I cheat and work on one of my other tales, world-hopping from story to story.
Thank you to everyone who has joined me on this journey so far with reads, likes, comments and follows - you rock!

Current Projects:

title: Shadow's Edge (Shadows Saga bk1)
description:
In the world of magic there are only two options: learn control, or risk becoming the one thing everyone fears.

On the anniversary of her parents' death Mara Collins must face more than her own grief; she must face a hidden world. When a series of accidents over the past eleven years leads to her discovery of witches and magic, Mara must make the decision to leave her life behind in order to hone her new abilities or stay and risk the chance that her powers could rage out of control. 

When people discover Mara is a descendant of one of the most powerful witches in history, they start to believe Mara will follow in her ancestor's footsteps. No pressure, right?

Not everyone is excited to hear of Mara's potential power, and some even want to stop her. With a Fae for a roommate, a witch for a mentor, and a Werewolf Prince for a friend everything seems to be looking up. But when friends turn to enemies, who can Mara go to for help? who can she trust? Will she be able to control her powers before they turn her into the one thing everyone fears?

title: The Folveshch
description:
[Formerly Featured/Award-Winning Novella/#2 in Horror]

There is something eerie about this village -- this hole of silent, maddened people.
  
  In 1922 my Papa told me of a faceless entity that lurks amongst us in our isolated slice of Russia. The locals have kept this horror alive for a century, though the only ones who claim to have seen the Folveshch have succumbed to a life of sightless silence. 
  
  My name is Stefan Alyovich and the people around me are changing. They slip into worsening madness every winter, and I ask myself: how much longer before I'm the only sane one left?
  
  ... The only one left alone with the Folveshch.

title: Lost Without You
description:
Book Two of Lost in the Castle Trilogy 
(Book Three is on the WATTYS 2022 SHORTLIST)

THE AMBY AWARDS 2022 WINNER (Best Series)

Samara, separated from Vlad by an unfortunate turn of events, is sent back to her century for her own good and safety. 

Not being able to face the prospect of living the rest of her life without the only man she loves, she refuses to lose hope of going back to him.

But is going back even possible? 

Looking for answers to her endless questions, she discovers that not even in present-day London all the people are what they seem to be at first sight...

Venturing deeper in secrets and mysteries, which suddenly seem to spring at her from London's every shadowy corner, she meets a man who she thought was long dead and the secret society surrounding him. 

Will Samara find her way back to Vlad with the stranger's help? Does he know things that might help her?

Will she find a way to stay with Vlad this time, forever?

The journey to her happiness  won't be short, easy, or simple. 

Samara will have to make a difficult choice. If she wants to try to gain back the man she loves, she will have to risk all that she has. 

Will she be able to leave one of her most precious beings behind to recover the other?

title: The Wanderer
description:
When Calista's pack was slaughtered, she had nowhere to go. So, she wandered. Hoping to find safety and refuge, she continued on, trekking up and down the slopes of the mountain her pack resided in. 

Ignoring the tragedy that had just occurred, she lived a life that was full of avoiding her problems and distracting herself with the simple joys she could find. 

She hadn't ran into a single rogue since being left on her own, and she was glad. Having heard stories in her pack of the disgusting, blood lusting rogues, you can't blame her. 

Never finding a place to call home, she kept wandering. However, instead of finding stability in a normal life, she found the beauty in the nomadic qualities of her newfound reality. 

Her peaceful life of solace was soon put to an end when she ran into the first rogue she's ever encountered; the Rogue Lycan.

Nikolai had a menacing reputation. Being known as the shifter that was more dangerous than any werewolf, he quickly made a name for himself amongst the rogues. They needed a leader and he was born to lead. 

His unforgiving nature made him all the more terrifying. He was more beast than man, losing himself to his instincts far too often. 

When the girl in denial meets the heartless monster, her world comes crashing down around her. 

Does she make it out of the rubble that is her utterly destroyed life, or does she stay buried underneath, gasping for air?

Or, will the notorious Rogue Lycan help her survive the aftermath?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I was 16 when I started writing these books. I am now 20 and getting back into writing consistently. These stories need a lot of work that I can't dedicate time into, but I am writing new personal content and may publish updates on existing stories when I have the chance.

I'm currently updating 'Inspiring My Mate' as often as I can.

'Saving My Mate' is the first book I've ever written, and 'Tender Love' is a spin-off of it! You don't have to read 'Saving My Mate' to understand 'Tender Love!'

'Loving My Mate' is the sequel to 'Saving My Mate' and 'Bitter Love' is the sequel to 'Tender Love.'

'Inspiring My Mate' combines both series.

'The Mermaid Queen' and 'Frost and Flames' are in the same universe, and combine in the upcoming sequel.

'Tainted Innocence' and 'The Wanderer' combine in their sequel.

authorBio:
docere, delectare, et movere.

**Wake...**
     ...you shamans, you storytellers, you wizards who have created this world. Sleep no more.
     Do you remember who you are? Do you recall your power? You and I, we have created Gods, and have frozen oceans. We filled jungles far and wide with beasts of great wisdom and terror.
     We have conjured suns, and pulled moons from their orbits. We have snapped the cables suspending Heaven, just to hear the enraged coiling, spiral and whine across the sky. We have bathed in moonlight, consumed starshine, and washed the world clean with rain.
         Do you remember? On our off days we created kings, crowned their heads, then removed those heads with guillotines -- just as and exercise, *a proof of concept* (... told you I could do it with cake, the next round is on you).
         And when the God we created with our words of power became unworthy, we made madmen of its followers, then executed the God.
      Have you forgotten Lilith? Asheara? The poets of Sumer?
I can still hear their language in your laughter. You were always the one worthy of sitting beneath the Bodhi tree, with your pen twisting your hair as you composed the phrases, the namshuk, the stories that created dynasties, religions and nations.
      But you have slept too long, and the namshuks need to be rewritten. War is on the world, tearing the fabric of their lives apart, flaying the hope from their souls, and the skin from their bodies.

Wake

title: Eight Legs Too Many || ONC 2021 and 2022
description:
Ever since Death got trapped in the mortal realm three years ago, nonstop famines, wars, and plagues have ravaged Earth. Shiori, a budding scientist with a love of snakes and a loathing for small talk, doesn't really care. She can deal with the constant pandemics, bombs, and spider/iguana/fruit fly/crocodile plagues, so long as it doesn't involve socializing with strangers -- the thing she hates most in the world.

Too bad her new roommate is hot, suave, and super chatty. Even worse, he seems to have decided Shiori is the only one with the power to send Death back to the underworld -- and he'll stop at nothing to make it happen!

**First place in The Punk Rock Awards 2022, Paranormal***
**Grand Winner of The Punk Rock Awards 2022**

title: Till Death Do Us Part {Completed}
description:
Lacey Hannigan was never your average girl.   

Why?   

Because she can see ghosts.  

In a new town, she feels like she can finally move on with her life, and feels like she has a better grip on herself than ever.  

Until Finn McDermott enters, the ghost of a hot, arrogant quarterback that disappeared nine months ago.  

And Lacey doesn’t know what’s scarier to her.  

The fact that everything she thought she knew was all a lie.  

Or the fact that Finn, one by one, is slowly undoing all of the hard work Lacey put up to protect herself and her gift.  

And that she doesn’t mind.  

Join Lacey and Finn as they work together to uncover Finn’s murder and bring justice to his death, finally freeing him from this world and allowing him to move on.  

But, when the time comes, will she be able to let him go?

title: WOLF BORN LYCAN 2 (A LITTLE WILD) (COMPLETE)
description:
Coy didn't know the difference between herself and her pack members. As far as she was concerned they were the same, they were family. She had always been a part of the pack for as long as she could remembered. 

There were times when she felt different but those moments were few and quick to pass. 

Then along came the strange wolf that was even bigger than she was. He smelled of the forest, humans and wolves. He moved in a way that intrigued her even though all the wolves in her pack moved just as beautifully. 

She was so drawn to him that she refused to allow the pack to attack him. But how could she get the pack to accept him when he was clearly so different from them? How could she get him to accept her pack when he didn't seem to want to even be there? 

Hours, days, weeks.

Bentley didn't like the idea of a wolf born mate, a wolf that couldn't shift. He was a shifter. He wanted a shifter mate, not that he ever thought about it until now. Still, he was taught the Creator didn't make mistakes. So, he had to step up and get to know this wolf. He stayed, stealing the moments and glances he could. 

When he found out the wolf couldn't be his mate he still couldn't make himself drive away. He didn't know what the attachment between them was but it was undeniably an connection. He needed to find the reason for the bond.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I grew up with dyslexia and wasn't diagnosed til I was 13.  I have spent  years finally learning to read and overcome my disability. 

My favorite genres are suspense, paranormal, adventure and some romance if it's a sub genre. 

Enjoyed writing since I was 15.

I'm married to the man that stole my heart and gave me his.

I can't spell. I apologize if it makes my works harder to read, just try to bare with me & point out mistakes as you see them.

If I come to your profile, read your work, I will let you know what I think. I won't give you platitudes. I'll be honest. I don't want to hurt your feelings but I think being honest and letting you know where your mistakes are, will make you a better writer. I expect the same RESPECT from my readers. 

I worry more about punctuation, grammar, paragraph definition, speech definition, as well as theme and readability. I know that I make mistakes & I'm more than willing to listen to your ideas & work on the corrections. 

I do take Reading requests, but please keep in mind that I will give honest responses.

Note: I'm not fond of novels with multiple POVs. I think it is much more practical (easier to understand & follow) to write them in either 1 or 2 POVs or in 3rd person if you must switch character perspective often. I will read them upon request but I will still be honest.

Side note: If your readers are constantly asking questions about certain characters or events- fix it in novel not on comments so future readers don't have to ask!

Read, vote, comment, add to your library.

My work is my own, do not plagiarize me. You may use my work to stimulate your muse... however do not copy it in any form now known or unknown or yet to be invented.

Follow me. If you want an opinion on your work. Ask me.

Now accepting novels to be edited. 

AshaWheeler

title: The Loyal Alone
description:
Don't change. Don't fight. Don't die. 

This message has been beaten into Mira since childhood. 

There are legends abound with stories of werewolves where females are a rare species, and being rare is dangerous- but becoming a Lycan wasn't a matter of choice for Mira.

Born as a wolf and cursed with being a woman, Mira and her father struggle for her survival, peace and most of all, freedom.

After the disappearance and death of her mother, they flee, in constant fear that they will be forced to join pack life and marry Mira off... or worse. 

While traveling to Alaska in search of a sanctuary among the rogues of the wilderness, they are attacked, and Mira is left to fend for herself in unknown territory...

The Thrilling Series Begins Here.
Happy Hunting. 

*********************************
This is the first book in a three book series. If you liked the first book, please visit Amazon.com and check out my second book, The Loyal Among Us, which is a continuation of this story. Thank you!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A.M. Hughes is a multi-genre author specializing in Young Adult novels and all things paranormal. Whether she is reading the new up-and-coming book for personal enjoyment, or writing it herself, you will always find her submerged in the world of dark paranormal fantasy. Witches, werewolves, you name it.

As a Phi Theta Kappa Alumni with a penchant for explorational writing that pushes bounds, you'll love diving into her Young Adult novels as they analyze critical aspects of our current world with an unearthly twist.

Her debut series, The Loyal Series (Books 1,2, & 3) will be completed June 2019. With more novels being planned each day, she's guaranteed to come out with something you'll enjoy.

So, what do you say? Are you ready to become a LOYAL fan?



Follow me on Social media to get updates, participate in Giveaways and GUSH about all things paranormal.

title: GHOST SLAYERS​ [BxB]
description:
Damien just wanted a life like any other teenager, blurry and wild. Adulthood was never his cup of tea, much less talk about saving the entire earth. And truly, it wasn't his fault that ghosts were jutting out of nowhere, physically solid creatures with outward human appearance. 

He had enough to deal with already but soon he realises that this is not all. In fact 'it all' was actually nothing. Suddenly he has been handed the task to go into an unknown territory and seal the portal connecting the two worlds together. The Best part? Absolutely no one knows how to do just that bit.



ACTION | HORROR | DARK FANTASY | PARANORMAL | HUMOR | ADVENTURE | THRILLER | GAY ROMANCE 



▪️A normal teenage boy (um...wannabe).
▪️An unforeseen adventure.
▪️An unexpected portal.
▪️A half-demon ghost slayer.
▪️A man as curious as any.

There is just one preposterous fault in the entire plan...

title: The loving Jinn
description:
People usually think that djinns and ghosts don't exist but what will happen if a girl fell in love with a djinn ??

Sounds impossible , right....?


..................................................................................

The face was now becoming strangely clear in my mind's eye as if the brain was developing a picture on its own based on my dream. I saw an extremely handsome man who has sparkling eyes , hypnotic voice and anyone could fall in love with his smile...


..................................................................................

He asked me in a charming voice, " You are scared of me ?"

"No", I answered almost immediately without thinking twice.

" So , why didn't you come to see me , princess ?", He asked in a sad voice.

"Because you come to me first " , The words escaped on its own without my consciousness...


..................................................................................


Read the story to know more...

title: Can you save me?
description:
He was created to destroy me but no one told me that, no one warned me not to fall in love with him, not to get trapped in those amber eyes.

Amber Mikelson holds a power that could be fate changing for a hidden magical tribe. The tribe appoints a warrior, a shifter to kill her to prevent the prophecy.

Laserian Ó Fearghaile is the most lethal, short tempered, ruthless shape shifter of 'The Hooded' tribe, tribe of shape shifters that can take any animal shape they want. They are like super natural assassins. He is assigned to kill their prime target: Amber Mikelson.
A girl who is not scared of his cold demeanour.

Could the guy assigned to destroy Amber save her from himself and the wrath of the Hoods?

Note: Part II of Can you Series. Its a stand alone and you DO NOT need to read the first one for this! But I advise you to read it for fun! :)

title: Catalyst
description:
When Phoebe is woken up by James, the boy she's been crushing on since she can remember, she's surprised to find him in a panic. His sister Kara is missing and he needs Phoebe's help to find her. Following hunches and the wordy clues of an annoying preteen, Phoebe and James discover that Kara has been taken, but she left a message for her brother: Tell Phoebe the truth. 

James begrudgingly unveils the family secret he's been keeping all his life: he and Kara can "shift" into dragons. Real, winged, magical beasts that have been hunted for hundreds of years! No longer safe, James has no choice but to flee the hunters that took his sister, and Phoebe demands to be brought along. Her gut instinct, which has always been supernaturally accurate, begs her to go, putting her on the path of a wild adventure.

Enduring battles, near-death experiences, and their growing attraction for each other, they struggle to survive and stay one step ahead of those that seek to destroy James and all his kind.

~COMPLETE~

title: Translucent
description:
When Lisa Finch moves to a small town in Scotland after her parents' divorce, the least she expects is to see ghosts.
                                                                              
Meanwhile, Cornelius Haywood has died for almost a century and despises the living. Yet, his spirit is trapped in the house Lisa moves into.
                                                                              
When they cross path, Lisa begins to question Cornelius' existence - the key to his unfinished business which she's eager to discover. However, their gradual interaction turns into a ticking bomb, as Lisa finds herself falling for the ghost and realizing there's no possible force in this universe can bring them a 'happily ever after'.

title: Fangs and Fates
description:
"You don't have to be afraid of me."

Werewolves are a danger, a menace, and evil. No one in their right mind would show mercy on a werewolf, a creature who could kill your in an instant, and will.

At least, that's what the history books say about werewolves. But no one thinks for a moment it's not true.

Raven Nightfang is a werewolf. She's not bloodthirsty, evil, or merciless. She's a normal, wood-dwelling, wolf-shifting girl. 

One night, she makes the mistake of wandering too far from her den and her mother's watchful eye, and ends up nearly getting killed by hunters after meeting one of them, Viktor.

She escapes with his help and ends up accidentally getting taken to the world of Ionicia, the equivalent of werewolf afterlife. There, Dreadea, Goddess of the Moon, reveals that something is threatening humans and werewolves alike, and she and a human are the only ones that can fix it.

Together, she and Viktor must work to uncover truths and decipher lies to find out what's really going on and save their species, despite their differences. But can they do it? What if whoever's behind it is still trying to stop them...

Cover by @Seong_Grace

title: The Masked Murderer
description:
**Currently Extending**

**2017 WATTY AWARD WINNER**

Olivia Chastain's life was seemingly perfect until she was violently thrust into a nightmare that would haunt her for years to come. Kidnapped by a sadistic murderer, Olivia is subjected to atrocities she'll never be able to erase from her memory.

When she's inexplicably released from his grip, horrifying flashbacks plague her every waking moment, but that's not the worst of what she's forced to contend with - the masked madman roams free, preying on other unsuspecting souls. As the days pass, the deviant's reign of terror grows more and more grotesque.

As the only surviving victim, Olivia fears he'll find her and finish what he started. 
Will the authorities catch the elusive psychopath before he strikes again?

description:
Being engaged to a fiery world that's lost in the darkness of her memory can be dangerous. In Acklemar, Wren learns every decision has a price--even love. Can the Travelers reach her in time to uncover the hidden secrets of her past and help her find her future? Or will she pay the ultimate price for the right to choose her path?

title: Favoured By The Escape Game Boss
description:

Author: 般若罗

    Brief introduction: Xia Qi was pitted into a multiplayer game against the BOSS by the scumbag and the white lotus, and began to pass the level in real life. He thought that he was as short as his teammates, but the style of the game changed suddenly.

    Copy 1: The bloody slaughterhouse of the Count Dracula

    Count Dracula: Please give me a kiss of true love.

    Xia Qi: No.

    Hey, the blood is splattered, the vampire Earl fall into madness, and stabbed your teammate A to death.

    Teammate B looked at Xia Qi tremblingly.

    The Count Dracula continued: Please give me a kiss of true love.

    Xia Qi: ...I agree.

    Ka, a blood ball flew up into the sky. Because of your hesitation, the vampire Earl felt that you didn't love him enough, so he cut off teammate B's head with a single knife.

    Xia Qi:? ? ?

    Other people's escape games:

    The death condition was accidentally triggered, die!

    Passively acting while working under the ghost NPC, died!

    Accidentally angered the boss and died!

    Xia Qi's escape game:

    Wake up from the velvet mattress of the love brain boss...

    Wearing women's clothing under the tender watch of the idiot BOSS...

    Be chased to the end of the world by the desperate BOSS...

    Xia Qi: Why is my style of escape game different from others?

    [Su Sushuang is good at scoring various broken legs and slicing BOSS attack by X]

title: Winter's Bite (Belle Morte 0.5)
description:
All Ysanne Moreau wants is to return home so she can say goodbye to the man she loved and lost. She's not looking for a friend, and she's definitely not looking for a new love.

But when she is attacked and injured on the road, her best chance of survival lies with a wandering peasant boy.

Edmond Dantes has nothing and no one. The last thing he expects is to discover that vampires are real and that one needs his help.

Taking shelter from the brutal winter, Ysanne and Edmond soon discover that they need each other to survive. But as their friendship begins to blossom into something more, Ysanne realises that in order to move on to her future, she needs to let go of her past.

And she's not sure she can do that.

title: Moon Lover
description:
Previously known as He Rejected Me. But We're Meant to Be.

Savannah Mason is a sweet, quiet, smart, obedient, 17 year old werewolf who's from the Blood Moon Pack.
She's hated by everyone, her parents want nothing to do with her, her pack bullies her, and worst of all... Her mate rejected her.
Every person first shifts the day they turn 15. Savannah was rejected by the hot, arrogant, and powerful, Aaron Weaver when she was 17. Unable to handle all of the abuse, pain, and rejection, Savannah runs away for 2 years and comes back stronger as ever to show everyone that she's not the same weak and vulnerable girl they knew 2 years ago. 
Following her return, Savannah is left with some unanswered questions, unsolved business, and a bunch of choices to make, or, will fate make them for her? 
Here, Savannah just might have to learn the hard way that nothing can stop your destiny.

* DISCLAIMER *
This book is NOT completed, and unfortunately I doubt it will be completed in the near future. I wrote this when I was 16, I'm now 26. It needs a re-write, editing, and a whole lot of everything that I sadly don't have the time for anymore.
Thank you to everyone who has supported this book for the past decade, it truly was where my love from reading and writing began.
Feel free to read, but the HEA is unwritten.

xoxo, 
Ellis.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Witch And His Wolf // Kai Parker
description:
REWRITING THE STORY ONLY READ UNTIL CHAPTER 16

When Abbie Warren steps into the woods that night, she has no idea her life is about to change forever.

Invited by Jo Parker to a mysterious party, Abbie quickly finds herself in over her head. But when the night spirals into chaos, the last person she expects to save her is Jo's brother, Kai-a brooding sixteen-year-old with a dark reputation and a hidden past.

Now bound together by secrets and whispers, Abbie and Kai must stay one step ahead of everyone...including someone who's out for revenge. But as tension rises and trust frays, Abbie can't help but wonder: Can they really deceive the world, or are they only deceiving themselves?

Get ready for a ride through friendship, deception, and danger in this thrilling prequel to the TVDU universe.

title: Spell Broken
description:
Lumi Fay's world has been turned upside-down once before, and now with her mentor turning up dead, it's flipped again. Only this time nothing beautiful can come from it.

                                                 ~~~

Lumi is a protector in training. Her job is to learn how to protect the town, but when her mentor is found dead she is thrust into the job. Reeling from the heartache Lumi sets out to find the murderer.
Not knowing anyone else with magic her list is empty. When she starts to suspect any and everyone, she starts to second guess everything she's ever known.
When someone comes up to her asking for her help she can't say no. Little does she know the problems that will pop up if she helps.

~~

authorBio:
Hi there, I am Akai Seirei, which means red spirit in Japanese. There is nothing remarkable about this woman, other than I'm doing here what I love the most, which is writing stories filled with the warmest feelings of my heart. Thanks for cheking this profile and welcome to my world. I hope you like what I write, but be warned that my English is far from perfect as my first launguage is Spanish.

If you are a reader, thanks for giving my stories a chance, if you are a writer as well, I wish you the best on your own stories and remember that regardless of numbers what trully matters is what gives you joy and by posting a story alone, you are already showing your courage and your desire to create things your own unique way. Good luck.

title: Poor Things (Wattys2018 Winner)
description:
|| Highest Rank - #1 in Horror || Wattpad Featured || After a tragic accident, football star Joel Harper finds himself rolling his wheelchair into a new school in a strange town. Soon he's making friends of misfits, taking lessons in Iron Maiden, and dodging a ruthless bully with a penchant for switchblades. Little is he aware, something ancient and wounded has awoken deep beneath the tiny mountain community, and all of Honaw will know its pain.
  
  --------

GRAND FINALE WINNER IN THE MONTHLY ELIMINATION AWARDS
1ST PLACE IN THE 2017 GOLD AWARDS (HORROR)
BEST OVERALL READ, BEST MAIN CHARACTER, BEST PLOT DEVELOPMENT - 2017 ICED TEA SUMMER BASH
1ST PLACE IN THE AUGUST MYSTICAL AWARDS (HORROR)
  
 "Barnett's writing is pure poetry, and [Poor Things] is his goriest, grittiest yet . . . beautiful and touching, a poignant coming of age story." - YA Books Central

authorBio:
I love any story that's told well, but I have a soft spot for tales that offer a shiver or two. Looking for a chill? You'll find plenty to frighten you here. Not big on getting  goosebumps? That's all right, too, as long as you don't mind stories that go to some dark places. I believe in putting characters before scares, because horror - like any other genre - only works if the people on the page are human and you care about them. So go ahead. Have a peek . . .

. . . just be sure to close your closet door.

My work has appeared in Crowded Magazine, and my short story The Sadie Hawkins placed in the top 6 for the 2015 Aeon Award. When I'm not reading or writing, I'm discussing reading or writing with others. Whether they want to or not.

My favorite authors include:
Stephen King

title: Beyond The Veil
description:
Two estranged sisters must use their paranormal gifts to prove themselves innocent when a college student goes missing. 

Having escaped her dysfunctional past, Jess has been quietly enjoying her normal college experience. But all that changed the night she got arrested. 

Now with her sister, Ash, crashing back into her life, and the disappearance of her housemate, the normal life she's created is at risk of falling apart. 

When they are both accused of being involved in the disappearance, the sisters have to set their differences aside and work together. But Ash brings more than just crystals and tarot cards. She brings a world of secrets that could either threaten their sanity or be the key to proving their innocence. 

Do they have what it takes to see beyond the veil to things hidden from the rest of the world? Or will their gifts swallow them, forcing them into the realms of madness and darkness?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hey, Hey fellow Wattpaders and welcome to my profile!! Glad to see you here.

I'm an amateur writer and found Wattpad after making another New Year's resolution to finally finish one of my stories. I tend to write after work as a way to relax and wind down after staring at spreadsheets all day long.

I love to write a bit of whatever takes my fancy but my favourite genres are mystery and paranormal with the occasional fantasy and romance thrown in for good measure. Variety is the spice of life after all!!

A fast track course in me:
* My cheeky escape is a comfy settee and a good anime show
* My literacy hero is Agatha Christie (Queen of Crime herself)
* I studied accountancy at university hence the many spreadsheets that rule my life
* I can't live without tomatoes
* Anything with more than four legs makes me nervous
* My dream is to one day work as a published author

I LOVE hearing from my readers. So if you've enjoyed one of my stories, I'd love to hear about it! Don't be shy, just drop me an inline comment or post on my profile.

Happy reading dear readers and until the next page turn!! x

Acheivements:
- Winner of the Death on the Nile short story competition
- 2022 Watty's shortlister with Murky Waters
- 2023 Open Novella Contest shortlister (currently) with After the Awakening

title: A Muse of Night
description:
A STUDY OF POISONS BOOK 3
_____

Vampires are ruthless and should be eradicated- that is the old way. I vowed to protect both humans and vampires. However in the modern world, tradition still finds its way around us.

Delia Petri, has lived many lives. The Keeper, the Traitor, the Judas Witch- and now she has opened her eyes and will live a new life. As the Duchess of Night, ruler of witches, and Alex's soon to be bride.

Tradition is divided as the Keepers have fallen, while some of them take safe hold in the Night Court- others have sided with Natalia. While Delia learns how to deal with her new powers and understand what it truly means to be a Conduit and a Vampire- Alex is slipping into the darkest parts of his madness.

Will Delia be able to stop Natalia once and for all or will the Duchess of Night fall to the blood she will drain?

_____

Things are different, Alex will never be the same and neither will I. We fell in love with the idea of each other but it's not the love either of us desire, I'm afraid he has his grip too far around my neck. Whatever happens all I know is that I'm going to kill Natalia.

I am Delia Petri, I am the Duchess of Night.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Ivy of Our Hearts
description:
Trapped in the woodlands, Ivy's only hope of going home is to escape the faerie who enchants her into loving him, blinding her to what he is--monstrous.

***

A dark fortress of trees twisted and crippled by time, the Clearwater, Connecticut, woods is no place for two teenage girls. The legends claim it's haunted. Fed up with being kept inside after dark, fearing the monster will take them, sixteen-year-old Ivy Farewell and her best friend Margaret set out to prove everyone wrong--that the ghost of Clearwater isn't a ghost. And the voice that has been calling to Ivy after dark is simply a trick of the wind.

But the woods are deeper than Ivy imagined, each turn bringing them farther from home. When they end up lost their only hope is in each other. All seems undone when Ivy falls ill with a fever, until a stranger persuades them back to his cabin. Under his spell, Ivy falls into a deep and complicated love, a love so treacherous it blinds her to what he truly is--a monster.

Copyright © 2023 T.A. Joseph
All rights reserved

authorBio:
Hello and welcome to my little corner of Wattpad! I'm Tracey, tea enthusiast and animated movie devotee. The genres I love to read and write most are fantasy, paranormal, contemporary, and sometimes historical fiction, all with a dash of romance. I'm a fan of beautiful prose, I often have crushes on fictional men, and faeries are my favorite magical creature.

MORE ABOUT ME:

➵ I have faith in Jesus Christ
➵ A daydreamer through and through
➵ I'm obsessed with Pinterest and Studio Ghibli (Howl's Moving Castle is my favorite)
➵ Period drama and fairytale addict
➵ I'd love to write as lovely as the movie Atonement looks because I'm obsessed



And I'm sorry, but I don't take translation requests. 

I also don't take reading requests. I understand that people want their stories read but there are so many stories to read, and I can't get to them all on top of writing and the stories I read off Wattpad.

Thanks for visiting me!

title: Enchanted to meet ♡
description:
Rin was unaware of his powers until he turned 17. Just a few months ago, he realized he was different from others and discovered his true identity: half human, half demon. Struggling to control his newfound abilities, Rin enrolled in "True cross academy's exorcist cramps school" determined to become an exorcist himself. His power lies in his blue flames, capable of burning his enemies to ashes.
During his time at the academy, Rin meets Hina, a beautiful girl from the same academy. With her long grey hair and mysterious, kind personality, Hina captivates Rin from their first encounter. Sparks fly between them, and an undeniable connection forms.

What will they do? How will their adventures begin? Stay tuned to discover the love story between a half-demon and Hina Yatsura, the daughter of a priest. How will their love blossom amidst the challenges they face?

authorBio:
RaeStylez_16 (Raven Quarrie) is a female aspiring Wattpad author, born on the 19th of August in the year 2000 and is from the Caribbean island, Jamaica.
After joining Wattpad in December 2016, she has now decided that she will be taking her writing seriously as a means to share her work as best as possible so reading individuals can enjoy and review what her imagination had conjured.
Raven is now interested in the horror genre, since adapting a love of horror movies at an early age and with the help of her favorite author R.L Stine and Wattpad author @Ms_Horrendous, she has now found a way to express fear in her books to her readers.

title: Fatal Attraction: Falling into a Cruel love (Boyxboy)
description:
Why did he kidnap me? This happened 3 months ago. Many times I have tried to escape the clutches of his rough hands. Many times I have cried for help. But I need to get stronger in order to escape from him. Now, three months later, I think about this, but now my feelings are different. I wanted to kill him, to make him suffer the way he made me suffer. "Do it, kill him!" Is what I'm thinking. "Kill him and it will be over. I will be able to escape." The mask that was hiding his identity looks at me as I hold the knife to his throat. The whole time I been wondering why I didn't just slit his throat. He told me to do it, to finish him but I couldn't, I just couldn't. I couldn't hate him for the times he whipped me or raped me. I just couldn't. I looked at him holding the knife to his throat with a shaky hand. No matter how hard I try I can't hate him. No matter how hard I try I can't get the knife to slice Reidson's throat. Dropping the knife on the floor I look at his face. I couldn't see his eyes because of the white mask.
 
Now the same hands that used to be so rough became soft and warm. He still beats and rapes me but I figured out why I didn't hate him for making me suffer like this with these same hands that hurt me so cruelly are now touching my face gently. I held his hand to my chest as I look at his masked face. His hand is stained with blood. My blood. I look at his face, I have fallen into a cruel love.

title: Purgatory (Part One of the Purgatory Series)
description:
Alethea has always been awkward - eccentric, even. On a typical day she spends her time cloistered inside a tiny apartment hiding from the world she doesn't really understand. When her therapist encourages her to push herself outside her comfort zone, Thea makes an ill-fated trip into the city.

Even though her therapist assured her nothing would go wrong, Thea gets attacked and sent to purgatory, which is, for someone who is agoraphobic, claustrophobic, germaphobic, the worst nightmare imaginable. 

Even worse? She may never be able to get back to the comfort of her apartment. She may not even want to.
