ANAtheCowgirl is well-known for writing unconventional and explicit Tagalog-English romances about morally-gray characters. But if her novels will be examined closely, they are more plot-driven than character-driven and their themes are more than just romance.


To put it simply, she just writes whatever she feels like writing and puts most of them under General Fiction to make it easier to categorize. And the stories that she feels like writing are those that, she believes, has an interesting plot and relevant message to share to its readers.



Her books are published in print under Pink & Purple (Bookware's imprint), LIB, and Red Room; and some of her online stories are under Wattpad Paid Stories Program.


ANAtheCowgirl is also a recipient of Wattys 2018 - The Storysmiths award (Alfred Sin), Wattys 2019 - New Adult award (Rough), and Wattys 2022 - Romance award (The Test).


Aside from writing, she's a full-time mom and works as a project-based editor.

title: The Devil's Daughter
description:
Betrayal follows her, the Angels are against her, and the Devil is on her tail. As Lucifer's Daughter Abbegael must hide her identity from both Heaven and Hell if she is to survive. All she wants is to return home but when Lucifer's plan starts to take shape she realises she is the key to destroying Heaven and she may be the only one who can save it. 

Razakiel has been the Devil's right hand man ever since the Fall. He despises Lucifer and everything he's done, but when he discovers Abbegael's secret he finally has a chance to get home. Because sacrificing the Devil's daughter could be the one thing to save him and Heaven alike.
                                                      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Trapped within the fiery depths of Hell, her only chance of escape is him; a stranger, the enemy. 

"I'm not going to hurt you," he growls in my ear, "Neither am I going to hand you over to that Bastard." I flinch at the anger in his voice and confusion rushes through me.

"What?" I squeak, attempting to get air into my constricted lungs. He sighs, the warm air brushing against my neck, sending goose bumps skittering across my skin.

"I'm not going to tell him you intend to escape. How can I when I plan to do the same thing?" My mind whirls as I attempt to understand what he is saying. He wants to escape? But he is one of Lucifer's most trusted. How does that even happen? He's lying.

"I'm not lying. I needed him to trust me or I would never find a way to get out." 

"You know a way out? Wait. Did you just read my thoughts? How did you just read my thoughts? I thought you were a shield!" Once again his sigh of exasperation leaves goose bumps on my skin and a shiver running down my spine.

"I am a shield. It just so happens that I'm a reader too. Yes, that is possible. Obviously. Now can I let you go, or are you going to try and kill me again?"

authorBio:
Hey guys, I'm Ellie Donnelly, an aspiring Young Adult author from Australia.

Angels and Demons play a large role in my books because I love the contrast of light and darkness and being able to blur the line in between.

title: Lost Like Never Found
description:
"Who husband? Which husband are you talking about?" His brown eyes started to get darker. 

"Why are you talking like that? It's you who is my husband! We got married just a few days back!" Angry tears blurred her vision. 

Letting a humorous chuckle out, he marched towards her, "We got married? Really? Don't tell me you believed in that stupid fake wedding."

"Are you out of your mind! Stupid fake wedding?! How can you call it a fake wedding when all the rituals were performed and we got married in the witness of God-Goddess, nature and all the people present there?" Those tears finally left her eyes.

"You silly girl, you know it very well why in the first place we are here and in which situation we went through that stupid wedding! That wedding holds no place for me. Do you get that?" His nose was flaring with anger.

"Stop! Please stop it! Are you even listening to yourself? You are calling our marriage stupid and on top of that, you are saying it holds no place for you. How could you!" She started throwing punches on his chest with her tiny fist making him angrier. He increased the hold of his handle on his sword, trying to control himself. 

"Fine! Our wedding holds no place for you, right? Then what was that which happened on our wedding night? Why did you claim your husbandly rights on me? Why did you consummate our marriage?" She roared with anger and pain. 

The wind suddenly started to increase its pace. The dark sky darkens more. The already cold weather became chilling cold. Leaves and soil started to fly with the breeze. The atmosphere became very scary but she was so immersed in her pain to notice it.

"Tell me why? Huh, why? Don't you have an answer to it?" She was abruptly stopped as her legs didn't touch the ground. Her back touched the tree, legs floating in the air as her neck was grabbed by his one hand. He lost it. He was unable to control himself, his anger... his true self.

title: Highborn (Season One)
description:
[High School Paranormal Romance]
"If you ask me, life sucks ass, and according to my mother, my future is the reason she never gives me the time of day." 

Dude, don't ask me why my bitch of a mom sent me away. I mean, I know she has an important career or whatever, but she shipped me thousands of miles away to my aunt's house in Colorado. What the hell's up with that? 

Don't even get me started on the people in this weird ass town. I hate admitting this since I'm in a committed relationship, but there's these three guys. I'm not sure how to explain it, but they're freaking hot, and since I started at my new school, at least one of them is everywhere I go. 

I guess they're like the school Royalty or whatever, which is a huge turnoff. I told them to leave me alone, but they don't listen and it's pissing me off.

Tyler is a total player and a selfish prick. Lucas is a sweetheart, but he's my cousin's boyfriend. That leaves, Justin, the golden boy. Not only does he literally have gold eyes, but I know he has a secret.

The migraines have been getting worse and I've been having some weird ass reactions to people. The only thing that used to help were my pills, but they're not working anymore, and things are starting to get wacky as hell. Like, I'm seeing shit and losing my damn mind!


REVERSE HAREM HIGH SCHOOL PARANORMAL ROMANCE

authorBio:
Tempering the rising flames of writers to reach their brightest blaze.

We are a community for both writers and readers looking to improve their craft, explore new worlds, and to form friendships. All are welcome!

Here we aim to provide a safe space for people of all backgrounds to bond over literature. Share your stories for the world to see. Check out our members' stories in our reading lists to find your next obsession. Keep an eye out for contests, clubs, and other opportunities to engage with the community.

Our Discord server is also a great place to connect with other Wattpad users, along with writers on other platforms and publishing paths: https://discord.gg/authors

We no longer affiliate with other communities, but we may be open to occasional promotions for promotions. DM us to find out more!

We do NOT accept work written by AI as a representation of our community; this includes in our reading lists and contests. Please do not submit AI-assisted work to anything in our community.

Use the hashtag #AstaniaBooks or #AstaniaCommunity on your stories to show you're a part of our community!

Curious? Take a look around our profile or Carrd, and we hope you can find a home with us in the wonderful world of Astania!

Please note: If you message us on our message board without a specific question or comment regarding the community, we will likely not respond.

title: Adopted By An Alpha
description:
Loretta Darcy Luanda Cooper is a 4 year old girl. But, there are 2 facts that separates her from any normal girl.


1: She's a royal. His Majesty Luhan  
    Dylan Cooper's daughter. She is the 
    next heir to the throne of Arabia.

2: She's different. Not just in looks or 
     personality, no, she's completely 
     different. She's a werewolf. She was 
     attacked by a rogue werewolf and the 
     creature turned her into something 
     like himself.

_________________________________________


He's a werewolf whose mate was brutally murdered by their rival pack. He became depressed and locked himself up in the pack house, and he never went back to his and his mates house again but a trip to Arabia changes it all. 


_________________________________________


A call for help will change their lives completely. Challenges will have to be overcome and by the end of it all both might be fixed, or both might be more broken. What will happen? Read to find out ;)'

title: Big Dog [ONC 2022]
description:
After losing her husband during the pandemic, Runa MacCabe moves herself and her children to the remote island that her husband's family had owned for centuries, hoping that she, her daughter, Hertha, and her son, Stigr, can find some kind of peace and closure.

When the island is rocked by an earthquake and a terrifying storm on the first night, Runa believes their new life may not be as peaceful as she hoped. Especially after her children tell her that they were saved from the earthquake and storm by a big dog that now lay injured in a mysterious cave.

Only, there were no dogs on the island and the only other resident of the island had only livestock animals on his farm.

Insistent, Hertha and Stigr persuade their mother to see the big dog, only for Runa to find something far stranger and far more dangerous than she could have ever feared. Something that could spell destruction for the entire world.

A novella, written for #ONC2022. Based upon Prompt No. 13 and in the Creature Feature category.

title: Wrong Time
description:
#1 in Paranormal 15/12/20 and 31/10/2021
#1 in Paranormal Love 13/04/19 and 21/10/2021

Everyone has been told at least one ghost story during their life, but it's up to them to believe it or not. I was part of that group, the sceptics. Always rational, never choosing my heart over my brain. That was it until one life-changing day. 
We have all heard of ghost stories. 
Here's mine.

                                     ******

Grace Lancaster is a completely normal 17 year-old teenager, except for one little fact. She's been having the same realistic nightmare for the past two years. It's not just a bad dream, it means something and she knows it. But what could that be? 

Archer Sutcliffe is the answer to all her prayers. However, she will face an inconvenience: He is a ghost.

Fire and ice.

Light and darkness. 

Life and death.

Sometimes the perfect person for you is who you least expected them to be, and they are the clear example of that.
But most importantly: Will they find the answers both of them are looking for?

authorBio:
My name is Talia Rhea, and I am a romance author. I can't say that I remember when I first became interested in romance. I do remember being younger and constantly going through my school and local library looking for...something. I never knew what. I only knew that the majority of the books I picked up didn't have it, or if they did they didn't have enough of it.
Back then, young and stupid, I scorned romance novels. I saw buxom women on covers with shirtless Adonises posing in wind storms, holding onto each other and I turned up my nose. Those are nothing but smut, I told myself. There's no story there, just sex. Which is fine, but I want a story. Skip!
And although I don't remember when I first felt that craving for romance, I do remember which book it was that finally satisfied that craving.
Divine Evil by Nora Roberts.
Slightly dark. Completely titillating. Enthralling and passionate. The story I desired with the romance I had always unknowingly craved. There were love scenes, but I would never call it smut. It was engrossing and exciting and so captivating that I couldn't put it down. It was the first time I had ever encountered a true romance novel and when I came to realize what it was that I am.
I am Talia Rhea and I am a romantic. I crave love. A heart isn't complete without love and a story isn't complete without romance. I'm not a perfect writer, but I get better with each story. Have patience with me and give me feedback when you can. I hope my romantic heart can satisfy that something in you that craves.

title: Moonlit Magic
description:
In the quaint, picturesque town of Eldermere, nestled between misty forests and rolling hills, Rowan Ellis arrives searching for a fresh start. What she finds instead is a town steeped in secrets, where the whisper of magic lingers in the air, and every shadow hides a story waiting to be uncovered.

When Rowan takes up residence at the cozy The Wishing Well Inn, run by the warm but enigmatic Beatrice Fenwick, she begins to sense that Eldermere is not an ordinary town. A series of peculiar events draws her deeper into the mysteries of the place, awakening strange abilities she never knew she possessed. Guided by an otherworldly connection and her growing curiosity, Rowan discovers a world she never imagined-a world where her latent magic could be the key to unlocking the town's past and protecting its future.

But Rowan's journey isn't without its complications. She crosses paths with the brooding and enigmatic Sebastian Vale, whose own secrets intertwine with Eldermere's history and Rowan's destiny. As their connection deepens, forbidden love blossoms, even as danger looms and a dark force begins to stir.

This first series of The Awakening explores Rowan's discovery of her powers, her budding romance with Sebastian, and the unraveling of a decades-old mystery that threatens to tear Eldermere apart. Each episode blends heartfelt emotion, simmering tension, and the timeless allure of magic in a story of love, discovery, and courage.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Unbreakable || Caius Volturi
description:
After being attacked as a child, Anna Trenton discovers that vampires can't physically harm her.  This makes her a fun target for three vampires who have taken it upon themselves to make her life miserable, finally going so far as to kill her entire family.  Feeling the guilt of her family's death, Anna realizes that they will never let her live a normal life.  So, after her 18th birthday, she flies to Italy to pay a visit to the Volturi, prepared to ask for her own death.  Upon arriving however, she quickly discovers that the Volturi's leaders have a different plan in mind for her.

title: The Tainted Earth (Royals of the Realm Series #3)
description:
The story of Alexander Erthe and Cara D'Angelo
***
The Third Book of the Royals of the Realm Series

An escape from all the family drama was all Alexander Erthe ever wanted. 

Being denied of his birthright as the heir to the throne of the Earth Elves made his self-confidence dwindle. The fact that his own family is his enemy broke his heart. As long as the earthstone's safe in his soul the kingdom is in good hands, so for him there's no need to fight a lost battle.

Fate, however, denied him of the peace he's asking for. His world was turned upside-down when an Angel stumbled injured in his territory. It wasn't the idea of his quiet life slipping away that bothers him - it was how to keep the fiery Cara D'Angelo safe from the demons of her past hunting her.

And he's willing to stir awake the entire Earth Kingdom to protect his precious angel, even if it means claiming his throne by force.

***

authorBio:
"Take my hand, mon amour,
Hold me with your calloused palms.
Kiss the darkness au revoir,
Hold me 'till the last dance.

Cover me with your dark wings,
Let go of everything and breathe me in.
You're as tempting as sin,
As dangerous as the siren's whim.

Let my light remove the shadows on your skin,
Let my love remove the stains deep within.
Walk away from the cold-blooded,
Love me to forget you're once tainted."

-Tainted, J. M. Santiago

title: Inverted (COMPLETE)
description:
Ashley Everson had cheated death, but not on his own. After a miraculous recovery, he discovers he's not alone in his body anymore. Something lurks, whispering in his ear a language he can't understand, inviting a chasm of reality he didn't even know existed, inverting his life as he knows it.

Is it responsible for his survival? Or is it just using him to hide from something much worse? What does the entity even want? What does it mean to his own mortality? Where did the entity even come from? Ash decides to find out before something much worse hunts down whatever is hiding inside of him.

**Awarded 1st place in the Paranormal category for the Cleaved Awards 2019.**

**Highest Ranked. Number 3 in Mystery. Number 2 in Thriller.**

#bookiestars #EliteAwards2019 #diademawards #tea2020

title: Annabelle
description:
This book is like a teaser/spoiler of the Annabelle movie where you get the movie plot summarized into ten shorter chapters. The end is my own version.

Before The Conjuring.
It was the year of 1969 when Mia gets a doll as a birthday gift from her husband John. The doll "Annabelle" was actually meant to be a toy for the coming baby. They soon notice something strange and unhuman
about the doll. After a line of paranormal activity, they finally decide to get help.

Based on true Events and the famous James Wan horror movie "Annabelle" WARNING: do not se the real Annabelle movie if you're sensitive, the movie is forbidden in some countries for causing violence and nightmares. Annabelle is REAL! She's locked in a safe case at the Warrens occult museum in Connecticut if you're interested in visiting her.

A little fact: the real Annabelle doll is actually a raggedy ann doll.

WARNING: The exorcism chapter "chapter IX" Contains the same sentences that are used for real exorcisms. The content can be very disturbing!

Please! Contact me if you find any possible misspellings in the story. Thank you.     (Horror/fan fiction)
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Castles in the Air
description:
Would you kill for love? 

Kenneth Belshaw, a wealthy businessman in Victorian California, finds his heart caught in the middle of a tense tug-of-war between two best friends: Tayfun Yavuz and Mateo Rodríguez. And then, just as he falls madly in love with Tayfun, Tayfun perishes, leaving him with nobody but Mateo.

But, triumphant Mateo's icy, covetous fingers can't linger on Ken's skin for long, for Mateo's old pal isn't just dead, he's undead. And he's ready to do whatever it takes to reclaim what's his- because, this time, he has nothing to lose.

But vampires are more vulnerable than they think.

title: Waking Into Insanity [MMIKM pt.2]
description:
It's 6 years later. 

Last we heard, Jade Fawn had been taken into the arms of two vampires, Syrus and Silva, who've vowed to lay their life and protect her, which they have.

Connor Davis, Alpha Alex Knight, Eric Fawn, and his mate are nearing the end of their task and plan to return back to their former home they lost.

Everything sounds like it's running smoothly, right? Well think again.

Because of Jade's power, she is still a target. Rouges, vampires, hunters, and everything in between, want her. Going from city to city, town to town, Jade could never get comfortable for long. . . That is until a new member pops into the picture

And their existence changes everything.

(I recommend reading "My Mate Is Killing Me" first to understand everything in "Waking Into Insanity". It's on my profile under "works")

title: Monster
description:
Set in Victorian Poland is a tale about a stubborn young woman named Elsa whose father runs a society solely for vampyre hunting. Elsa does not believe in such tales, until she comes across a mysterious man at a ball interested in her mother's old pocket watch... and possibly her blood.
  
 When Elsa wakes and finds herself in an enchanted mansion and is not able to leave, she realizes that the man she'd danced with was no man at all, but a vampyre. Elsa is desperate to escape, but what she'll discover out in the world might just be darker than the mysterious, manipulative vampyre who has captured her... perhaps even darker. She could just discover herself, and not all discoveries are full of light.
  
~Had been selected and promoted by Crimson Peak Movie's sponsored reading list
~The perfect spooky, cozy Halloween novel you won't be able to put down
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My name is Skylar. I have been writing for as long as I could hold a pencil (no, seriously). Because I am always working on a novel, I can't seem to keep my head out of the clouds. And I have more books than I care to admit, but I can't help it. I LOVE to read.

If you decide to read my novels, then I hope you enjoy them as much as I enjoyed writing them. If things continue to go well for me as a writer here on Wattpad, I may just publish more of my work.

Happy reading & writing.

title: The Spirit Healer Series [reverse harem]
description:
Clare Parker is the new girl in Hawkins Town, and all she wants is a quiet, uneventful life.

As a temporary member of the powerful Hawkins Pack, her only goal is to keep her head down, graduate high school with good grades, and make it to college. It's her way of repaying the man who saved her life-a man she owes everything to.

But things in Hawkins are far from simple.

The moment Clare locks eyes with Elijah Shepherd, the future Beta of the pack, her world tilts. Falling for him at first sight was never part of the plan. And things only get more complicated when Sawyer Hawkins, the arrogant and magnetic future Alpha, starts paying attention to her.

Now Clare has to juggle high school-a struggle all on its own-with her swirling, conflicted emotions for two boys who seem to be pulling her in opposite directions. All while staying under the radar to keep the dangerous enemies hunting her from finding out where she is.

Secrets, danger, and forbidden feelings collide in this paranormal reverse harem romance series, where Clare must learn to trust herself and the people who love her.

title: DANIEL HERON: BECOMING
description:
Did you ever feel like someone else was orchestrating your life? Like someone else is pulling the strings, and you have no choice but to go with the flow?

Daniel Heron felt like that most of his life. It wasn't easy growing up in a home that desperately lacked affection, but he stuck it out. 

But we all have a breaking point, an on one gloomy afternoon, Daniel reached his. Little did he know that after getting out of one toxic environment, he would instantly get pulled into another. 

The threads of Daniel's life fell into the hands of Lucio Veles, his friend who believed that the law doesn't apply to him. He wasn't far from the truth, because those they sent after him, officially do not exist. They shouldn't exist, at least not outside of the horror stories. For their eyes shine with amber glow, and their canines are sharper than they should be.

Updates: ONCE  A  WEEK
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
There is a place where everything is possible. That place is our imagination.
      🐉            🐉           🐉
Postoji mjesto gdje je sve moguće. To mjesto naša je mašta.
      🐉            🐉            🐉

Hello dear wanderer! 
Whatever reason brought you here - WELCOME!
Here, have a cookie... 🍪
🖊️  Who am I, you ask? Well, in short, I was born in the 1980s, I'm a teacher by day, amateur writer by night. 
🌿  I'm a big nature lover; nature is a very common motif in my stories. Don't believe me? Go check for yourself.
🌍  I also like made-up worlds. It was those worlds that brought me to this place starting with 'W' in the first place.
🇭🇷  What's that other language on the covers of some of my stories, you wonder? That would be Croatian - my native language.
💙 There's only thing left for me to say - Let my imagination take you to a journey through my dreams...

A ako ne razumiješ što piše ovdje iznad, ne brini.
Baš mi je drago što si tu - želim ti dobrodošlicu!
Uzmi kolačić... 🍪
🖊️  Pitaš se tko sam? Pa, ukratko, rođena sam 1980 i neke, danju sam učiteljica, noću amaterska spisateljica.
🌿   Velik sam ljubitelj prirode; ona je vrlo čest motiv u mojim pričama. Ne vjeruješ mi? Idi i provjeri!
🌍   Volim izmaštane svjetove. Upravo su me ti svjetovi doveli na ovo mjesto čije ime počinje slovom 'W'.
💙   Želim ti reći još samo jedno - Dopusti mi da te moja mašta povede na putovanje kroz moje snove...

title: Charm the Dragon Tamer (A Charlie Weasley and Hermione Granger Love Story)
description:
After being cheated on, Hermione disappears without a word. After trying to find her for days her friends finally give up. Where did she go to mend her broken heart? Far away into Romania, a place her friends wouldn't find her but she forgot a Weasley works in Romania with Dragons. What happens when these two meet? What if Hermione has a natural ability to tame any kind of dragon? Will Charlie tell everyone back in London where Hermione is or not? What if both of them start having feelings for each other? Will it be kept quiet or will they confess? Maybe it isn't that hard to Charm the Dragon Tamer or is it! 

In my story a few people aren't dead.

title: The Alpha's Alyne
description:
He was the Alpha's son and the soon to be Alpha, he was Asher. The perfect definition of a leader, workaholic, and a good son, but he also had a flaw, and that was his anger. He had some major anger issues, so if you wished to live longer, you better be on his good books because no one wants to anger the big bad wolf and die.
And then comes Alyne, the Beta's fighter daughter. Alyne, a pro in kickboxing but also a closed-off person, who likes to stay in her bubble. But Alyne was much more than she appeared to be.
This is the journey of these two opposite characters, who are bound together by destiny. Now the question is, do they not have anything in common, or do they have something in common that will make them stick together till the end?

title: The Secrets We Bury
description:
Kayla O’Neil has it rough as it is. With her father gone, her mum decides it is time for a fresh start. Kayla is still broken, confused, and has put up her walls, keeping the amount of people around her to the bare minimum.  When she moves in, she is surprised to discover a little ‘present’ that the previous owner has left. Letters. Some opened, crinkled, and tear stained. Others? Sealed. Waiting for the right person to expose them to the world, including Louis Tomlinson.  Louis is living his life as a pop star in the band One Direction. He has pretty much forgotten his life back home. At least the bad parts, the parts that nobody would want to remember. Kayla will flip is entire life up-side down. Even she didn't know how complex her discovery was.  Everything will change because everyone has a secret. The question is; how long can you keep it buried?

title: Dance of Empires
description:
She would do anything for her sister. She would kill and commit atrocities worse than ever seen before for the sake of her family. But what happens when she becomes blinded by the need for revenge, the need for power? Will she forsake her dearest things or let it go? Navigating the battle field is easy for her, the royal court in the palm of her sisters hand. Both deadly in different ways, both demons, literally and figuratively. Then they find love. title: The Death Curse
description:
Layla has rotten luck when it comes to love but the rest of her life is going well. ... Or at least it was. 

Layla Takanashi had everything she needed; a good job, a great best friend, and a nice apartment in the city.  A boyfriend would just be icing on the cake. But after a flop of a first date, Layla decides to drown her sorrows at a bar and ends up with something she never would have asked for. A death curse. 

Now Layla finds herself dying in a new way every day with no way to stop it.  She reaches out to Rhys Pembroke, the owner of a local occult bookstore, for help. But she soon finds out that he may be more than she bargained for.

title: HIDDEN- Sides, Truths, Secrets
description:
Rose knew she isn't normal. And neither was her family. Like which family force their daughter to live alone and change her house every single fucking year, definitely not a normal one.

She wanted to find answers to all the hidden secrets kept by her family and she got the chance when one day, during her 'annual ritual' of shifting houses, a group of zombies attacked her........ and she met him.

------------------------------------
------------------------------------

"Creature?"

"Well, it implies to all kinds collectively. Both of bright land and dark land. The world is roughly segregated into three categories. First where humans reside alongside hunters, second Bright land, where all the mermaids, fairies, Pegasus, etc. creatures of the day live and on the contrary, third, the dark land where creatures of the night like vampires, werewolves, zombies, dragons, etc. live."

------------------------------------But what she didn't know was she has inherited the curse which had destroyed her mother's life before and is about to do the same with her.
------------------------------------

"So I am not a human? I am half dark and half bright land's creature?"

"And that's what makes you human. How do you think the first human was born? Humans are hybrids of creatures of dark and light. But the firstborn humans had superpowers. Power no one can control. But with evolution, most humans lost their powers. Some are still left, those are known as hunters, but their powers are nowhere as strong as the firstborns."

"So if Damon found out that I am a half-half hybrid, he will kill me?"

"Without a doubt." 

First I couldn't be with my mate because he is a vampire prince and I belongs to a family of werewolves and now this.
Fuck my life.......

------------------------------------

title: Heir
description:
When his father dies without naming an heir for his pack, twenty-five-year-old Roman Corson knows that the time to claim the title of Alpha is now or never. However, with six siblings who all have their own unique talents, he knows that if he wants to win over the pack then he needs a secret weapon. He just wishes it didn't come in the form of the one person whom he has a mountain of history with and who knows him better than anyone: Beta Theron Bradley, his mate who rejected him. 

Roman knows Theron is the advantage he needs to win over the pack but the more time they spend together, the more memories and unresolved feelings begin to arise and if Roman isn't careful, he can lose both the pack and his heart a second time.

title: My Incubus demon...
description:
Gabrielle is just a normal, teenage girl. She has many friends that care for her. A loving boyfriend that she can talk to. Parents that support her in her time of need. 
Well, that's what she wishes.

Everybody sees Gabrielle as that weird girl in class, sitting alone. They sneer at her and whisper to each other. Whispering in the corridor as she walks by. Nobody makes an effort with her, and she doesn't really mind. In fact, she'd probably do the same in their situation.

But all that changes when school starts. 
Will she be that weird girl? Or will she stand up for herself with the help of... her incubus demon

(An incubus is a demon in male form who, according to mythological and legendary traditions, lies upon sleepers, especially women, in order to engage in sexual activity with them. Its female counterpart is the succubus)

title: Once Upon a You | A Beauty and the Beast Retelling ✔️
description:
| 8𝘅 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗗 · A YA Beauty and the Beast gender-swapped retelling. Bit of a Stranger Things vibe going on, too! 

Life was going mega well for Beatrice-Bea Laurent, a soon-to-be 18-year-old certified Insta star slash posh gal. 

She was spending every waking breath throwing parties, and dodging responsibilities. 

Until one fateful day when an Instagram scandal has her parents banish her from New York to New Town. 

Next thing she knows, she is cursed by a creepy old lady and is... changed. She starts growing fur, claws AND fangs!

                                                                                      ***

Beatrice Laurent is your average posh teen girl, who goes to classes when she feels like it.
Which is basically... never. She spends her days lounging on her couch, staring at her phone screen, sharing fab life insta stories with her "friends," and sliding into their dms.
Dodging real life responsibilities left and right, she does nothing, yet has everything.
And, she has no problem with that. 
In fact, she enjoys it.
Chartering planes-check. Private yachts-check. Designer duds-check. 
No expectations, no responsibilities, no worries. 

But that all ends when Beatrice gets grounded and banished from New York to New Town. 
Cherry on top: she is cursed by a creepy old lady at a party she threw!

Suddenly she is friggin' growing fur, claws and other feline attributes, and having the incredible urge to roar and pursue tiny rodents.

What's a girl to supposed to do when she involuntarily transforms into a beast and can't attend classes no more?

Can Bea count on Ross Thorne, a bookish classmate who is struggling to stop living in his older brother Gus' shadow... 
To keep her secret? 

And perhaps aid her in the un-cursing when their budding affection becomes more than apparent? 

© 2022 EvelynHail
Exclusively on Wattpad
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Wattpad Creator  · Wattpad Ambassador ❣️

Wattys Winner (2023)
Wattys Shortlister (2018), (2022), (2023), (2024)
ONC Winner (2020)
Ambys Winner and Runner-Up (2021)
Featured on: 35 genre profiles

Born in a fractured country uprooted by the Yugoslav wars, I learned to fight and read at the same time.

That wasn't enough to keep my single mum and me clothed and fed, so we sought refuge, immigrating to faraway Ireland. There I discovered my Galway Girl soul and my love for the English language.

Years later, I returned to mainland Europe and earned two PhDs in English and Latin American Lit.

These days, I work as an English Literature teacher at university, program in Python, and write books in English, German and Spanish.

'I've been through a lot of pain and dirt
And I've got the scars to prove it ♫'

I climbed the ladder from zero to hero.
I survived, adapted and endured, and this in turn gave birth to a plethora of creative stories.

Now I am a music maker and I am a dreamer of dreams.

title: The cursed Enchanted Love
description:
Evelyn Blackwood has spent years trying to escape the shadow of her family's dark legacy. Haunted by a curse that ties her to the eerie Blackwood Manor, she has lived in isolation, desperate to forget the past. But when Damien Crowe-her once forbidden love-returns, Evelyn's world is torn apart.

Their bond is ancient, powerful, and deadly. The curse that binds them together has been waiting, its grip tightening with each passing year. As Evelyn unravels the horrifying truth of their shared history, she faces an impossible choice: break the curse at the cost of her own soul, or let the darkness consume them both.

A thrilling tale of love, betrayal, and dark magic, The Cursed Enchanted Love will keep you on the edge of your seat until the very last chapter.

authorBio: Stephanie Gildart has been writing fantasy and science fiction for as long as she can remember. Growing up near Seattle, she checked out so many books that she memorized her library card number. She received her MA/MFA in Children's Literature and Writing for Children from the Simmons University. When she isn't writing or teaching middle schoolers, she loves to crochet amigurumi dolls, play tabletop games, and explore other creative things. She lives in the Bay Area with her dogs Fox and Lilly, who remind her enjoy a nice walk outside every day (as long as it isn't raining).

title: Raven's Heir | ONC 2021 honourable mention
description:
Sandrine is reluctant to take the job as a ghost hunter, despite her ancestral gift. And when she meets her boss and future partners, every fibre of her being tells her to quit-but she needs the money. How hard can it be to dispel the ghost of a bird?

Soon, she finds herself fighting the advances of a medieval playboy, targeted by a flock of ectoplasmic ravens, and trying to solve the puzzle of the cottage in the lake. With disaster waiting around the corner, she truly has no time for a budding romance, right?

~ ~ ~

My entry for the open novella contest 2021.

Prompts:

No 5: There is a terrible drought ravaging the land, but when the waters recede from the local lake/reservoir, they reveal something no one expected to find.

No 64. What should have been a simple task for a trio of ghost hunters quickly becomes something for which the term 'Worst Case Scenario' is the mother of all understatement.

No 61. I would've lived longer if it weren't for Lorraine. There's only one issue... who's Lorraine?

Willkommen! - Welcome! - Bienvenue!

Growing up with StarTrek-reruns and Tolkien left me an addict of science fiction and fantasy, reading everything from Adams to Zelazny. Once I dreamed of becoming a writer, but dreams are dreams, and life wasn't meant to be easy.
I am and shall always be an avid reader, occasional writer - and a Wattpad Ex-Star and Ex-Ambassador.

Co-captain of @Ooorah and the amazing Tevun Krus WattZine, you will also find me on @layeththesmackdown, @challengecorner, and @childrensfiction
Member of TSS - The Scribblers' Society

title: Andy Biersack's Daughter (A BVB Fanfiction)
description:
Rachel is a 4 and half year old girl who is very advanced for her age and has no idea who her dad is. One day her mom leaves her with a note and on a strangers porch with her all her things. The man "Andy" takes her to the hospital for a DNA test and it's confirmed. she is Rachel Maria Biersack....will andy keep her or put her up for adoption. will he be able to take care of her? what will the guys think? Will crazy shit happen? Most definitely especially since strange things seem to occur around her. 


Also sort of a romance (for Andy)

title: The Dream Weaver
description:
*Previously Featured* Wren's first day at her new school is a twisted kind of day--in other words, anything but ordinary. With Kellan and Jaxon battling for her attention, their crazy love triangle draws Wren into a hidden world she never dreamed possible. 

Unlocking the mystery of her lost memories, mystical tattoos and unusual abilities are only the beginning of her being able to unravel her past to find out who she really is. Claiming her role in a world she knows nothing about, is more dangerous than she knows. 

MULTIMEDIA book:
*BOOK TRAILER VIDEO
*EXCLUSIVE VIDEOS made for chapters 14 & 22! 
*GIFs made to help bring content alive.
*Screenshots
*Recipe from the Stompin Grounds Cafe with video.
*Pictures in every chapter.
*Playlist, with Spotify link.


SUMMARY
Within moments of stepping in the front door of her new school, Wren stumbles into Kellan one of the hottest guys she's ever seen, only to meet his fiery rival Jaxon later the same morning. It's obvious that both guys seem to hate each other for no apparent reason and have somehow decided to pull Wren into their little war against each other.

Since the accident three years ago, her memories have been lost and her nights plagued with the same recurring dream of having to flee leaving everyone she loves behind. She can't help but wonder if there's more to who she is with her repeating dreams, mystical tattoos and unusual abilities.

The reality is--time has run out, and her past has finally caught up with her. She needs to piece together her missing memories now if she wants the right to claim a future with love.

title: Make Them Scream
description:
After a mysterious vehicle runs them off the road, Alex and his bandmates must fight for their lives to escape a vicious pack of wolves who bear unsettling similarities to the other band they are touring with.

*****

Alex is the lead singer of the up-and-coming rock band Make Them Scream. Despite the fact that the insomnia he's fought with since he was a teenager has been worsening, the band have found themselves in the express lane to stardom. But, when a mysterious vehicle knocks their tour bus off the road in the middle of upstate Montana, the bandmates are left stranded with no cell service. When poor decisions lead them toward the dark woods, things go from bad to worse. If the elements don't get them first, their own demons might devour them alive. Some monsters only come out in the dark, and some reality is scarier than nightmares.

*****

WATTYS 2021 WINNER WEREWOLF

*****

Content Warning: This story contains mature language, violence, gore and reference to alcohol and drug use.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
An engineer who designs ships. 2018, 2019, 2021 and 2022 Wattys Winner, 2022 Ambys Winner, 2023 Wattys Shortlister, Wattpad Originals author, and former Wattpad Creator/Star.

My current story, Mezzanine, is a teen horror/thriller series with a dash of romance, a hint of humor and ton of mystery. New chapters will release weekly on Wattpad and YONDER, the next-generation reading app from the Wattpad family.

I grew up in a suburban town in New Jersey where my friends and I spent most of our free time hunting for ghosts and trying to find the scariest horror movies.

I attended college at a very small school in New York (that looks remarkably like Wayne Manor) where I majored in Naval Architecture and Marine Engineering. I am now living in Seattle, Washington working as a naval architect.

In my free time, I enjoy hiking, live music, skiing, and of course reading and writing. I'm particularly interested in horror, paranormal, mysteries, and thrillers. On my profile, you'll find horror stories of all types, from mysteries and thrillers to vampires and werewolves! Hope you find something that interests you.

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/amy_marie_z/

description:

And as the night progresses the story of the asylum starts to unravel right before them.

title: Chasing Echoes
description:
In a world where the extraordinary is denied, three girls-Amy, Alice, and Jackie-find themselves the target of a relentless government agency. Jackie, a mischievous ghost, is bound to Alice, a compassionate medium, and Amy, a determined sorceress. Together, they navigate a life filled with chaos, their unique abilities weaving a tapestry of turmoil in a society that fears them.
As whispers of their powers spread, the government deems them a threat to the established order. The girls are pursued not just for what they've done but for the potential havoc they could wreak upon a world unprepared for their reality. With each close encounter, the stakes grow higher, and their journey becomes a harrowing game of cat and mouse.
Forced to flee from those who can not understand or accept them, Amy, Alice, and Jackie must find a way to survive in the shadows. Their story is one of resilience and friendship against the backdrop of a society that seeks to erase their existence. It's a tale of three girls fighting for a  semblance of peace in life-and the afterlife-that has become a hellish ordeal. As they run and hide, they must confront the question: Can they ever truly be free, or will the world's refusal to believe in them be their unending curse?


NOTE - This version of the book will not be updated anymore. The official version will be on Ao3, and it will be a rewrite. Sorry, but personal stuff went down, and this version of the book needs to be rewritten for my own peace of mind.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Death Watchers
description:
The Shadow Man stared at me. "Jocelynn, my love, surely you don't want him. Especially considering I can give you everything." His grin stretched too far across his face. "What could he possibly offer you that I can't?"

~~~~~

Jocelynn Turner is a Death Watcher. After her mother died giving birth to her brother, Clayton, she's seen the one thing her mother told her to stay away from: the Shadow Man. Now that he knows about her, he isn't about to let her escape.

When Jocelynn meets Cole, she knows something is different with him too. He gives her the creeps and yet he's also the only one who can tell her more about the Death Watchers.

But Jocelynn is running out of time. Now that the Shadow Man knows she's come of age, he is hell-bent on taking her to the Underworld to become his queen.

*Note: Finished, but welcome to any criticism, or thoughts on how to make it better.*

title: Whispers of Willow
description:
Formerly titled 'The Vampire Prince'
.
.

Willow must find a way to break her father's curse to prevent him from dying, and in pursuit of it, she accidentally steps into a hidden vampire kingdom where humans are supposedly a myth. She must find her way back home without being killed. 

Fortunately, Prince Wes, a vampire aware of human existence, is willing to help her, although his benevolence isn't free of ulterior motives. When she is sent back to the human world, Wes follows her. He soon finds her and makes her an offer that would resolve all her troubles. Knowing how desperate she is to save her father, she would say yes, but what does he want in return?

This is a story of love, adventure, betrayal, vampires, witches, kings and queens, and the unavoidable handsome prince.


___________

© invincible

title: The Veil Of Vengeance
description:
When 5 friends travel to Dehradun, they unknowingly check into a haunted mansion with a dark past. The ghost of Abhinav, a betrayed businessman, haunts the mansion, seeking revenge on the family that destroyed his life. His tragic story-a family's greed that led to the murder of his wife and children-terrifies the group, but Riddhi forms an unexpected bond with him.

Desperate for justice and redemption, Abhinav offers Riddhi a chilling choice: help him seek revenge, or be trapped by his restless spirit forever. As they grow closer, Riddhi must decide if she will risk everything to help a ghost find peace-and uncover the true cost of revenge.

The Veil Of Vengeance is a haunting tale of betrayal, love, and the fight for redemption in the shadow of death.

title: Broken Luna
description:
Alexandria is a werewolf with an unfortunate past that has kept her wolf weak and fragile. Now she is twenty-one and unmated all because her inner wolf is too afraid to find her mate. Werewolves tipicaly find their mate at he ages of 16 to 19 and if real unlucky 20. To be unmated at 21 is unheard of unless your mate has passed away which a werewolf would feel even if they have never meet.

Alexandria knows her mate is not dead, she can feel it in her gut but her wolf won't let off her pheromones so he can find her. Fate, on the other hand has other plans because Alexandria is now seated at a pack meeting discovering that a young man from a few packs down from her has been searching for his mate unable to find her.

Her suspected mate is no ordinary mate though. He is the future Alpha of the Midnight Warrior Pack looking for his future Luna so he can finally take up the role of Alpha.

Alexandria is completely terrified of her mate finding her let alone a Alpha mate. Why would he want her when she was so broken. But she was his mate now.

His broken Luna.

[cover by @kikibuscus2259]

title: "Between Fangs and Claws: The Hybrid Legend"
description:
"Between Fangs and Claws: The Hybrid Legend"
Alicia always knew she was different-her heightened senses, uncanny reflexes, and aversion to sunlight were just quirks. But when a blood test reveals her existence isn't entirely human, her quiet life shatters. Hunted by those who fear her and haunted by dreams of a mysterious figure, Alicia embarks on a journey to uncover the truth about her lineage. As the last known hybrid of vampire and werewolf blood, she must unravel the secrets of a legend long buried in shadows. But the deeper she digs, the more she realizes: some truths were meant to remain hidden.

authorBio:
Hi there!

I've been a proud Wattpad member since 2014, spending years immersed in amazing stories and connecting with talented writers. Recently, I took the leap and started writing my own books-something I've always dreamed of doing!

If you ever need help translating something into Spanish, I'm happy to assist-just don't send me an entire book, please! I also love discovering new stories and take reading requests, but I have one rule: if a book hasn't been updated in 3+ months without explanation, I'll sadly remove it from my library.

I enjoy reading a wide range of genres, but I steer clear of anything too scary-nightmares are no fun (don't judge me, haha!).

Thanks for stopping by my profile, and I hope you enjoy your time here! 😊

title: Guardians Book One - Magic Rising
description:
Kath remembers her gran, many years ago, telling her she wasn't mad - the voices she could hear were real - but years later, she's long forgotten she could ever hear whispers in the wind and voices that weren't hers. Now, she's an adult working a 9-5 job in the City. 
But one night, walking home along the river, she sees and hears things that couldn't possibly be real. And when her new colleague turns out to be more than just mysterious - when the voices that aren't real start speaking again - Kath knows her gran was right all along...

Cover art by the wonderful @LeighWStuart!

* FINISHED! *

title: Gifted
description:
---------------
No matter how fast you run away, it's rare to hide from your destiny.........!
Because destiny has its own way to find you.......!
----------------
Rachael Santiago, the most powerful stoicheiódis (the Greek word for elemental) in history, with her ability to control four elements of the earth, air, water, fire, and lighting. She is known as a lethal weapon, with her special gifts and darkness she possessed to kill mercilessly as a mafia queen, nobody dares to challenge her...., until now.
What would happen when Xavier meets Rebel? Will he be able to redeem her from the shadows of her past and make her accept him as her significant other? And let go of her unknown revenge which she is eager to take?
What will happen when she learns real identity of Xavier?
Continue reading to find out the hidden secrets of Supernaturals Secret society, Synx.

title: The Sisters of Nowhere
description:
All small towns have their quirks. The town of Nowhere, for example, has an overabundance of ghosts.

Wyatt Best has lost his money, his father, and his last sweater vest. He is only sad about losing one of those things. When he's sent to live with his estranged uncle in Nowhere, Wyatt is immediately fascinated by its magic.

He then meets the Penny family. The three Penny sisters, who were each born on the same day exactly a year apart, have the ability to commune with the ghosts in Nowhere and act as a bridge between the land of the living and that of the dead.

Just as Wyatt begins to adjust to his new life in this strange town, a forest appears. And the ghosts it has trapped inside have secrets to tell.

title: Protectors of Umbra [Umbra's Fate #1] ✓
description:
One day darkness came and made everyone's hearts it's home. 

                                                            ***

The village of Umbra has always been known for its beautiful landscape and the peaceful lifestyle of its inhabitants, but everything changed when the Devil appeared. Now, if they want to survive against the demons that walk between them, the villagers have to use the powers the Devil gave them and fight. 

Will they be able to hold onto their lives for a whole year? What would they do when the line between allies and enemies starts to fade? Is it possible to find love in the middle of death or will the darkness consume it all?

title: Devil's Child {Book 1} (a Gaara love story) || 2014
description:
Sonia was a young girl from the Yamanaka and Uchiha clans. Her mother being of the Yamanaka clan, and her father of the Uchiha clan. When she was 3 years old, a scarring event occurred, she had a part of the devil forcefully sealed within her soul. She met Gaara at a young age after she had been adopted in Suna. Her adoptive mother gave birth to a child by the name of Iku and he became like a younger brother to Sonia. All of those things became a blur to her after a certain incident occurred with Gaara. Then years passed, many things happened, and she enrolled in the ninja academy of Konoha for her final year. Only meeting Gaara again in the chunin exams. 
  
  *EDIT: Yes, I realize that there are a lot of mistakes and POV changes in this story and I apologize for that, this was my first fanfic. I'll fix it later on but for now please bear with it. There are also a few scenes where a few characters go OOC, I'll try to fix that too when I have the time. I realize my writing left some things to be desired, but I was 14 and English isn't my first language. I did the best I could at the time. :) ~Sonia*
  
*Disclaimer: I do not own the photo(s) used in the cover! But I did make the cover.*

title: THE DEAF BOY HEARD IT ALL (BOYXBOY)
description:
There's only one rule in the Leiker's house. Don't go near the well. Eighteen year old Gunner Leiker lives in a world without sound. Hearing impaired since an accident when he was six years old left him with a different view of the world.


  Six month before his birthday his sister, Harlow Nowak, could finally afford the hearing implants that could change Gunner's life. For the first time in years, he can hear the sound of rain against the window sill. He can finally hear his niece's voice. Can listen to the latest song playing on the radio. 


  Soon Gunner learns there are others sounds he can pick up on throughout his house. The sound of a wheelchair squeaking through the hall. The soft sobs of a woman crying. And someone  begging for help coming from the well.


  Every night someone begs Gunner to help them out of the well. Once an old evil is released can it ever be sealed again? What darkness lies at the bottom of that deep dark hole? Some things are never meant to be awaken. Gunner is about to learn that the hard way.

title: Ethereal
description:
(Previously called Wings)

"From the moment I saw him, I knew that he was not from this world. He was something more, something that I couldn't quite place my finger on. Something that was inexplicably interested in me."
  
Emilia Hill had never been popular. It didn't matter if she looked and acted exactly like the rest of them, nobody ever stayed around her for long. But her life takes an unexpected turn when three angels show up, requesting her help in finding a teen they claim to be dangerous - a teen they know hardly anything about. Emilia knew they were telling the truth. Not only that, she knew that they are something else, something from another world, something... not human. 

Emilia must decide who she's actually helping, and if the truth is worth the price.

  
Copyright 2016 Lauren Sophie (Lauren_Sophie_)
Cover was made by @dysanic

authorBio:
Hello! I'm @Lauren_Sophie_ . Technically I started wattpad in 2010 but I abandoned various old accounts because 10 year old me was a terrible writer. I really like votes, comments and feedback! It helps me improve!

I have a couple of old werewolf books here on my profile, but my writing has improved a lot since writing them - so I'd recommend reading my newest book series Ethereal - my personal favourite!

Favourite books on wattpad, 'To love a monster', 'She's one of the boys', 'The heartbreaker chronicles', 'billion reasons why' and 'love at last sight'. Just a few from my very extensive library. All the books in my reading list are also ones that I recommend. :)

title: Werewolves Don't Cry (BoyxBoy) [On Hold]
description:
What happens when an asexual werewolf falls in love with a sex-crazed human?

Jesse Calaway is struggling to keep his sex addiction under control, but it's so much harder when you swing both ways. Plus, he is surrounded by people who are willing to just throw themselves at him, literally.

Gray Montero is an asexual and a very romantic werewolf. He tries to slide into Jesse's love life, but due to his shyness and Jesse jumping from one lover to another, he can't seem to get a chance.

Until disaster strikes!

Jesse is targeted by a psychotic pack of werewolves who hunt humans every full moon for sport.

How will Gray keep Jesse safe and keep his secret well hidden while trying to make Jesse fall in love with him all at the same time?

𝗣.𝗦: Asexual people may experience romantic attraction, but they do not feel the urge to act on these feelings sexually.

[this story is also available on Radish. The newest chapters get published there one month before they're being published here]

title: Ebony Wings
description:
Protecting her was duty.
Falling for her was forbidden.
Being with him was all that mattered.

When Ali Bliss makes the quick decision to enrol at University she can practically taste the freedom. It was everything she could have hoped for and more. Much more, as she was to discover on the sunrise of her nineteenth birthday. 

Lost in the world of a superior race, survival begins to take on a whole new meaning when Ali realises she not only fights for her own life but for the lives of thousands of other humans just like herself. That is, once they figure out a way to eradicate an entire army of Fallen Angels. 

Their journey takes them from the tame English countryside to the wild, unexplored Russian mountain ranges in search for a being only heard of in angelic folklore, which may just have the answers they are looking for. 

And if things couldn't get more complicated in Ali's life, she can't help but do the one thing she has been forbidden from doing. Despite her best efforts she begins to fall for the one man she can't have - the man with the Ebony Wings. 

(NB: This is a completed, standalone novel.)
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The One Who Chose to Stay
description:
What else is there to do when all your life, all you've ever done was run away, hide, and hurt the people you love most. 

Maxine would want more than anything to live a happy life, but deep down she knows she doesn't deserve to do so. 

Between carrying her responsibilities of protecting her younger sister and the emotions that come along with finding out your mate was a dangerous and ruthless Alpha who hated rogues with a passion, will she be able to do what is right, protect what is hers, and finally live the life she's always wanted?

Would she, who has ran all her life, choose to stay for the people she loves?


_______________________________________________________


BOOK 1 of the "The One" Series.

title: What is Love, Alpha?
description:
- "What's wrong, gatia? You're too pale," he said softly, using one hand to brush my hair from my forehead. I happily basked in his touch, feeling comforted already. 
"I... uh," I trailed off quietly, not really wanting to say. I was suddenly worried of him thinking I was insane. Biting my lip and looking down at the ground, I took a deep breath. "I just... didn't feel c-comfortable. L-like someone was...w-watching me," I stumbled out pathetically, internally wincing.  "Like... h-he was watching m-me," I added almost silently, the words slipping out almost without my permission. 
Almost instantly, his arms wrapped tightly around me as he tugged me into his very bare and warm chest, hunching over my protectively. I felt his chest vibrate as he let out a small growl, but instead of terrifying me like it should, it made me sigh in comfort. 
"You never have to worry about him, sweetheart, I promise." He softly purred, his voice still sounding rough even as he tried to lighten it. I liked the rougher part of his voice; it made me feel even more protected. "As long as I'm around, he'll never hurt you again; and I don't plan on going anywhere or letting you go anytime soon." -
In a world where vampires and werewolves are very much real, Emily is stuck right in the middle. She was barely kindergarten age when she was kidnapped by a strong vampire coven. They stole everything from her and their main leader, Christien, quickly became obsessed with her; his favorite prize. 	
But what's a vampire to do when a powerful alpha werewolf, Anton,  saves his possesion? What's a poor Emily to do when that werewolf turns out to be her mate?
Let's just say that Chrisiten isn't about to give up easily; but neither is Anton.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: WICKED { #Wattys2016 }
description:
Highest ranking: #16 in Paranormal

The arrival of the gorgeous Sterling brothers triggers a series of gruesome, inexplicable and magical events in the small town of Willow Creek. And at the center of it all is seventeen year old Cordelia Bishop. A dabble in Wicca is all it takes for her to unearth hidden powers, and a dark, messy past-both of which are centuries old. Before she can even get a grasp on her newfound discoveries, she's hurled into a world of dark magic and blood-lust. 

She'll have to navigate this new world, while trying to get a handle on her budding powers, keep her family safe, deal with a blossoming romance with the smokin' hot Cal Sterling, and an uneasy relationship with his brooding older brother Kol. Throw in terrifying nightmares of past lives, and you have Cordelia's new life.

The Sterlings assure her they're on the same side, but that becomes harder and harder to believe when it becomes more and more evident they're hiding something. But as Cordelia will come to understand, the past repeats itself and so do mistakes. And in order to avoid being burned at the stake, she'll have to break her old habits. Too bad old habits die hard.

title: Tickle Monster
description:
What once started as an innocent being of their imagination could turn into the living nightmare of 15 year old Jade Romero. It was all fun and games as she and her twin sister, Teegan had an innocent sleepover in the room they shared in their new home.

"It appeared to have pale skin that stretched in long string-like pieces over muscle on its long, misshapen arms. The beast or creature or whatever had a pointy nose and a mouth that was curved into a grotesquely creepy smile. It's eyes were as devoid of goodness and light as they were of any color except black. It seemed to speak of true evil and I felt a chill deep into every part of my body. And then a flicker of something deep in my mind... recognition?"
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Writing descriptions of yourself are weird. I don't want to sound cliché or cheesy but I still want people to see the real me, right down to my cheesy cliché heart. How can I say I care about readers but I still want them to show their support back for me. Ya get my troubles? I just want to write stories that people can truly feel, whether it be crazy stupid grins that make you look like a clown (I'll admit I've done that a few times while reading a good romance) or acting as if you don't care what happens next but desperately want to know if she gets killed or not. I mean cmon Kaitlyn (me talking to myself, the weirdo) get your stuff together! ....just vote and leave a comment it really means a lot.

title: Never wake a Dragon (on hold)
description:
The saying goes - don't poke the bear. It should be - don't poke a dragon.

Adeem lives his life in the shadows of Stockholm, stealing memories from unsuspecting humans whenever it suits him. But with a knack for getting into trouble, and a serious hatred for authority, his life is about to take a turn. Finding out that the new Guardian of Stockholm hosts a sleeping dragon inside is a problem he can't ignore.

As the first dragon Guardian, Kyung has to play his cards right - especially if he wants to destroy the institution that ruined his life. The council has ruled the world for too long, rewriting history to suit their cause. But when Kyung crosses paths with Adeem, the demon that has chased off all the previous Guardians of Stockholm, he knows this is his one chance to set his plans for revenge in motion.

But trust between a demon and a dragon is difficult at best. Impossible, at worst. However, the moment Kyung realizes his dragon is about to wake up, everything changes. Absolutely everything.

title: The Sandman's Daughter
description:
I walk along. My feet padding silently against the floor of the stark, cold hallway as it stretches out in front of me. I am in my mother's dream. She doesn't know it. I slip through as softly as a cloud caught in a peaceful breeze.

I am here to help her, but she will never know that. No one ever will. People never remember my visits in the waking hours. I'm a nocturnal guide. I'm pulled into the dreams of those that need me the most. I guide them through the jumbled mess in their minds, trying to free them from what troubles them. I don't know why I can do this. It's as much a part of me as my big feet or my brown curls. 

 It is what I've always done. Unfortunately, it is what I'll always do. 

Whether I like it or not.

I am Cassie O'Bryan and I am a Dream Walker.

Cassie O'Bryan is not your typical high school student.  At night, she is pulled into people's dreams,  guiding them through anything the mind needs to work out.  She was born with this gift, or as Cassie feels, a curse. 

When her fellow classmates start falling into unexplained comas, it seems it might be linked to disturbances in the dream world.  What is stalking dreams, turning them into nightmares, and reaping children's souls?  Cassie must use her gift to find the answers. Along the way, she just might find out who she really is as well.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Melissa L. Webb is the author of the Maxie Duncan series. She enjoys all things paranormal. She currently lives between the ocean and the redwoods with her dog, Nessie.

title: A Guardian's Fate (Book #2)
description:
(BOOK #2 in the Secrets of Aristol series.)

It's almost been three months since Elouise's birthday. Although she's kept herself distracted by Beatrice's past, she's left with more questions. Perhaps she isn't concentrating hard enough. After all, she's still waiting for the one who may never come back. She can only hope the answers will come faster than she fears. 

When Eldon returned home, he thought he would be back by Elouise's side within a month. He fell back into his old routine instead. But he hasn't stopped thinking about her and what they managed to discover together. Then his village is attacked, and he finds himself back at her side, reminded of the awakened ability within him he's tried to avoid. He only hopes things will start making more sense this time.

If anything's worth hoping for, though, it's that Eldon will finally believe.

But he won't be the only one forced to face the secrets of the kingdom.

Greetings, fair traveler, and welcome to my page. A prolific daydreamer, I've been crafting stories, building worlds, and creating memorable creatures for over three decades. My genre of choice has always been fantasy, whether it be high, urban, or of the paranormal variety. Although my degree is in English, I'm largely self-taught, since my college didn't have a dedicated creative writing program. Nearly everything I've learned is through decades of voracious reading, so you could say my real teachers were Mercedes Lackey, Anne McCaffrey, and Tamora Pierce. In my books you will find strong female protagonists, a proliferation of magic, talking animals, gods & goddesses, and/or mythical creatures.

title: Unfamiliar (Unfamiliar Series #1)
description:
I will be posting this story on Royal Road within the next week or so after I have passed the approval process. My name on there will also be CatLegis. 

Kara thought that going to a boarding school for witches would be hard. But when she's framed for murder, she must clear her name before the murderer can strike again. 
*****
Kara has just turned sixteen and is to attend Greenwood Academy, a witches' boarding school located in the Salem Woods in Massachusetts. But the Zen family is notorious for weak familiars and, as she prepares to summon her familiar for the first time, along with bracing for the bullying that will surely follow, something miraculous happens. 

The power she summons was thought to be a myth and legend: and it's extremely powerful. 

Accepted by the popular students within the academy, Kara begins to think that her stay at Greenwood will be an easy one. But when a fellow student is viciously murdered, Kara is the sole suspect of the crime, and she must figure out how to clear her name before tragedy can strike again.

But what exactly is the truth when she's going to a three hundred year old boarding school that has secrets?

Word count: Approximately 70,000 words.

COPYRIGHT @catlegis, book, world, plot, and characters are mine, please ask for permission and do not infringe, thank you. There WILL be consequences if you do, so please don't think that you can.

title: Shift
description:
Horrible things happen to Scarlet Usher, that's just her life. Nothing good has happened to her in so long, she can't even remember what true happiness feels like. But when one of these awful occurrences leaves Scarlet with an unusual gift, she will begin to feel more than she ever bargained for. Becoming a werewolf is hard, but it's definitely not the hardest thing she'll have to do.

authorBio: E. M. Otten is a self-published author and fiction writer from Grand Rapids, Michigan. She writes young- and new-adult stories of fiction, fantasy, romance, love, and adventure, with a little bit of comedy. Her area of expertise involves stories of the supernatural/paranormal. When she's not writing, you can find her enjoying the outdoors with her family and friends, drinking copious amounts of coffee, or reading.

title: Phantom Pain (trilogy)
description:
A storm of biblical proportions hit the western United States. In its centre, the small town of Springbrook was flooding, residents forced to evacuate to a local landmark: the dark and towering Castle Moore. 

In the chapel behind, lay the body of a fallen angel. 
 
Trapped in his own mind, the angel was jerked from his cycle of pain by a teenaged boy looking for his father. His memories hurt, and he was unsure of so much, but there was one thing he knew for certain. The harsh winds, and pounding rain were only the surface of the storm that was upon them. A war was coming: in hell, in heaven, and on earth, with the castle in the centre of it all. 

For its walls protected something, something the armies of hell would do anything to possess, and something that called to the angel-like a lost brother.

Included within:
HELL ON EARTH-BOOK 2
STORM FRONT-BOOK 3

authorBio:
My name is Kelly, I live in Sydney, Australia.

I've always loved art, drawing, writing and music from a young age. Creativity has always been my outlet, an escape from reality when it becomes difficult. I believe that by adding detail and emotion into each of my pieces, it can give others an insight into my busy mind. I hope that what I invent can be enjoyed, giving others an opportunity to live inside the world I've created.

'Art is not what you see, but what you make others see' - Edgar Degas

title: 𝐖𝐨𝐫𝐥𝐝 𝐋𝐞𝐟𝐭 𝐈𝐧 𝐏𝐢𝐞𝐜𝐞𝐬
description:
"𝘌𝘷𝘦𝘯 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘰𝘯𝘦𝘴 𝘭𝘦𝘧𝘵 𝘢𝘭𝘪𝘷𝘦 𝘸𝘪𝘴𝘩 𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘺 𝘸𝘦𝘳𝘦 𝘥𝘦𝘢𝘥."

                                              ○ ○ ○

In the year of 2734, no one suspected that the dead would rule the world. 

With millions infected after the first wave, and with the help of her family, Aliana Rodgers is one of the few that survives. They manage to get to Miracles, a safe haven in Texas. Shortly after she is, without a solid explanation, taken by Ground Zero, an organization that promises the worst has happened.

As she spends her days at Ground Zero, she learns more about the organization and what it is. She learns that the people changed and that no one can be trusted. For the first time, Aliana is forced to survive on her own in the world that is left in pieces. The real question is, will she survive? Or will the dead catch up to her? 

                                             ○ ○ ○

title: The Wine's Divine | Complete
description:
In an attempt to protect her heart, newly single, Ember has sworn off love. Intrigued, the goddess Aphrodite decides to change the girl's mind. But when Ember's stubborn nature proves difficult, Aphrodite's intentions turn dark.

•---•---•

Ember Michaelson, hopeless romantic and sophomore in college has waited her entire life to find 'the one'. But when he breaks her heart she's left questioning everything she believes in and declares a ban on love.

Ember could never have foreseen that her small proclamation, or as others might call it: crazed public shouting, would carry to Mount Olympus. But it has, and now she's piqued the interest of someone who is not going to let her plans come to fruition. 

The goddess Aphrodite loves a challenge almost as much as she loves gifts, and today is her birthday. Having stayed out of human affairs for centuries, she can't help but feel the allure of divine intervention when Ember's words find her ears. Aphrodite is determined to change Ember's mind, even if that means playing dirty.

title: New Ally Old Enemy (Discontinued)
description:
Stuart returns to Beacon Hills after being gone for the Google internship but after a stroll through the woods Stuart life is about to change for not just Scott, but Stuart gets bitten by Peter. Stiles helped Scott through his first full moon now ... Stiles has to help Stuart but that's just the beginning. . . . Read to find out.

This story is Temporally Discontinued until I can make some more parts and think of an ending. This story has been on the back burner for a while now, so I think it's best to discontinue in the meantime. At some point later on after I get some parts written and have an ending in mind I will start publishing again, but until then, the story is done, I hope you enjoy and happy reading.

A/N: I wanted to mention that the story doesn't take place in a specific season except the prolong and chapter 1 do take place in the very last episode of season 1 other than that it will be all over the place and there will be a few chapters based on season 3. 

A/N: I also want to make note of the different symbols you'll be seeing as u read. Symbol 1: ~ this is time skip 2: { } this is someone thoughts 3:《 》this is when two characters are texting or calling each other 4: " " this is when characters are speaking to each other. 

Thx again for even getting this far, hope you all like it. If I made mistakes in the description, please let me know.

P.s I have now seen the internship. I have seen season 1-6 of teen wolf and I have read some things on Wattpad and seen trailers that tie in with one another.

My story's highest tag(s) #76 stuart, #666 paranormal, #1 stilinskitwins

I'm a big fan of Teen Wolf and my Fave character is Void Stiles and of course Stiles. I also love how to train your dragon that hasn't changed and probably never will.

I like drawing animals of any kind, but I mostly do foxes, wolves, or really any canines, and dragons as well as dinosaurs. I also love Pokémon and I collect cards.

title: 𝐄𝐜𝐡𝐨 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐖𝐢𝐧𝐝|| 𝐉𝐞𝐨𝐧 𝐉𝐮𝐧𝐠𝐤𝐨𝐨𝐤 ||✅️
description:
[𝐱7 𝐅𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐝]

Jungkook could feel the cool breeze tugging on his hoodie as he stared far into the horizon, where the blue-grey ocean met the grey hues of the stormy sky.
She turns to face him, her eyes mysterious "...Perhaps the echoes of people we once loved still linger in the places we regularly visited with them, which is why we return... Not so much to remember them as to feel them "
Her melancholy aura sent chills up his spine.
....
When the expectation of success drove Jungkook, one of the renowned members of the global sensation, BTS, to suddenly plunge into a deep, hollow hole of darkness. A deep feeling of detachment from everyone around him, and an ice-cold heaviness made him feel dead inside. He realized it was time to reconsider the intrinsic value of inner joy and peace... which led him to a secluded island, where he finds hope in a kindred spirit.

title: The Girl Who Fell Out of the Ocean (The Ghostly Saga Book 1) -Editing
description:
What if you had lived before? 
               For eighteen-year-old Lavinia Gregory every day is like waking up from a dream, the older she gets the more she remembers. 
               She used to be shorter, with long, dark hair- not now, and it is not just the colour of her hair that has changed, it is her entire life. 
              Over the years, the memories of her past life became less vague, less like shadows and colours and more like the thundering horses that always seem to be hammering across her chest. Lavinia had a family, a family she sacrificed everything for and now they're gone and she's here. In a world full of ghostly shadows and unfinished memories.
              Lavinia must discover, why she came back to this world and how she died in the first place.
              But  most importantly what happened to him, Will, the one she loved above all the rest?

title: Top Green Tea Has Become a Heartthrob In Escape Games
description:
Top green tea Su Xiaoxi just wants to be a good girl with a simple mind.
But she entered the dangerous escape game and could only continue to operate.
Green tea guidelines:
1. Use more vests to protect yourself.
2. Call your brother a few more times to protect yourself.
3. Find a few spare tires and protect yourself.
4. Protect yourself by shed a few more tears.
Facing NPC: Brother, happy birthday. No one remembers your birthday before. It must be sad, right? (Hoo Han Wen Nuan. jpg)
Facing the ghost: Brother, your head turned off, does it hurt? Can I blow for you? (It hurts to tears. jpg)
Face the player: Brother, you just punched someone! It's too great! Could you let me touch your six pack abs?
In this way, she unknowingly became a heartthrob in the escape game, killing both men and women.
All the NPCs love her, all the ghosts protect her, and the little brothers do their best for her.
She got mixed up and quickly escaped from the game.
However, she did not expect that the cooler tyrant's chief little brother, the gentle neighbor's little brother, the clingy milk dog, the violent and fierce little brother, and the spare tire number 123456...
Are all tm the same person? ? ?
[Male Lead Version-When the upright, cold and abstinent male lead was played crazy]
After being used countless times by her, he felt soft when she called her brother, and his heart broke when she cried.
Finally, she stripped off all her vests and caught her.
So, hush-how should you punish her? Can't escape anymore!


Content label: Sweet text Shuang text
Search keyword: Protagonist: Supporting role: Other:
One-sentence brief: Can you escape the palm of his hand if you escape the game?
Purpose: No matter what you do, you can bear the consequences to be excellent
