title: Cozy Mystery: Cake Spell Disaster (A Haven Witch Woman Sleuths Book) COMPLETED
description:
Mistmoor Point has a new dirty word... poison!

Welcome to Mistmoor Point...
A small town on a small island where magic is standard practice and witches rule. 

Felicity Redfern has a lot of jobs. 
Baker, girlfriend, novice witch... and... worst of all, private investigator. 

When the mayor's anniversary party goes wrong, disaster happened!
1. Half the town is sick. 
2. The mayor's in a coma.
3. The most disastrous part... One person's dead.

And someone will take the blame.

 Felicity's mother and her supernatural bakery.

Is this a case of magic accidentally gone wrong, or is something more sinister at bay? 
Felicity's counting on her boyfriend, master warlock and sheriff of Mistmoor Point, Lincoln Maxwell, to help her solve the crime. 

But ... Lincoln thinks he already knows who the culprit is-Felicity's mother!

With no one on her side, Felicity has no choice but to use her novice witchy powers to investigate on her own. 
But the job proves too big for one witch alone... or one amateur witch to be exact! 
When her own life gets threatened, there's only one friend Felicity can turn to for help...

Her mother's familiar, a fuzzy feline named Sunny. 

But can they fix this mess before someone else gets killed? 
What if Felicity's mother really is to blame?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
It was from reading Agatha Christie's mystery books that inspired Zoe to write cozy mystery novels. Zoe liked the fact that cozy mysteries are able to offer readers a form of escapism that typical detective stories can't.

Like what Marilyn Stasio, who has been the Crime columnist forThe New York TimesBook Review since the late 1980s, recently wrote: "The abiding appeal of the cozy mystery owes a lot to our collective memory, true or false, of simpler, sweeter times." It is Zoe's desire that her writings will evoke that nostalgic memory in all of us; those memories of the good old days.
What sets Zoe apart in her writings is her fusing of Mystery with Paranormal elements, a combination which will bring about fantasies that are intriguing and engaging. Her stories contain unexpected twists and sometimes light-hearted moments that will make one smile at Zoe's quirkiness, fun and wittiness in her writings.

Blair Walsh never thought monsters were real. That is until she steps onto a creepy ring of little white mushrooms, passes out and wakes up in a cove filled with  sharp-toothed, webbed-feet, colorful Mermen. She makes it out, only after having a major freak-out because they want her to bear their children, and gets back to her home city of New York. The plot twist is: she was followed!

title: My Ghost Boy (female reader × Luke Patterson)
description:
When three ghosts show up at your best friends house and you two are the only ones who can see them what do you do? Luke Patterson is more than just a ghost he is a guy with a heart. What will happen if you and Luke suddenly catch feelings for eachother. He's a fricking ghost. Will the love create an impenetrable bond between the two or will the two worlds become separate. title: The Medium
description:
Seventeen year-old spirit medium Emily Chambers has a problem. Actually, she has several. As if seeing dead people isn't a big enough social disadvantage, she also has to contend with an escaped demon and a handsome ghost with a secret past. And then there's the question of her parentage. Being born an entire year after her father's death (yes, a year) and without the pale skin of other respectable English ladies, Emily is as much a mystery as the dead boy assigned to her.

Jacob Beaufort's spirit has been unable to crossover since his death several months ago.  It might have something to do with the fact he was murdered. Or it might not. All he knows is, he has been assigned by the Otherworld's administrators to a girl named Emily. A girl who can see and touch him. A girl who released a shape-shifting demon into the mortal realm. Together they must send the demon back before it wreaks havoc on London. It should be a simple assignment, but they soon learn there's nothing simple when a live girl and a dead boy fall in love.

THE MEDIUM is the first book in the Emily Chambers Spirit Medium trilogy. Yes, that's *trilogy* - meaning not everything will be wrapped up nicely at the end of The Medium. There are 2 more books after it, both of which are published. Check out my website for details.
Tous Droits Réservés

I love everything historical - movies, TV shows and too many books to list here. When I was younger I wanted to live in the past, but then I found out they didn't have toothpaste or Tim Tams (the national food of Australia).

All my stories can be bought from Amazon, Apple Books, Barnes & Noble, Kobo, Google Play and Smashwords and read on your ereader, smartphone, iPad/tablet, or computer. title: ENCOUNTERED
description:
She was so much buried in her work that the 'overtiming' word seemed like a routine for her. Never had a chance to date in her whole life. She was too focused on her studies during highschool, and too focused on the work the company has to offer. She was lonely, and would shove it off by burying herself more into work and stuffs. But then that day... She took a shortcut.

This story deals with supernatural elements. The setting is a little creepy (it seems so) at first, but takes a warm turn as the story progresses.

Main themes- Mystery, Suspense, Comfort [A hidden romance(?)]

[Note- Before you jump to conclusions and drop, I assure you guys, the main character (female lead) is not going to be a paedophile at all, trust me!]

title: the daisy diary | z. julien
description:
Y/n L/n is a kindergarten teacher in the small village of Ignacia, destined to live and die in the same place as her parents, and their parents before them. She's uninspired, lonely and stuck. 

Zane Julien presents her with an opportunity she can't refuse - the chance for adventure, the spark she needs for the book she's struggling to write, and the desirable company of having a family again.

But Zane sometimes acts a little strange, almost inhuman, and Y/n can't ignore the weird pull she feels toward him. He's familiar and yet so mysterious. Every time they seem to get closer, he's pulling away again.

Who is the Master of Ice, really, and why does he remind her so much of the faceless man in the dreams she's had all her life?


-----

Zane Julien X Reader]

[CONTAINS MATURE LANGUAGE]

title: Wild Love The Vet Visit
description:
Madeliene, a wolf-shifter with a strong spirit, finds herself facing her biggest challenge yet: a trip to the vet. With her pack in tow, and a hefty dose of reluctant bravery, she navigates a day full of hilarious chaos and heartwarming moments. Follow Madeliene, Mattias, Aurea, Gabriel, and Aunt Catherine as they deal with the antics of a very unwilling wolf in "Wild Love: The Vet Visit," a humorous short story from the Wild Love Series. Perfect for fans of lighthearted supernatural adventures, this story brings together the charm of animal shifters and the bond of family.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: This journey began back in September when I started university to pursue a bachelor's in theology. Facing challenges with a sensory processing disorder, a writing disability, and a learning disability, I was advised to practice daily writing to improve my skills for academic essays and discussions. Initially unsure of what to write each day, inspiration struck me after binge-watching a terrible, lacklustre Netflix series based on a book series while enjoying a pepperoni pizza. After finishing the last episode, a thought suddenly sparked in my mind. "Yeah, I could totally create something better," I mused internally without realizing what I was about to walk myself into.

title: My Husband: The Devil
description:
Joo Ree-Ha has been considered strange ever since she was a little girl. She spends a lot of time alone. She is interested in things no one else is. She often gets looked down on for being different. One day she crosses into a dark alley and sees a dark figure eating rodents alive. She escapes and tells people what she had seen, but nobody believes her. Ever since then, she sees the dark figure everywhere. Over and over again. She desperately tries to warn everyone, but people only call her crazy. So she goes back to the alley in search of the dark figure to find proof of what she's seen. The next thing she knows, she wakes up in the underworld, a place unknown to anyone. Unless you were dead, that is. She learns that she is not only a prisoner, but she is engaged to none other than the devil's spawn himself. Will Ree-Ha escape her dark and cruel fate, or will an unlikely romance spark between her and her abductor first.....?

title: Omens (wattys2016)
description:
"I am too busy staring into those eyes, the ones that have been haunting my nightmares for the last seven years. The same eyes that watched me from the corner of a darkened room as I slowly accepted that I had bled to death."

Technically she was for a few minutes before paramedics were able to revive her. Now, seven years later, Omera struggles to keep her life from falling apart. All she wants to be a normal teen. But life has other plans for her as she encounters a boy who will pull her so far into his world...she might not make it out alive.

"Veil of Shadows: A Legacy of Darkness"

Seraphina has always been different-an outcast. When her search for her missing mother collides with the alluring yet dangerous Livius Varro, their electric connection becomes both a blessing and a curse.

title: Moon Lovers ✓
description:
"Ouchh!" I winced in pain, struggling to get back on my feet. Squatting beside me, he stared at me in a ridiculous way before grabbing me by the neck. 

"Your scent, you're the one," he claimed, pushing away my head angrily. My body shrank in fear and my legs trembling from anxiety. "Why do you always say that? I don't know you. Leave me alone!" 

 Staring at him closely, his face seemed pale, young and a bit old at the same time. He moved closer to me with the speed of bolt which no normal human possesses. 

"That's what you think." He touched my face admiring it while I turned my face away in disgust. His dilated eyes rolled, turned red and his teeth clenched out and gradually moved his mouth towards my neck.

title: Kiss of Shadows [Claiming Series, #4]
description:
A vampire mage and a modern cop team up to battle evil magic... 

When police sergeant Caro Harrington witnesses a man being killed by an invisible assailant, she suspects a detective agency with a reputation for solving "weird cases" might be her only hope. Especially now that she senses someone has been watching her ever since she saw the murder. But when Caro walks in the door, her own uncanny skills tell her these aren't ordinary men...especially Iain Keller, who, surprisingly enough, is the first person to believe her. 

Once a Persian mage, Iain is drawn to Caro in a way that no woman has ever attracted him. The magic glimmering within this mortal witch calls to his own, and the need to possess Caro drives him, until it's all-consuming. The vampire can fight it...or he can save her, teach her and damn himself.

description:
𝑵𝒆𝒗𝒆𝒓 𝒕𝒓𝒖𝒔𝒕 𝒂 𝒔𝒕𝒓𝒂𝒏𝒈𝒆𝒓. 𝑬𝒔𝒑𝒆𝒄𝒊𝒂𝒍𝒍𝒚 𝒐𝒏𝒆 𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝒆𝒙𝒕𝒓𝒆𝒎𝒆𝒍𝒚 𝒔𝒆𝒅𝒖𝒄𝒕𝒊𝒗𝒆 𝒆𝒚𝒆𝒔.






I heard the water drip from a tap nearby as I jumped from one step of the stairs to another.

Something blocked my view like a fog. Well, it was a fog. It blurred my vision until I missed my step and twisted my ankle.

I fell but the sound echoed in this hollow basement wasn't mine "Hello?"

A hiss of wind swirls past me and I whipped my head away "Who's there??" 

Suddenly someone was behind me, his hand secured on my throat "You're very own soul reaper" and I already knew who it was.

Not by the voice but the cold touch of his skin.

༺𑁍༻

𝑲𝑬𝑳𝑳𝒀 𝑵𝑶𝑹𝑽𝑰𝑪𝑬, a part time working student at a veterinary clinic. Living in the most authentic city, Chicago, it sure was a dream come true for her. Until it turned out to be her worst nightmare of all.

𝑭𝑬𝑳𝑰𝑿 𝑫𝑶𝑹𝑽𝑨𝑹𝑰𝑺, popular by his nickname Felix the Hunter of Hunter. An A grade detective staying in Chicago to solve a reckless mistake made by his superiors. When in the process his fate clashes with a new stranger. 

The rest of the story is a myth or is it?

༺𑁍༻
Vampire x Human

title: From Actor to Healer: Alan Rickman's New Life as a Spirit Guide, Book 1
description:
You can communicate with the spirit of Alan Rickman right now...Best known for his roles in Harry Potter, Die Hard, and Robin Hood, acclaimed British actor Alan Rickman died of cancer in 2016. After making contact with Alan hours after his passing, spiritual healer Sonya White Jaguar later taught him how to perform Reiki and unwittingly helped him to cross over to the next dimension. An unprecedented partnership followed. Now working across dimensions as a teacher and healer, Alan helped Sonya to overcome her grief from the death of her parents to cancer. He has also given Reiki treatments to Sonya and her friends. Alan wants to work with you in a similar fashion...if you're ready.

"I found the author's adventures with the spirit of Alan Rickman to be compelling and inspiring. Many important healing lessons are found within this book. Thank you for sharing the essential truths of our souls continuance after death and that we all have guides we can develop a loving and healing relationship with! A truly wonderful book!" Patricia Doyle, bestselling author of The Secret Second Coming: What If the Church Got It Wrong

"A fascinating and inspiring tale! After reading it, I came away with a sense of hope and peace. I've been an Alan Rickman fan for years which made this story even more enjoyable. As well as being a good read, it's a learning tool. It has many practical instructions you can use to connect with Alan (or others). This book helped me to challenge my fear and reach out to contact the other side." T.B., Reiki Level II Practitioner

"This book was such an incredible gift to read. I strongly believe this book will help people a lot. For me, it realigned my ideas about the afterlife, higher dimensions, and my own soul. It's given me a lot to chew on and I love that. This is also a very informative book about the nuts and bolts of Reiki. People who are familiar with Reiki will get a lot out of this that will improve their practice." L.H., Reiki Master
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Sonya White Jaguar is a spiritual healer and mystical romance author.

She works closely with spirit guides who assist her. Her main guide is Alan Rickman, an acclaimed British actor who died of cancer in 2016. After making contact with Alan hours after his passing, Sonya later taught him how to perform Reiki and unwittingly helped him to cross over to the next dimension. Her account is documented in her free books here on Wattpad.

Now working as a teacher and healer, Alan performs spiritual healing on Sonya's behalf and guides her writing. In 2022, Alan asked Sonya to begin sharing her spiritual experiences publicly for free. Alan is a powerful, generous spirit guide who is available to help anyone.

More books are coming, including channeled commentaries from Alan, romance fiction, and more! Follow Sonya here on Wattpad to receive updates.

Subscribe to the free White Jaguar Newsletter and you'll receive two emails a month with inspirational messages from Alan, an exclusive sneak peek at Sonya's books in progress, video announcements, and more:
https://sonyawhitejaguar.com

Sonya's YouTube channel has 50+ educational videos to help you develop your intuition and clairvoyance, work with spirit guides like Alan, and use spiritual tools like crystals and pendulums. There are also many channeled messages from Alan. Two videos are released a month. Subscribe to her channel and you'll be alerted when new videos drop:
https://www.youtube.com/@sonyawhitejaguar

A death note was found on a boy after he died. The question is, who wrote it and why?

Evelyn Matthews and her highschool classmates go camping in the forest with their teacher. Their campsite gets destroyed, their teacher disappears, and they can't seem to find their way out. They are left with no other option but to stay in a haunted house in the middle of the forest.

title: Blade
description:
Rachel Brown lost all connection to spirituality the day her brother died and her mother became a victim of paralysis... Or so she thought.
Six years later, she is still battling against the forces that threaten to tear her life apart. They are succeeding, slowly stealing everything she holds dear: her mother, her familial relationships, even her sanity... But that is not the worst thing they've stolen.
In her ignorance, Rachel does not realize that she has lost the one Being that can save her from all her troubles, the same Being she had renounced, blaming Him for her predicament.
Will she be able to retrace her steps before it is too late?
And who is this new teacher who has taken a suspicious interest in her?
Is he the final hit that upends her life?
Or is he the stairway to the Solution she had lost?
Get ready to meet the Solution within the pages of this story, as He leads you through a journey of love and self-discovery.

authorBio:
Once upon a time,a little girl was born😊.She was God's very own daughter,still is. Her parents knew her significance and named her just that...Tioluwanimi:I belong to God. Yep. That's right. It's me. As God's own daughter, I knew I had a purpose. For several years, I struggled to find this purpose. Was it in music? No. Art? No. Dance...? Definitely not. 😅 I finally found out this purpose when God gave me this bible passage: "And how can the message be proclaimed if the messengers are not sent out? As the scripture says, "How wonderful is the coming of messengers who bring good news!" I was to be this messenger, a harbinger of good news to the lost, to those seeking peace and solace. I am God's very own, His beloved daughter sent just like Jesus was, to be His messenger, a light in the darkness of this world. A light whose writing is the instrument of illumination. Yes. That is who I am. I am Yah's beloved harbinger, a Christian writer,and there are so many great works yet to come.

You can contact me on Whatsapp here: +234 7018186313

title: True Nature
description:
My breath caught in my throat. This couldn't be happening. My head was screaming at me to move but my feet felt frozen to the ground as my skin broke out in a cold sweat. I couldn't take my eyes off of Tessa who like me was frozen in place, her face etched in fear.  Her aggressor growled at her, glaring at my best friend who kept her eyes religiously on the muck at her feet. 

"I said tell me your name" the voice brought chills down my back.

"T-Tessa" she whispered.

Her shaky voice finally snapped me out of it, my feet listening to my brain and stumbling forward...

_______________________________

Ivy is a young woman who has bared the burden of knowing she is different from her pack members since she was young. Rather than face her differences she decides to hide away from them, and her pack, doing all that she can to avoid drawing attention to herself. That is, until he arrives to ruin everything.

An extremely powerful Alpha, Tobias Black reluctantly agrees to attend the annual pack meeting. Dreading the amount of female attention he will receive as an unmated alpha, he intends to stay only a few days before returning home. The last thing he expected however, was to meet her.

title: Sin (Wattys Winner)
description:
On the flip of a coin, people die around Sin. Escaped from a lunatic asylum and haunted by his dead sister, he must find out why, and discover who is trying to use his power to destroy everything and everyone.

*****

Dead, dead, dead.  Say it enough times and it becomes just another word.
    
What would you do? Could you kill a killer? Does the death of one appease the deaths of a hundred? What about that hundred against a thousand?
    
What if you had no choice?
    
Meet Sin. No, not that sort of sin, but Sin, crazy as a loon (you ask Sister Moon), and proud of it. Sin locks himself away in an asylum and, every so often, badboy he's believed to be, gets violent. That's only so they'll give him those nice drugs, though. The ones that help him forget.
    
It's a pity they don't work.
    
Sin, you see, has a serious problem. Well, it's not so much his problem, as ours - yours, mine and everyone else's. People die around Sin.  He doesn't like it and there's nothing he can do about it.  But someone else knows, and Sin has to stop them... and himself...
    
Flip and catch...
    
--

WATTY WINNER!!

Includes a special BONUS CHAPTER commissioned for Amazon Prime's Panic, and bonus chapters set in Sin's asylum!

authorBio:
Though I love to write fantasy I'm very choosy of the fantasy I read. Simply because it so often doesn't hit the spot for me. That's why it occurred to me that I should have a go at writing the story I want to read. And I did ;D

The trilogy is completed and available at all ebook stores. If you want to buy a copy of one, or all three books, pop to my personal bookstore https://nicolemacdonald-author.mailerpage.io/bookstore

Books two and three are available in eformat at all good e-retailers including itunes, Barnes & Noble, Amazon, and Smashwords

If you would like to buy The Arrival in paperback, you now can! It's available through Amazon/Book Depository/Barnes & Noble and other online retailers.

An FYI for leaving comments; Rude/snippy comments will be deleted and the user reported. If you have a question then message me, don't just pop it in the comments. Writing is a hobby, I have a fulltime job so I don't have time to check them all.

title: Hysteria
description:
When a virus turns people into flesh hungry zombies, the survivors must band together in any hope of escape. Only this virus is man-made and the perpetrators, Cambers, are planning to destroy the planet taking only the strongest and smartest with them.
One year after the outbreak America is all but fallen, the rest of the world fights to keep the virus from their shores but when it appears in Britain the country is totally unprepared, it seems history will repeat itself.
A mass evacuation occurs though many won't make it out of the country. Volunteers are drafted in to help the overwhelmed army but all are unprepared for the drama ahead.
As Brooke and her friends follow the crowd heading for the ports they encounter old faces and new. They soon discover the true horror of their situation and that no one is coming to save them, they are truly on their own.
Will Brooke choose to stay and fight or turn and run?

authorBio:
Why hello there lovely!

Welcome to my profile, if you've stumbled upon this blurb then I suppose you're looking for additional information. However, I'm not particularly good at biographies. You can find things I do enjoy writing though, over that way. --->

-------

If you are a returning follower, you'll notice a few changes. I previously used to write under a pen name and have now opted to use my real name. Hi, how's it going?

Any stories that were previously ongoing have now been unpublished. This is simply because so much time has lapsed between their initial conception and now, that I no longer think I could continue those stories without re-writing them completely.

I have kept up the completed fanfictions that people seem to enjoy - Lost and Found and On Borrowed Time. However, this series is destined, I think, to remain a duology. Please do not expect updates for this series at this time.

-------

From here on I intend to post mostly original fiction, however, I will still, as previously, try to post weekly update schedules.


Thanks for stopping by!

title: Zeus (The God Chronicles #1)
description:
Sometimes, even the gods can't change their fate... 

Vegas is not where Karly had imagined herself to be at this point in her life.She was supposed to be living in California, soaking up the sun and enjoying the life of an artist. Instead, she's just moving out of her parent's house and going to a school that could loosely be called her second choice. When she meets Zeus Drakos, owner of the new hit casino and resort in town, he seems just like every other jerk guy out there. How was she supposed to know who he really was?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Kamery is not the person who grew up dreaming of the day that she would clutch her very own novel to her chest, tears brimming over the rims of her eyes as she thought about how she'd written it herself, finally! In fact, anything remotely like that didn't even happen until she was actually holding her first book in her hand, amazed that she'd written it and wondering how on Earth she'd managed to do it when it hadn't ever occurred to her to write one until months before. Surprisingly, though, it was just what she never realized she loved doing.

When starting out in life, Kamery had (and still has) big dreams to perform on Broadway. She loves music and acting very much, while she and dance have a love/hate relationship; she would love to do it and every form of dance decides it hates that about her, haha! The one constant she always had between the performing world and the book world were the stories, tales that transported her to other worlds and made her feel like she really could do anything. Finally, she decided she wanted to do that for someone else and sat down to write.

It's been a few years since she held that first book, realizing that she really liked writing and wanted to do more, but the love that blossomed in that moment has only grown. Currently, Kamery works from home in  Arizona, while taking care of her two adorable kids, a girl and a boy, and talking her sweet husband Jake's ear off about the insane amount of characters in her head who are ready to fight to the death for a chance at their own novels.  It truly is a wonderful life!

title: Boon: Book 7

authorBio: I ghostwrite as well as write my own books to help put food on the table, and when no one is looking I write fanfiction. >.> Usually under the name of Lowefantasy. Darkness x MC // Mostly Darkness POV // Duskwood mobile game fanfiction // the story is not very related to the game's plot.

title: Malefic - Afterlife #1 (Sunday Updates)
description:
Do you believe in the supernatural?

I didn't. Not until I died. I was ten when I was clinically dead for twenty minutes. But I didn't come back alone. Damien, a demon, came back with me. 

It's been seven years. I hate him. The feeling is mutual.

He is beautiful and dangerous. He haunts my every moment. His mission, to return to me to where I belong. Hell. He will deceive, torment, seduce. Whatever it takes.

When I uncover the truth of who Damien is, it will blur the line between heaven and hell.

* Updates every Sunday. If you're too impatient to wait check out my Patreon to read the completed book. https://www.patreon.com/reganure

title: Black Butler: Book of Black (Red: Season 3) (FINISHED)
description:
"Mine. All mine. You're mine."
"I am yours, yes... no matter how irritating you are every second of my life."
Sebastian smiled then, eyes glowing a bright red. "You admitted it, master."
"Shut it."
*****
Another task of Yumi unwinds when she invites a select few guests over with a cruise party, but when Sebastian is miraculously attacked one night, Yumi must find the culprit of his "murder." All while someone dark helps her in the shadows, another menacing presence.
"Master..." Sebastian said in amusement,  "did you really think it would be that easy to rid of me?"
"I hoped."
He stared at me for a moment.
"Master... were you crying?"
Sniffs. "No."
"Awww, that's adorable. You were grieving me."
"Shut up. I wasn't."
"You're a very bad liar. Especially knowing that last night you thought I was asleep, and you unbuttoned my shirt and snuggled with my chest. Were you really that cold?"
"I don't know what you're talking about."
"Mmm." He caught my chin and leaned forward, face inches from mine as I stared up at his demonic grin. "Liar."

******this is season three of my main fanfiction "red"****

title: The Wars In Hephaestus (Book: 1- A Love Acquitted)
description:
"Zeus!!!!!!!!", Hephaestus cries as he storms into throne room.
"What is it my son?", The Great King of The Gods and Father of men Zeus asks.
"I want to divorce my wife Aphrodite", says Hephaestus as he tries to bring his anger under control.

Zeus looks upon his son Forger of The Gods and creator of his beloved Master Bolt and all other weaponry on Mount Olympus, cocks an eyebrow while he searches his sons face, he thinks as his shocking light blue eyes stare into the depths of his son's dark hazel brown ones, "This day should have come long ago. Hephaestus may not be the most beautiful or in godly terms beautiful at all but he is the purest of heart among us except for that accursed God of Honesty who couldn't lie to Hera for me. She was sore vexed when she learn of yet another affair (frown). Hephaestus thou is my complete opposite always loyal to his wife, so what could one have done to create such a stir in my beloved childs mind". 

"What did she do this time", Zeus finally says.

title: Valentine III.
description:
Grand Finale of the Valentine series.

***************

"Though what you say may be true... Though you may have read through me and tainted my hands, It's still quite important that you know one more thing..." 
I begin, shifting slightly in my chair to release some of the tension in my shoulders.

"That if ever given the choice..." I continue, slowly.

His brow piques up in curiosity as he listens.

"I would still find much greater pleasure in killing you, than fucking you" I breathe finally looking up from my plate and fastening my glare to his fiery gaze. 

My grip around the silver table knife tightens to reinforce my statement.


"Is that right?" breathes Hades in response...

***************


Trigger warnings. Mature content. Read with extreme caution.

title: My Alchemist (the Mythical Zawgyi of Myanmar) Book I
description:
🚨Still on editing with minor changes🚨---

Myths are just stories and folklore are just gossip. Well, that's what people usually believe, until Rose became entangled with her mysterious boss. Arrogant, handsome and condescending, her young boss is everything but easy to please, and while she tries her best to do her job, she learnt that there's more than 'FATE' that brought them together in this lifetime. 

#Who is this mysterious man and what truly lies between their fate?

#Is there such thing as a previous life? 

#Will their love stand against all odds?

#Is there really any happily ever afters when one of you is everything..... but human? 


Hello !!
Auroral here...

This is my original story  based on mythical legends of Myanmar.
So, please take note to absolutely restraint from copying or plagiarising my work.
Any unauthorised publication of my original material or translating the contents are also prohibited.
I'm a new writer and since English is not my mother language, I do like to apologise in advance for some grammar or usage mistakes. 
I promise I will learn to get better in my future books. 
Love... constructive criticism so, never hesitate to leave comments or suggestions for me. 
I'm always looking forward to hear from my readers. 

Xoxo, 
Auroral

Hunted by council for practicing dark magic, she is certain she's been wrongfully accused. She flees, and is forced to rely on strangers for protection. But the farther she strays from home, the more her magic and forgotten memories return and she begins to suspect all is not as it seems.

title: The Tragedy of Eden's Gate
description:
When a dark situation leads Theo to the quiet village of Eden's Gate, where the residents are odd and the pool of friends severely lacking, he's less than thrilled. The town is a miserable means to an end. And, to make matters even worse, he's pretty sure the house is haunted. Cold spots, flickering lights, a shadow that won't stop following him- a recipe for a haunting, and for a complete disaster.

Sam is a vengeful spirit, cursed to walk the halls of his own murder scene for the rest of eternity, doomed to an afterlife of dismal solitude. And then his favourite resident goes and dies, the house is given to new people, and Sam discovers - quite by accident - that the boy sleeping in his room can see him. 

And he is the only one who can help Sam solve his murder. 

- Open Novella Contest 2023 -
Prompt 23: "They were not real, everyone told me they were not real. But why are they here? Why are they trying to talk to me? Why are they calling me the ONE? Why are they staring at me like that?"

───── • ⋆⋅⛧⋅⋆ • ─────
Status: Complete
Story length: 40,000 words

Disclaimer: this story contains themes that some readers may find distressing relating to death and mention of domestic abuse.

title: Rejected
description:
Rejection. It's exactly what Aaron Taylor did to me. I mean what did I expect? He is the soon to be Alpha of the Dark Shadows Pack. And me? I'm the Omega of the pack.

Why did the moon goddess ever pick me, Kiana Marie Mikaelson, to be mates with the player of all players, Aaron Drew Taylor?

After all the Rejection, and what Aaron found out making him hate me, I couldn't take it and I left. I became a Rogue. OK, sure I didn't exactly leave on my own, Aaron kicked me out of the pack but sure, I'm just glad I left.

I stumbled onto a unfamiliar territory and regret it as soon as I did,because soon after I was accepted into the pack I became the Omega for the Red Moon Pack.

After even more torture with the Red Moon Pack, I finally escape to stumble stupidly across another pack territory. Cursing myself on my way to the Alpha's office, I then get the surprise of my lifetime...

BY THE WAY SOMETHING IS WRONG WITH WATTPAD FOR THIS BOOK, IT SAYS THAT THERE IS LESS PAGES THEN THERE ACTUALLY IS

**** IF YOU HAVE A PROBLEM WITH BAD GRAMMAR OR SPELLING ERRORS, DON'T READ MY BOOK, I'M ONE OF THOSE LAZY WRITERS THAT WRITES IT BUT DOESN'T LIKE TO EDIT SO IF YOU HAVE A PROBLEM IF I DON'T EDIT IT RIGHT AWAY THEN PLEASE DON'T READ IT, IF YOU DON'T CARE ABOUT THAT STUFF PLEASE READ MY BOOK AND GIVE ME YOUR OPINION AND ADVICE****
Tous Droits Réservés

authorBio:
So since I keep getting messages about this I figured I would make a PSA.
I am always open to new reading suggestions. If I enjoy the book I will include it in one of my recommendation books.
With that said, I will not be including any incomplete or discontinued books in my recommendation books. (So please do not message me about books that fall into these categories. I will no longer be responding if you message me about an incomplete book.)
Also, I am happy to help in finding a book that you lost, but I recommend writing a comment on one of my books - as more people would likely see your message and hopefully one of them can assist in finding the missing book. The author note in my first book has become a place where many people have left comments asking for help, so feel free to ask about yours there too.

Happy Reading!


**My original boyxboy recommendation book has been removed for revisions and updates.**

title: Airel: The Awakening (Airel Saga Book One)
description:
NEW YORK TIMES and USA TODAY Bestseller
Top #10 Amazon Bestseller
#1 Barnes & Noble Bestseller
Top #10 Bestseller on iTunes, and Kobo


"Move over Twilight! Here comes Aaron Patterson!"
--Joshua Graham, bestselling author of Beyond Justice and Darkroom

"I was surprised by how much I really, really liked this book. I have not jumped on the whole "fallen angel" bandwagon, just as I didn't jump on all of the vampire stories that came out after Twilight. This is not your typical fallen angel story. It is one that has left me breathlessly waiting for the next one in the series. Hurry up please!!!"
--Sandra Stiles

BOOK DESCRIPTION:
All Airel wanted was to be normal...

She seems like an average 17-year-old in the anonymous
little city of Boise, Idaho: Airel. But those untroubled days are soon to end,
and the change she undergoes will be so radical she will wonder if it wasn't
all an illusion to begin with. Pursued ferociously, relentlessly by an ancient enemy
in the deepest darkness, now she will have to learn how to fight for her life.
And all because of who she is, because of her lineage. Because of this she will
never have what she wants most: she will never be normal.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Serpent's Kiss || Kingdom at the End of the World - Book I
description:
When a storm strands Ira Hale at the stately Beaufort Manor, she joins the household to work under the mysterious and reclusive Valeri Beaufort, but what secrets are lurking in the shadows?

***

Ira Hale joins the Beaufort household under the employ of Beaufort Manor's mysterious master, Sir Valeri Beaufort. She soon comes to care for the reclusive noble and his haunted home. When a series of gruesome murders in a nearby town expose Sir Beaufort as a vampire, both the town and Beaufort Manor fall under the scrutiny of a ruthless police force known as the Amith Capil. In a world where monsters walk among humans, the true killer hides in plain sight.

***

Book I of Kingdom at the End of the World series.

2021 Watty Winner in Horror

***
Content warning: This story contains graphic depictions of violence and death.
Tous Droits Réservés
